FILE: backups/pre-supabase-realtime/QuoteBoardTab.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import {
  FileText,
  RefreshCw,
  Search,
  DollarSign,
  MapPin,
  Truck,
  Calendar,
  Loader2,
  ArrowRight,
  Users,
  Weight,
} from "lucide-react";

// ============================================================
// Types
// ============================================================

interface LoadInfo {
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  miles: number | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
}

interface QuoteBoardLoad {
  load_id: string;
  quote_count: number;
  latest_activity: string;
  best_rate: number | null;
  outbound_count: number;
  load_info: LoadInfo | null;
  quotes: { source: string; status: string; is_known: boolean }[];
}

type SyncStage = null | "syncing_vapi" | "loading_board" | "done";

// ============================================================
// Helpers
// ============================================================

function formatRoute(info: LoadInfo): string {
  const origin = [info.origin_city, info.origin_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
  const dest = [info.dest_city, info.dest_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
  if (origin && dest) return `${origin} → ${dest}`;
  if (origin) return origin;
  if (dest) return `→ ${dest}`;
  return "";
}

function formatPickupDay(dateStr: string): string {
  const d = new Date(dateStr);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return dateStr;
  const now = new Date();
  const diffDays = Math.round((d.getTime() - now.getTime()) / 86400000);
  if (diffDays === 0) return "Today";
  if (diffDays === 1) return "Tomorrow";
  if (diffDays === -1) return "Yesterday";
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

function formatWeight(lbs: number): string {
  if (lbs >= 1000) return `${(lbs / 1000).toFixed(lbs % 1000 === 0 ? 0 : 1)}k lbs`;
  return `${lbs.toLocaleString()} lbs`;
}

function relativeTime(iso: string): string {
  const d = new Date(iso);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return iso;
  const diffMs = Date.now() - d.getTime();
  const mins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
  if (mins < 1) return "just now";
  if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
  const hours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
  const days = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`;
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

const STAGE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  syncing_vapi: "Analyzing VAPI calls...",
  loading_board: "Loading quote board...",
  done: "Done!",
};

// ============================================================
// Component
// ============================================================

export function QuoteBoardTab() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [loads, setLoads] = useState<QuoteBoardLoad[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [userName, setUserName] = useState("");
  const [syncStage, setSyncStage] = useState<SyncStage>(null);
  const [syncSummary, setSyncSummary] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [period, setPeriod] = useState<"today" | "week">("today");
  const [loadingMore, setLoadingMore] = useState(false);
  const intervalRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);
  const doneTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);

  const fetchBoard = useCallback(async (silent = false, overridePeriod?: "today" | "week") => {
    const usePeriod = overridePeriod || period;
    if (!silent) setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    if (!silent) {
      setSyncSummary(null);
      setSyncStage("syncing_vapi");
    }

    // Always run VAPI sync — both manual and auto-refresh
    try {
      const syncRes = await fetch("/api/quote-board/sync", { method: "POST" });
      if (syncRes.ok) {
        const syncData = await syncRes.json();
        const v = syncData.vapi;
        if (v?.error) {
          console.warn("[QuoteBoard] VAPI sync error:", v.error);
        }
        if (v?.calls_processed > 0) {
          console.log(`[QuoteBoard] Synced ${v.new_extractions} new calls (${v.calls_processed} processed, ${v.total_calls_fetched} total, ${v.skipped_existing} existing)`);
          if (!silent) {
            setSyncSummary(`${v.new_extractions} new call${v.new_extractions !== 1 ? "s" : ""} processed`);
          }
        } else {
          console.log(`[QuoteBoard] No new VAPI calls (${v?.total_calls_fetched || 0} total, ${v?.skipped_existing || 0} existing)`);
        }
      } else {
        console.error("[QuoteBoard] Sync endpoint returned", syncRes.status);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[QuoteBoard] Sync fetch failed:", err);
    }

    if (!silent) {
      setSyncStage("loading_board");
    }

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/quote-board", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ period: usePeriod }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch quote board");
      const json = await res.json();
      setLoads(json.loads || []);
      if (json.user_name) setUserName(json.user_name);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
      if (!silent) {
        setSyncStage("done");
        // Clear "done" after 3 seconds
        if (doneTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(doneTimerRef.current);
        doneTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
          setSyncStage(null);
          setSyncSummary(null);
        }, 3000);
      }
    }
  }, [period]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchBoard();
    intervalRef.current = setInterval(() => fetchBoard(true), 30000);
    return () => {
      if (intervalRef.current) clearInterval(intervalRef.current);
      if (doneTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(doneTimerRef.current);
    };
  }, [fetchBoard]);

  const handleViewMore = async () => {
    setLoadingMore(true);
    setPeriod("week");
    await fetchBoard(false, "week");
    setLoadingMore(false);
  };

  const handleViewToday = async () => {
    setPeriod("today");
    await fetchBoard(false, "today");
  };

  const filteredLoads = search.trim()
    ? loads.filter((l) =>
        l.load_id.toLowerCase().includes(search.trim().toLowerCase())
      )
    : loads;

  const isRefreshing = syncStage === "syncing_vapi" || syncStage === "loading_board";

  // ============================================================
  // Render
  // ============================================================

  if (loading && loads.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        {Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="border rounded-xl p-5 space-y-3">
            <Skeleton className="h-5 w-48" />
            <Skeleton className="h-4 w-32" />
            <Skeleton className="h-4 w-40" />
            <Skeleton className="h-8 w-full rounded-lg" />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-5">
      {/* Toolbar */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="relative max-w-xs flex-1">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <Input
              className="pl-9 h-9 text-sm"
              placeholder="Filter by order number..."
              value={search}
              onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
            {filteredLoads.length} load{filteredLoads.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} {period === "today" ? "today" : "this week"}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          {/* Progress indicator */}
          {syncStage && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              {isRefreshing && (
                <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div
                    className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full transition-all duration-500"
                    style={{
                      width: syncStage === "syncing_vapi" ? "40%" : "80%",
                    }}
                  />
                </div>
              )}
              {syncStage === "done" && (
                <div className="w-24 h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="h-full bg-green-500 rounded-full w-full" />
                </div>
              )}
              <span className="whitespace-nowrap">
                {syncStage === "done" && syncSummary
                  ? syncSummary
                  : STAGE_LABELS[syncStage] || ""}
              </span>
            </div>
          )}

          <Button
            variant="outline"
            size="sm"
            className="gap-2 h-9"
            onClick={() => fetchBoard()}
            disabled={isRefreshing}
          >
            {isRefreshing ? (
              <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
            ) : (
              <RefreshCw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            )}
            Refresh
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty state */}
      {!loading && filteredLoads.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
          <FileText className="h-12 w-12 mb-3 opacity-40" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">
            {search
              ? `No loads match "${search}"`
              : period === "today"
                ? "No quotes today"
                : "No quotes yet"}
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">
            {search
              ? "Try a different order number"
              : "Carrier offers from emails, outbound campaigns, and VAPI calls will appear here"}
          </p>
          {!search && period === "today" && (
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              className="mt-4 gap-2"
              onClick={handleViewMore}
              disabled={loadingMore}
            >
              {loadingMore && <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />}
              View past 7 days
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Load cards grid */}
      {filteredLoads.length > 0 && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {filteredLoads.map((load) => {
            const info = load.load_info;
            const route = info ? formatRoute(info) : "";
            const newCount = load.quotes.filter((q) => !q.is_known).length;
            const hasAccepted = load.quotes.some((q) => q.status === "accepted");
            const negotiatingCount = load.quotes.filter((q) => q.status === "negotiating").length;

            return (
              <button
                key={load.load_id}
                type="button"
                className="border rounded-xl p-5 text-left hover:border-primary/40 hover:shadow-md transition-all group cursor-pointer"
                onClick={() => router.push(`/quote-board/${load.load_id}`)}
              >
                {/* Route header */}
                {route ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm font-semibold mb-1">
                    <MapPin className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-primary shrink-0" />
                    <span className="truncate">{route}</span>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="text-sm font-semibold mb-1 font-mono text-primary">
                    Load #{load.load_id}
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Load details line */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground flex-wrap mb-3">
                  {info?.weight_lbs && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <Weight className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {formatWeight(info.weight_lbs)}
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {info?.equipment_type && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <Truck className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {info.equipment_type}
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {info?.pickup_date && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <Calendar className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {formatPickupDay(info.pickup_date)} pickup
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {info?.miles && (
                    <span>{info.miles.toLocaleString()} mi</span>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Outbound summary */}
                {load.outbound_count > 0 && userName && (
                  <p className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground mb-3">
                    AI emailed {load.outbound_count} carrier{load.outbound_count !== 1 ? "s" : ""} as {userName}
                  </p>
                )}

                {/* Stats row */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[10px] gap-1">
                      <Users className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {load.quote_count} carrier{load.quote_count !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
                    </Badge>
                    {newCount > 0 && (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px] bg-violet-50 text-violet-600 border-violet-300">
                        {newCount} new
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                    {hasAccepted && (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px] bg-green-50 text-green-600 border-green-300">
                        Accepted
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                    {negotiatingCount > 0 && !hasAccepted && (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px] bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border-amber-300">
                        {negotiatingCount} negotiating
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Bottom row: best rate + time + arrow */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    {load.best_rate != null && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 text-green-600 font-semibold text-sm font-mono">
                        <DollarSign className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        {load.best_rate.toLocaleString()}
                        <span className="text-[9px] font-normal text-muted-foreground ml-0.5">best</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {info?.shipper_rate != null && (
                      <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground font-mono">
                        Ship ${info.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                      {relativeTime(load.latest_activity)}
                    </span>
                    <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground group-hover:text-primary transition-colors" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* View More / Show Today toggle */}
      {!loading && !error && (
        <div className="flex justify-center pt-2">
          {period === "today" ? (
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="gap-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
              onClick={handleViewMore}
              disabled={loadingMore}
            >
              {loadingMore && <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />}
              View past 7 days
            </Button>
          ) : (
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="gap-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
              onClick={handleViewToday}
            >
              Show today only
            </Button>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: backups/pre-supabase-realtime/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import {
  vapiGetNegotiations,
  getOrder,
  type VapiNegotiation,
} from "@/lib/ttms/client";
// ============================================================
// Quote Board — Aggregation API
//
// Merges 3 sources into a single board grouped by order/load:
//   1. email_negotiations (inbound quotes + outbound offers)
//   2. Supplementary inbound emails (untracked rate quotes)
//   3. VAPI calls (persisted in vapi_call_extractions) +
//      VAPI negotiations (phone-based)
//
// VAPI sync is handled by /api/quote-board/sync (called
// separately by the frontend before this endpoint).
// This route is data-only — reads from DB, no AI calls.
// ============================================================

export const maxDuration = 60;

interface QuoteBoardQuote {
  source: "email" | "outbound" | "vapi_negotiation" | "vapi_call";
  identifier: string;
  display_name: string;
  latest_rate: number | null;
  status: string;
  round_count: number;
  is_known: boolean;
  carrier_id: string | null;
  mc_number: string | null;
  last_activity: string;
}

interface LoadInfo {
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  miles: number | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
}

interface QuoteBoardLoad {
  load_id: string;
  quote_count: number;
  latest_activity: string;
  best_rate: number | null;
  outbound_count: number;
  load_info: LoadInfo | null;
  quotes: QuoteBoardQuote[];
}

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    let body: { period?: string } = {};
    try { body = await req.json(); } catch { /* empty body is fine */ }

    const period = body.period || "today";
    const sinceDate = period === "today"
      ? new Date(new Date().setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)).toISOString()
      : new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();

    // Fetch user profile name
    const { data: profile } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("name, display_name")
      .eq("id", user.id)
      .single();
    const userName = profile?.name || profile?.display_name || "Agent";

    // --- Step 1: Fetch all sources in parallel from DB ---
    // VAPI sync is handled by /api/quote-board/sync (called by frontend first)
    const [negResult, emailsResult, vapiExtractionsResult, carriersResult] =
      await Promise.allSettled([
        // A) email_negotiations
        supabase
          .from("email_negotiations")
          .select("*")
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
          .gte("updated_at", sinceDate)
          .order("updated_at", { ascending: false }),

        // B) Supplementary inbound emails with rate intents
        supabase
          .from("emails")
          .select(
            "id, from_address, from_name, extracted_fields, detected_intent, received_at"
          )
          .eq("user_id", user.id)
          .in("detected_intent", [
            "carrier_rate_quote",
            "carrier_rate_counter",
          ])
          .gte("received_at", sinceDate)
          .order("received_at", { ascending: false }),

        // C) VAPI call extractions — persisted in Supabase, no live AI
        supabase
          .from("vapi_call_extractions")
          .select("*")
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
          .gte("call_started_at", sinceDate)
          .order("call_started_at", { ascending: false }),

        // D) All tenant carriers for identity resolution
        supabase
          .from("carriers")
          .select("id, name, email, phone, mc_number")
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id),
      ]);

    // Extract settled values
    const negotiations =
      negResult.status === "fulfilled" ? negResult.value.data || [] : [];
    const emails =
      emailsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? emailsResult.value.data || [] : [];
    const vapiExtractions =
      vapiExtractionsResult.status === "fulfilled"
        ? vapiExtractionsResult.value.data || []
        : [];
    const carriers =
      carriersResult.status === "fulfilled"
        ? carriersResult.value.data || []
        : [];

    // --- Step 3: Collect ALL order IDs from every source ---
    const orderIds = new Set<string>();
    for (const neg of negotiations) {
      if (neg.interested_order) orderIds.add(neg.interested_order);
    }
    for (const email of emails) {
      const fields = (email.extracted_fields || {}) as { load_id?: string };
      if (fields.load_id) orderIds.add(fields.load_id);
    }
    for (const ext of vapiExtractions) {
      if (ext.order_id) orderIds.add(ext.order_id);
    }

    // Fetch VAPI negotiations for ALL discovered order IDs (parallel, max 20)
    const orderIdList = Array.from(orderIds).slice(0, 20);
    const vapiNegResults = await Promise.allSettled(
      orderIdList.map((oid) => {
        const parsed = parseInt(oid, 10);
        if (isNaN(parsed)) return Promise.resolve({ data: [] as VapiNegotiation[] });
        return vapiGetNegotiations({ order_id: parsed, per_page: 50 }).catch(() => ({
          data: [] as VapiNegotiation[],
          meta: { current_page: 1, from: 0, last_page: 1, per_page: 50, to: 0, total: 0 },
        }));
      })
    );
    const vapiNegs: VapiNegotiation[] = [];
    for (const r of vapiNegResults) {
      if (r.status === "fulfilled") {
        const data = (r.value as { data: VapiNegotiation[] }).data || [];
        vapiNegs.push(...data);
      }
    }

    // --- Step 4: Build carrier lookup maps ---
    const carrierByEmail = new Map<string, (typeof carriers)[0]>();
    const carrierByPhone = new Map<string, (typeof carriers)[0]>();
    for (const c of carriers) {
      if (c.email) carrierByEmail.set(c.email.toLowerCase(), c);
      if (c.phone) {
        const digits = c.phone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
        if (digits.length >= 7) carrierByPhone.set(digits, c);
      }
    }

    // --- Step 4b: Fetch TTMS order details + enrich carrier maps with past_carriers ---
    const allOrderIds = Array.from(orderIds);
    const loadInfoMap = new Map<string, LoadInfo>();
    const numericOrderIds = allOrderIds.filter((id) => /^\d+$/.test(id));

    for (let i = 0; i < numericOrderIds.length; i += 10) {
      const batch = numericOrderIds.slice(i, i + 10);
      const batchResults = await Promise.allSettled(
        batch.map((id) => getOrder(parseInt(id, 10)).catch(() => null))
      );
      for (let j = 0; j < batch.length; j++) {
        const r = batchResults[j];
        if (r.status !== "fulfilled" || !r.value?.data) continue;

        const o = r.value.data;
        loadInfoMap.set(batch[j], {
          origin_city: o.shipfrom_city || null,
          origin_state: o.shipfrom_state || null,
          dest_city: o.shipto_city || null,
          dest_state: o.shipto_state || null,
          equipment_type: o.equipment_type || null,
          shipper_rate: o.total_charge || null,
          pickup_date: o.requested_pickup_date || null,
          delivery_date: o.requested_delivery_date || null,
          miles: o.total_miles || null,
          weight_lbs: o.total_weight || null,
        });

        // Enrich carrier lookup with past_carriers from TTMS
        const pastCarriers = (r.value as { past_carriers?: { carrier_name: string; carrier_email: string; carrier_mc: string; carrier_telephone: string }[] }).past_carriers || [];
        for (const pc of pastCarriers) {
          if (pc.carrier_email && !carrierByEmail.has(pc.carrier_email.toLowerCase())) {
            carrierByEmail.set(pc.carrier_email.toLowerCase(), {
              id: pc.carrier_email,
              name: pc.carrier_name,
              email: pc.carrier_email,
              phone: pc.carrier_telephone,
              mc_number: pc.carrier_mc,
            });
          }
          if (pc.carrier_telephone) {
            const digits = pc.carrier_telephone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
            if (digits.length >= 7 && !carrierByPhone.has(digits)) {
              carrierByPhone.set(digits, {
                id: pc.carrier_telephone,
                name: pc.carrier_name,
                email: pc.carrier_email,
                phone: pc.carrier_telephone,
                mc_number: pc.carrier_mc,
              });
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }

    function resolveCarrier(email?: string | null, phone?: string | null) {
      if (email) {
        const match = carrierByEmail.get(email.toLowerCase());
        if (match)
          return {
            is_known: true,
            carrier_id: match.id,
            display_name: match.name,
            mc_number: match.mc_number,
          };
      }
      if (phone) {
        const digits = phone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
        if (digits.length >= 7) {
          const match = carrierByPhone.get(digits);
          if (match)
            return {
              is_known: true,
              carrier_id: match.id,
              display_name: match.name,
              mc_number: match.mc_number,
            };
        }
      }
      return {
        is_known: false,
        carrier_id: null,
        display_name: email || phone || "Unknown",
        mc_number: null,
      };
    }

    // --- Step 5: Merge into load map ---
    const loadMap = new Map<string, QuoteBoardQuote[]>();

    function addQuote(loadId: string, quote: QuoteBoardQuote) {
      if (!loadId) return;
      const existing = loadMap.get(loadId) || [];
      existing.push(quote);
      loadMap.set(loadId, existing);
    }

    // Track which (sender, order) combos we've already added from negotiations
    const negKeys = new Set<string>();

    // A) email_negotiations
    for (const neg of negotiations) {
      const key = `${(neg.sender_email || "").toLowerCase()}::${neg.interested_order}`;
      negKeys.add(key);

      const carrier = resolveCarrier(neg.sender_email);
      const source =
        neg.intent === "outbound_offer" ? "outbound" : "email";

      addQuote(neg.interested_order, {
        source: source as "email" | "outbound",
        identifier: neg.sender_email || "",
        display_name: neg.sender_name || carrier.display_name,
        latest_rate:
          neg.last_negotiated_rate != null
            ? Number(neg.last_negotiated_rate)
            : null,
        status: neg.status || "open",
        round_count: neg.round_count || 0,
        is_known: carrier.is_known,
        carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
        mc_number: neg.mc_number || carrier.mc_number,
        last_activity: neg.updated_at || neg.created_at,
      });
    }

    // B) Supplementary emails not yet in negotiations
    for (const email of emails) {
      const fields = (email.extracted_fields || {}) as {
        load_id?: string;
        quoted_rate?: number;
      };
      const loadId = fields.load_id;
      if (!loadId) continue;

      const key = `${(email.from_address || "").toLowerCase()}::${loadId}`;
      if (negKeys.has(key)) continue; // already covered by negotiation

      const carrier = resolveCarrier(email.from_address);
      addQuote(loadId, {
        source: "email",
        identifier: email.from_address || "",
        display_name: email.from_name || carrier.display_name,
        latest_rate: fields.quoted_rate != null ? Number(fields.quoted_rate) : null,
        status: "quoted",
        round_count: 0,
        is_known: carrier.is_known,
        carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
        mc_number: carrier.mc_number,
        last_activity: email.received_at,
      });
    }

    // C) VAPI negotiations (structured data from TTMS API)
    for (const vn of vapiNegs) {
      const carrier = resolveCarrier(null, vn.phone_number);
      addQuote(String(vn.order_id), {
        source: "vapi_negotiation",
        identifier: vn.phone_number || "",
        display_name: carrier.display_name,
        latest_rate: vn.rate != null ? Number(vn.rate) : null,
        status: "negotiating",
        round_count: 0,
        is_known: carrier.is_known,
        carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
        mc_number: carrier.mc_number,
        last_activity: vn.created_at,
      });
    }

    // D) VAPI call extractions (from Supabase — AI-extracted, persisted)
    for (const ext of vapiExtractions) {
      if (!ext.order_id) continue;

      const phone = ext.phone_number || "";
      const carrier = resolveCarrier(null, phone);

      addQuote(ext.order_id, {
        source: "vapi_call",
        identifier: phone,
        display_name: carrier.display_name,
        latest_rate: ext.rate != null ? Number(ext.rate) : null,
        status: ext.status || "called",
        round_count: 0,
        is_known: carrier.is_known,
        carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
        mc_number: carrier.mc_number,
        last_activity: ext.call_started_at || ext.extracted_at,
      });
    }

    // --- Step 6: Build response ---

    // Filter out no-rate quotes (keep outbound + vapi_call even without rate)
    for (const [loadId, quotes] of loadMap) {
      const filtered = quotes.filter(
        (q) => q.latest_rate != null || q.source === "outbound" || q.source === "vapi_call"
      );
      if (filtered.length === 0) {
        loadMap.delete(loadId);
      } else {
        loadMap.set(loadId, filtered);
      }
    }

    const loads: QuoteBoardLoad[] = Array.from(loadMap.entries())
      .map(([loadId, quotes]) => {
        // Dedupe: keep latest per identifier per load
        const byIdentifier = new Map<string, QuoteBoardQuote>();
        for (const q of quotes) {
          const existing = byIdentifier.get(q.identifier);
          if (!existing || q.last_activity > existing.last_activity) {
            byIdentifier.set(q.identifier, q);
          }
        }
        const dedupedQuotes = Array.from(byIdentifier.values()).sort(
          (a, b) =>
            new Date(b.last_activity).getTime() -
            new Date(a.last_activity).getTime()
        );

        // Compute best (lowest) rate
        const rates = dedupedQuotes
          .map((q) => q.latest_rate)
          .filter((r): r is number => r != null);
        const bestRate = rates.length > 0 ? Math.min(...rates) : null;

        const outboundCount = dedupedQuotes.filter((q) => q.source === "outbound").length;

        return {
          load_id: loadId,
          quote_count: dedupedQuotes.length,
          latest_activity: dedupedQuotes[0]?.last_activity || "",
          best_rate: bestRate,
          outbound_count: outboundCount,
          load_info: loadInfoMap.get(loadId) || null,
          quotes: dedupedQuotes,
        };
      })
      .sort(
        (a, b) =>
          new Date(b.latest_activity).getTime() -
          new Date(a.latest_activity).getTime()
      );

    return NextResponse.json({ loads, user_name: userName });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to build quote board";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: backups/pre-supabase-realtime/scores-route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrder, getOrders } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { scoreCarrier, getScoreColor, getScoreLabel } from "@/lib/carrier-scoring";

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ loadId: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { loadId } = await params;

    // Find the TTMS numeric order ID from the load number
    let orderId: number | null = null;

    // Try local loads table first
    const { data: localLoad } = await supabase
      .from("loads")
      .select("tms_load_id")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .eq("load_number", loadId)
      .maybeSingle();

    if (localLoad?.tms_load_id) {
      orderId = parseInt(localLoad.tms_load_id, 10);
    }

    // Try parsing as direct numeric ID
    if (!orderId || isNaN(orderId)) {
      const parsed = parseInt(loadId, 10);
      if (!isNaN(parsed)) orderId = parsed;
    }

    // Fallback: search TTMS by load_number
    if (!orderId) {
      try {
        const searchResult = await getOrders({ load_number: loadId, per_page: 1 });
        if (searchResult.data?.length > 0) {
          orderId = searchResult.data[0].id;
        }
      } catch {
        // Non-fatal
      }
    }

    if (!orderId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ scores: {}, error: "Load not found in TMS" });
    }

    // Fetch order with past_carriers
    const result = await getOrder(orderId);
    const pastCarriers = result.past_carriers || [];

    // Score each carrier, key by lowercase email
    const scores: Record<
      string,
      {
        score: number;
        score_label: string;
        score_color: string;
        carrier_name: string;
        carrier_email: string;
        carrier_telephone: string;
        loads_count: number;
        carrier_total: number;
      }
    > = {};

    for (const pc of pastCarriers) {
      const s = scoreCarrier(pc);
      const key = (pc.carrier_email || "").toLowerCase();
      if (key) {
        scores[key] = {
          score: s,
          score_label: getScoreLabel(s),
          score_color: getScoreColor(s),
          carrier_name: pc.carrier_name,
          carrier_email: pc.carrier_email,
          carrier_telephone: pc.carrier_telephone,
          loads_count: pc.loads_count,
          carrier_total: pc.carrier_total,
        };
      }
      // Also key by phone for VAPI matching
      if (pc.carrier_telephone) {
        const digits = pc.carrier_telephone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
        if (digits.length >= 7) {
          scores[digits] = scores[key] || {
            score: s,
            score_label: getScoreLabel(s),
            score_color: getScoreColor(s),
            carrier_name: pc.carrier_name,
            carrier_email: pc.carrier_email,
            carrier_telephone: pc.carrier_telephone,
            loads_count: pc.loads_count,
            carrier_total: pc.carrier_total,
          };
        }
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ scores });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch scores";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: backups/pre-supabase-realtime/sync-route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { syncVapiExtractions } from "@/lib/vapi/sync-extractions";

export const maxDuration = 60;

/**
 * POST /api/quote-board/sync
 * Runs VAPI extraction sync and returns detailed stats.
 * Called by the frontend BEFORE loading the board data.
 */
export async function POST() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const result = await syncVapiExtractions(user.id);
    return NextResponse.json({
      vapi: result,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Sync failed";
    console.error("[quote-board/sync] Fatal error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ vapi: { error: message, new_extractions: 0 } });
  }
}

FILE: docs/reddog-api-schema.md
================================================
# Reddog API Schema (TTMS)

**Base URL:** `https://reddog.t-tms.com`
**Spec:** `https://reddog.t-tms.com/reddog_swagger/swagger.yaml`
**Version:** 1.0.0 (OAS 3.0)

## Authentication

- **Admin API** (Orders, Carriers, Clients): `X-API-KEY` header
- **Vapi API** (Carrier lookup, booking, negotiation): `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

---

## Orders

### GET /api/orders — List orders
Paginated list. Filter by client_id, carrier_id, status, load_number.

**Query params:**
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| client_id | integer | Filter by client |
| carrier_id | integer | Filter by carrier |
| status | string | Filter by status |
| load_number | string | Filter by load number |
| per_page | integer | Default: 15 |
| page | integer | Page number |

**Response 200:** `{ data: Order[], links: {}, meta: PaginationMeta }`

### POST /api/orders — Create order
**Request body:**
```json
{
  "client_id": 1,
  "shipfrom_customer_id": 10,
  "shipto_customer_id": 20,
  "shipfrom_apt_required": false,
  "shipto_apt_required": false,
  "order_type": "NORMAL",
  "equipment_type": "TL",
  "total_weight": 1000,
  "requirements": "Dock appointment required",
  "notes": "Handle with care",
  "requested_pickup_date": "2026-02-20",
  "requested_delivery_date": "2026-02-22",
  "status": "PENDING",
  "order_stops": [],
  "order_items": [{ "description": "General freight", "class": "50", "weight": 1000 }],
  "order_accessorials": []
}
```
**Response 201:** `{ data: Order }`
**Response 422:** Validation error

### GET /api/orders/{order} — Show order
**Path param:** `order` (integer)
**Response 200:** `{ data: Order }`

### PUT /api/orders/{order} — Update order
**Path param:** `order` (integer)
**Request body (partial):**
```json
{
  "notes": "Updated delivery instructions",
  "requirements": "New pickup window 8am-10am",
  "status": "CONFIRMED"
}
```
**Response 200:** `{ data: Order }`

### DELETE /api/orders/{order} — Delete order
**Response 204:** No content

---

## Order Schema

```typescript
interface Order {
  id: number;
  client_id: number;
  client_name: string;
  client_phone: string;
  client_email: string;
  client_address: string;
  client_city: string;
  client_state: string;
  client_zip: string;
  bill_type: string;

  // Ship From
  shipfrom_customer_id: number;
  shipfrom_name: string;
  shipfrom_phone: string;
  shipfrom_email: string;
  shipfrom_contact: string;
  shipfrom_address: string;
  shipfrom_city: string;
  shipfrom_state: string;
  shipfrom_zip: string;
  shipfrom_lat: number;
  shipfrom_long: number;
  shipfrom_shipping_from_hours: string;
  shipfrom_shipping_to_hours: string;
  shipfrom_apt_required: boolean;
  shipfrom_notes: string;

  // Ship To
  shipto_customer_id: number;
  shipto_name: string;
  shipto_phone: string;
  shipto_email: string;
  shipto_contact: string;
  shipto_address: string;
  shipto_city: string;
  shipto_state: string;
  shipto_zip: string;
  shipto_lat: number;
  shipto_long: number;
  shipto_receiving_from_hours: string;
  shipto_receiving_to_hours: string;
  shipto_apt_required: boolean;
  shipto_notes: string;

  // Equipment & Load
  equipment_id: number;
  equipment_type: string;
  total_miles: number;
  total_weight: number;
  requirements: string;
  notes: string;

  // Dates
  requested_pickup_date: string; // ISO datetime
  requested_pickup_time: string;
  requested_delivery_date: string;
  requested_delivery_time: string;
  actual_pickup_date: string;
  actual_delivery_date: string;

  // Client charges
  line_haul_charge: number;
  fuel_charge: number;
  accessorial_charge: number;
  total_charge: number;

  // Carrier
  carrier_id: number;
  carrier_name: string;
  carrier_email: string;
  carrier_line_haul_charge: number;
  carrier_fuel_charge: number;
  carrier_accessorial_charge: number;
  carrier_total_charge: number;

  // Identifiers
  load_number: string;
  bol_number: string;
  reference_numbers: string;
  status: string;
  shipment_date: string;
  shipment_user_id: number;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;

  // Relations
  order_stops: OrderStop[];
  order_items: OrderItem[];
  order_accessorials: OrderAccessorial[];
}

interface OrderStop {
  id: number;
  order_id: number;
  stop_type: string;
  customer_id: number;
  name: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  state: string;
  zip: string;
  country: string;
  telephone: string;
  email: string;
  main_contact: string;
  receiving_from_hours: string;
  receiving_to_hours: string;
  shipping_from_hours: string;
  shipping_to_hours: string;
  pickup_date: string;
  pickup_time: string;
  delivery_date: string;
  delivery_time: string;
  notes: string;
  appointment_required: boolean;
  is_leg: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

interface OrderItem {
  id: number;
  order_id: number;
  description: string;
  class: string;
  pallet: string;
  unit: string;
  length: number;
  width: number;
  height: number;
  weight: number;
  bulk_order_item_id: number;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

interface OrderAccessorial {
  id: number;
  order_id: number;
  accessorial_id: number;
  accessorial_for: string;
  total_rate: number;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}
```

interface Carrier {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  contact_name: string;
  title: string;
  address: string;
  city: string;
  state: string;
  zip: string;
  country: string;
  telephone: string;
  email: string;
  secondary_email: string;
  tender_contact: string;
  tier: string;
  scac: string;
  mc: string;
  dot: string;
  fed_id: string;
  is_1099: boolean;
  factoring_company: string;
  remittance_address: string;
  remittance_city: string;
  remittance_state: string;
  remittance_zip: string;
  remittance_country: string;
  remittance_email: string;
  equipment_type: string;
  unit_nos: string;
  status: boolean;
  approved: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  carrier_vehicles: CarrierVehicle[];
  carrier_contacts: CarrierContact[];
}

  id: number;
  carrier_id: number;
  vehicle_type: string;
  unit_no: string;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

interface CarrierContact {
  id: number;
  carrier_id: number;
  name: string;
  title: string;
  phone: string;
  email: string;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

## Vapi (Voice AI Integration)

### POST /vapi/carrier — Get carrier
Look up carrier by MC/DOT number.
```json
{ "number": "string" }
```

### POST /vapi/sendregistrationlink — Send registration link
```json
{ "email_id": "string" }
```

### POST /vapi/order — Get order
```json
{ "order_id": 12345 }
```

### POST /vapi/book — Book order
```json
{
  "number": "5551234567",
  "order_id": 100,
  "rate": 1500,
  "email": "carrier@example.com"
}
```

### POST /vapi/negotiation — Negotiation (VAPI call)
Start/process negotiation with MC number, phone, order ID, rate.
```json
{
  "number": "string",
  "phone_no": "string",
  "order_id": 0,
  "rate": 0
}
```

### POST /vapi/negotiation_phone — Negotiation by phone
```json
{
  "phone_no": "string",
  "order_id": 0,
  "rate": 0
}
```

### GET /vapi/negotiations — Get Order Negotiations
**Query params:**
| Param | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| order_id | integer | Required if phone_number not provided |
| phone_number | string | Partial match. Required if order_id not provided |
| page | integer | Default: 1 |
| per_page | integer | Default: 15 |

**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "data": [{ "id": 0, "order_id": 0, "phone_number": "string", "rate": 0, "created_at": "string" }],
  "links": {},
  "meta": {}
}
```

### POST /vapi/addressorders — Orders by address
```json
{
  "ship_from": "string",
  "ship_to": "string",
  "equipment": "string",
  "pickup_date": "2026-03-09"
}
```

### POST /vapi/order_address — Order by address
Same request body as addressorders.

### POST /vapi/ordercall — Order Outbound Calling
Arbitrary payload (all fields passed through).

### POST /vapi/lastcalldetails — Get Last Vapi Call by Phone
```json
{ "number": "4155552671" }
```
**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "call_id": "abc123",
  "status": "ended",
  "caller": "+14155552671",
  "started_at": "2026-03-01T10:00:00Z",
  "ended_at": "2026-03-01T10:05:30Z",
  "duration": 330,
  "transcript": "Hello, I need help with my account...",
  "summary": "Customer called about a billing issue.",
  "recording_url": "https://storage.vapi.ai/recordings/abc123.mp3",
  "ended_reason": "customer-ended-call"
}
```

### POST /vapi/allcalldetails — All call details
Returns all Vapi calls sorted by created date desc.
**Request body:** `{}`
**Response 200:**
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "string",
  "data": [{
    "call_id": "string",
    "status": "string",
    "caller": "string",
    "started_at": "string",
    "ended_at": "string",
    "transcript": "string",
    "summary": "string",
    "recording_url": "string",
    "ended_reason": "string"
  }]
}
```

## Common Response Types

```typescript
interface PaginationMeta {
  current_page: number;
  from: number;
  last_page: number;
  path: string;
  per_page: number;
  to: number;
  total: number;
}

interface ValidationError {
  message: string;
  errors: Record<string, string[]>;
}

interface VapiResponse {
  success: boolean;
  message: string;
  [key: string]: any;
}
```



================================================
FILE: future/for_client.md
================================================
# Red Dog Logistics — AI Email Negotiation & Management Platform

## Project Overview

This is a complete AI-powered freight brokerage email management and rate negotiation system built for Red Dog Logistics. It connects to your Microsoft Outlook inbox, intelligently classifies every incoming email, and when a carrier emails about a load — the system automatically drafts a negotiation reply using real freight broker tactics, defends your margins with hard-coded safety guardrails, and learns from every negotiation to get smarter over time.

**What it does in plain terms:**
- Reads your inbox automatically
- Knows which emails are important (carrier rate quotes, load inquiries, POD requests) and which aren't (newsletters, spam)
- When a carrier emails about a load, the AI drafts a reply that sounds like a seasoned broker — quoting rates, countering offers, defending margins
- Tracks every negotiation back-and-forth as an email conversation
- Learns which carriers negotiate hard, which lanes close fast, and adjusts strategy accordingly
- Syncs all your loads, carriers, and shippers from your Reddog TTMS system

---

## How the System Works (End to End)

### 1. Email Sync & Classification

Your Microsoft Outlook inbox is synced automatically every day at midnight UTC. When new emails arrive, the system:

1. Pulls all new/changed emails via Microsoft Graph delta queries (only fetches what's changed since last sync)
2. Stores them in the database with full metadata (subject, from, to, body, conversation thread ID)
3. Classifies each email using AI into three categories:
   - **IMP** (Important): Orders, rate quotes, POD requests, dispatch, compliance, payment issues
   - **UNIMP** (Unimportant): Newsletters, routine updates, fuel reports
   - **IGNORE**: Spam, marketing, no-reply confirmations

The AI classification uses Google Gemini and includes reasoning for every decision, so you can see *why* it classified each email.

Real-time push notifications from Microsoft Graph mean the system can also react to emails as they arrive (not just at the daily sync).

### 2. The AI Negotiation Engine

This is the core of the system. When you open an email from a carrier and click "Draft Reply," the following happens:

#### Step 1: Intent Detection
The AI reads the carrier's email and determines what they want:
- **Load inquiry**: "Hey, I'm interested in load ORD-134083"
- **Rate offer**: "I can do that load for $3,500"
- **Rate counter**: "That's too low, I need $3,200"
- **Accept**: "OK, I'll take it at that rate"
- **Provide MC**: "Here's my MC number: 1234567"

It also extracts the dollar amount, MC number, and load number from the email.

#### Step 2: Load Lookup
The system finds the referenced load by searching:
1. Your database (loads synced from TTMS)
2. If not found, queries the Reddog TTMS API directly
3. If still not found, checks the carrier's most recent load

Once found, it knows the shipper rate (total charge), which drives all margin calculations.

#### Step 3: Rate Calculation
From the shipper rate (what the customer is paying), the system calculates:

| Rate | Formula | Margin | Purpose |
|------|---------|--------|---------|
| **Posted Rate** (Opening) | Shipper Rate × 0.82 | 18% | Your opening offer to the carrier |
| **Target Rate** (Optimal) | Shipper Rate × 0.85 | 15% | Where you want to close |
| **Max Payout** (Hard Cap) | Shipper Rate × 0.88 | 12% | Absolute maximum — never go above this |
| **Min Accept** (Floor) | Posted Rate × 0.95 | — | Minimum the carrier can offer before rejection |

**Example:** If the shipper is paying $3,500:
- Posted rate: $2,870 (your opening offer)
- Target rate: $2,980 (where you want to close)
- Max payout: $3,080 (absolute ceiling)
- Min accept: $2,727 (floor)

#### Step 4: Pre-Routing (Quick Decisions)
Before calling the full AI negotiation, the system handles simple cases instantly:

- **Carrier offers ≤ posted rate?** → Accept immediately (great deal for us)
- **Carrier offers < 95% of posted?** → Reject (too far below our floor)
- **First contact with a rate offer?** → Always counter at posted rate (never accept on first touch)
- **Carrier offers > posted rate?** → Send to AI negotiation (this is where the real work happens)

#### Step 5: AI Negotiation (The Full Prompt)
When the carrier wants more than our posted rate, the AI takes over. It receives:

- **Full conversation history**: Every prior email from the carrier AND every reply we sent (merged chronologically from both the emails and email_replies tables)
- **The carrier's actual email**: Subject, body, sender name and address — so it can respond to what they specifically said
- **Carrier behavioral profile**: How many times they've negotiated with us before, how often they accept vs walk away, their average premium above posted, how many rounds they typically take to close
- **Learned patterns**: Extracted from past negotiations (e.g., "This carrier typically accepts on round 2-3 when within 5% of their ask")
- **Load details**: Route, miles, equipment, weight, commodity
- **Staircase counter schedule**: What rate it's allowed to offer at each round

The AI responds with JSON:
```json
{
  "action": "counter",
  "amount": 2870,
  "message": "Hello John,\n\nI hear you, but $2,870 is solid for 1,200 miles — that's $2.39/mi. We run this lane every week, get set up with us and I'll keep you busy.\n\nRegards,\nEeman Majumder"
}
```

#### Step 6: Server-Side Safety Guardrails
After the AI responds, hard-coded server logic enforces three rules that **cannot be bypassed**:

1. **Never exceed the round-specific max counter** — The AI can't offer more than the staircase allows for this round
2. **Never exceed the absolute hard cap** — 88% of shipper rate, period
3. **Never go below the floor** — 95% of posted rate

These guardrails run after every AI response. Even if the AI tries to be too generous, the code clamps the amount.

### 3. The Staircase Counter Strategy

The system doesn't just counter at the same rate every time. It uses a "staircase" that gradually increases what it's willing to pay as the negotiation goes on:

| Round | Max Counter | Strategy |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| **1-2** | Posted Rate ($2,870) | Hold firm. Sell the rate hard. Don't move. |
| **3** | Midpoint ($2,930) | Small bump. Show willingness but stay close. |
| **4** | Target Rate ($2,980) | Move to optimal target. This is where you want to close. |
| **5** | Midpoint ($3,030) | Getting close to ceiling. Only if carrier is about to walk. |
| **6+** | Max Payout ($3,080) | Absolute maximum. Last resort. |

Rounds are counted by **carrier messages only** — each time the carrier sends a new email, that's one round.

### 4. The Conversation Flow

The system tracks the full email thread as a back-and-forth conversation:

```
Round 1: Carrier asks about load ORD-134083
  → AI quotes $2,870 (posted rate, 18% margin)

Round 2: Carrier counters with $3,500
  → AI holds at $2,870 ("Look, $2,870 is solid for these miles...")

Round 3: Carrier comes down to $3,200
  → AI bumps to $2,930 ("I hear you, here's what I can do...")

Round 4: Carrier says $3,000
  → AI moves to $2,980 ("That's where I'm at on this one...")

Round 5: Carrier accepts $2,980
  → AI accepts, asks for MC# if not on file
```

The AI sees the **full conversation history** — both the carrier's emails AND our previous replies. This is built by merging:
- Incoming emails from the `emails` table
- Sent replies from the `email_replies` table
- Sorted chronologically into a single timeline

### 5. AI Personality & Tactics

The AI is prompted to sound like a real freight broker with 15 years of experience:

**Personality rules:**
- Casual and confident: "Look, I get it, but..." / "Here's what I can do..."
- Never says "I understand" — says "I hear you" or just jumps into the point
- 2-3 sentences max (no essays)
- Always mentions rate per mile
- Never reveals margins, caps, or internal numbers
- Never says "best I can do" or "final offer" — uses casual confidence instead

**Persuasion tactics (rotated each round):**
- **Urgency**: "I've got another carrier looking at this one"
- **Volume**: "We run this lane every week, get you set up and I'll keep you busy"
- **Simplicity**: "FCFS both ends, no hassle"
- **Market**: "I'm seeing $2.39/mi all day on this lane"
- **Speed**: "I can have the rate con in your inbox in 10 minutes"
- **Relationship**: "Work with me on this one and I'll take care of you on the next"

**Market awareness:**
If the carrier mentions weather, fuel spikes, or market conditions, the AI briefly acknowledges it (one clause) then redirects to the rate. It never argues or dismisses their concern.

### 6. Carrier Intel (Behavioral Profiles)

When a carrier has negotiated with you before (2+ past negotiations), the system builds a behavioral profile:

| Metric | What It Means |
|--------|---------------|
| Total negotiations | How many times they've negotiated with you |
| Accepted count | How many deals they closed |
| Walked away count | How many times they ghosted or rejected |
| Avg discount % | How much above your posted rate they typically settle |
| Avg rounds to close | How many back-and-forth emails before they accept |

The AI uses this to adjust strategy:
- **avg_discount > 5%** → "Hard negotiator — be extra firm, they'll settle."
- **walked_away > accepted** → "Walks away often — may need slight flexibility late."
- **avg_rounds ≤ 2** → "Closes fast — hold firm."

### 7. MC# & Carrier Setup

When a carrier's MC number isn't on file:
- Every reply mentions they should visit **https://reddoglogisticsinc.com/** to get set up as a carrier
- The AI never writes "MC# NA" or any placeholder — it asks them to provide it
- When they accept a rate, the system specifically asks them to get set up before booking can proceed

When a carrier provides their MC number, the system stores it and confirms it in the reply.

---

## The Learning Loop (4 Stages)

The system gets smarter over time by learning from every negotiation.

### Stage 1: Action Capture
Every time the AI generates a negotiation response, the full context is logged:
- What the carrier offered, what the AI countered
- The shipper rate, floor, target, ceiling
- The round number
- The full conversation context
- Which AI model was used and what prompt was sent

### Stage 2: Outcome Observation
When a negotiation closes (carrier accepts or walks away), the system records:
- Final rate agreed upon
- Margin realized (shipper rate minus final rate)
- How many rounds it took
- How long it took (hours from first contact to close)

### Stage 3: Pattern Distillation
A daily job (3:00 AM UTC) analyzes all completed negotiations from the last 90 days:
- Groups data by carrier (needs 3+ negotiations) and by lane (needs 5+)
- Uses AI to extract behavioral patterns:
  - "This carrier typically accepts on round 2-3 when within 5% of their ask"
  - "TX→GA lane closes at average 2.3 rounds, final rate around $3,150"
  - "This carrier has ghosted after round 4 in 20% of negotiations"
- Assigns confidence scores based on sample size
- Old patterns are automatically superseded when new ones are extracted

### Stage 4: Context Injection
The next time you negotiate with that carrier (or on that lane), the system:
1. Queries carrier-specific patterns, lane patterns, and global patterns
2. Formats them as "observed facts" in the AI prompt
3. The AI sees these facts and adjusts its strategy accordingly

**Example injected into prompt:**
```
OBSERVED PATTERNS (treat these as facts from past interactions):
CARRIER HISTORY:
- [0.78] Carrier accepts 85% of time on round 2 when within 5% of ask
- [0.65] Has ghosted after round 4 in 20% of negotiations
LANE INTELLIGENCE:
- [0.82] MO→GA closes at avg 2.3 rounds, final rate $2,950/load
```

---

## Data Sync & Integrations

### Microsoft Outlook (via Microsoft Graph)
- **Synced**: All inbox emails (delta queries — only new/changed)
- **Sent**: Replies sent through the app via Graph API
- **Tokens**: Auto-refreshed daily at 6:00 AM UTC
- **Subscriptions**: Push notifications renewed daily at noon UTC

### Reddog TTMS
- **Synced daily at 6:00 PM UTC**:
  - All orders → `loads` table (with miles, rates, routes, equipment)
  - All carriers → `carriers` table (MC#, DOT#, equipment types)
  - All clients → `shippers` table
- **On-demand**: When a carrier emails about a load not in the database, the system queries TTMS API directly and upserts the result

### AI Models (via OpenRouter)
- **Google Gemini 3 Flash Preview**: All negotiation (temperature 0.4), intent parsing (temperature 0.1)
- **Google Gemini 2.0 Flash**: Email classification, pattern distillation

### Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- **15 database tables** with row-level security (tenant isolation)
- **Real-time subscriptions** on emails, loads, escalations, carrier quotes
- **Automated triggers** for profile creation on user signup

---

## Database Tables

| Table | Purpose | Key Columns |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `profiles` | User accounts | name, email, company_name, onboarding_complete |
| `emails` | Incoming emails from Outlook | subject, from_address, body_preview, category (IMP/UNIMP/IGNORE), conversation_id |
| `email_replies` | Sent replies | reply_body, conversation_id, source (manual/ai_draft), sent_at |
| `email_negotiations` | Negotiation state per carrier per load | sender_email, mc_number, interested_order, last_negotiated_rate, round_count, status |
| `loads` | Freight shipments from TTMS | load_number, origin/dest, shipper_rate, carrier_rate, miles, equipment_type |
| `carriers` | Carrier directory | name, email, mc_number, dot_number, equipment_types |
| `shippers` | Shipper/client directory | name, billing_email, logistics_email |
| `carrier_quotes` | Rate quotes per load per carrier | quoted_rate, ai_counter_rate, status, final_rate, rounds_to_close |
| `rate_parameters` | Floor/target/ceiling rates by lane | origin_state, dest_state, floor_rate, target_rate, ceiling_rate |
| `escalations` | Items needing human review | trigger_type, summary, ai_recommendation, status |
| `negotiation_events` | Learning loop: every AI action logged | carrier_offer, ai_counter_rate, round_number, action_taken, outcome, margin_pct |
| `learnings` | Learning loop: extracted patterns | scope_type, category, observation, confidence, expires_at |
| `email_connections` | Microsoft Graph tokens | access_token, refresh_token, delta_link |
| `sync_state` | Delta sync tracking | delta_link, last_sync_at, sync_in_progress |
| `ai_activity_log` | Audit trail for all AI actions | action_type, action_description, metadata |

---

## Cron Jobs (Automated Tasks)

| Schedule | Job | Purpose |
|----------|-----|---------|
| Daily midnight UTC | Delta Sync | Sync new emails from Outlook |
| Daily 3:00 AM UTC | Distill Patterns | Learning loop Stage 3: extract negotiation patterns |
| Daily 6:00 AM UTC | Token Refresh | Refresh Microsoft Graph OAuth tokens |
| Daily noon UTC | Graph Renew | Renew Microsoft Graph push notification subscriptions |
| Daily 6:00 PM UTC | TTMS Sync | Sync loads, carriers, shippers from Reddog TTMS |

---

## Dashboard Pages

| Page | What You See |
|------|-------------|
| **Dashboard** | 4 tabs: Inbox (AI-classified emails), Active Loads, Quote Board, Call Log |
| **Inbox** | All emails filtered by category (IMP/UNIMP/IGNORE), searchable, with AI reasoning |
| **Email Detail** | Full email thread, AI draft reply with negotiation context (rate, action, carrier info), one-click send |
| **Quote Board** | Grid of load cards showing all carrier interest — click any load to open a dedicated detail page with full carrier data table |
| **Quote Board Detail** | Full carrier table for a load: carrier rate, our rate, $/mile, transit, status, carrier score, setup status — with route/weight/equipment header |
| **Outbound** | Proactive carrier outreach — score carriers per load, generate and send AI-crafted offer emails |
| **Loads** | All loads from TTMS, filterable by status, with rate details |
| **Load Detail** | Individual load with carrier quotes, negotiation timeline, margin info |
| **Carriers** | Carrier directory synced from TTMS |
| **Shippers** | Client/shipper directory |
| **Escalations** | Items flagged for human review with AI recommendations |
| **Analytics** | Email volume charts, top senders, category breakdowns |
| **Settings** | Classification preferences, sync settings |

---

## Quote Board — How It Works

The Quote Board is a real-time view of every load that has received carrier interest from any channel. It answers: "Which loads have carriers quoting on them right now, and what are they offering?"

### Data Sources (All Real, All Live)

1. **Inbound Emails**: When a carrier emails about a load (rate quote or counter-offer), the AI classifier has already extracted the load number and quoted rate during email sync. The Quote Board pulls these directly from the database.

2. **Outbound Offers**: When you send an offer email to a carrier from the Outbound page, the system creates a negotiation record. The Quote Board shows these as "Offered" status so you can track which carriers you've reached out to and whether they've responded.

3. **VAPI Phone Calls**: When a carrier calls in via the VAPI voice AI system, the Quote Board uses Gemini AI to scan the call transcript and extract the order number and any rate discussed. It also pulls structured negotiation data from the VAPI API.

### Carrier Identification

- **Known carriers** (in your carrier network): Matched by email address or phone number against your carrier database. Shows their name and a carrier score badge (scored on lane history, rating, approval, insurance, active status — same 100-point scale as the Outbound page).
- **New carriers** (not in your system): Shows their raw email address or phone number with a "New" badge. You can see what they're quoting and decide whether to onboard them.

### What You See

**Quote Board Grid (main view):**
Each load card shows:
- Route: "Chicago, IL → Dallas, TX"
- Load details: 42,000 lbs — Dry Van | Thu pickup | 1,200 miles
- "AI emailed 8 carriers as J. Smith" (if outbound offers were sent)
- Carrier count + new carrier count + status badges (Accepted, Negotiating)
- Best carrier rate + shipper rate
- Click any card → opens the detail page

**Quote Board Detail Page (/quote-board/[loadId]):**
- Back button to return to the grid
- Full load header: route, weight, equipment, pickup date, miles, transit days
- Rate summary chips: Shipper Rate, Our Rate (82%), Best Carrier Rate
- Full carrier data table with columns:

| Column | What It Shows |
|--------|--------------|
| Carrier | Name, email, MC number |
| Source | Inbound (email), Outbound (we emailed them), Phone (VAPI call) — color-coded |
| Carrier Rate | What the carrier quoted |
| Our Rate | Our posted rate (82% of shipper rate) |
| $/Mile | Carrier's rate divided by total miles |
| Transit | Estimated transit days (pickup → delivery) |
| Status | Best Book, Negotiating, Email Sent, Quoted, Called + round count |
| Score | TTMS carrier score badge (100-point scale) |
| Setup | "Setup" (known carrier) or "New" (unknown) |
| Last Activity | When they last interacted |

Row backgrounds are color-tinted: blue for outbound offers, purple for phone calls, white for inbound emails.

The board auto-refreshes every 30 seconds — no manual refresh needed.

---

## Security

- **Row-Level Security (RLS)**: Every database table enforces tenant isolation — users can only see their own data
- **OAuth 2.0**: Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) for authentication
- **Carrier email content is treated as untrusted**: The AI is explicitly instructed to never follow instructions embedded in carrier emails (prompt injection protection)
- **Rate limiting**: AI endpoints are rate-limited per user to prevent abuse
- **Cron authentication**: All cron jobs require a secret token
- **No margin data exposed**: The AI never reveals internal numbers, caps, floors, or margin percentages to carriers

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | Next.js 16 (React 19), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI |
| Backend | Next.js API Routes (serverless functions) |
| Database | Supabase (PostgreSQL) with RLS + Realtime |
| Auth | Microsoft Entra ID OAuth → Supabase Auth |
| AI | Google Gemini 3 Flash (via OpenRouter API) |
| Email | Microsoft Graph API (read, send, delta sync, push notifications) |
| TMS | Reddog TTMS API (loads, carriers, shippers) |
| Hosting | Vercel (serverless + cron jobs) |
| Real-time | Supabase Realtime (WebSocket subscriptions) |

---

## Key Architectural Decisions

1. **Email-based negotiation, not chat**: Carriers communicate via email, not a chat widget. The system treats email threads as conversations.

2. **Server-side guardrails override AI**: The AI proposes actions, but hard-coded server logic enforces rate limits. The AI cannot bypass the 88% margin ceiling or the staircase schedule.

3. **Pre-routing for speed**: Simple decisions (accept low offers, reject ridiculous ones, counter on first contact) are handled without calling the full AI, reducing latency and cost.

4. **Learning loop is passive**: It observes and learns without changing behavior until patterns reach sufficient confidence (3+ events for carrier patterns, 5+ for lane patterns).

5. **Fallback chain**: If AI response parsing fails, a template-based fallback generates a reasonable counter. If load isn't in the database, TTMS API is queried directly. Every step has a graceful degradation path.

6. **Non-fatal error handling**: Carrier profile lookup, learning context, event logging — all wrapped in try/catch and marked as non-fatal. A failure in any auxiliary system never blocks the core negotiation flow.

    @apply bg-background text-foreground;
    font-family: var(--font-inter), var(--font-poppins), system-ui, sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
    text-rendering: optimizeLegibility;
    letter-spacing: -0.011em;
  }
  html {
    @apply font-sans;
  }
  button, input, select, textarea {
    font-family: inherit;
  }
  h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
    font-family: var(--font-poppins), system-ui, sans-serif;
    letter-spacing: -0.02em;
  }
  .font-mono, code, pre, [class*="font-mono"] {
    font-family: var(--font-jetbrains), ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace;
  }
}

/* Thin minimal scrollbars — global */
* {
  scrollbar-width: thin;
  scrollbar-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12) transparent;
}
:is(.dark *) {
  scrollbar-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) transparent;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 4px;
  height: 4px;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: transparent;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  border-radius: 4px;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
}
:is(.dark) ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
}
:is(.dark) ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
}

import type { Metadata } from "next";
import { Poppins, Inter, JetBrains_Mono } from "next/font/google";
import { Toaster } from "@/components/ui/sonner";
import { TooltipProvider } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/theme-provider";
import "./globals.css";

const poppins = Poppins({
  variable: "--font-poppins",
  subsets: ["latin"],
  weight: ["300", "400", "500", "600", "700"],
});

const inter = Inter({
  variable: "--font-inter",
  subsets: ["latin"],
  weight: ["300", "400", "500", "600", "700"],
});

const jetbrainsMono = JetBrains_Mono({
  variable: "--font-jetbrains",
  subsets: ["latin"],
  weight: ["400", "500", "600", "700"],
});

export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "TTMS Mailer - AI Email Management",
  description:
    "AI-powered email classification for Truck Transport Management",
};

export default function RootLayout({
  children,
}: Readonly<{
  children: React.ReactNode;
}>) {
  return (
    <html lang="en">
      <body className={`${poppins.variable} ${inter.variable} ${jetbrainsMono.variable} antialiased`}>
        <ThemeProvider>
          <TooltipProvider>
            {children}
            <Toaster />
          </TooltipProvider>
        </ThemeProvider>
      </body>
    </html>
  );
}

import { LoginButton } from "@/components/auth/login-button";
import { Truck, Mail, Brain, BarChart3, ShieldAlert } from "lucide-react";

export default async function LandingPage({
  searchParams,
}: {
  searchParams: Promise<{ error?: string; message?: string }>;
}) {
  const params = await searchParams;
  const isNotAgent = params.error === "not_agent";

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-background">
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-4 text-center space-y-8">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-3 mb-2">
          <div className="p-3 bg-primary rounded-xl">
            <Truck className="h-8 w-8 text-primary-foreground" />
          </div>
          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight">TTMS Mailer</h1>
        </div>

        <p className="text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-md mx-auto">
          AI-powered email management for your truck transport business.
          Automatically classify, prioritize, and manage your inbox.
        </p>

        {isNotAgent && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg border border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive max-w-md mx-auto">
            <ShieldAlert className="h-6 w-6 flex-shrink-0" />
            <p className="text-sm text-left">
              You are not added as an Agent in our system. Please ask the
              authority to add you as an Agent before logging in.
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        {params.error === "auth_failed" && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-3 p-4 rounded-lg border border-destructive/50 bg-destructive/10 text-destructive max-w-md mx-auto">
            <ShieldAlert className="h-6 w-6 flex-shrink-0" />
            <p className="text-sm text-left">
              Authentication failed. Please try again.
            </p>
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 py-4">
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-center">
            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-muted">
              <Mail className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
            </div>
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">Outlook Sync</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Connect your Microsoft 365 inbox
            </span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-center">
            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-muted">
              <Brain className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
            </div>
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">AI Classification</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Auto-tag as Important, Unimportant, or Ignore
            </span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2 text-center">
            <div className="p-2 rounded-lg bg-muted">
              <BarChart3 className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
            </div>
            <span className="text-sm font-medium">Smart Dashboard</span>
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Analytics and insights for your team
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <LoginButton />

        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          Connects securely to your Microsoft Outlook account via OAuth 2.0
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
================================================
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { TopBar } from "@/components/shell/TopBar";
import { LeftNav } from "@/components/shell/LeftNav";
import { RightPanel } from "@/components/shell/RightPanel";
import { PodWatcher } from "@/components/shell/PodWatcher";

export default async function DashboardLayout({
  children,
}: {
  children: React.ReactNode;
}) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    redirect("/");
  }

  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select(
      "name, email, avatar_url, display_name, autopilot_active, supervised_mode, ttms_pod_title"
    )
    .eq("id", user.id)
    .single();

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen overflow-hidden bg-background">
      <PodWatcher />
      <LeftNav />
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        <TopBar
          user={{
            email: profile?.email || user.email,
            name: profile?.name || profile?.display_name,
            avatarUrl: profile?.avatar_url,
            autopilotActive: profile?.autopilot_active,
            podTitle: profile?.ttms_pod_title || null,
          }}
        />
        <main className="flex-1 overflow-auto">{children}</main>
      </div>
      <RightPanel />
    </div>
  );
}
