"use client";

import { useState, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
import { AgentToggle } from "@/components/agent/agent-toggle";
import { ActivityFeed } from "@/components/agent/activity-feed";
import { DraftsSidebar } from "@/components/agent/drafts-sidebar";
import type { ConsoleEvent } from "@/components/agent/live-console";
import {
  Mail,
  FileText,
  Send,
  MessageSquare,
  Shield,
  CheckCircle2,
  Brain,
  Scan,
} from "lucide-react";

const pipelineSteps = [
  {
    icon: Mail,
    title: "Sync & Classify",
    desc: "Pulls new emails from Outlook and classifies them as Tender, Shipper, Important, or Ignore using AI. Prioritizes carrier replies first — speed wins loads.",
    color: "text-blue-500",
    bg: "bg-blue-50 dark:bg-blue-950/30",
  },
  {
    icon: FileText,
    title: "Extract & Quote",
    desc: "Extracts load details from emails and PDFs. Tenders get AI rate quotes with CSV. Shippers get TTMS orders. Detects duplicate tenders automatically.",
    color: "text-violet-500",
    bg: "bg-violet-50 dark:bg-violet-950/30",
  },
  {
    icon: Send,
    title: "Carrier Blast",
    desc: "Scores carriers on lane history, response rate, and past acceptance behavior. Ghost carriers get deprioritized. Top performers get personalized AI offer emails.",
    color: "text-emerald-500",
    bg: "bg-emerald-50 dark:bg-emerald-950/30",
  },
  {
    icon: MessageSquare,
    title: "Negotiate & Book",
    desc: "Handles carrier replies instantly — counters, accepts, or escalates. Learns from every negotiation to get sharper over time. First carrier to accept wins.",
    color: "text-amber-500",
    bg: "bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-950/30",
  },
  {
    icon: Shield,
    title: "Safety Rails",
    desc: "Rate ceilings, max negotiation rounds, dangerous keyword detection. Auto-pauses after 3+ escalations per hour. Auto-retries on API failures.",
    color: "text-red-500",
    bg: "bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-950/30",
  },
  {
    icon: Brain,
    title: "Learning Loop",
    desc: "Logs every decision and outcome. Distills carrier behavior, shipper award rates, and lane patterns. Injects learnings into future AI prompts automatically.",
    color: "text-teal-500",
    bg: "bg-teal-50 dark:bg-teal-950/30",
  },
  {
    icon: Scan,
    title: "Sweep & Catch-Up",
    desc: "When idle, sweeps the last 40 emails for unreplied IMP, Shipper, Tender, and bidding emails. Generates AI replies for anything that slipped through.",
    color: "text-pink-500",
    bg: "bg-pink-50 dark:bg-pink-950/30",
  },
];

const highlights = [
  "Negotiation replies send instantly — no draft delay",
  "All other outbound gated by Draft Mode for your review",
  "Awarded quotes automatically convert to orders + carrier blasts",
  "Tender quote replies include a CSV rate sheet attachment",
  "Duplicate tenders from the same shipper detected and flagged",
  "Carrier scoring learns from blast response history over time",
  "Test mode lets you preview everything — nothing goes out",
  "Circuit breaker auto-pauses the agent if things go sideways",
];

export default function AgentPage() {
  const [events, setEvents] = useState<ConsoleEvent[]>([]);
  const [running, setRunning] = useState(false);
  const idRef = useRef(0);

  const runStream = useCallback(async () => {
    setRunning(true);
    setEvents([]);

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/agent/run-stream");
      if (!res.ok || !res.body) {
        setEvents([{
          id: ++idRef.current,
          phase: "error",
          type: "error",
          message: `Failed to start: ${res.status}`,
          timestamp: new Date(),
        }]);
        setRunning(false);
        return;
      }

      const reader = res.body.getReader();
      const decoder = new TextDecoder();
      let buffer = "";

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split("\n\n");
        buffer = lines.pop() || "";

        for (const line of lines) {
          if (!line.startsWith("data: ")) continue;
          try {
            const data = JSON.parse(line.slice(6));
            setEvents((prev) => [
              ...prev,
              {
                id: ++idRef.current,
                phase: data.phase,
                type: data.type,
                message: data.message,
                timestamp: new Date(),
              },
            ]);
          } catch {
            // skip malformed
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setEvents((prev) => [
        ...prev,
        {
          id: ++idRef.current,
          phase: "error",
          type: "error",
          message: `Stream error: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : "unknown"}`,
          timestamp: new Date(),
        },
      ]);
    }

    setRunning(false);
  }, []);

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto">
      {/* Hero */}
      <div className="space-y-1">
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Agent Mode</h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          Autonomous email processing — from inbox to booked load
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Settings Card — Run button triggers stream, console embedded inside */}
      <AgentToggle
        onRun={runStream}
        running={running}
        events={events}
        onClearEvents={() => setEvents([])}
      />

      {/* Activity Feed + Drafts Sidebar */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-6">
        <div className="lg:col-span-3">
          <ActivityFeed />
        </div>
        <div className="lg:col-span-2">
          <DraftsSidebar />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Pipeline Visual — below the action area */}
      <div className="rounded-xl border bg-card p-6 space-y-5">
        <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
          How the Agent Works
        </h2>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
          {pipelineSteps.map((step) => {
            const Icon = step.icon;
            return (
              <div key={step.title} className="flex items-start gap-3 p-3 rounded-lg border bg-card/50 hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors">
                <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${step.bg} shrink-0`}>
                  <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${step.color}`} />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-0.5 min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold">{step.title}</p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">
                    {step.desc}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        {/* Highlights */}
        <div className="border-t pt-4 mt-4">
          <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-2">
            {highlights.map((h) => (
              <div key={h} className="flex items-start gap-2">
                <CheckCircle2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-green-500 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{h}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/analytics/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { EmailsPerDayChart } from "@/components/analytics/emails-per-day-chart";
import { CategoryBreakdown } from "@/components/analytics/category-breakdown";
import { TopSendersTable } from "@/components/analytics/top-senders-table";
import { NegotiationFunnel } from "@/components/analytics/negotiation-funnel";
import { VapiChart } from "@/components/analytics/vapi-chart";
import { LlmCostChart } from "@/components/analytics/llm-cost-chart";
import {
  Mail, AlertCircle, Truck, Package, CheckCircle2,
  TrendingUp, Phone, BarChart3, Eye, Trophy,
  RefreshCw, Brain, Zap, Clock, DollarSign,
} from "lucide-react";

interface AnalyticsPayload {
  totalEmails: number;
  importantCount: number;
  unimportantCount: number;
  ignoreCount: number;
  shipperCount: number;
  unclassifiedCount: number;
  unreadImportant: number;
  emailsPerDay: { date: string; imp: number; unimp: number; ignore: number; shipper: number }[];
  topSenders: { address: string; name: string | null; count: number; topCategory: string }[];
  negotiations: {
    total: number; open: number; negotiating: number; accepted: number;
    rejected: number; closed: number; winRate: number; avgRounds: number;
    bestRate: number | null; avgRate: number | null;
    perDay: { date: string; count: number }[];
  };
  vapi: {
    total: number; quoting: number; negotiating: number; booking: number;
    transfer: number; inquiring: number; unknown: number;
    conversionRate: number; perDay: { date: string; count: number }[];
  };
  loads: { active: number; pending: number; delivered: number };
  llm: {
    totalCost: number;
    totalCalls: number;
    totalTokens: number;
    avgLatencyMs: number;
    costPerDay: { date: string; cost: number }[];
    byPurpose: { purpose: string; calls: number; cost: number; tokens: number }[];
    byModel: { model: string; calls: number; cost: number; tokens: number }[];
  };
}

const PERIODS = [
  { label: "7 days", value: 7 },
  { label: "30 days", value: 30 },
  { label: "90 days", value: 90 },
];

function KpiCard({
  label, value, sub, icon: Icon, accent,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: string | number;
  sub?: string;
  icon: React.ElementType;
  accent?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <Card className="relative overflow-hidden">
      <CardContent className="pt-5 pb-4 px-5">
        <div className="flex items-start justify-between">
          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-medium text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide mb-1">{label}</p>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold leading-none">{value}</p>
            {sub && <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">{sub}</p>}
          </div>
          <div className={`p-2 rounded-lg ${accent ?? "bg-muted"}`}>
            <Icon className="h-4 w-4" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

function SectionHeader({ title, description }: { title: string; description?: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="mb-4">
      <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">{title}</h2>
      {description && <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">{description}</p>}
    </div>
  );
}

function LoadingPage() {
  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-8">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <Skeleton className="h-7 w-32" />
        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-52" />
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        {Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24" />)}
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
        {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24" />)}
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        <Skeleton className="h-72 lg:col-span-2" />
        <Skeleton className="h-72" />
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        <Skeleton className="h-64" />
        <Skeleton className="h-64" />
      </div>
      <Skeleton className="h-64" />
    </div>
  );
}

export default function AnalyticsPage() {
  const [data, setData] = useState<AnalyticsPayload | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [refreshing, setRefreshing] = useState(false);
  const [days, setDays] = useState(30);

  async function fetchData(d: number, silent = false) {
    if (!silent) setLoading(true);
    else setRefreshing(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/analytics?days=${d}`);
      if (res.ok) setData(await res.json());
    } catch (e) {
      console.error(e);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
      setRefreshing(false);
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => { fetchData(days); }, [days]);

  if (loading) return <LoadingPage />;

  if (!data) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-64 gap-3 text-muted-foreground">
        <p className="text-sm">Failed to load analytics</p>
        <button onClick={() => fetchData(days)} className="text-xs underline">Retry</button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const impPct = data.totalEmails > 0 ? Math.round((data.importantCount / data.totalEmails) * 100) : 0;
  const avgPerDay = data.emailsPerDay.length > 0 ? Math.round(data.totalEmails / days) : 0;

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-8 max-w-7xl mx-auto">

      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-xl font-bold">Analytics</h1>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
            {data.totalEmails} emails · {data.negotiations.total} negotiations · {data.vapi.total} calls
            {data.llm.totalCalls > 0 && ` · ${data.llm.totalCalls} AI calls ($${data.llm.totalCost < 1 ? data.llm.totalCost.toFixed(4) : data.llm.totalCost.toFixed(2)})`}
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <button
            onClick={() => fetchData(days, true)}
            disabled={refreshing}
            className="p-1.5 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors text-muted-foreground"
          >
            <RefreshCw className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${refreshing ? "animate-spin" : ""}`} />
          </button>
          <div className="flex rounded-lg border bg-muted/30 p-0.5 gap-0.5">
            {PERIODS.map((p) => (
              <button
                key={p.value}
                onClick={() => setDays(p.value)}
                className={`px-3 py-1 text-xs font-medium rounded-md transition-colors ${
                  days === p.value
                    ? "bg-white shadow-sm text-foreground"
                    : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
                }`}
              >
                {p.label}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Section: Load Pipeline ── */}
      <div>
        <SectionHeader title="Load Pipeline" description="Live counts from TTMS" />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          <KpiCard
            label="Pending Loads"
            value={data.loads.pending}
            sub="Need a carrier"
            icon={Package}
            accent="bg-amber-50 text-amber-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Active Loads"
            value={data.loads.active}
            sub="Booked, dispatched & in transit"
            icon={Truck}
            accent="bg-blue-50 text-blue-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Delivered"
            value={data.loads.delivered}
            sub="All time"
            icon={CheckCircle2}
            accent="bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600"
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Section: Email Activity ── */}
      <div>
        <SectionHeader title="Email Activity" description={`Last ${days} days`} />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
          <KpiCard
            label="Total Emails"
            value={data.totalEmails}
            sub={`~${avgPerDay}/day`}
            icon={Mail}
            accent="bg-slate-100 text-slate-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Important"
            value={data.importantCount}
            sub={`${impPct}% of inbox`}
            icon={AlertCircle}
            accent="bg-red-50 text-red-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Shipper Tenders"
            value={data.shipperCount}
            sub="Load tender emails"
            icon={BarChart3}
            accent="bg-green-50 text-green-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Unread Important"
            value={data.unreadImportant}
            sub="Need attention"
            icon={Eye}
            accent={data.unreadImportant > 0 ? "bg-orange-50 text-orange-600" : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"}
          />
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          <div className="lg:col-span-2">
            <EmailsPerDayChart data={data.emailsPerDay} days={days} />
          </div>
          <CategoryBreakdown
            importantCount={data.importantCount}
            unimportantCount={data.unimportantCount}
            ignoreCount={data.ignoreCount}
            shipperCount={data.shipperCount}
            unclassifiedCount={data.unclassifiedCount}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Section: Negotiation Performance ── */}
      <div>
        <SectionHeader title="Negotiation Performance" description="AI email negotiations" />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
          <KpiCard
            label="Negotiations"
            value={data.negotiations.total}
            sub={`${data.negotiations.open} open`}
            icon={TrendingUp}
            accent="bg-violet-50 text-violet-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Win Rate"
            value={`${data.negotiations.winRate}%`}
            sub={`${data.negotiations.accepted} accepted`}
            icon={Trophy}
            accent={data.negotiations.winRate >= 20 ? "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600" : "bg-amber-50 text-amber-600"}
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Avg Rounds"
            value={data.negotiations.avgRounds}
            sub="Per negotiation"
            icon={RefreshCw}
            accent="bg-blue-50 text-blue-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Avg Won Rate"
            value={data.negotiations.avgRate != null ? `$${data.negotiations.avgRate.toLocaleString()}` : "—"}
            sub={data.negotiations.bestRate != null ? `Best: $${data.negotiations.bestRate.toLocaleString()}` : "No data yet"}
            icon={CheckCircle2}
            accent="bg-green-50 text-green-600"
          />
        </div>
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
          <NegotiationFunnel data={data.negotiations} />
          <TopSendersTable senders={data.topSenders} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* ── Section: VAPI Calls ── */}
      <div>
        <SectionHeader title="VAPI Call Performance" description="AI phone line analytics" />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
          <KpiCard
            label="Total Calls"
            value={data.vapi.total}
            sub={`Last ${days} days`}
            icon={Phone}
            accent="bg-purple-50 text-purple-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Conversion Rate"
            value={`${data.vapi.conversionRate}%`}
            sub={`${data.vapi.booking} booked`}
            icon={Trophy}
            accent={data.vapi.conversionRate >= 10 ? "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600" : "bg-amber-50 text-amber-600"}
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Quoting"
            value={data.vapi.quoting}
            sub="Carriers gave rates"
            icon={TrendingUp}
            accent="bg-blue-50 text-blue-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Negotiating"
            value={data.vapi.negotiating}
            sub="Active back-and-forth"
            icon={RefreshCw}
            accent="bg-amber-50 text-amber-600"
          />
        </div>
        <VapiChart perDay={data.vapi.perDay} intentData={data.vapi} />
      </div>

      {/* ── Section: AI / LLM Cost Tracking ── */}
      <div>
        <SectionHeader title="AI Cost Tracking" description="OpenRouter LLM usage & spend" />
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-4">
          <KpiCard
            label="Total Spend"
            value={data.llm.totalCost >= 1 ? `$${data.llm.totalCost.toFixed(2)}` : `$${data.llm.totalCost.toFixed(4)}`}
            sub={`Last ${days} days`}
            icon={DollarSign}
            accent="bg-violet-50 text-violet-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="API Calls"
            value={data.llm.totalCalls}
            sub={data.llm.totalCalls > 0 ? `~${Math.round(data.llm.totalCalls / days)}/day` : "No calls"}
            icon={Brain}
            accent="bg-purple-50 text-purple-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Total Tokens"
            value={data.llm.totalTokens >= 1000 ? `${(data.llm.totalTokens / 1000).toFixed(1)}k` : data.llm.totalTokens}
            sub={data.llm.totalCalls > 0 ? `~${Math.round(data.llm.totalTokens / data.llm.totalCalls)} per call` : "—"}
            icon={Zap}
            accent="bg-blue-50 text-blue-600"
          />
          <KpiCard
            label="Avg Latency"
            value={data.llm.avgLatencyMs > 0 ? `${(data.llm.avgLatencyMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s` : "—"}
            sub="Per API call"
            icon={Clock}
            accent="bg-amber-50 text-amber-600"
          />
        </div>
        <LlmCostChart
          costPerDay={data.llm.costPerDay}
          byPurpose={data.llm.byPurpose}
          byModel={data.llm.byModel}
          days={days}
        />
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/carriers/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useCarriers } from "@/hooks/useCarriers";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Plus, Search, Loader2, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";

const EQUIPMENT_OPTIONS = [
  "Dry Van",
  "Reefer",
  "Flatbed",
  "Step Deck",
  "Power Only",
  "Box Truck",
  "Hotshot",
  "Conestoga",
];

export default function CarriersPage() {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState("");
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  const [creating, setCreating] = useState(false);

  const { carriers, loading, error, total, totalPages, refresh } = useCarriers(debouncedSearch, page);

  // Debounce search
  const [searchTimeout, setSearchTimeout] = useState<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);
  function handleSearchChange(value: string) {
    setSearch(value);
    if (searchTimeout) clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
      setDebouncedSearch(value);
      setPage(1); // reset to page 1 on new search
    }, 300);
    setSearchTimeout(timeout);
  }

  // Form state
  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    name: "",
    contact_name: "",
    email: "",
    phone: "",
    mc_number: "",
    dot_number: "",
    equipment_types: [] as string[],
  });

  function toggleEquipment(eq: string) {
    setForm((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      equipment_types: prev.equipment_types.includes(eq)
        ? prev.equipment_types.filter((e) => e !== eq)
        : [...prev.equipment_types, eq],
    }));
  }

  async function handleCreate() {
    setCreating(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/carriers", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(form),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to add carrier");
      toast.success("Carrier added successfully");
      setDialogOpen(false);
      setForm({
        name: "",
        contact_name: "",
        email: "",
        phone: "",
        mc_number: "",
        dot_number: "",
        equipment_types: [],
      });
      refresh();
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to add carrier");
    } finally {
      setCreating(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Carrier Network</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Manage your carrier relationships
            {total > 0 && ` · ${total} carriers`}
          </p>
        </div>
        <Dialog open={dialogOpen} onOpenChange={setDialogOpen}>
          <DialogTrigger render={<Button />}>
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Add Carrier
          </DialogTrigger>
          <DialogContent className="max-w-lg">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>Add New Carrier</DialogTitle>
              <DialogDescription>
                Enter the carrier details below.
              </DialogDescription>
            </DialogHeader>
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 py-4">
              <div className="col-span-2 space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="carrier_name">Company Name</Label>
                <Input
                  id="carrier_name"
                  value={form.name}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, name: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="ABC Trucking"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="contact_name">Contact Name</Label>
                <Input
                  id="contact_name"
                  value={form.contact_name}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, contact_name: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="John Doe"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="carrier_email">Email</Label>
                <Input
                  id="carrier_email"
                  type="email"
                  value={form.email}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, email: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="dispatch@abc.com"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="carrier_phone">Phone</Label>
                <Input
                  id="carrier_phone"
                  value={form.phone}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, phone: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="(555) 123-4567"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="mc_number">MC #</Label>
                <Input
                  id="mc_number"
                  value={form.mc_number}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, mc_number: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="MC-123456"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="col-span-2 space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="dot_number">DOT #</Label>
                <Input
                  id="dot_number"
                  value={form.dot_number}
                  onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, dot_number: e.target.value })}
                  placeholder="1234567"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="col-span-2 space-y-2">
                <Label>Equipment Types</Label>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2">
                  {EQUIPMENT_OPTIONS.map((eq) => (
                    <label
                      key={eq}
                      className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm cursor-pointer"
                    >
                      <input
                        type="checkbox"
                        checked={form.equipment_types.includes(eq)}
                        onChange={() => toggleEquipment(eq)}
                        className="rounded border-input"
                      />
                      {eq}
                    </label>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <DialogFooter>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDialogOpen(false)}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button onClick={handleCreate} disabled={creating || !form.name}>
                {creating && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
                Add Carrier
              </Button>
            </DialogFooter>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>

      {/* Search */}
      <div className="relative w-72">
        <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
        <Input
          className="pl-9"
          placeholder="Search carriers..."
          value={search}
          onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {loading && carriers.length === 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty */}
      {!loading && carriers.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground text-sm">
          No carriers found
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      {carriers.length > 0 && (
        <div className="border rounded-lg">
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Contact</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Phone</TableHead>
                <TableHead>MC #</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Equipment</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {carriers.map((carrier) => (
                <TableRow key={carrier.id}>
                  <TableCell className="font-medium">{carrier.name}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {carrier.contact_name ?? <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {carrier.email ?? <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {carrier.phone ?? <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm font-mono">
                    {carrier.mc_number ?? <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1">
                      {carrier.equipment_types.length > 0
                        ? carrier.equipment_types.map((eq) => (
                            <Badge key={eq} variant="secondary" className="text-xs">
                              {eq}
                            </Badge>
                          ))
                        : <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                    </div>
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <span
                      className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                        carrier.status
                          ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700"
                          : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-500"
                      }`}
                    >
                      {carrier.status ? "Active" : "Inactive"}
                    </span>
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Pagination */}
      {totalPages > 1 && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Page {page} of {totalPages}
          </p>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.max(1, p - 1))}
              disabled={page <= 1 || loading}
            >
              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Previous
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.min(totalPages, p + 1))}
              disabled={page >= totalPages || loading}
            >
              Next
              <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
import { InboxTab } from "@/components/dashboard/InboxTab";
import { ActiveLoadsTab } from "@/components/dashboard/ActiveLoadsTab";
import { QuoteBoardTab } from "@/components/dashboard/QuoteBoardTab";
import { CallLogTab } from "@/components/dashboard/CallLogTab";

const TABS = ["INBOX", "ACTIVE LOADS", "QUOTE BOARD", "CALL LOG"] as const;

const TAB_ALIASES: Record<string, (typeof TABS)[number]> = {
  inbox: "INBOX",
  "active-loads": "ACTIVE LOADS",
  "quote-board": "QUOTE BOARD",
  "call-log": "CALL LOG",
};

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const tabParam = searchParams.get("tab");
  const initialTab = (tabParam && TAB_ALIASES[tabParam]) || "INBOX";

  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] =
    useState<(typeof TABS)[number]>(initialTab);

  // Sync tab from URL param changes
  useEffect(() => {
    if (tabParam && TAB_ALIASES[tabParam]) {
      setActiveTab(TAB_ALIASES[tabParam]);
    }
  }, [tabParam]);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      <div className="border-b px-6 flex gap-1 sticky top-0 bg-background z-10">
        {TABS.map((tab) => (
          <button
            key={tab}
            onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab)}
            className={`px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium transition-colors ${
              activeTab === tab
                ? "border-b-2 border-primary text-primary"
                : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
            }`}
          >
            {tab}
          </button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="flex-1 overflow-auto">
        {activeTab === "INBOX" && <InboxTab />}
        {activeTab === "ACTIVE LOADS" && <ActiveLoadsTab />}
        {activeTab === "QUOTE BOARD" && <QuoteBoardTab />}
        {activeTab === "CALL LOG" && <CallLogTab />}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/email/[id]/page.tsx
================================================
import { notFound } from "next/navigation";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, markMessageAsRead } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { EmailHeader } from "@/components/email-detail/email-header";
import { EmailBody } from "@/components/email-detail/email-body";
import { EmailActions } from "@/components/email-detail/email-actions";
import { AiReasoning } from "@/components/email-detail/ai-reasoning";
import { EmailDetailActions } from "@/components/email-detail/email-detail-actions";
import { ShipperReply } from "@/components/email-detail/shipper-reply";
import { StatusReply } from "@/components/email-detail/status-reply";
import { CustomTagReply } from "@/components/email-detail/custom-tag-reply";
import { ConversationThread } from "@/components/email-detail/conversation-thread";
import { ManualReply } from "@/components/email-detail/manual-reply";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import type { EmailDetail, ReplyStatus } from "@/types/email";

export default async function EmailDetailPage({
  params,
}: {
  params: Promise<{ id: string }>;
}) {
  const { id } = await params;
  const supabase = await createClient();

  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) notFound();

  const { data: email, error } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select(
      "id, user_id, subject, from_address, from_name, to_addresses, received_at, body_preview, body_html, is_read, has_attachments, conversation_id, category, detected_intent, ai_reasoning, confidence, manual_override, custom_tag, graph_message_id"
    )
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (error || !email) notFound();

  // Mark as read in DB + Outlook
  if (!email.is_read) {
    await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update({ is_read: true })
      .eq("id", id)
      .eq("user_id", user.id);

    // Also mark as read in Microsoft Outlook (non-fatal)
    if (email.graph_message_id) {
      getAccessToken(user.id)
        .then((token) => markMessageAsRead(token, email.graph_message_id))
        .catch((err) => console.error("[mark-read] Outlook sync failed:", err));
    }
  }

  // Fetch reply status
  const { data: replies } = await supabase
    .from("email_replies")
    .select("source")
    .eq("email_id", id);

  let replyStatus: ReplyStatus = null;
  if (replies && replies.length > 0) {
    const hasAi = replies.some(
      (r) => r.source === "ai_draft" || r.source === "ai_auto"
    );
    replyStatus = hasAi ? "ai_replied" : "replied";
  }

  // Fetch negotiation status for header tags (round count + intent)
  let negotiationStatus: { roundCount: number; intent: string } | null = null;
  if (email.conversation_id) {
    const { data: neg } = await supabase
      .from("email_negotiations")
      .select("round_count, intent")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .eq("conversation_id", email.conversation_id)
      .single();
    if (neg && neg.round_count > 0 && neg.intent) {
      negotiationStatus = { roundCount: neg.round_count, intent: neg.intent };
    }
  }

  const emailData = email as unknown as EmailDetail;

  const isSent = email.category === "SENT";
  // For sent emails, reply goes to the first recipient
  const replyTo = isSent
    ? (email.to_addresses as string[])?.[0] || email.from_address
    : email.from_address;

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
      <div className="max-w-4xl space-y-4">
        {!isSent && (
          <EmailActions
            emailId={email.id}
            currentCategory={email.category as EmailDetail["category"]}
            currentCustomTag={email.custom_tag}
          />
        )}
        <EmailHeader email={emailData} replyStatus={replyStatus} negotiationStatus={negotiationStatus} customTag={isSent ? "SENT" : email.custom_tag} />
        {!isSent && (
          <AiReasoning
            reasoning={email.ai_reasoning}
            confidence={email.confidence}
            manualOverride={email.manual_override}
          />
        )}
        <EmailBody html={email.body_html} />
        <ManualReply
          emailId={email.id}
          fromAddress={replyTo}
          subject={email.subject || undefined}
          category={email.category || undefined}
          detectedIntent={email.detected_intent || undefined}
          hasAttachments={email.has_attachments || false}
        />
        {!isSent && email.category === "SHIPPER" && !email.custom_tag && (
          <ShipperReply emailId={email.id} />
        )}
        {!isSent && email.category === "SHIPPER_STATUS" && !email.custom_tag && (
          <StatusReply emailId={email.id} />
        )}
        {!isSent && email.custom_tag && (
          <CustomTagReply emailId={email.id} customTag={email.custom_tag} />
        )}
        <Separator />
      </div>

      {/* Full-width zone — load extraction table expands to available screen width */}
      {!isSent && (
        <EmailDetailActions emailId={email.id} category={email.category} fromAddress={email.from_address} emailSubject={email.subject || undefined} manualOverride={email.manual_override} />
      )}

      <div className="max-w-4xl space-y-4">
        <Separator />
        <ConversationThread emailId={email.id} currentEmailId={email.id} />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/escalations/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useEscalations } from "@/hooks/useEscalations";
import { EscalationActions } from "@/components/escalations/EscalationActions";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Select,
  SelectContent,
  SelectItem,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectValue,
} from "@/components/ui/select";
import { AlertTriangle, Sparkles, RefreshCw, Radar } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import type { EscalationStatus } from "@/types/index";

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<EscalationStatus, string> = {
  open: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  resolved: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  expired: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-500",
};

const TRIGGER_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  rate_ceiling_exceeded: "Rate Ceiling Exceeded",
  no_carrier_coverage: "No Carrier Coverage",
  late_pickup_risk: "Late Pickup Risk",
  carrier_load_drop: "Carrier Load Drop",
  carrier_detention: "Carrier Detention",
  carrier_rate_dispute: "Rate Dispute",
  shipper_complaint: "Shipper Complaint",
  shipper_invoice_dispute: "Invoice Dispute",
  classifier_low_confidence: "Low Confidence",
  shipper_relationship: "Shipper Relationship",
  other: "Other",
};

export default function EscalationsPage() {
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>("open");
  const [scanning, setScanning] = useState(false);

  const { escalations, loading, error, openCount, refresh, resolveEscalation } =
    useEscalations(statusFilter as EscalationStatus);

  async function handleScan() {
    setScanning(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/cron/check-escalations");
      const json = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(json.error || "Scan failed");
      toast.success(`Scan complete: ${json.created} new escalation${json.created !== 1 ? "s" : ""} found`);
      refresh();
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Scan failed");
    } finally {
      setScanning(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Escalations</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            {openCount > 0
              ? `${openCount} open escalation${openCount !== 1 ? "s" : ""} requiring attention`
              : "No open escalations"}
          </p>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Button
            variant="outline"
            size="sm"
            onClick={handleScan}
            disabled={scanning}
            className="gap-2"
          >
            <Radar className={`h-4 w-4 ${scanning ? "animate-spin" : ""}`} />
            {scanning ? "Scanning..." : "Scan TTMS"}
          </Button>
          <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={refresh} className="gap-2">
            <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
            Refresh
          </Button>
          <Select value={statusFilter} onValueChange={(val) => val && setStatusFilter(val)}>
            <SelectTrigger className="w-40">
              <SelectValue placeholder="Filter" />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="open">Open</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="resolved">Resolved</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="all">All</SelectItem>
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {loading && (
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => (
            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-40 w-full" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty */}
      {!loading && escalations.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground gap-2">
          <AlertTriangle className="h-8 w-8" />
          <span className="text-sm">No escalations found</span>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Escalation cards */}
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {escalations.map((escalation) => (
          <Card key={escalation.id}>
            <CardHeader className="pb-3">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                  <span
                    className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS[escalation.status]}`}
                  >
                    {escalation.status.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + escalation.status.slice(1)}
                  </span>
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                    {TRIGGER_LABELS[escalation.trigger_type] ?? escalation.trigger_type}
                  </Badge>
                  {(escalation.load_context?.load_number || escalation.load?.load_number) && (
                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-mono">
                      {escalation.load_context?.load_number || escalation.load?.load_number}
                    </Badge>
                  )}
                </div>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
                  {new Date(escalation.created_at).toLocaleString()}
                </span>
              </div>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-3">
              {/* Load context */}
              {escalation.load_context && (
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  {escalation.load_context.origin && escalation.load_context.destination && (
                    <span>{escalation.load_context.origin} → {escalation.load_context.destination}</span>
                  )}
                  {escalation.load_context.carrier_name && (
                    <span>Carrier: {escalation.load_context.carrier_name}</span>
                  )}
                  {escalation.load_context.shipper_name && (
                    <span>Shipper: {escalation.load_context.shipper_name}</span>
                  )}
                  {escalation.load_context.carrier_rate != null && (
                    <span>Rate: ${escalation.load_context.carrier_rate.toLocaleString()}</span>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}
              <p className="text-sm">{escalation.summary}</p>

              {/* AI Recommendation */}
              {escalation.ai_recommendation && escalation.status === "open" && (
                <div className="flex items-start gap-2 p-3 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded-lg">
                  <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
                  <div>
                    <span className="text-xs font-medium text-blue-700">
                      AI Recommendation
                    </span>
                    <p className="text-sm text-blue-800 mt-0.5">
                      {escalation.options.find(
                        (o) => o.key === escalation.ai_recommendation
                      )?.label ?? escalation.ai_recommendation}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Resolution info */}
              {escalation.status === "resolved" && escalation.resolved_option && (
                <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  Resolved with:{" "}
                  <span className="font-medium text-foreground">
                    {escalation.options.find(
                      (o) => o.key === escalation.resolved_option
                    )?.label ?? escalation.resolved_option}
                  </span>
                  {escalation.resolved_at && (
                    <> on {new Date(escalation.resolved_at).toLocaleString()}</>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Actions */}
              {escalation.status === "open" && escalation.options.length > 0 && (
                <EscalationActions
                  escalation={escalation}
                  onResolve={(optionKey) =>
                    resolveEscalation(escalation.id, optionKey)
                  }
                />
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/inbox/compose/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useMemo } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import dynamic from "next/dynamic";
import {
  ArrowLeft, Send, Loader2, Trash2, Paperclip,
  Bold, Italic, Underline, Strikethrough, Link2, RemoveFormatting, Sparkles,
} from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { Kbd, KbdGroup } from "@/components/ui/kbd";
import "react-quill-new/dist/quill.snow.css";

const ReactQuill = dynamic(() => import("react-quill-new"), { ssr: false });

/* ── Custom toolbar with Lucide icons ── */
function CustomToolbar({ onImprove, improving }: { onImprove: () => void; improving: boolean }) {
  return (
    <div id="compose-toolbar" className="flex items-center gap-1 px-4 py-1.5" style={{ border: "none" }}>
      <TBtn className="ql-bold" title="Bold"><Bold className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></TBtn>
      <TBtn className="ql-italic" title="Italic"><Italic className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></TBtn>
      <TBtn className="ql-underline" title="Underline"><Underline className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></TBtn>
      <TBtn className="ql-strike" title="Strikethrough"><Strikethrough className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></TBtn>
      <div className="w-px h-4 bg-border mx-1" />
      <TBtn className="ql-link" title="Insert link"><Link2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></TBtn>
      <TBtn className="ql-clean" title="Clear formatting"><RemoveFormatting className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></TBtn>
      <div className="w-px h-4 bg-border mx-1" />
      <TBtn className="" title="Improve writing with AI" onClick={onImprove} disabled={improving}>
        {improving ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" /> : <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
      </TBtn>
    </div>
  );
}

function TBtn({ className, title, children, onClick, disabled }: { className: string; title: string; children: React.ReactNode; onClick?: () => void; disabled?: boolean }) {
  return (
    <button type="button" className={`${className} flex items-center justify-center h-7 w-7 rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-muted transition-colors disabled:opacity-40`} title={title} onClick={onClick} disabled={disabled}>
      {children}
    </button>
  );
}

export default function ComposePage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [improving, setImproving] = useState(false);
  const [showCcBcc, setShowCcBcc] = useState(false);
  const [editorHtml, setEditorHtml] = useState("");

  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    to: "",
    cc: "",
    bcc: "",
    subject: "",
  });

  function handleFieldChange(field: keyof typeof form, value: string) {
    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  }

  const modules = useMemo(() => ({
    toolbar: { container: "#compose-toolbar" },
  }), []);

  const formats = ["bold", "italic", "underline", "strike", "link"];

  const handleSend = useCallback(async () => {
    if (sending) return;
    setSending(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/email/send", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          to: form.to, cc: form.cc || undefined, bcc: form.bcc || undefined,
          subject: form.subject, body: editorHtml,
        }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) { const d = await res.json().catch(() => null); throw new Error(d?.error || "Failed"); }
      toast.success("Email sent");
      router.push("/dashboard");
    } catch (err) { toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send email"); }
    finally { setSending(false); }
  }, [form, editorHtml, sending, router]);

  async function handleImproveWriting() {
    const tmp = document.createElement("div");
    tmp.innerHTML = editorHtml;
    const plainText = tmp.textContent?.trim() || "";
    if (!plainText) { toast.error("Write something first"); return; }
    setImproving(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/ai/improve", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ text: plainText }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed");
      const data = await res.json();
      if (data.text) {
        const html = data.text.split("\n").filter((l: string) => l.trim()).map((l: string) => `<p>${l}</p>`).join("");
        setEditorHtml(html);
        toast.success("Writing improved");
      }
    } catch { toast.error("Failed to improve writing"); }
    finally { setImproving(false); }
  }

  const hasBody = editorHtml.replace(/<[^>]*>/g, "").trim().length > 0;
  const canSend = form.to.trim() && form.subject.trim() && hasBody;

  // Ctrl+Enter
  useEffect(() => {
    function onKey(e: KeyboardEvent) {
      if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === "Enter") {
        e.preventDefault();
        if (canSend) handleSend();
      }
    }
    window.addEventListener("keydown", onKey);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("keydown", onKey);
  }, [canSend, handleSend]);

  return (
    <div className="h-full flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center px-4 h-11 border-b shrink-0">
        <button onClick={() => router.push("/dashboard")} className="flex items-center justify-center h-7 w-7 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground" title="Back">
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
        </button>
        <span className="text-sm font-semibold ml-2">New Message</span>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-h-0">
        {/* Fields */}
        <Field label="To">
          <input autoFocus type="email" value={form.to} onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange("to", e.target.value)} placeholder="Add recipient" className="flex-1 h-10 text-[13px] bg-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground/40" />
          <button onClick={() => setShowCcBcc(!showCcBcc)} className="text-[13px] text-muted-foreground/60 hover:text-foreground transition-colors pr-4">Cc/Bcc</button>
        </Field>
        {showCcBcc && (
          <>
            <Field label="Cc"><input type="email" value={form.cc} onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange("cc", e.target.value)} placeholder="Add recipient" className="flex-1 h-10 text-[13px] bg-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground/40 pr-4" /></Field>
            <Field label="Bcc"><input type="email" value={form.bcc} onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange("bcc", e.target.value)} placeholder="Add recipient" className="flex-1 h-10 text-[13px] bg-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground/40 pr-4" /></Field>
          </>
        )}
        <Field label="Subj"><input value={form.subject} onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange("subject", e.target.value)} placeholder="Subject" className="flex-1 h-10 text-[13px] font-medium bg-transparent outline-none placeholder:text-muted-foreground/40 pr-4" /></Field>

        {/* Toolbar */}
        <CustomToolbar onImprove={handleImproveWriting} improving={improving} />

        {/* Editor */}
        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden compose-editor">
          <ReactQuill theme="snow" value={editorHtml} onChange={setEditorHtml} modules={modules} formats={formats} placeholder="Write your message..." />
        </div>

        {/* Footer */}
        <div className="shrink-0 border-t px-4 h-11 flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
            <button className="flex items-center justify-center h-7 w-7 rounded-md text-muted-foreground opacity-40 cursor-not-allowed" title="Attach file (coming soon)" disabled><Paperclip className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></button>
            <button onClick={() => router.push("/dashboard")} className="flex items-center justify-center h-7 w-7 rounded-md hover:bg-destructive/10 transition-colors text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive" title="Discard"><Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" /></button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <KbdGroup>
              <Kbd>⌃ Ctrl</Kbd>
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground/50">+</span>
              <Kbd>↵ Enter</Kbd>
            </KbdGroup>
            <Button onClick={handleSend} disabled={sending || !canSend} size="sm">
              {sending ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5 animate-spin" /> : <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-1.5" />}
              Send
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <style jsx global>{`
        .compose-editor .quill { min-height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
        .compose-editor .ql-toolbar.ql-snow { display: none !important; }
        #compose-toolbar, #compose-toolbar * { border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; }
        #compose-toolbar .ql-active { background: hsl(0 0% 94%) !important; color: hsl(0 0% 9%) !important; border-radius: 6px !important; }
        .compose-editor .ql-container.ql-snow { border: none !important; font-family: inherit; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; flex: 1; }
        .compose-editor .ql-editor { padding: 20px 24px; min-height: 300px; word-wrap: break-word; overflow-wrap: break-word; }
        .compose-editor .ql-editor.ql-blank::before { color: hsl(0 0% 63.9% / 0.4); font-style: normal; left: 24px !important; right: 24px !important; top: 20px !important; }
      `}</style>
    </div>
  );
}

function Field({ label, children }: { label: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="flex items-center border-b">
      <label className="text-[13px] text-muted-foreground pl-4 w-12 shrink-0">{label}</label>
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/lane-boundaries/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Plus, Loader2, Sparkles, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";

interface LaneBoundary {
  id: string;
  lane_description: string;
  origin_state: string;
  dest_state: string;
  equipment_type: string;
  floor_rate: number;
  target_rate: number;
  ceiling_rate: number;
  set_by: "ai" | "agent";
  created_at: string;
}

const emptyForm = {
  lane_description: "",
  origin_state: "",
  dest_state: "",
  equipment_type: "Dry Van",
  floor_rate: "",
  target_rate: "",
  ceiling_rate: "",
};

export default function LaneBoundariesPage() {
  const [boundaries, setBoundaries] = useState<LaneBoundary[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [dialogOpen, setDialogOpen] = useState(false);
  const [creating, setCreating] = useState(false);
  const [aiLoading, setAiLoading] = useState(false);
  const [aiReasoning, setAiReasoning] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [aiUsed, setAiUsed] = useState(false);
  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const [form, setForm] = useState(emptyForm);

  const fetchBoundaries = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/lane-boundaries");
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch lane boundaries");
      const data = await res.json();
      setBoundaries(data.boundaries ?? []);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchBoundaries();
  }, [fetchBoundaries]);

  async function handleCreate() {
    setCreating(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/lane-boundaries", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          ...form,
          floor_rate: Number(form.floor_rate),
          target_rate: Number(form.target_rate),
          ceiling_rate: Number(form.ceiling_rate),
          set_by: aiUsed ? "ai" : "agent",
        }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to add lane boundary");
      toast.success("Lane boundary added");
      setDialogOpen(false);
      setForm(emptyForm);
      setAiReasoning(null);
      setAiUsed(false);
      fetchBoundaries();
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to add lane boundary");
    } finally {
      setCreating(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleDelete(id: string) {
    setDeleting(id);
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/lane-boundaries?id=${id}`, {
        method: "DELETE",
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to delete");
      toast.success("Lane boundary deleted");
      fetchBoundaries();
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to delete lane boundary");
    } finally {
      setDeleting(null);
    }
  }

  async function handleAiSuggest() {
    if (!form.origin_state || !form.dest_state) {
      toast.error("Enter origin and destination states first");
      return;
    }
    setAiLoading(true);
    setAiReasoning(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/lane-boundaries/ai", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          origin_state: form.origin_state,
          dest_state: form.dest_state,
          equipment_type: form.equipment_type,
        }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("AI suggestion failed");
      const data = await res.json();
      setForm((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        floor_rate: String(data.floor_rate),
        target_rate: String(data.target_rate),
        ceiling_rate: String(data.ceiling_rate),
      }));
      if (data.reasoning) setAiReasoning(data.reasoning);
      setAiUsed(true);
      toast.success("AI rates applied");
    } catch {
      toast.error("AI suggestion failed");
    } finally {
      setAiLoading(false);
    }
  }

  const formValid =
    form.lane_description &&
    form.origin_state &&
    form.dest_state &&
    form.floor_rate &&
    form.target_rate &&
    form.ceiling_rate;

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Lane Boundaries</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Set floor, target, and ceiling rates for your lanes
          </p>
        </div>
        <Dialog
          open={dialogOpen}
          onOpenChange={(open) => {
            setDialogOpen(open);
            if (!open) {
              setForm(emptyForm);
              setAiReasoning(null);
              setAiUsed(false);
            }
          }}
        >
          <DialogTrigger render={<Button />}>
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
              Add Lane
          </DialogTrigger>
          <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-md">
            <DialogHeader>
              <DialogTitle>Add Lane Boundary</DialogTitle>
              <DialogDescription>
                Define rate boundaries for a lane or use AI to suggest rates.
              </DialogDescription>
            </DialogHeader>
            <div className="space-y-4 py-4">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="lane_desc">Lane Description</Label>
                <Input
                  id="lane_desc"
                  value={form.lane_description}
                  onChange={(e) =>
                    setForm({ ...form, lane_description: e.target.value })
                  }
                  placeholder="Chicago to Dallas"
                />
              </div>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="origin">Origin State</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="origin"
                    value={form.origin_state}
                    onChange={(e) =>
                      setForm({ ...form, origin_state: e.target.value.toUpperCase() })
                    }
                    placeholder="IL"
                    maxLength={2}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="dest">Destination State</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="dest"
                    value={form.dest_state}
                    onChange={(e) =>
                      setForm({ ...form, dest_state: e.target.value.toUpperCase() })
                    }
                    placeholder="TX"
                    maxLength={2}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="equip">Equipment Type</Label>
                <Input
                  id="equip"
                  value={form.equipment_type}
                  onChange={(e) =>
                    setForm({ ...form, equipment_type: e.target.value })
                  }
                  placeholder="Dry Van"
                />
              </div>

              {/* AI Suggest Button */}
              <Button
                type="button"
                variant="outline"
                className="w-full"
                onClick={handleAiSuggest}
                disabled={aiLoading || !form.origin_state || !form.dest_state}
              >
                {aiLoading ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                ) : (
                  <Sparkles className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                )}
                {aiLoading ? "Generating rates..." : "AI Suggest Rates"}
              </Button>

              {aiReasoning && (
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground bg-muted/50 rounded-md p-2">
                  {aiReasoning}
                </p>
              )}

              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="floor">Floor Rate ($)</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="floor"
                    type="number"
                    value={form.floor_rate}
                    onChange={(e) =>
                      setForm({ ...form, floor_rate: e.target.value })
                    }
                    placeholder="1800"
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label htmlFor="target">Target Rate ($)</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="target"
                    type="number"
                    value={form.target_rate}
                    onChange={(e) =>
                      setForm({ ...form, target_rate: e.target.value })
                    }
                    placeholder="2200"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label htmlFor="ceiling">Ceiling Rate ($)</Label>
                <Input
                  id="ceiling"
                  type="number"
                  value={form.ceiling_rate}
                  onChange={(e) =>
                    setForm({ ...form, ceiling_rate: e.target.value })
                  }
                  placeholder="2800"
                />
              </div>
            </div>
            <DialogFooter>
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDialogOpen(false)}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button onClick={handleCreate} disabled={creating || !formValid}>
                {creating && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
                Add
              </Button>
            </DialogFooter>
          </DialogContent>
        </Dialog>
      </div>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {loading && (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty */}
      {!loading && boundaries.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground text-sm gap-2">
          <p>No lane boundaries defined yet</p>
          <p className="text-xs">Add your first lane to set rate guardrails</p>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      {boundaries.length > 0 && (
        <div className="border rounded-lg">
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>Lane</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Origin</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Destination</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Equipment</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="text-right">Floor</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="text-right">Target</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="text-right">Ceiling</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Set By</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="w-10" />
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {boundaries.map((b) => (
                <TableRow key={b.id}>
                  <TableCell className="font-medium">
                    {b.lane_description}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>{b.origin_state}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell>{b.dest_state}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                    {b.equipment_type}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-right font-mono text-sm">
                    ${Number(b.floor_rate).toLocaleString()}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-right font-mono text-sm text-green-600">
                    ${Number(b.target_rate).toLocaleString()}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-right font-mono text-sm text-amber-600">
                    ${Number(b.ceiling_rate).toLocaleString()}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    {b.set_by === "ai" ? (
                      <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-violet-600 bg-violet-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                        <Sparkles className="h-3 w-3" />
                        AI
                      </span>
                    ) : (
                      <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                        Agent
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <Button
                      variant="ghost"
                      size="icon"
                      className="h-8 w-8 text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive"
                      onClick={() => handleDelete(b.id)}
                      disabled={deleting === b.id}
                    >
                      {deleting === b.id ? (
                        <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
                      ) : (
                        <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
                      )}
                    </Button>
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/loads/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { useLoads } from "@/hooks/useLoads";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Select,
  SelectContent,
  SelectItem,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectValue,
} from "@/components/ui/select";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Plus, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";
import type { LoadStatus } from "@/types/index";

const STATUS_OPTIONS: { value: string; label: string }[] = [
  { value: "all", label: "All Statuses" },
  { value: "pending", label: "Pending" },
  { value: "sourcing", label: "Sourcing" },
  { value: "booked", label: "Booked" },
  { value: "in_transit", label: "In Transit" },
  { value: "delivered", label: "Delivered" },
  { value: "cancelled", label: "Cancelled" },
];

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
  bidding: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-800",
  sourcing: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  booked: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  in_transit: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  delivered: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-700",
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  bidding: "Bidding",
  sourcing: "Sourcing",
  booked: "Booked",
  in_transit: "In Transit",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

export default function LoadsPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>("all");
  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
  const filterStatus = statusFilter === "all" ? undefined : (statusFilter as LoadStatus);
  const { loads, loading, error, hasMore, totalCount, refresh, fetchLoads } = useLoads(filterStatus, page);

  function handleFilterChange(value: string) {
    setStatusFilter(value);
    setPage(0);
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Loads</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Manage your freight loads
          </p>
        </div>
        <Button onClick={() => router.push("/loads/new")}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          Create Load
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Filter bar */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
        <Select value={statusFilter} onValueChange={(val) => handleFilterChange(val as string)}>
          <SelectTrigger className="w-48">
            <SelectValue placeholder="Filter by status" />
          </SelectTrigger>
          <SelectContent>
            {STATUS_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
              <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value}>
                {opt.label}
              </SelectItem>
            ))}
          </SelectContent>
        </Select>
        {totalCount > 0 && (
          <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            {totalCount} load{totalCount !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
          </span>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Error state */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading state */}
      {loading && loads.length === 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      {!loading && loads.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground text-sm">
          No loads found
        </div>
      )}

      {loads.length > 0 && (
        <>
          <div className="border rounded-lg">
            <Table>
              <TableHeader>
                <TableRow>
                  <TableHead>Load #</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Route</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Carrier</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Shipper</TableHead>
                  <TableHead className="text-right">Rate</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Pickup Date</TableHead>
                  <TableHead>Equipment</TableHead>
                </TableRow>
              </TableHeader>
              <TableBody>
                {loading ? (
                  Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
                    <TableRow key={`skel-${i}`}>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-16" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-40" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-5 w-16 rounded-full" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-24" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-24" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-right"><Skeleton className="h-4 w-14 ml-auto" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-20" /></TableCell>
                      <TableCell><Skeleton className="h-4 w-16" /></TableCell>
                    </TableRow>
                  ))
                ) : (
                  loads.map((load) => (
                    <TableRow
                      key={load.id}
                      className="cursor-pointer hover:bg-muted/50"
                      onClick={() => router.push(`/loads/${load.id}`)}
                    >
