                      <TableCell className="font-mono font-medium text-primary">
                        {load.load_number}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell>
                        {load.origin_city && load.origin_state
                          ? `${load.origin_city}, ${load.origin_state.toUpperCase()}`
                          : "TBD"}{" "}
                        &rarr;{" "}
                        {load.dest_city && load.dest_state
                          ? `${load.dest_city}, ${load.dest_state.toUpperCase()}`
                          : "TBD"}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell>
                        <span
                          className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS[load.status]}`}
                        >
                          {STATUS_LABELS[load.status]}
                        </span>
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-sm">
                        {load.carrier?.name ?? <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-sm">
                        {load.shipper?.name ?? <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-right font-mono text-sm">
                        {load.carrier_rate
                          ? `$${load.carrier_rate.toLocaleString()}`
                          : "--"}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-sm">
                        {load.pickup_date
                          ? new Date(load.pickup_date).toLocaleDateString()
                          : "--"}
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="text-sm">
                        {load.equipment_type ?? "--"}
                      </TableCell>
                    </TableRow>
                  ))
                )}
              </TableBody>
            </Table>
          </div>

          {/* Pagination */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Page {page + 1}
            </span>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Button
                variant="outline"
                size="sm"
                disabled={page === 0 || loading}
                onClick={() => {
                  const prev = page - 1;
                  setPage(prev);
                  fetchLoads(prev + 1); // hook uses 1-based pages
                }}
              >
                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
                Previous
              </Button>
              <Button
                variant="outline"
                size="sm"
                disabled={!hasMore || loading}
                onClick={() => {
                  const next = page + 1;
                  setPage(next);
                  fetchLoads(next + 1); // hook uses 1-based pages
                }}
              >
                Next
                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4" />
              </Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/loads/[id]/page.tsx
================================================
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
import { LoadDetail } from "@/components/loads/LoadDetail";
import { getOrder, mapOrderToLoad, vapiGetNegotiations } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

interface LoadPageProps {
  params: Promise<{ id: string }>;
}

export default async function LoadPage({ params }: LoadPageProps) {
  const { id } = await params;
  const supabase = await createClient();

  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    redirect("/");
  }

  const orderId = parseInt(id, 10);
  if (isNaN(orderId)) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64 text-muted-foreground">
        Invalid load ID
      </div>
    );
  }

  try {
    // Fetch load from TTMS
    const orderResult = await getOrder(orderId);
    const load = mapOrderToLoad(orderResult.data);

    // Fetch negotiations from VAPI for this order
    let quotes: { id: number; order_id: number; phone_number: string; rate: number; created_at: string }[] = [];
    try {
      const negResult = await vapiGetNegotiations({ order_id: orderId });
      quotes = negResult.data || [];
    } catch {
      // Negotiations may not exist — silently ignore
    }

    // Fetch activity log from Supabase (still local)
    const { data: activities } = await supabase
      .from("ai_activity_log")
      .select("*")
      .eq("load_id", id)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

    return (
      <div className="p-6">
        <LoadDetail
          load={load}
          quotes={quotes as never[] ?? []}
          activities={activities ?? []}
        />
      </div>
    );
  } catch {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64 text-muted-foreground">
        Load not found
      </div>
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/outbound/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { CarrierScoringPanel } from "@/components/loads/CarrierScoringPanel";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Search,
  Send,
  Package,
  MapPin,
  Calendar,
  Truck,
  DollarSign,
  Loader2,
  ChevronDown,
  ChevronUp,
} from "lucide-react";
import type { Load } from "@/types/index";

type LoadWithTTMS = Load & { _ttms?: { equipment_id?: number } };

const PAGE_SIZE = 15;

export default function OutboundPage() {
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [loads, setLoads] = useState<Load[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [loadingMore, setLoadingMore] = useState(false);
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(false);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [senderName, setSenderName] = useState("Red Dog Logistics");
  const [currentSearch, setCurrentSearch] = useState<string | undefined>();
  const [collapsedIds, setCollapsedIds] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());

  // Fetch agent name
  useEffect(() => {
    const supabase = createClient();
    supabase.auth.getUser().then(({ data: { user } }) => {
      if (!user) return;
      supabase
        .from("profiles")
        .select("name, display_name")
        .eq("id", user.id)
        .single()
        .then(({ data }) => {
          if (data?.name || data?.display_name) {
            setSenderName(data.name || data.display_name);
          }
        });
    });
  }, []);

  const fetchLoads = useCallback(async (loadNumber?: string, pageNum: number = 1, append: boolean = false) => {
    if (append) {
      setLoadingMore(true);
    } else {
      setLoading(true);
    }
    setError(null);
    try {
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.set("status", "pending");
      params.set("per_page", String(PAGE_SIZE));
      params.set("page", String(pageNum));
      if (loadNumber) params.set("load_number", loadNumber);

      const res = await fetch(`/api/loads?${params.toString()}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch loads");

      const data = await res.json();
      const fetched: Load[] = data.data ?? [];

      if (append) {
        setLoads((prev) => [...prev, ...fetched]);
      } else {
        setLoads(fetched);
      }
      setHasMore(fetched.length === PAGE_SIZE);
      setPage(pageNum);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to fetch loads");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
      setLoadingMore(false);
    }
  }, []);

  // Initial fetch
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchLoads();
  }, [fetchLoads]);

  function handleSearch(e: React.FormEvent) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const q = search.trim() || undefined;
    setCurrentSearch(q);
    fetchLoads(q, 1, false);
  }

  function handleLoadMore() {
    fetchLoads(currentSearch, page + 1, true);
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-8 space-y-8 max-w-5xl">
      {/* Header */}
      <div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="p-2 bg-primary/10 rounded-lg">
            <Send className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
          </div>
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Outbound</h1>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Score carriers and send proactive offer emails for pending loads
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Search */}
      <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex items-center gap-3 max-w-lg">
        <div className="relative flex-1">
          <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <Input
            value={search}
            onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            placeholder="Search by order number..."
            className="pl-10 h-10 text-sm"
          />
        </div>
        <Button type="submit" size="sm" className="h-10 px-4">
          Search
        </Button>
        {search && (
          <Button
            type="button"
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-10"
            onClick={() => {
              setSearch("");
              setCurrentSearch(undefined);
              fetchLoads(undefined, 1, false);
            }}
          >
            Clear
          </Button>
        )}
      </form>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {loading && (
        <div className="space-y-5">
          {Array.from({ length: 3 }).map((_, i) => (
            <div key={i} className="border rounded-xl p-6 space-y-4">
              <Skeleton className="h-6 w-72" />
              <Skeleton className="h-4 w-48" />
              <div className="space-y-2 pt-2">
                <Skeleton className="h-16 w-full rounded-lg" />
                <Skeleton className="h-16 w-full rounded-lg" />
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty state */}
      {!loading && loads.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 text-muted-foreground">
          <Package className="h-10 w-10 mb-3 opacity-40" />
          <p className="text-base font-medium">
            {search ? `No pending loads match "${search}"` : "No pending loads"}
          </p>
          <p className="text-sm mt-1">
            {search ? "Try a different order number" : "Loads with PENDING status will appear here"}
          </p>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Load cards */}
      {!loading && loads.length > 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-5">
          {loads.map((load) => {
            const origin =
              load.origin_city && load.origin_state
                ? `${load.origin_city}, ${load.origin_state.toUpperCase()}`
                : "TBD";
            const dest =
              load.dest_city && load.dest_state
                ? `${load.dest_city}, ${load.dest_state.toUpperCase()}`
                : "TBD";
            const isCollapsed = collapsedIds.has(load.id);

            return (
              <div
                key={load.id}
                className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm"
              >
                {/* Load header */}
                <div className={`px-6 py-5 bg-muted/20${isCollapsed ? "" : " border-b"}`}>
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      {/* Order number */}
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        <span className="font-mono text-base font-bold text-primary">
                          {load.load_number}
                        </span>
                        <Badge
                          variant="outline"
                          className="text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold text-amber-600 border-amber-300 bg-amber-50"
                        >
                          Pending
                        </Badge>
                      </div>

                      {/* Route */}
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm">
                        <MapPin className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
                        <span className="font-medium">{origin}</span>
                        <span className="text-muted-foreground">&rarr;</span>
                        <span className="font-medium">{dest}</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Load details pills + toggle */}
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 shrink-0">
                      {load.equipment_type && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground bg-muted/60 rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5">
                          <Truck className="h-3 w-3" />
                          <span>{load.equipment_type}</span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {load.pickup_date && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground bg-muted/60 rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5">
                          <Calendar className="h-3 w-3" />
                          <span>
                            {new Date(load.pickup_date).toLocaleDateString()}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      {load.shipper_rate && (
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs font-semibold text-foreground bg-muted/60 rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5">
                          <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3" />
                          <span className="font-mono">
                            {load.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                      )}
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        className="h-8 w-8 p-0"
                        onClick={() =>
                          setCollapsedIds((prev) => {
                            const next = new Set(prev);
                            if (next.has(load.id)) {
                              next.delete(load.id);
                            } else {
                              next.add(load.id);
                            }
                            return next;
                          })
                        }
                      >
                        {isCollapsed ? (
                          <ChevronDown className="h-4 w-4" />
                        ) : (
                          <ChevronUp className="h-4 w-4" />
                        )}
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Carrier scoring */}
                {!isCollapsed && (
                  <CarrierScoringPanel
                    loadId={load.id}
                    load={{
                      id: load.id,
                      load_number: load.load_number,
                      origin_city: load.origin_city,
                      origin_state: load.origin_state,
                      dest_city: load.dest_city,
                      dest_state: load.dest_state,
                      equipment_type: load.equipment_type,
                      equipment_id: (load as LoadWithTTMS)._ttms?.equipment_id ?? null,
                      pickup_date: load.pickup_date,
                      delivery_date: load.delivery_date ?? null,
                      weight_lbs: load.weight_lbs,
                      commodity: load.commodity,
                      shipper_rate: load.shipper_rate,
                      total_miles: load.total_miles ?? null,
                    }}
                    senderName={senderName}
                  />
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })}

          {/* Load more */}
          {hasMore && (
            <div className="flex justify-center pt-2">
              <Button
                variant="outline"
                size="sm"
                className="h-10 px-6"
                disabled={loadingMore}
                onClick={handleLoadMore}
              >
                {loadingMore ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                ) : null}
                Load more
              </Button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/quote-board/[loadId]/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { useRouter, useParams } from "next/navigation";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import {
  ArrowLeft,
  MapPin,
  Truck,
  Calendar,
  Weight,
  DollarSign,
  Mail,
  Phone,
  Send,
  Ruler,
} from "lucide-react";

// ============================================================
// Types
// ============================================================

interface QuoteBoardQuote {
  source: "email" | "outbound" | "vapi_negotiation" | "vapi_call";
  identifier: string;
  display_name: string;
  latest_rate: number | null;
  ai_rate: number | null;
  status: string;
  round_count: number;
  is_known: boolean;
  carrier_id: string | null;
  mc_number: string | null;
  last_activity: string;
  reference_id: string | null;
}

interface VapiCallDetail {
  call_id: string;
  phone_number: string | null;
  order_id: string | null;
  rate: number | null;
  intent: string | null;
  status: string | null;
  call_started_at: string | null;
  summary: string | null;
}

interface LoadInfo {
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  miles: number | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
  order_status: string | null;
}

interface QuoteBoardLoad {
  load_id: string;
  quote_count: number;
  latest_activity: string;
  best_rate: number | null;
  outbound_count: number;
  load_info: LoadInfo | null;
  quotes: QuoteBoardQuote[];
}

// ============================================================
// Status config
// ============================================================

const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; classes: string }> = {
  open: { label: "Quoted", classes: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-300" },
  quoted: { label: "Quoted", classes: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 border-gray-300" },
  offered: { label: "Email Sent", classes: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-300" },
  negotiating: { label: "Negotiating", classes: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-300" },
  accepted: { label: "Best Book", classes: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-300" },
  rejected: { label: "Rejected", classes: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-300" },
  closed: { label: "Closed", classes: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 border-gray-300" },
  called: { label: "Called", classes: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 border-purple-300" },
};

// ============================================================
// Helpers
// ============================================================

function formatRoute(info: LoadInfo): string {
  const origin = [info.origin_city, info.origin_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
  const dest = [info.dest_city, info.dest_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
  if (origin && dest) return `${origin} → ${dest}`;
  if (origin) return origin;
  if (dest) return `→ ${dest}`;
  return "";
}

function formatPickupDay(dateStr: string): string {
  const d = new Date(dateStr);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return dateStr;
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

function computeTransitDays(pickup: string | null, delivery: string | null): number | null {
  if (!pickup || !delivery) return null;
  const p = new Date(pickup);
  const d = new Date(delivery);
  if (isNaN(p.getTime()) || isNaN(d.getTime())) return null;
  const days = Math.round((d.getTime() - p.getTime()) / 86400000);
  return days > 0 ? days : null;
}

function relativeTime(iso: string): string {
  const d = new Date(iso);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return iso;
  const diffMs = Date.now() - d.getTime();
  const mins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
  if (mins < 1) return "just now";
  if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
  const hours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
  const days = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`;
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

function sourceIcon(source: string) {
  if (source === "outbound") return Send;
  if (source === "vapi_call" || source === "vapi_negotiation") return Phone;
  return Mail;
}

function sourceLabel(source: string) {
  if (source === "outbound") return "Outbound";
  if (source === "vapi_call") return "Phone";
  if (source === "vapi_negotiation") return "Phone";
  return "Inbound";
}

// ============================================================
// Page
// ============================================================

export default function QuoteBoardDetailPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const params = useParams();
  const loadId = params.loadId as string;

  const [load, setLoad] = useState<QuoteBoardLoad | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [userName, setUserName] = useState("");
  const [callModal, setCallModal] = useState<VapiCallDetail | null>(null);
  const [callModalLoading, setCallModalLoading] = useState(false);

  // Fetch board data and find this load
  const fetchLoad = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/quote-board", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ period: "week" }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch");
      const json = await res.json();
      const allLoads: QuoteBoardLoad[] = json.loads || [];
      const found = allLoads.find((l) => l.load_id === loadId) || null;
      setLoad(found);
      if (json.user_name) setUserName(json.user_name);
    } catch {
      setLoad(null);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [loadId]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchLoad();
  }, [fetchLoad]);

  async function openCallModal(callId: string) {
    setCallModalLoading(true);
    setCallModal(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/vapi/call?id=${encodeURIComponent(callId)}`);
      if (res.ok) {
        const json = await res.json();
        setCallModal(json.call);
      }
    } finally {
      setCallModalLoading(false);
    }
  }

  // ============================================================
  // Render
  // ============================================================

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-64" />
        <Skeleton className="h-5 w-96" />
        <Skeleton className="h-5 w-48" />
        <div className="space-y-2 mt-8">
          {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-14 w-full rounded-lg" />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (!load) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6">
        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="gap-2 mb-6" onClick={() => router.push("/dashboard?tab=quote-board")}>
          <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Back to Quote Board
        </Button>
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">Load #{loadId} not found</p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">This load may not have any active quotes</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const info = load.load_info;
  const route = info ? formatRoute(info) : "";
  const transitDays = info ? computeTransitDays(info.pickup_date, info.delivery_date) : null;
  const postedRate = info?.shipper_rate ? Math.round(info.shipper_rate * 0.82) : null;

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      {/* Back button */}
      <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="gap-2 -ml-2" onClick={() => router.push("/dashboard?tab=quote-board")}>
        <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" /> Back to Quote Board
      </Button>

      {/* Load header */}
      <div>
        {/* Route line */}
        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold flex items-center gap-2">
          {route ? (
            <>
              <MapPin className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
              {route}
            </>
          ) : (
            <span className="font-mono">Load #{load.load_id}</span>
          )}
        </h1>

        {/* Details line */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mt-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground flex-wrap">
          {route && (
            <span className="font-mono text-xs text-primary/70">#{load.load_id}</span>
          )}
          {info?.weight_lbs && (
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Weight className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              {info.weight_lbs.toLocaleString()} lbs
            </span>
          )}
          {info?.equipment_type && (
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Truck className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              {info.equipment_type}
            </span>
          )}
          {info?.pickup_date && (
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Calendar className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              {formatPickupDay(info.pickup_date)} pickup
            </span>
          )}
          {info?.miles && (
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
              <Ruler className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              {info.miles.toLocaleString()} miles
            </span>
          )}
          {transitDays && (
            <span>Transit {transitDays} day{transitDays !== 1 ? "s" : ""}</span>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Outbound summary */}
        {load.outbound_count > 0 && userName && (
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-2">
            AI emailed <span className="font-semibold text-foreground">{load.outbound_count}</span> carrier{load.outbound_count !== 1 ? "s" : ""} as{" "}
            <span className="font-semibold text-foreground">{userName}</span>
          </p>
        )}

        {/* Rate summary chips */}
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4 mt-3 flex-wrap">
          {info?.shipper_rate != null && (
            <div className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-muted/50 border text-xs">
              <span className="text-muted-foreground">Shipper Rate</span>
              <span className="ml-2 font-semibold font-mono">${info.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </div>
          )}
          {postedRate != null && (
            <div className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 text-xs">
              <span className="text-blue-600">Client Rate (82%)</span>
              <span className="ml-2 font-semibold font-mono text-blue-700">${postedRate.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </div>
          )}
          {load.best_rate != null && (
            <div className="px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg bg-green-50 border border-green-200 text-xs">
              <span className="text-green-600">Best Carrier Offer</span>
              <span className="ml-2 font-semibold font-mono text-green-700">${load.best_rate.toLocaleString()}</span>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* VAPI call detail modal */}
      <Dialog open={callModalLoading || callModal !== null} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setCallModal(null); }}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-lg">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Phone className="h-4 w-4 text-purple-600" />
              Call Details
            </DialogTitle>
          </DialogHeader>
          {callModalLoading ? (
            <div className="space-y-2 py-4">
              <Skeleton className="h-4 w-3/4" />
              <Skeleton className="h-4 w-1/2" />
              <Skeleton className="h-20 w-full" />
            </div>
          ) : callModal ? (
            <div className="space-y-4 text-sm">
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-4 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                {callModal.phone_number && (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Phone className="h-3 w-3" />
                    {callModal.phone_number}
                  </span>
                )}
                {callModal.call_started_at && (
                  <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                    <Calendar className="h-3 w-3" />
                    {new Date(callModal.call_started_at).toLocaleString("en-US", {
                      month: "short", day: "numeric", hour: "numeric", minute: "2-digit",
                    })}
                  </span>
                )}
                {callModal.intent && (
                  <span className="capitalize font-medium text-purple-600">{callModal.intent}</span>
                )}
                {callModal.rate != null && (
                  <span className="font-semibold font-mono text-green-600">
                    ${Number(callModal.rate).toLocaleString()}
                  </span>
                )}
              </div>
              {callModal.summary ? (
                <div className="rounded-lg bg-muted/40 p-3 text-sm leading-relaxed">
                  {callModal.summary}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <p className="text-muted-foreground text-xs">No summary available for this call.</p>
              )}
            </div>
          ) : null}
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>

      {/* Carrier table */}
      <div className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full text-sm">
            <thead>
              <tr className="bg-muted/30 border-b text-left">
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Carrier</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Source</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-right">Carrier Offer</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-right">AI Rate</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-right">Client Rate</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-right">$/Mile</th>
                {transitDays && (
                  <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-center">Transit</th>
                )}
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-center">Status</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-right">Margin</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3 font-semibold text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground text-right">Last Activity</th>
                <th className="px-4 py-3"></th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody className="divide-y">
              {load.quotes.map((quote, idx) => {
                const Icon = sourceIcon(quote.source);
                const statusCfg = STATUS_CONFIG[quote.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.open;
                const isOutbound = quote.source === "outbound";
                const isVapi = quote.source === "vapi_call" || quote.source === "vapi_negotiation";

                // Compute $/mile
                const ratePerMile =
                  quote.latest_rate != null && info?.miles
                    ? (quote.latest_rate / info.miles).toFixed(2)
                    : null;

                // Row background tint
                const rowBg = isOutbound
                  ? "bg-blue-50/30"
                  : isVapi
                  ? "bg-purple-50/20"
                  : "";

                return (
                  <tr key={`${quote.identifier}-${idx}`} className={`hover:bg-muted/10 transition-colors ${rowBg}`}>
                    {/* Carrier */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <div className="flex flex-col">
                        <span className="font-semibold truncate max-w-[200px]">{quote.display_name}</span>
                        {quote.display_name !== quote.identifier && (
                          <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground truncate max-w-[200px]">{quote.identifier}</span>
                        )}
                        {quote.mc_number && quote.mc_number !== "NA" && (
                          <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">MC# {quote.mc_number}</span>
                        )}
                      </div>
                    </td>

                    {/* Source */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3">
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <div className={`p-1 rounded ${isOutbound ? "bg-blue-100" : isVapi ? "bg-purple-100" : "bg-muted/60"}`}>
                          <Icon className={`h-3 w-3 ${isOutbound ? "text-blue-600" : isVapi ? "text-purple-600" : "text-muted-foreground"}`} />
                        </div>
                        <span className={`text-[11px] font-medium ${isOutbound ? "text-blue-600" : isVapi ? "text-purple-600" : "text-muted-foreground"}`}>
                          {sourceLabel(quote.source)}
                        </span>
                      </div>
                    </td>

                    {/* Carrier Rate */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      {quote.latest_rate != null ? (
                        <span className="font-semibold font-mono text-green-600 flex items-center justify-end gap-0.5">
                          <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3" />
                          {quote.latest_rate.toLocaleString()}
                        </span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Pending</span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    {/* AI Rate */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      {quote.ai_rate != null ? (
                        <span className="font-mono text-xs text-orange-600">${quote.ai_rate.toLocaleString()}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">—</span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    {/* Our Rate (Posted) */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      {postedRate != null ? (
                        <span className="font-mono text-xs text-blue-600">${postedRate.toLocaleString()}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">—</span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    {/* $/Mile */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      {ratePerMile != null ? (
                        <span className="font-mono text-xs">${ratePerMile}</span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">—</span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    {/* Transit */}
                    {transitDays && (
                      <td className="px-4 py-3 text-center">
                        <span className="text-xs">{transitDays}d</span>
                      </td>
                    )}

                    {/* Status */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-center">
                      <Badge
                        variant="outline"
                        className={`text-[10px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold ${statusCfg.classes}`}
                      >
                        {statusCfg.label}
                      </Badge>
                      {quote.status === "accepted" && (
                        <span className="block text-[9px] text-green-600 font-medium mt-0.5 truncate max-w-[110px] mx-auto">
                          via {isVapi ? "call" : isOutbound ? "email" : "email"} · {quote.identifier}
                        </span>
                      )}
                      {quote.status !== "accepted" && quote.round_count > 0 && (
                        <span className="block text-[9px] text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
                          Round {quote.round_count}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    {/* Margin */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      {quote.latest_rate != null && postedRate != null ? (() => {
                        const margin = postedRate - quote.latest_rate;
                        const marginPct = parseFloat(((margin / postedRate) * 100).toFixed(1));
                        return (
                          <span className={`font-mono text-xs font-semibold ${marginPct >= 15 ? "text-green-600" : "text-red-600"}`}>
                            {Math.abs(marginPct)}%
                          </span>
                        );
                      })() : (
                        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">—</span>
                      )}
                    </td>

                    {/* Last Activity */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">{relativeTime(quote.last_activity)}</span>
                    </td>

                    {/* Action */}
                    <td className="px-4 py-3 text-right">
                      {(quote.source === "email" || quote.source === "outbound") && quote.reference_id ? (
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 px-2 text-xs gap-1 text-blue-600 hover:text-blue-700 hover:bg-blue-50"
                          onClick={() => router.push(`/email/${quote.reference_id}`)}
                        >
                          <Mail className="h-3 w-3" />
                          Show Email
                        </Button>
                      ) : quote.source === "vapi_call" && quote.reference_id ? (
                        <Button
                          variant="ghost"
                          size="sm"
                          className="h-7 px-2 text-xs gap-1 text-purple-600 hover:text-purple-700 hover:bg-purple-50"
                          onClick={() => openCallModal(quote.reference_id!)}
                        >
                          <Phone className="h-3 w-3" />
                          View Call
                        </Button>
                      ) : (
                        <span />
                      )}
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                );
              })}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/sent/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import {
  SendHorizontal,
  Mail,
  RefreshCw,
  Loader2,
  Paperclip,
} from "lucide-react";
import { formatDistanceToNow } from "date-fns";

interface SentEmail {
  id: string;
  subject: string | null;
  from_address: string;
  from_name: string | null;
  to_addresses: string[];
  received_at: string;
  body_preview: string | null;
  has_attachments: boolean;
  conversation_id: string | null;
}

export default function SentPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [emails, setEmails] = useState<SentEmail[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [syncing, setSyncing] = useState(false);

  async function fetchSent() {
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/sent");
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        setEmails(data.items || []);

        // If empty, trigger a Graph sync
        if (!data.items || data.items.length === 0) {
          triggerSync();
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // silently fail
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function triggerSync() {
    setSyncing(true);
    try {
      await fetch("/api/emails/sync-sent", { method: "POST" });
      // Re-fetch after sync
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/sent");
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        setEmails(data.items || []);
      }
    } catch {
      // silently fail
    } finally {
      setSyncing(false);
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchSent();

    // Subscribe to Realtime for new sent emails
    const supabase = createClient();
    let userId: string | null = null;

    async function setupRealtime() {
      const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
      if (!user) return;
      userId = user.id;

      const channel = supabase
        .channel("sent-emails")
        .on(
          "postgres_changes",
          {
            event: "INSERT",
            schema: "public",
            table: "emails",
            filter: `user_id=eq.${userId}`,
          },
          (payload) => {
            const newEmail = payload.new as SentEmail & { category?: string };
            if (newEmail.category === "SENT") {
              setEmails((prev) => [newEmail, ...prev].slice(0, 200));
            }
          }
        )
        .subscribe();

      return channel;
    }

    let channel: ReturnType<typeof supabase.channel> | null = null;
    setupRealtime().then((ch) => { channel = ch || null; });

    return () => {
      if (channel) {
        const sb = createClient();
        sb.removeChannel(channel);
      }
    };
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, []);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3 mb-5">
          <SendHorizontal className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
          <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Sent</h1>
        </div>
        {Array.from({ length: 8 }).map((_, i) => (
          <Skeleton key={i} className="h-16 w-full rounded-lg" />
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-5">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <SendHorizontal className="h-5 w-5 text-primary" />
          <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold">Sent</h1>
          <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{emails.length} emails</span>
        </div>
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="sm"
          className="gap-2 h-9"
          onClick={triggerSync}
          disabled={syncing}
        >
          {syncing ? (
            <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
          ) : (
            <RefreshCw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
          )}
          Sync
        </Button>
      </div>

      {syncing && emails.length === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
          <Loader2 className="h-8 w-8 mb-3 animate-spin opacity-40" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">Syncing sent emails from Outlook...</p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">This may take a moment on first load</p>
        </div>
      )}

      {!syncing && emails.length === 0 && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
          <Mail className="h-12 w-12 mb-3 opacity-40" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">No sent emails</p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">Emails you send will appear here</p>
        </div>
      )}

      {emails.length > 0 && (
        <div className="border rounded-xl overflow-hidden divide-y">
          {emails.map((email) => {
            const toList = email.to_addresses?.join(", ") || "Unknown";
            const timeAgo = formatDistanceToNow(new Date(email.received_at), { addSuffix: true });

            return (
              <button
                key={email.id}
                type="button"
                className="w-full text-left px-4 py-3 hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors flex items-start gap-3"
                onClick={() => router.push(`/email/${email.id}`)}
              >
                {/* Avatar */}
                <div className="mt-0.5 shrink-0">
                  <div className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-blue-100 flex items-center justify-center">
                    <SendHorizontal className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-600" />
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Content */}
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-0.5">
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground truncate">
                      To: {toList}
                    </span>
                    {email.has_attachments && (
                      <Paperclip className="h-3 w-3 text-muted-foreground shrink-0" />
                    )}
                    <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground ml-auto shrink-0">
                      {timeAgo}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                  {email.subject && (
                    <p className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground/80 truncate mb-0.5">
                      {email.subject}
                    </p>
                  )}
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
                    {email.body_preview || "(no content)"}
                  </p>
                </div>
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/settings/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Select,
  SelectContent,
  SelectItem,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectValue,
} from "@/components/ui/select";
import {
  Mail,
  CheckCircle,
  XCircle,
  Moon,
  Sun,
  Plus,
  X,
  Tag,
  RefreshCw,
  Shield,
} from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { useTheme } from "next-themes";

interface Preferences {
  auto_classify: boolean;
  important_keywords: string[];
  ignore_domains: string[];
  sync_interval_minutes: number;
}

interface EmailConnectionStatus {
  connected: boolean;
  email_address: string | null;
  provider: string | null;
  last_synced_at: string | null;
}

export default function SettingsPage() {
  const { theme, setTheme } = useTheme();
  const [prefs, setPrefs] = useState<Preferences | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [emailConnection, setEmailConnection] =
    useState<EmailConnectionStatus | null>(null);

  // Tag inputs
  const [newKeyword, setNewKeyword] = useState("");
  const [newDomain, setNewDomain] = useState("");

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchAll() {
      try {
        const [prefsRes, connRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
          fetch("/api/settings"),
          fetch("/api/email-connection"),
        ]);
        if (prefsRes.status === "fulfilled" && prefsRes.value.ok) {
          setPrefs(await prefsRes.value.json());
        }
        if (connRes.status === "fulfilled" && connRes.value.ok) {
          setEmailConnection(await connRes.value.json());
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error("Failed to fetch settings:", error);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }
    fetchAll();
  }, []);

  // Auto-save preferences on any change
  const savePrefs = useCallback(async (updated: Preferences) => {
    setPrefs(updated);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/settings", {
        method: "PUT",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(updated),
      });
      if (!res.ok) toast.error("Failed to save");
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to save");
    }
  }, []);

  function addKeyword() {
    if (!prefs) return;
    const kw = newKeyword.trim();
    if (kw && !prefs.important_keywords.includes(kw)) {
      savePrefs({ ...prefs, important_keywords: [...prefs.important_keywords, kw] });
      setNewKeyword("");
    }
  }

  function removeKeyword(kw: string) {
    if (!prefs) return;
    savePrefs({ ...prefs, important_keywords: prefs.important_keywords.filter((k) => k !== kw) });
  }

  function addDomain() {
    if (!prefs) return;
    const d = newDomain.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (d && !prefs.ignore_domains.includes(d)) {
      savePrefs({ ...prefs, ignore_domains: [...prefs.ignore_domains, d] });
      setNewDomain("");
    }
  }

  function removeDomain(d: string) {
    if (!prefs) return;
    savePrefs({ ...prefs, ignore_domains: prefs.ignore_domains.filter((dom) => dom !== d) });
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 space-y-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        <Skeleton className="h-8 w-32" />
        <Skeleton className="h-32" />
        <Skeleton className="h-48" />
        <Skeleton className="h-32" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-8 max-w-2xl mx-auto">
      <div>
        <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold tracking-tight">Settings</h1>
        <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          All changes save automatically.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* ── Email Connection ── */}
      <section className="space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Mail className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
            Email Connection
          </h2>
        </div>
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            {emailConnection ? (
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  {emailConnection.connected ? (
                    <CheckCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-500" />
                  ) : (
                    <XCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" />
                  )}
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium">
                      {emailConnection.connected
                        ? emailConnection.email_address || "Connected"
                        : "Not Connected"}
                    </p>
                    {emailConnection.last_synced_at && (
                      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                        Last sync {new Date(emailConnection.last_synced_at).toLocaleString()}
                      </p>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
                {emailConnection.provider && (
                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs capitalize">
                    {emailConnection.provider}
                  </Badge>
                )}
              </div>
            ) : (
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                No email connection configured.
              </p>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>

      {/* ── Sync & Classification ── */}
      {prefs && (
        <section className="space-y-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
              Sync & Classification
            </h2>
          </div>
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-4 space-y-5">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Auto-classify emails</Label>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    Classify new emails automatically after each sync
                  </p>
                </div>
                <Switch
                  checked={prefs.auto_classify}
                  onCheckedChange={(v) => savePrefs({ ...prefs, auto_classify: v })}
                />
              </div>

              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <div>
                  <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Sync interval</Label>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    How often to check for new emails
                  </p>
                </div>
                <Select
                  value={String(prefs.sync_interval_minutes)}
                  onValueChange={(v) =>
                    v && savePrefs({ ...prefs, sync_interval_minutes: parseInt(v) })
                  }
                >
                  <SelectTrigger className="w-28">
                    <SelectValue />
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    <SelectItem value="5">5 min</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="15">15 min</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="30">30 min</SelectItem>
                    <SelectItem value="60">1 hour</SelectItem>
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </section>
      )}

      {/* ── Classification Rules ── */}
      {prefs && (
        <section className="space-y-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Tag className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
              Classification Rules
            </h2>
          </div>
          <Card>
            <CardContent className="p-4 space-y-5">
              {/* Important keywords */}
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <div>
                  <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Important keywords</Label>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    Emails with these words are tagged Important
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <Input
                    placeholder="e.g. urgent, load confirmation"
                    value={newKeyword}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewKeyword(e.target.value)}
                    onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && addKeyword()}
                    className="h-8 text-sm"
                  />
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={addKeyword} className="shrink-0">
                    <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                  </Button>
                </div>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                  {prefs.important_keywords.map((kw) => (
                    <Badge key={kw} variant="secondary" className="gap-1 pr-1 text-xs">
                      {kw}
                      <button
                        onClick={() => removeKeyword(kw)}
                        className="ml-0.5 hover:bg-muted rounded-full p-0.5 cursor-pointer"
                      >
                        <X className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                      </button>
                    </Badge>
                  ))}
                  {prefs.important_keywords.length === 0 && (
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">None added</span>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Ignore domains */}
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <div>
                  <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Ignore domains</Label>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    Emails from these domains are auto-tagged Ignore
                  </p>
                </div>
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  <Input
                    placeholder="e.g. newsletter.com, marketing.co"
                    value={newDomain}
                    onChange={(e) => setNewDomain(e.target.value)}
                    onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && addDomain()}
                    className="h-8 text-sm"
                  />
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={addDomain} className="shrink-0">
                    <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                  </Button>
                </div>
                <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
                  {prefs.ignore_domains.map((d) => (
                    <Badge key={d} variant="secondary" className="gap-1 pr-1 text-xs">
                      {d}
                      <button
                        onClick={() => removeDomain(d)}
                        className="ml-0.5 hover:bg-muted rounded-full p-0.5 cursor-pointer"
                      >
                        <X className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                      </button>
                    </Badge>
                  ))}
                  {prefs.ignore_domains.length === 0 && (
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">None added</span>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </section>
      )}

      {/* ── Appearance ── */}
      <section className="space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          {theme === "dark" ? (
            <Moon className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          ) : (
            <Sun className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          )}
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
            Appearance
          </h2>
        </div>
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <div>
                <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Dark mode</Label>
                <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  Switch between light and dark theme
                </p>
              </div>
              <Switch
                checked={theme === "dark"}
                onCheckedChange={(v) => setTheme(v ? "dark" : "light")}
              />
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>

      {/* ── Safety note ── */}
      <section className="space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Shield className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
          <h2 className="text-sm font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
            Agent & Pricing
          </h2>
        </div>
        <Card>
          <CardContent className="p-4">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              Agent controls (Off / Test / Live, safety rails, draft mode) are on the{" "}
              <a href="/agent" className="text-foreground font-medium underline underline-offset-4 hover:text-foreground/80">
                Agent page
              </a>
              . Lane rate boundaries are on the{" "}
              <a href="/lane-boundaries" className="text-foreground font-medium underline underline-offset-4 hover:text-foreground/80">
                Lane Boundaries page
              </a>
              .
            </p>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/shippers/page.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Plus, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Search } from "lucide-react";
import type { Shipper } from "@/types/index";

export default function ShippersPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [shippers, setShippers] = useState<Shipper[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);
  const [total, setTotal] = useState(0);
  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [debouncedSearch, setDebouncedSearch] = useState("");
  const [searchTimeout, setSearchTimeout] = useState<NodeJS.Timeout | null>(null);

  function handleSearchChange(value: string) {
    setSearch(value);
    if (searchTimeout) clearTimeout(searchTimeout);
    const timeout = setTimeout(() => {
      setDebouncedSearch(value);
      setPage(1);
    }, 300);
    setSearchTimeout(timeout);
  }

  const fetchShippers = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const params = new URLSearchParams();
      params.set("page", String(page));
      params.set("per_page", "50");
      if (debouncedSearch) params.set("search", debouncedSearch);
      const res = await fetch(`/api/shippers?${params.toString()}`);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch shippers");
      const data = await res.json();
      setShippers(data.shippers ?? data.data ?? data);
      setTotal(data.total ?? 0);
      setTotalPages(data.total_pages ?? 1);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }, [page, debouncedSearch]);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchShippers();
  }, [fetchShippers]);

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-6">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Shipper Accounts</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Manage your shipper relationships
            {total > 0 && ` \u00b7 ${total} shippers`}
          </p>
        </div>
        <Button onClick={() => router.push("/shippers/new")}>
          <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
          Add Shipper
        </Button>
      </div>

      {/* Search */}
      <div className="relative w-72">
        <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
        <Input
          className="pl-9"
          placeholder="Search shippers by name..."
          value={search}
          onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}
        />
      </div>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Loading */}
      {loading && shippers.length === 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-2">
          {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
            <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full" />
          ))}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty */}
      {!loading && shippers.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-48 text-muted-foreground text-sm">
          No shippers found
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Table */}
      {shippers.length > 0 && (
        <div className="border rounded-lg">
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow>
                <TableHead>Name</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Email</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Phone</TableHead>
                <TableHead>City</TableHead>
                <TableHead>State</TableHead>
                <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {shippers.map((shipper) => (
                <TableRow key={shipper.id}>
                  <TableCell className="font-medium">{shipper.name}</TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {shipper.billing_email ?? (
                      <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {shipper.phone ?? (
                      <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {shipper.city ?? (
                      <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell className="text-sm">
                    {shipper.state ?? (
                      <span className="text-muted-foreground">--</span>
                    )}
                  </TableCell>
                  <TableCell>
                    <span
                      className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                        shipper.status
                          ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700"
                          : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-500"
                      }`}
                    >
                      {shipper.status ? "Active" : "Inactive"}
                    </span>
                  </TableCell>
                </TableRow>
              ))}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Pagination */}
      {totalPages > 1 && (
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Page {page} of {totalPages}
          </p>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.max(1, p - 1))}
              disabled={page <= 1 || loading}
            >
              <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Previous
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => Math.min(totalPages, p + 1))}
              disabled={page >= totalPages || loading}
            >
              Next
              <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/app/(dashboard)/shippers/new/page.tsx

"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { ArrowLeft, Loader2 } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";

const INITIAL_FORM = {
  name: "",
  username: "",
  password: "",
  email: "",
  address: "",
  city: "",
  state: "",
  zip: "",
  telephone: "",
};

export default function NewShipperPage() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [creating, setCreating] = useState(false);
  const [form, setForm] = useState(INITIAL_FORM);

  function handleChange(field: keyof typeof INITIAL_FORM, value: string) {
    setForm((prev) => ({ ...prev, [field]: value }));
  }

  async function handleCreate() {
    setCreating(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/shippers", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ ...form, status: true }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json().catch(() => null);
        throw new Error(data?.error || "Failed to add shipper");
      }
      toast.success("Shipper added successfully");
      router.push("/shippers");
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to add shipper");
    } finally {
      setCreating(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 max-w-2xl mx-auto space-y-8">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="icon"
          onClick={() => router.push("/shippers")}
        >
          <ArrowLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
        </Button>
        <div>
          <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold">Add New Shipper</h1>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Create a new client in TTMS
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Company Info */}
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="pt-6 space-y-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Company Info</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="col-span-2 space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="name">Company Name *</Label>
              <Input
                id="name"
                value={form.name}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("name", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="ABC Logistics"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="username">Username</Label>
              <Input
                id="username"
                value={form.username}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("username", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="abclogistics"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="password">Password</Label>
              <Input
                id="password"
                type="password"
                value={form.password}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("password", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="securepassword123"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Contact */}
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="pt-6 space-y-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Contact</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
              <Input
                id="email"
                type="email"
                value={form.email}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("email", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="contact@abclogistics.com"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="telephone">Telephone</Label>
              <Input
                id="telephone"
                value={form.telephone}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("telephone", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="555-111-2222"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Address */}
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="pt-6 space-y-4">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-semibold">Address</h2>
          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div className="col-span-2 space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="address">Street Address</Label>
              <Input
                id="address"
                value={form.address}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("address", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="456 Commerce Ave"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="city">City</Label>
              <Input
                id="city"
                value={form.city}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("city", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Dallas"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="state">State</Label>
              <Input
                id="state"
                value={form.state}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("state", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="TX"
                maxLength={2}
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label htmlFor="zip">Zip</Label>
              <Input
                id="zip"
                value={form.zip}
                onChange={(e) => handleChange("zip", e.target.value)}
                placeholder="75201"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Actions */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <Button
          onClick={handleCreate}
          disabled={creating || !form.name}
          size="lg"
        >
          {creating && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
          Add Shipper
        </Button>
        <Button
          variant="outline"
          size="lg"
          onClick={() => router.push("/shippers")}
        >
          Cancel
        </Button>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/app/admin/page.tsx
