"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import {
  BarChart, Bar, LineChart, Line, PieChart, Pie, Cell,
  XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, CartesianGrid, Legend,
} from "recharts";

// ============================================================
// Types
// ============================================================

interface Overview {
  total_users: number;
  active_today: number;
  total_emails: number;
  llm_calls_today: number;
  llm_cost_today: number;
  vapi_extractions_today: number;
  active_connections: number;
}

interface UserRow {
  id: string;
  name: string | null;
  email: string | null;
  pod_title: string | null;
  ttms_user_id: number | null;
  onboarding_complete: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  last_sync_at: string | null;
  sync_in_progress: boolean;
  email_count: number;
  email_connected: boolean;
  provider_email: string | null;
  llm_cost_today: number;
}

interface UserDetail {
  profile: {
    id: string;
    name: string | null;
    email: string | null;
    ttms_pod_title: string | null;
    ttms_user_id: number | null;
    onboarding_complete: boolean;
    autopilot_active: boolean;
    supervised_mode: boolean;
    created_at: string;
  };
  email_stats: Record<string, number>;
  llm: {
    cost_today: number;
    cost_7d: number;
    calls_7d: number;
    by_action: Record<string, { count: number; cost: number }>;
  };
  quote_board_loads: number;
  vapi_extractions: number;
  negotiations: number;
  connection: { is_active: boolean; provider_email: string | null; connected_at: string } | null;
  recent_activity: { action: string; model: string; cost: number; created_at: string }[];
}

interface Analytics {
  llm: {
    daily: Record<string, { cost: number; calls: number; tokens: number }>;
    by_purpose: Record<string, { count: number; cost: number }>;
    by_model: Record<string, { count: number; cost: number }>;
    total_cost_30d: number;
    total_tokens_30d: number;
    total_calls_30d: number;
  };
  emails: {
    daily: Record<string, number>;
    category_breakdown: Record<string, number>;
    total_30d: number;
  };
  loads: {
    by_status: Record<string, number>;
    total_revenue: number;
    total_carrier_cost: number;
    total_profit: number;
    avg_profit: number;
    total_loads: number;
  };
  negotiations: {
    by_status: Record<string, number>;
    total_30d: number;
    avg_rate: number;
  };
  vapi: {
    daily: Record<string, number>;
    total_30d: number;
  };
}

// ============================================================
// Helpers
// ============================================================

const COLORS = ["#6366f1", "#f59e0b", "#10b981", "#ef4444", "#8b5cf6", "#06b6d4", "#f97316", "#ec4899", "#14b8a6", "#84cc16"];

function timeAgo(dateStr: string): string {
  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();
  const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  if (mins < 1) return "just now";
  if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
  const hrs = Math.floor(mins / 60);
  if (hrs < 24) return `${hrs}h ago`;
  return `${Math.floor(hrs / 24)}d ago`;
}

function fmt(cost: number): string {
  return cost < 1 ? `$${cost.toFixed(4)}` : `$${cost.toFixed(2)}`;
}

function fmtK(n: number): string {
  if (n >= 1_000_000) return `${(n / 1_000_000).toFixed(1)}M`;
  if (n >= 1_000) return `${(n / 1_000).toFixed(1)}K`;
  return String(n);
}

// Fill 30-day date range for charts
function fillDays(data: Record<string, number>, days = 30): { date: string; value: number }[] {
  const result: { date: string; value: number }[] = [];
  for (let i = days - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const d = new Date(Date.now() - i * 86400000);
    const key = d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
    result.push({ date: key.slice(5), value: data[key] || 0 });
  }
  return result;
}

// ============================================================
// Login Screen
// ============================================================

function LoginScreen({ onLogin }: { onLogin: (token: string) => void }) {
  const [username, setUsername] = useState("");
  const [password, setPassword] = useState("");
  const [error, setError] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  async function handleSubmit(e: React.FormEvent) {
    e.preventDefault();
    setLoading(true);
    setError("");
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/admin/auth", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ username, password }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) setError(data.error || "Login failed");
      else {
        sessionStorage.setItem("admin_token", data.token);
        onLogin(data.token);
      }
    } catch {
      setError("Network error");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50">
      <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="w-full max-w-sm bg-white rounded-lg shadow-lg p-8 space-y-4">
        <h1 className="text-xl font-bold text-center">Admin Login</h1>
        {error && <p className="text-sm text-red-600 bg-red-50 rounded px-3 py-2">{error}</p>}
        <input type="text" placeholder="Username" value={username} onChange={(e) => setUsername(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-md text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black" autoFocus />
        <input type="password" placeholder="Password" value={password} onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
          className="w-full px-3 py-2 border rounded-md text-sm focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black" />
        <button type="submit" disabled={loading}
          className="w-full py-2 bg-black text-white rounded-md text-sm font-medium hover:bg-gray-800 disabled:opacity-50">
          {loading ? "Logging in..." : "Login"}
        </button>
      </form>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
// Components
// ============================================================

function StatCard({ label, value, sub }: { label: string; value: string | number; sub?: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border p-4">
      <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide font-medium">{label}</p>
      <p className="text-2xl font-bold mt-1">{value}</p>
      {sub && <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 mt-0.5">{sub}</p>}
    </div>
  );
}

function SectionTitle({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700 mb-3">{children}</h3>;
}

function ChartCard({ title, children }: { title: string; children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border p-4">
      <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-gray-500 uppercase mb-3">{title}</p>
      {children}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
// User Detail Modal
// ============================================================

function UserDetailPanel({ detail, onClose }: { detail: UserDetail; onClose: () => void }) {
  const p = detail.profile;
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-16 overflow-auto" onClick={onClose}>
      <div className="bg-white rounded-lg shadow-xl w-full max-w-2xl mx-4 mb-16" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 border-b">
          <div>
            <h2 className="font-bold text-lg">{p.name || p.email || "Unknown"}</h2>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{p.email}</p>
          </div>
          <button onClick={onClose} className="text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 text-xl px-2">&times;</button>
        </div>
        <div className="p-4 space-y-4">
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-xs">
            {p.ttms_pod_title && <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 rounded font-medium">{p.ttms_pod_title} Pod</span>}
            {p.ttms_user_id && <span className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 rounded">TTMS #{p.ttms_user_id}</span>}
            <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded ${p.onboarding_complete ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700" : "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700"}`}>
              {p.onboarding_complete ? "Active" : "Onboarding"}
            </span>
            <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded ${p.autopilot_active ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700" : "bg-gray-100"}`}>
              Autopilot: {p.autopilot_active ? "ON" : "OFF"}
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="text-xs">
            <span className="font-medium">Email: </span>
            {detail.connection ? (
              <span className={detail.connection.is_active ? "text-green-600" : "text-red-600"}>
                {detail.connection.provider_email} ({detail.connection.is_active ? "Connected" : "Disconnected"})
              </span>
            ) : <span className="text-gray-400">Not connected</span>}
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
            <StatCard label="Emails" value={detail.email_stats.total || 0} sub={`${detail.email_stats.unread || 0} unread`} />
            <StatCard label="LLM Cost (7d)" value={fmt(detail.llm.cost_7d)} sub={`${detail.llm.calls_7d} calls`} />
            <StatCard label="Quote Board" value={detail.quote_board_loads} />
            <StatCard label="Negotiations" value={detail.negotiations} />
            <StatCard label="VAPI Extractions" value={detail.vapi_extractions} />
            <StatCard label="LLM Today" value={fmt(detail.llm.cost_today)} />
          </div>

          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-gray-500 mb-2">Email Breakdown</p>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 text-xs">
              {Object.entries(detail.email_stats).filter(([k]) => k !== "total" && k !== "unread").sort(([, a], [, b]) => b - a)
                .map(([cat, count]) => <span key={cat} className="px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 rounded">{cat}: {count}</span>)}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-gray-500 mb-2">LLM by Action (7d)</p>
            <div className="space-y-1">
              {Object.entries(detail.llm.by_action).sort(([, a], [, b]) => b.cost - a.cost)
                .map(([action, data]) => (
                  <div key={action} className="flex justify-between text-xs bg-gray-50 rounded px-3 py-1.5">
                    <span className="font-medium">{action}</span>
                    <span className="text-gray-500">{data.count} calls &middot; {fmt(data.cost)}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          </div>

          <div>
            <p className="text-xs font-semibold uppercase text-gray-500 mb-2">Recent Activity</p>
            <div className="max-h-48 overflow-auto space-y-1">
              {detail.recent_activity.length === 0 ? <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">No recent activity</p> :
                detail.recent_activity.map((a, i) => (
                  <div key={i} className="flex justify-between text-xs bg-gray-50 rounded px-3 py-1.5">
                    <div>
                      <span className="font-medium">{a.action}</span>
                      <span className="text-gray-400 ml-2">{a.model}</span>
                    </div>
                    <span className="text-gray-500 shrink-0">{fmt(Number(a.cost) || 0)} &middot; {timeAgo(a.created_at)}</span>
                  </div>
                ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
// Analytics Tab
// ============================================================

function AnalyticsTab({ token }: { token: string }) {
  const [data, setData] = useState<Analytics | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch("/api/admin/analytics", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } })
      .then((r) => r.json())
      .then(setData)
      .finally(() => setLoading(false));
  }, [token]);

  if (loading) return <p className="text-gray-500 p-6">Loading analytics...</p>;
  if (!data) return <p className="text-red-500 p-6">Failed to load analytics</p>;

  // Prepare chart data
  const llmDailyData = fillDays(
    Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(data.llm.daily).map(([k, v]) => [k, v.cost]))
  );
  const llmCallsDaily = fillDays(
    Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(data.llm.daily).map(([k, v]) => [k, v.calls]))
  );
  const emailDailyData = fillDays(data.emails.daily);
  const vapiDailyData = fillDays(data.vapi.daily);

  const categoryPieData = Object.entries(data.emails.category_breakdown)
    .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b - a)
    .map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value }));

  const purposeData = Object.entries(data.llm.by_purpose)
    .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b.cost - a.cost)
    .map(([name, v]) => ({ name, calls: v.count, cost: Number(v.cost.toFixed(4)) }));

  const modelData = Object.entries(data.llm.by_model)
    .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b.cost - a.cost)
    .map(([name, v]) => ({ name: name.split("/").pop() || name, calls: v.count, cost: Number(v.cost.toFixed(4)) }));

  const loadStatusData = Object.entries(data.loads.by_status)
    .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b - a)
    .map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value }));

  const negStatusData = Object.entries(data.negotiations.by_status)
    .sort(([, a], [, b]) => b - a)
    .map(([name, value]) => ({ name, value }));

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Top-level stats */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-3">
        <StatCard label="LLM Cost (30d)" value={fmt(data.llm.total_cost_30d)} sub={`${fmtK(data.llm.total_calls_30d)} calls`} />
        <StatCard label="Tokens (30d)" value={fmtK(data.llm.total_tokens_30d)} />
        <StatCard label="Emails (30d)" value={fmtK(data.emails.total_30d)} />
        <StatCard label="Revenue" value={`$${data.loads.total_revenue.toLocaleString()}`} sub={`${data.loads.total_loads} loads`} />
        <StatCard label="Profit" value={`$${Math.round(data.loads.total_profit).toLocaleString()}`} sub={`avg ${fmt(data.loads.avg_profit)}/load`} />
        <StatCard label="Negotiations (30d)" value={data.negotiations.total_30d} sub={data.negotiations.avg_rate > 0 ? `avg rate ${fmt(data.negotiations.avg_rate)}` : undefined} />
      </div>

      {/* Row 1: LLM Cost + Emails per day */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        <ChartCard title="LLM Cost per Day (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <BarChart data={llmDailyData}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} interval={4} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} tickFormatter={(v) => `$${v.toFixed(2)}`} />
              <Tooltip formatter={(v) => [`$${Number(v).toFixed(4)}`, "Cost"]} labelFormatter={(l) => `Date: ${l}`} />
              <Bar dataKey="value" fill="#6366f1" radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]} />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>

        <ChartCard title="Emails per Day (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <BarChart data={emailDailyData}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} interval={4} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} />
              <Tooltip formatter={(v) => [v, "Emails"]} />
              <Bar dataKey="value" fill="#10b981" radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]} />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>
      </div>

      {/* Row 2: LLM Calls + VAPI per day */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        <ChartCard title="LLM Calls per Day (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <LineChart data={llmCallsDaily}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} interval={4} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} />
              <Tooltip formatter={(v) => [v, "Calls"]} />
              <Line type="monotone" dataKey="value" stroke="#8b5cf6" strokeWidth={2} dot={false} />
            </LineChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>

        <ChartCard title="VAPI Extractions per Day (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
            <BarChart data={vapiDailyData}>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
              <XAxis dataKey="date" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} interval={4} />
              <YAxis tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} />
              <Tooltip formatter={(v) => [v, "Extractions"]} />
              <Bar dataKey="value" fill="#f59e0b" radius={[2, 2, 0, 0]} />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>
      </div>

      {/* Row 3: Pie charts */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        <ChartCard title="Email Categories (All Time)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={250}>
            <PieChart>
              <Pie data={categoryPieData} dataKey="value" nameKey="name" cx="50%" cy="50%" outerRadius={80} label={({ name, percent }) => `${name} ${((percent ?? 0) * 100).toFixed(0)}%`}>
                {categoryPieData.map((_, i) => <Cell key={i} fill={COLORS[i % COLORS.length]} />)}
              </Pie>
              <Tooltip />
            </PieChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>

        <ChartCard title="Load Status Breakdown">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={250}>
            <PieChart>
              <Pie data={loadStatusData} dataKey="value" nameKey="name" cx="50%" cy="50%" outerRadius={80} label={({ name, value }) => `${name}: ${value}`}>
                {loadStatusData.map((_, i) => <Cell key={i} fill={COLORS[i % COLORS.length]} />)}
              </Pie>
              <Tooltip />
            </PieChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>

        <ChartCard title="Negotiation Status (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={250}>
            <PieChart>
              <Pie data={negStatusData} dataKey="value" nameKey="name" cx="50%" cy="50%" outerRadius={80} label={({ name, value }) => `${name}: ${value}`}>
                {negStatusData.map((_, i) => <Cell key={i} fill={COLORS[i % COLORS.length]} />)}
              </Pie>
              <Tooltip />
            </PieChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>
      </div>

      {/* Row 4: LLM by purpose + model */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        <ChartCard title="LLM Cost by Purpose (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={Math.max(200, purposeData.length * 32)}>
            <BarChart data={purposeData} layout="vertical">
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
              <XAxis type="number" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} tickFormatter={(v) => `$${v}`} />
              <YAxis dataKey="name" type="category" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} width={150} />
              <Tooltip formatter={(v) => [`$${Number(v).toFixed(4)}`, "Cost"]} />
              <Bar dataKey="cost" fill="#6366f1" radius={[0, 2, 2, 0]} />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>

        <ChartCard title="LLM Cost by Model (30d)">
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={Math.max(200, modelData.length * 40)}>
            <BarChart data={modelData} layout="vertical">
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="#f0f0f0" />
              <XAxis type="number" tick={{ fontSize: 10 }} tickFormatter={(v) => `$${v}`} />
              <YAxis dataKey="name" type="category" tick={{ fontSize: 9 }} width={180} />
              <Tooltip formatter={(v) => [`$${Number(v).toFixed(4)}`, "Cost"]} />
              <Legend />
              <Bar dataKey="cost" fill="#8b5cf6" radius={[0, 2, 2, 0]} name="Cost" />
            </BarChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        </ChartCard>
      </div>

      {/* Revenue breakdown */}
      <ChartCard title="Financial Summary">
        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 text-center">
          <div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-green-600">${data.loads.total_revenue.toLocaleString()}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Total Revenue</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-red-500">${data.loads.total_carrier_cost.toLocaleString()}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Carrier Costs</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-indigo-600">${Math.round(data.loads.total_profit).toLocaleString()}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Gross Profit</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <p className="text-2xl font-bold">{data.loads.total_revenue > 0 ? `${((data.loads.total_profit / data.loads.total_revenue) * 100).toFixed(1)}%` : "—"}</p>
            <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">Margin</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </ChartCard>
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
// Dashboard
// ============================================================

function Dashboard({ token }: { token: string }) {
  const [tab, setTab] = useState<"overview" | "analytics">("overview");
  const [overview, setOverview] = useState<Overview | null>(null);
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<UserRow[]>([]);
  const [selectedUser, setSelectedUser] = useState<UserDetail | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [loadingDetail, setLoadingDetail] = useState(false);

  const headers = { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` };

  const fetchData = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    const [ovRes, usRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
      fetch("/api/admin/overview", { headers }).then((r) => r.json()),
      fetch("/api/admin/users", { headers }).then((r) => r.json()),
    ]);
    if (ovRes.status === "fulfilled") setOverview(ovRes.value);
    if (usRes.status === "fulfilled") setUsers(usRes.value.users || []);
    setLoading(false);
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [token]);

  useEffect(() => { fetchData(); }, [fetchData]);

  async function openUser(userId: string) {
    setLoadingDetail(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/admin/users/${userId}`, { headers });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (res.ok) setSelectedUser(data);
    } catch { /* ignore */ }
    finally { setLoadingDetail(false); }
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-gray-50">
      <header className="bg-white border-b px-6 py-3 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 z-40">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-6">
          <h1 className="font-bold text-lg">TTMS Admin</h1>
          <div className="flex gap-1">
            {(["overview", "analytics"] as const).map((t) => (
              <button key={t} onClick={() => setTab(t)}
                className={`px-3 py-1.5 text-xs font-medium rounded transition-colors ${tab === t ? "bg-black text-white" : "text-gray-600 hover:bg-gray-100"}`}>
                {t.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + t.slice(1)}
              </button>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <button onClick={fetchData} className="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 border rounded hover:bg-gray-50">Refresh</button>
          <button onClick={() => { sessionStorage.removeItem("admin_token"); window.location.reload(); }}
            className="text-xs px-3 py-1.5 text-red-600 border border-red-200 rounded hover:bg-red-50">Logout</button>
        </div>
      </header>

      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto p-6">
        {tab === "overview" && (
          loading ? <p className="text-gray-500">Loading...</p> : (
            <div className="space-y-6">
              {overview && (
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-7 gap-3">
                  <StatCard label="Total Users" value={overview.total_users} />
                  <StatCard label="Active Today" value={overview.active_today} />
                  <StatCard label="Total Emails" value={overview.total_emails.toLocaleString()} />
                  <StatCard label="LLM Calls Today" value={overview.llm_calls_today} />
                  <StatCard label="LLM Cost Today" value={fmt(overview.llm_cost_today)} />
                  <StatCard label="VAPI Today" value={overview.vapi_extractions_today} />
                  <StatCard label="Connections" value={overview.active_connections} />
                </div>
              )}

              <div className="bg-white rounded-lg border overflow-hidden">
                <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b">
                  <SectionTitle>Users ({users.length})</SectionTitle>
                </div>
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="w-full text-xs">
                    <thead>
                      <tr className="bg-gray-50 text-left text-gray-500 uppercase">
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">User</th>
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Pod</th>
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Emails</th>
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Last Sync</th>
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Connection</th>
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">LLM Today</th>
                        <th className="px-4 py-2 font-medium">Status</th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody className="divide-y">
                      {users.map((u) => (
                        <tr key={u.id} onClick={() => openUser(u.id)} className="hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer transition-colors">
                          <td className="px-4 py-3">
                            <div className="font-medium text-sm">{u.name || "—"}</div>
                            <div className="text-gray-400">{u.email}</div>
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-4 py-3">
                            {u.pod_title ? <span className="px-2 py-0.5 bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 rounded font-medium">{u.pod_title}</span> : <span className="text-gray-300">—</span>}
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-4 py-3 font-medium">{u.email_count.toLocaleString()}</td>
                          <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-500">
                            {u.last_sync_at ? timeAgo(u.last_sync_at) : "Never"}
                            {u.sync_in_progress && <span className="ml-1 text-blue-500">syncing...</span>}
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-4 py-3">
                            <span className={`inline-block h-2 w-2 rounded-full ${u.email_connected ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-red-400"}`} />
                            <span className="ml-1.5 text-gray-500">{u.email_connected ? "Connected" : "Disconnected"}</span>
                          </td>
                          <td className="px-4 py-3 text-gray-500">{fmt(u.llm_cost_today)}</td>
                          <td className="px-4 py-3">
                            <span className={`px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-medium ${u.onboarding_complete ? "bg-green-100 text-green-700" : "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700"}`}>
                              {u.onboarding_complete ? "Active" : "Onboarding"}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          )
        )}

        {tab === "analytics" && <AnalyticsTab token={token} />}
      </div>

      {selectedUser && <UserDetailPanel detail={selectedUser} onClose={() => setSelectedUser(null)} />}
      {loadingDetail && (
        <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/20 z-50 flex items-center justify-center">
          <div className="bg-white rounded-lg px-6 py-4 shadow-lg text-sm">Loading user details...</div>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

// ============================================================
// Main
// ============================================================

export default function AdminPage() {
  const [token, setToken] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [checking, setChecking] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    const saved = sessionStorage.getItem("admin_token");
    if (saved) setToken(saved);
    setChecking(false);
  }, []);

  if (checking) return null;
  if (!token) return <LoginScreen onLogin={setToken} />;
  return <Dashboard token={token} />;
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/admin/analytics/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createAdminClient } from "@/lib/supabase/admin";
import { isAdminAuthed } from "@/lib/admin-auth";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  if (!isAdminAuthed(request)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const supabase = createAdminClient();
  const thirtyDaysAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();

  const [
    llmResult,
    emailsResult,
    emailCategoryResult,
    loadsResult,
    negotiationsResult,
    vapiResult,
  ] = await Promise.allSettled([
    // LLM usage last 30 days (for daily cost chart + breakdown)
    supabase
      .from("llm_usage")
      .select("purpose, model, total_cost, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, created_at")
      .gte("created_at", thirtyDaysAgo)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: true }),

    // Emails last 30 days (for daily email volume chart)
    supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("received_at, category, is_read")
      .gte("received_at", thirtyDaysAgo)
      .order("received_at", { ascending: true }),

    // All email categories (for pie chart)
    supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("category"),

    // Loads with status + charges (for revenue data)
    supabase
      .from("loads")
      .select("status, shipper_rate, carrier_rate, created_at")
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
      .limit(500),

    // Email negotiations (for negotiation stats)
    supabase
      .from("email_negotiations")
      .select("status, last_negotiated_rate, updated_at")
      .gte("updated_at", thirtyDaysAgo),

    // VAPI calls last 30 days
    supabase
      .from("vapi_call_extractions")
      .select("rate, status, extracted_at")
      .gte("extracted_at", thirtyDaysAgo),
  ]);

  const llmRows = llmResult.status === "fulfilled" ? llmResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const emailRows = emailsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? emailsResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const allEmailCategories = emailCategoryResult.status === "fulfilled" ? emailCategoryResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const loadRows = loadsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? loadsResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const negRows = negotiationsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? negotiationsResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const vapiRows = vapiResult.status === "fulfilled" ? vapiResult.value.data || [] : [];

  // --- LLM daily cost + calls ---
  const llmByDay: Record<string, { cost: number; calls: number; tokens: number }> = {};
  const llmByPurpose: Record<string, { count: number; cost: number }> = {};
  const llmByModel: Record<string, { count: number; cost: number }> = {};
  let llmTotalCost = 0;
  let llmTotalTokens = 0;

  for (const row of llmRows) {
    const day = row.created_at.slice(0, 10);
    const cost = Number(row.total_cost) || 0;
    const tokens = (Number(row.prompt_tokens) || 0) + (Number(row.completion_tokens) || 0);

    if (!llmByDay[day]) llmByDay[day] = { cost: 0, calls: 0, tokens: 0 };
    llmByDay[day].cost += cost;
    llmByDay[day].calls++;
    llmByDay[day].tokens += tokens;

    const purpose = row.purpose || "unknown";
    if (!llmByPurpose[purpose]) llmByPurpose[purpose] = { count: 0, cost: 0 };
    llmByPurpose[purpose].count++;
    llmByPurpose[purpose].cost += cost;

    const model = row.model || "unknown";
    if (!llmByModel[model]) llmByModel[model] = { count: 0, cost: 0 };
    llmByModel[model].count++;
    llmByModel[model].cost += cost;

    llmTotalCost += cost;
    llmTotalTokens += tokens;
  }

  // --- Emails per day ---
  const emailsByDay: Record<string, number> = {};
  for (const row of emailRows) {
    const day = row.received_at?.slice(0, 10);
    if (day) emailsByDay[day] = (emailsByDay[day] || 0) + 1;
  }

  // --- Email category breakdown (all time) ---
  const categoryBreakdown: Record<string, number> = {};
  for (const row of allEmailCategories) {
    const cat = row.category || "UNCLASSIFIED";
    categoryBreakdown[cat] = (categoryBreakdown[cat] || 0) + 1;
  }

  // --- Load stats ---
  const loadsByStatus: Record<string, number> = {};
  let totalRevenue = 0;
  let totalCarrierCost = 0;
  let totalProfit = 0;
  let loadsWithProfit = 0;

  for (const load of loadRows) {
    const status = load.status || "unknown";
    loadsByStatus[status] = (loadsByStatus[status] || 0) + 1;

    const shipperRate = Number(load.shipper_rate) || 0;
    const carrierRate = Number(load.carrier_rate) || 0;
    if (shipperRate > 0) {
      totalRevenue += shipperRate;
      totalCarrierCost += carrierRate;
      totalProfit += shipperRate - carrierRate;
      loadsWithProfit++;
    }
  }

  // --- Negotiation stats ---
  const negByStatus: Record<string, number> = {};
  let totalNegotiatedRates = 0;
  let negWithRates = 0;
  for (const neg of negRows) {
    const status = neg.status || "unknown";
    negByStatus[status] = (negByStatus[status] || 0) + 1;
    if (neg.last_negotiated_rate) {
      totalNegotiatedRates += Number(neg.last_negotiated_rate);
      negWithRates++;
    }
  }

  // --- VAPI stats ---
  const vapiByDay: Record<string, number> = {};
  for (const row of vapiRows) {
    const day = row.extracted_at?.slice(0, 10);
    if (day) vapiByDay[day] = (vapiByDay[day] || 0) + 1;
  }

  return NextResponse.json({
    llm: {
      daily: llmByDay,
      by_purpose: llmByPurpose,
      by_model: llmByModel,
      total_cost_30d: llmTotalCost,
      total_tokens_30d: llmTotalTokens,
      total_calls_30d: llmRows.length,
    },
    emails: {
      daily: emailsByDay,
      category_breakdown: categoryBreakdown,
      total_30d: emailRows.length,
    },
    loads: {
      by_status: loadsByStatus,
      total_revenue: totalRevenue,
      total_carrier_cost: totalCarrierCost,
      total_profit: totalProfit,
      avg_profit: loadsWithProfit > 0 ? totalProfit / loadsWithProfit : 0,
      total_loads: loadRows.length,
    },
    negotiations: {
      by_status: negByStatus,
      total_30d: negRows.length,
      avg_rate: negWithRates > 0 ? totalNegotiatedRates / negWithRates : 0,
    },
    vapi: {
      daily: vapiByDay,
      total_30d: vapiRows.length,
    },
  });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/admin/auth/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { validateCredentials, generateAdminToken } from "@/lib/admin-auth";

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  try {
    const { username, password } = await request.json();

    if (!validateCredentials(username, password)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid credentials" }, { status: 401 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ token: generateAdminToken() });
  } catch {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Bad request" }, { status: 400 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/admin/overview/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createAdminClient } from "@/lib/supabase/admin";
import { isAdminAuthed } from "@/lib/admin-auth";

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  if (!isAdminAuthed(request)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const supabase = createAdminClient();
  const todayStart = new Date(new Date().setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)).toISOString();

  const [
    usersResult,
    emailsResult,
    llmTodayResult,
    llmCostResult,
    vapiTodayResult,
    activeTodayResult,
    connectionsResult,
  ] = await Promise.allSettled([
    // Total users
    supabase.from("profiles").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }),

    // Total emails
    supabase.from("emails").select("id", { count: "exact", head: true }),

    // LLM calls today
    supabase
      .from("llm_usage")
      .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .gte("created_at", todayStart),

    // LLM total cost today
    supabase
      .from("llm_usage")
      .select("total_cost")
      .gte("created_at", todayStart),

    // VAPI extractions today
    supabase
      .from("vapi_call_extractions")
      .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .gte("extracted_at", todayStart),

    // Active users today (synced today)
    supabase
      .from("sync_state")
      .select("user_id", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .gte("last_sync_at", todayStart),

    // Email connections
    supabase
      .from("email_connections")
      .select("id, is_active", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .eq("is_active", true),
  ]);

  const totalUsers = usersResult.status === "fulfilled" ? usersResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const totalEmails = emailsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? emailsResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const llmCallsToday = llmTodayResult.status === "fulfilled" ? llmTodayResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const vapiToday = vapiTodayResult.status === "fulfilled" ? vapiTodayResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const activeToday = activeTodayResult.status === "fulfilled" ? activeTodayResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const activeConnections = connectionsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? connectionsResult.value.count || 0 : 0;

  let llmCostToday = 0;
  if (llmCostResult.status === "fulfilled" && llmCostResult.value.data) {
    llmCostToday = llmCostResult.value.data.reduce(
      (sum, row) => sum + (Number(row.total_cost) || 0),
      0
    );
  }

  return NextResponse.json({
    total_users: totalUsers,
    active_today: activeToday,
    total_emails: totalEmails,
    llm_calls_today: llmCallsToday,
    llm_cost_today: llmCostToday,
    vapi_extractions_today: vapiToday,
    active_connections: activeConnections,
  });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/admin/users/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createAdminClient } from "@/lib/supabase/admin";
import { isAdminAuthed } from "@/lib/admin-auth";

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  if (!isAdminAuthed(request)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const supabase = createAdminClient();

  // Fetch all profiles
  const { data: profiles } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("id, name, email, avatar_url, ttms_pod_title, ttms_user_id, onboarding_complete, created_at, updated_at")
    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

  if (!profiles) return NextResponse.json({ users: [] });

  // Fetch sync states for all users
  const { data: syncStates } = await supabase
    .from("sync_state")
    .select("user_id, last_sync_at, sync_in_progress");

  // Fetch email counts per user
  const { data: emailCounts } = await supabase
    .rpc("admin_email_counts_per_user");

  // Fallback: if RPC doesn't exist, fetch manually
  let emailCountMap: Record<string, number> = {};
  if (emailCounts) {
    for (const row of emailCounts as Array<{ user_id: string; cnt: number }>) {
      emailCountMap[row.user_id] = Number(row.cnt);
    }
  }

  // If RPC failed, do individual counts (slower but works)
  if (!emailCounts) {
    for (const profile of profiles) {
      const { count } = await supabase
        .from("emails")
        .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
        .eq("user_id", profile.id);
      emailCountMap[profile.id] = count || 0;
    }
  }

  // Fetch email connection status per user
  const { data: connections } = await supabase
    .from("email_connections")
    .select("tenant_id, is_active, provider_email");

  const syncMap = new Map(
    (syncStates || []).map((s) => [s.user_id, s])
  );
  const connectionMap = new Map(
    (connections || []).map((c) => [c.tenant_id, c])
  );

  // Fetch LLM cost per user today
  const todayStart = new Date(new Date().setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)).toISOString();
  const { data: llmUsage } = await supabase
    .from("llm_usage")
    .select("user_id, total_cost")
    .gte("created_at", todayStart);

  const llmCostMap: Record<string, number> = {};
  for (const row of llmUsage || []) {
    llmCostMap[row.user_id] = (llmCostMap[row.user_id] || 0) + (Number(row.total_cost) || 0);
  }

  const users = profiles.map((p) => {
    const sync = syncMap.get(p.id);
    const conn = connectionMap.get(p.id);
    return {
      id: p.id,
      name: p.name,
      email: p.email,
      avatar_url: p.avatar_url,
      pod_title: p.ttms_pod_title,
      ttms_user_id: p.ttms_user_id,
      onboarding_complete: p.onboarding_complete,
      created_at: p.created_at,
      last_sync_at: sync?.last_sync_at || null,
      sync_in_progress: sync?.sync_in_progress || false,
      email_count: emailCountMap[p.id] || 0,
      email_connected: conn?.is_active || false,
      provider_email: conn?.provider_email || null,
      llm_cost_today: llmCostMap[p.id] || 0,
    };
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ users });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/admin/users/[id]/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createAdminClient } from "@/lib/supabase/admin";
import { isAdminAuthed } from "@/lib/admin-auth";

export async function GET(
  request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  if (!isAdminAuthed(request)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { id } = await params;
  const supabase = createAdminClient();
  const todayStart = new Date(new Date().setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)).toISOString();
  const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();

  const [
    profileResult,
    activityResult,
    emailStatsResult,
    llmUsageResult,
    quoteBoardResult,
    vapiResult,
    connectionResult,
    negotiationsResult,
  ] = await Promise.allSettled([
    // Profile
    supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id, name, email, avatar_url, ttms_pod_title, ttms_user_id, onboarding_complete, autopilot_active, supervised_mode, created_at, updated_at")
      .eq("id", id)
      .single(),

    // Recent activity (last 50)
    supabase
      .from("llm_usage")
      .select("purpose, model, total_cost, created_at")
      .eq("user_id", id)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
      .limit(50),

    // Email stats by category
    supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("category, is_read")
      .eq("user_id", id),

    // LLM usage (last 7 days)
    supabase
      .from("llm_usage")
      .select("purpose, model, total_cost, created_at")
      .eq("user_id", id)
      .gte("created_at", sevenDaysAgo)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false }),

    // Quote board loads count
    supabase
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .eq("tenant_id", id),

    // VAPI extractions count
    supabase
      .from("vapi_call_extractions")
      .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .eq("tenant_id", id),

    // Email connection
    supabase
      .from("email_connections")
      .select("is_active, provider_email, created_at, updated_at")
      .eq("tenant_id", id)
      .maybeSingle(),

    // Email negotiations count
    supabase
      .from("email_negotiations")
      .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .eq("tenant_id", id),
  ]);

  if (profileResult.status !== "fulfilled" || !profileResult.value.data) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "User not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  const profile = profileResult.value.data;
  const activity = activityResult.status === "fulfilled" ? activityResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const emailRows = emailStatsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? emailStatsResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const llmRows = llmUsageResult.status === "fulfilled" ? llmUsageResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const quoteBoardCount = quoteBoardResult.status === "fulfilled" ? quoteBoardResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const vapiCount = vapiResult.status === "fulfilled" ? vapiResult.value.count || 0 : 0;
  const connection = connectionResult.status === "fulfilled" ? connectionResult.value.data : null;
  const negotiationCount = negotiationsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? negotiationsResult.value.count || 0 : 0;

  // Email breakdown
  const emailStats: Record<string, number> = { total: emailRows.length, unread: 0 };
  for (const e of emailRows) {
    emailStats[e.category] = (emailStats[e.category] || 0) + 1;
    if (!e.is_read) emailStats.unread++;
  }

  // LLM cost breakdown
  let llmCost7d = 0;
  let llmCostToday = 0;
  const llmByAction: Record<string, { count: number; cost: number }> = {};
  for (const row of llmRows) {
    const cost = Number(row.total_cost) || 0;
    llmCost7d += cost;
    if (row.created_at >= todayStart) llmCostToday += cost;
    const purpose = row.purpose || "unknown";
    if (!llmByAction[purpose]) llmByAction[purpose] = { count: 0, cost: 0 };
    llmByAction[purpose].count++;
    llmByAction[purpose].cost += cost;
  }

  return NextResponse.json({
    profile,
    email_stats: emailStats,
    llm: {
      cost_today: llmCostToday,
      cost_7d: llmCost7d,
      calls_7d: llmRows.length,
      by_action: llmByAction,
    },
    quote_board_loads: quoteBoardCount,
    vapi_extractions: vapiCount,
    negotiations: negotiationCount,
    connection: connection
      ? {
          is_active: connection.is_active,
          provider_email: connection.provider_email,
          connected_at: connection.created_at,
        }
      : null,
    recent_activity: activity.slice(0, 30).map((a: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
      action: a.purpose,
      model: a.model,
      cost: a.total_cost,
      created_at: a.created_at,
    })),
  });
}

import { NextResponse } from "next/server";

  _req: Request,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {

  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

    await discardDraft(id, user.id);

    return NextResponse.json({ error: msg }, { status: 500 });

================================================
FILE: src/app/api/agent/emergency-stop/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/agent/activity-logger";

export const maxDuration = 15;

/**
 * Emergency Stop — kills the agent immediately:
 * 1. Disables agent (enabled=false, test_mode=false)
 * 2. Discards ALL pending drafts (real + test)
 * 3. Expires ALL active carrier blasts
 * 4. Logs the emergency stop
 */
export async function POST() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const svc = await createServiceClient();
  const now = new Date().toISOString();

  // 1. Kill agent
  await svc
    .from("agent_settings")
    .update({ enabled: false, test_mode: false, updated_at: now })
    .eq("user_id", user.id);

  // 2. Discard all pending drafts
  const { data: discardedDrafts } = await svc
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .update({ status: "discarded", discarded_at: now })
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .eq("status", "pending")
    .select("id");

  // Also hard-delete test drafts (they're throwaway)
  await svc
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .delete()
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .eq("is_test", true);

  // 3. Expire all active carrier blasts
  const { data: expiredBlasts } = await svc
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .update({ status: "expired" })
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .in("status", ["sent", "countered"])
    .select("id");

  const draftsCount = discardedDrafts?.length || 0;
  const blastsCount = expiredBlasts?.length || 0;

  // 4. Log
  await logActivity(
    user.id,
    "escalated",
    `EMERGENCY STOP — agent killed, ${draftsCount} draft(s) discarded, ${blastsCount} blast(s) expired`,
    { metadata: { emergency_stop: true, drafts_discarded: draftsCount, blasts_expired: blastsCount } }
  );

  return NextResponse.json({
    stopped: true,
    drafts_discarded: draftsCount,
    blasts_expired: blastsCount,
  });
}

FILE: src/app/api/agent/run/route.ts

import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { runAgentCycle } from "@/lib/agent/orchestrator";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";

export const maxDuration = 300;

export async function POST() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  try {
    const result = await runAgentCycle(user.id);
    return NextResponse.json(result);
  } catch (err) {
    await flushLlmUsage(user.id).catch(() => {});
    throw err;
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/agent/run-stream/route.ts
================================================
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { runAgentCycle } from "@/lib/agent/orchestrator";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";

export const maxDuration = 300;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return new Response("Unauthorized", { status: 401 });
  }

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      function emit(event: { phase: string; type: string; message: string }) {
        const data = JSON.stringify(event);
        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${data}\n\n`));
      }

      try {
        const result = await runAgentCycle(user.id, emit);
        // Send final summary
        controller.enqueue(
          encoder.encode(
            `data: ${JSON.stringify({ phase: "summary", type: "done", message: `Processed ${result.processed} email(s)`, processed: result.processed, actions: result.actions })}\n\n`
          )
        );
      } catch (err) {
        // Safety net: flush any buffered LLM usage that the orchestrator didn't get to
        await flushLlmUsage(user.id).catch(() => {});
        const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
        controller.enqueue(
          encoder.encode(
            `data: ${JSON.stringify({ phase: "error", type: "error", message: msg })}\n\n`
          )
        );
      }

      controller.close();
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "text/event-stream",
      "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
      Connection: "keep-alive",
    },
  });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/agent/settings/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { clearTestDrafts } from "@/lib/agent/draft-manager";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/agent/activity-logger";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const svc = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: settings } = await svc
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("*")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (settings) return NextResponse.json(settings);

  // Create default row if none exists
  const { data: newSettings, error } = await svc
    .from("agent_settings")
    .insert({ user_id: user.id })
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  return NextResponse.json(newSettings);
}

export async function PATCH(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const body = await req.json();
  const allowedFields = [
    "enabled", "draft_mode", "max_carrier_blast",
    "max_negotiation_rounds", "rate_ceiling_pct", "auto_book_enabled",
    "test_mode",
  ];

  const updates: Record<string, unknown> = { updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
  for (const key of allowedFields) {
    if (key in body) updates[key] = body[key];
  }

  const svc = await createServiceClient();

  // Ensure row exists first
  const { data: existing } = await svc
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("id")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!existing) {
    await svc.from("agent_settings").insert({ user_id: user.id });
  }

  // If turning test_mode OFF, clean up all test drafts first
  if (body.test_mode === false) {
    const cleared = await clearTestDrafts(user.id);
    if (cleared > 0) {
      await logActivity(user.id, "classified", `Test mode disabled — ${cleared} test draft(s) deleted`);
    }
  }

  // If turning test_mode ON, log it
  if (body.test_mode === true) {
    await logActivity(user.id, "classified", "[TEST] Test mode enabled — agent will sandbox all outbound actions");
  }

  const { data, error } = await svc
    .from("agent_settings")
    .update(updates)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  return NextResponse.json(data);
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/ai/classify/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { classifyEmailBatch } from "@/lib/ai/classify";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { checkRateLimit } from "@/lib/rate-limiter";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const rl = checkRateLimit(user.id);
  if (!rl.allowed) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Rate limit exceeded. Try again shortly." },
      { status: 429, headers: { "Retry-After": String(Math.ceil((rl.retryAfterMs || 60000) / 1000)) } }
    );
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();
    const { emailId } = body;

    if (!emailId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "emailId is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    // Fetch email from DB
    const { data: email, error: fetchError } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("*")
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .single();

    if (fetchError || !email) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Email not found" },
        { status: 404 }
      );
    }

    // Classify using AI
    const [classificationResult] = await classifyEmailBatch(
      [
        {
          id: email.id,
          subject: email.subject || "",
          from: email.from_name ? `${email.from_name} <${email.from_address}>` : email.from_address,
          body_preview: email.body_preview || "",
        },
      ],
      { carrier_list: "", shipper_list: "", active_loads_summary: "" }
    );

    // Update email record with classification
    const updatePayload: Record<string, unknown> = {
      category: classificationResult.classification,
      detected_intent: classificationResult.detected_intent,
      confidence_score: classificationResult.confidence_score,
      classifier_reasoning: classificationResult.reasoning,
      extracted_fields: classificationResult.extracted_fields,
    };

    // If confidence is low, send to review queue
    if (classificationResult.confidence_score < 0.85) {
      updatePayload.handler_status = "review_queue";
    }

    await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update(updatePayload)
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id);

    // Log to ai_activity_log
    await supabase.from("ai_activity_log").insert({
      tenant_id: user.id,
      action_type: "email_classified",
      action_description: `Classified email "${email.subject}" as ${classificationResult.classification} (${classificationResult.detected_intent})`,
      email_id: emailId,
      outcome: classificationResult.classification,
      metadata: {
        confidence_score: classificationResult.confidence_score,
        detected_intent: classificationResult.detected_intent,
      },
    });

    await flushLlmUsage(user.id);
    return NextResponse.json({ data: classificationResult });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Classification failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/ai/draft/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { draftReply } from "@/lib/ai/draft";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { checkRateLimit } from "@/lib/rate-limiter";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const rl = checkRateLimit(user.id);
  if (!rl.allowed) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Rate limit exceeded. Try again shortly." },
      { status: 429, headers: { "Retry-After": String(Math.ceil((rl.retryAfterMs || 60000) / 1000)) } }
    );
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();
    const { emailId, intent } = body;

    if (!emailId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "emailId is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    // Fetch email from DB
    const { data: email, error: fetchError } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("*")
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .single();

    if (fetchError || !email) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Email not found" },
        { status: 404 }
      );
    }

    // Draft reply using AI
    const result = await draftReply({
      emailBody: email.body_html || email.body_preview || "",
      fromAddress: email.from_address,
      subject: email.subject || "(no subject)",
      detectedIntent: intent || email.detected_intent || "unknown",
      agentName: "Agent",
    });
    const draft = result.draft;

    await flushLlmUsage(user.id);
    return NextResponse.json({ data: { draft } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Draft generation failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
