FILE: src/app/api/ai/improve/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { openrouterCall } from "@/lib/ai/openrouter-client";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  try {
    const { text } = await request.json();

    if (!text || typeof text !== "string" || text.trim().length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "text is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const result = await openrouterCall({
      model: "google/gemini-2.0-flash-001",
      purpose: "improve_writing",
      messages: [
        {
          role: "system",
          content:
            "You are a professional email editor. Improve the writing of the given email text. Make it professional, clear, and concise. Fix grammar, improve word choice, and make it flow better. Keep the same intent and tone. Return ONLY the improved text with no preamble, explanation, or quotes.",
        },
        { role: "user", content: text },
      ],
      temperature: 0.3,
      maxTokens: 2000,
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ text: result.content });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to improve writing";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/analytics/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrders } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
  const days = parseInt(searchParams.get("days") || "30");
  const since = new Date();
  since.setDate(since.getDate() - days);
  const sinceISO = since.toISOString();

  // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
  // NEW: use pod_id for pod-centric filtering
  const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(user.id);

  // Parallel fetch everything
  const [
    emailsRes, negotiationsRes, vapiRes,
    ttmsInTransitRes, ttmsAwaitingRes, ttmsBookedRes, ttmsConfirmedRes, ttmsDispatchedRes,
    ttmsPendingRes, ttmsDeliveredRes,
    llmUsageRes,
  ] =
    await Promise.allSettled([
      supabase
        .from("emails")
        .select("id, category, from_address, from_name, received_at, is_read")
        .eq("user_id", user.id)
        .gte("received_at", sinceISO)
        .order("received_at", { ascending: false }),
      supabase
        .from("email_negotiations")
        .select("id, status, round_count, last_negotiated_rate, sender_email, sender_name, created_at, updated_at")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
        .gte("created_at", sinceISO),
      supabase
        .from("vapi_call_extractions")
        .select("id, intent, status, call_started_at, rate, order_id")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
        .gte("call_started_at", sinceISO),
      getOrders({ status: "IN TRANSIT", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "AWAITING_PICKUP", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "BOOKED", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "CONFIRMED", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "DISPATCHED", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "PENDING", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "DELIVERED", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      // Read LLM cost data from ai_activity_log (primary source — every
      // trackLlmCall writes here with cost, model, tokens, latency).
      // Uses service client to bypass RLS since rows are inserted by service_role.
      (await createServiceClient())
        .from("ai_activity_log")
        .select("id, model, purpose, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, cost, latency_ms, created_at")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
        .gt("cost", 0)
        .gte("created_at", sinceISO)
        .order("created_at", { ascending: false }),
    ]);

  const negotiations = negotiationsRes.status === "fulfilled" ? (negotiationsRes.value.data ?? []) : [];
  const vapiCalls = vapiRes.status === "fulfilled" ? (vapiRes.value.data ?? []) : [];
  // Active loads = sum of all "in-motion" statuses
  const activeLoads =
    (ttmsInTransitRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsInTransitRes.value.meta.total : 0) +
    (ttmsAwaitingRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsAwaitingRes.value.meta.total : 0) +
    (ttmsBookedRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsBookedRes.value.meta.total : 0) +
    (ttmsConfirmedRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsConfirmedRes.value.meta.total : 0) +
    (ttmsDispatchedRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsDispatchedRes.value.meta.total : 0);
  const pendingLoads = ttmsPendingRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsPendingRes.value.meta.total : 0;
  const deliveredLoads = ttmsDeliveredRes.status === "fulfilled" ? ttmsDeliveredRes.value.meta.total : 0;

  // Build date range once — used by email stats and negotiation/vapi charts
  const dateRange: string[] = [];
  for (let d = 0; d <= days; d++) {
    const dt = new Date(since);
    dt.setDate(dt.getDate() + d);
    dateRange.push(dt.toISOString().split("T")[0]);
  }

  // ── Email stats (try RPC first, fallback to JS) ──────────────
  let totalEmails = 0;
  let importantCount = 0;
  let unimportantCount = 0;
  let ignoreCount = 0;
  let shipperCount = 0;
  let unclassifiedCount = 0;
  let unreadImportant = 0;
  let emailsPerDay: Array<{ date: string; imp: number; unimp: number; ignore: number; shipper: number }> = [];
  let topSenders: Array<{ address: string; name: string | null; count: number; topCategory: string }> = [];

  const { data: rpcStats, error: rpcError } = await supabase.rpc("get_email_analytics", {
    p_user_id: user.id,
    p_since: sinceISO,
  });

  if (!rpcError && rpcStats) {
    // Fast path: SQL aggregation
    totalEmails = rpcStats.total ?? 0;
    importantCount = rpcStats.imp ?? 0;
    unimportantCount = rpcStats.unimp ?? 0;
    ignoreCount = rpcStats.ignore ?? 0;
    shipperCount = rpcStats.shipper ?? 0;
    unclassifiedCount = rpcStats.unclassified ?? 0;
    unreadImportant = rpcStats.unread_imp ?? 0;

    // Fill date gaps for the chart
    const dailyFromDb = (rpcStats.daily ?? []) as Array<{ date: string; imp: number; unimp: number; ignore: number; shipper: number }>;
    const dailyMap = new Map(dailyFromDb.map((d) => [d.date, d]));
    emailsPerDay = dateRange.map((date) => ({
      date,
      imp: dailyMap.get(date)?.imp ?? 0,
      unimp: dailyMap.get(date)?.unimp ?? 0,
      ignore: dailyMap.get(date)?.ignore ?? 0,
      shipper: dailyMap.get(date)?.shipper ?? 0,
    }));

    topSenders = ((rpcStats.top_senders ?? []) as Array<{ address: string; name: string | null; count: number; top_category: string }>).map((s) => ({
      address: s.address,
      name: s.name,
      count: Number(s.count),
      topCategory: s.top_category || "UNCLASSIFIED",
    }));
  } else {
    // Fallback: JS aggregation (works if RPC not deployed yet)
    const emails = emailsRes.status === "fulfilled" ? (emailsRes.value.data ?? []) : [];
    totalEmails = emails.length;
    importantCount = emails.filter((e) => e.category === "IMP").length;
    unimportantCount = emails.filter((e) => e.category === "UNIMP").length;
    ignoreCount = emails.filter((e) => e.category === "IGNORE").length;
    shipperCount = emails.filter((e) => e.category === "SHIPPER").length;
    unclassifiedCount = emails.filter((e) => e.category === "UNCLASSIFIED").length;
    unreadImportant = emails.filter((e) => e.category === "IMP" && !e.is_read).length;

    const dailyEmailMap = new Map<string, { imp: number; unimp: number; ignore: number; shipper: number }>(
      dateRange.map((d) => [d, { imp: 0, unimp: 0, ignore: 0, shipper: 0 }])
    );
    for (const email of emails) {
      const date = email.received_at.split("T")[0];
      const existing = dailyEmailMap.get(date);
      if (!existing) continue;
      if (email.category === "IMP") existing.imp++;
      else if (email.category === "UNIMP") existing.unimp++;
      else if (email.category === "IGNORE") existing.ignore++;
      else if (email.category === "SHIPPER") existing.shipper++;
    }
    emailsPerDay = Array.from(dailyEmailMap.entries())
      .map(([date, counts]) => ({ date, ...counts }))
      .sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));

    const senderMap = new Map<string, { name: string | null; count: number; categories: Record<string, number> }>();
    for (const email of emails) {
      const existing = senderMap.get(email.from_address) || { name: email.from_name, count: 0, categories: {} as Record<string, number> };
      existing.count++;
      const cat = String(email.category);
      existing.categories[cat] = (existing.categories[cat] || 0) + 1;
      senderMap.set(email.from_address, existing);
    }
    topSenders = Array.from(senderMap.entries())
      .map(([address, d]) => ({
        address,
        name: d.name,
        count: d.count,
        topCategory: Object.entries(d.categories).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0] || "UNCLASSIFIED",
      }))
      .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
      .slice(0, 10);
  }

  // ── Negotiation stats ─────────────────────────────────────────
  const negTotal = negotiations.length;
  const negOpen = negotiations.filter((n) => n.status === "open").length;
  const negNegotiating = negotiations.filter((n) => n.status === "negotiating").length;
  const negAccepted = negotiations.filter((n) => n.status === "accepted").length;
  const negRejected = negotiations.filter((n) => n.status === "rejected").length;
  const negClosed = negotiations.filter((n) => n.status === "closed").length;
  const winRate = negTotal > 0 ? Math.round((negAccepted / negTotal) * 100) : 0;
  const roundCounts = negotiations.map((n) => n.round_count ?? 0);
  const avgRounds =
    roundCounts.length > 0
      ? Math.round((roundCounts.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / roundCounts.length) * 10) / 10
      : 0;
  const acceptedRates = negotiations
    .filter((n) => n.status === "accepted" && n.last_negotiated_rate != null)
    .map((n) => Number(n.last_negotiated_rate));
  const bestRate = acceptedRates.length > 0 ? Math.min(...acceptedRates) : null;
  const avgRate =
    acceptedRates.length > 0
      ? Math.round(acceptedRates.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / acceptedRates.length)
      : null;

  // Negotiations per day
  const dailyNegMap = new Map<string, number>(dateRange.map((d) => [d, 0]));
  for (const neg of negotiations) {
    const date = (neg.created_at as string).split("T")[0];
    if (dailyNegMap.has(date)) dailyNegMap.set(date, (dailyNegMap.get(date) ?? 0) + 1);
  }
  const negotiationsPerDay = Array.from(dailyNegMap.entries())
    .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));

  // ── VAPI stats ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const vapiTotal = vapiCalls.length;
  const vapiQuoting = vapiCalls.filter((c) => c.intent === "quoting").length;
  const vapiNegotiating = vapiCalls.filter((c) => c.intent === "negotiating").length;
  const vapiBooking = vapiCalls.filter((c) => c.intent === "booking").length;
  const vapiTransfer = vapiCalls.filter((c) => c.intent === "transfer").length;
  const vapiInquiring = vapiCalls.filter((c) => c.intent === "inquiring").length;
  const vapiUnknown = vapiCalls.filter((c) => !["quoting","negotiating","booking","transfer","inquiring"].includes(c.intent ?? "")).length;
  const vapiConversionRate = vapiTotal > 0 ? Math.round((vapiBooking / vapiTotal) * 100) : 0;

  const dailyVapiMap = new Map<string, number>(dateRange.map((d) => [d, 0]));
  for (const call of vapiCalls) {
    const date = (call.call_started_at as string).split("T")[0];
    if (dailyVapiMap.has(date)) dailyVapiMap.set(date, (dailyVapiMap.get(date) ?? 0) + 1);
  }
  const vapiPerDay = Array.from(dailyVapiMap.entries())
    .map(([date, count]) => ({ date, count }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));

  // ── LLM Usage stats (from ai_activity_log where cost > 0) ──
  const llmRows = llmUsageRes.status === "fulfilled" ? (llmUsageRes.value.data ?? []) : [];

  const llmTotalCost = llmRows.reduce((s: number, r: any) => s + (Number(r.cost) || 0), 0);
  const llmTotalCalls = llmRows.length;
  const llmTotalTokens = llmRows.reduce((s: number, r: any) => s + (r.prompt_tokens || 0) + (r.completion_tokens || 0), 0);
  const llmAvgLatency = llmTotalCalls > 0
    ? Math.round(llmRows.reduce((s: number, r: any) => s + (r.latency_ms || 0), 0) / llmTotalCalls)
    : 0;

  // Cost per day
  const dailyLlmMap = new Map<string, number>(dateRange.map((d) => [d, 0]));
  for (const row of llmRows) {
    const date = (row.created_at as string).split("T")[0];
    if (dailyLlmMap.has(date)) dailyLlmMap.set(date, (dailyLlmMap.get(date) ?? 0) + (Number(row.cost) || 0));
  }
  const llmCostPerDay = Array.from(dailyLlmMap.entries())
    .map(([date, cost]) => ({ date, cost: Math.round(cost * 1e6) / 1e6 }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date));

  // By purpose
  const purposeMap = new Map<string, { calls: number; cost: number; tokens: number }>();
  for (const row of llmRows) {
    const p = row.purpose || "unknown";
    const existing = purposeMap.get(p) || { calls: 0, cost: 0, tokens: 0 };
    existing.calls++;
    existing.cost += Number(row.cost) || 0;
    existing.tokens += (row.prompt_tokens || 0) + (row.completion_tokens || 0);
    purposeMap.set(p, existing);
  }
  const llmByPurpose = Array.from(purposeMap.entries())
    .map(([purpose, d]) => ({ purpose, calls: d.calls, cost: Math.round(d.cost * 1e6) / 1e6, tokens: d.tokens }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.cost - a.cost);

  // By model
  const modelMap = new Map<string, { calls: number; cost: number; tokens: number }>();
  for (const row of llmRows) {
    const m = row.model || "unknown";
    const existing = modelMap.get(m) || { calls: 0, cost: 0, tokens: 0 };
    existing.calls++;
    existing.cost += Number(row.cost) || 0;
    existing.tokens += (row.prompt_tokens || 0) + (row.completion_tokens || 0);
    modelMap.set(m, existing);
  }
  const llmByModel = Array.from(modelMap.entries())
    .map(([model, d]) => ({ model, calls: d.calls, cost: Math.round(d.cost * 1e6) / 1e6, tokens: d.tokens }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.cost - a.cost);

  return NextResponse.json({
    totalEmails,
    importantCount,
    unimportantCount,
    ignoreCount,
    shipperCount,
    unclassifiedCount,
    unreadImportant,
    emailsPerDay,
    topSenders,
    negotiations: {
      total: negTotal,
      open: negOpen,
      negotiating: negNegotiating,
      accepted: negAccepted,
      rejected: negRejected,
      closed: negClosed,
      winRate,
      avgRounds,
      bestRate,
      avgRate,
      perDay: negotiationsPerDay,
    },
    vapi: {
      total: vapiTotal,
      quoting: vapiQuoting,
      negotiating: vapiNegotiating,
      booking: vapiBooking,
      transfer: vapiTransfer,
      inquiring: vapiInquiring,
      unknown: vapiUnknown,
      conversionRate: vapiConversionRate,
      perDay: vapiPerDay,
    },
    loads: {
      active: activeLoads,
      pending: pendingLoads,
      delivered: deliveredLoads,
    },
    llm: {
      totalCost: Math.round(llmTotalCost * 1e6) / 1e6,
      totalCalls: llmTotalCalls,
      totalTokens: llmTotalTokens,
      avgLatencyMs: llmAvgLatency,
      costPerDay: llmCostPerDay,
      byPurpose: llmByPurpose,
      byModel: llmByModel,
    },
  });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/analytics/stats/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrders } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
    // NEW: use pod_id for pod-centric filtering
    const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(user.id);

    // Fetch stats from TTMS in parallel
    const [activeRes, deliveredRes, allRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
      getOrders({ status: "IN TRANSIT", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ status: "DELIVERED", per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
      getOrders({ per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId }),
    ]);

    const activeLoads =
      activeRes.status === "fulfilled" ? activeRes.value.meta.total : 0;
    const loadsDelivered =
      deliveredRes.status === "fulfilled" ? deliveredRes.value.meta.total : 0;

    // Get open escalations from Supabase (still local)
    const { count: openEscalations } = await supabase
      .from("escalations")
      .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .eq("status", "open");

    // Get AI actions today and unread emails from Supabase
    // Count from both ai_activity_log (manual + agent dual-write) and
    // agent_activity (for any older agent actions that predate dual-write)
    const today = new Date();
    today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
    const todayISO = today.toISOString();
    const [{ count: aiLogCount }, { count: agentActionCount }, { count: unreadCount }] =
      await Promise.all([
        supabase
          .from("ai_activity_log")
          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
          .gte("created_at", todayISO),
        supabase
          .from("agent_activity")
          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
          .eq("user_id", user.id)
          .in("action", ["synced", "classified", "extracted_load", "created_order", "sent_blast", "sent", "drafted", "negotiated", "booked", "escalated", "learning"])
          .gte("created_at", todayISO),
        supabase
          .from("emails")
          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
          .eq("is_read", false),
      ]);
    // Use whichever is higher — after dual-write ships, ai_activity_log will
    // be the superset; before that, agent_activity has the agent actions.
    const aiActionsToday = Math.max(aiLogCount ?? 0, agentActionCount ?? 0);

    return NextResponse.json({
      activeLoads,
      loadsDelivered,
      openEscalations: openEscalations ?? 0,
      aiActionsToday: aiActionsToday ?? 0,
      unreadCount: unreadCount ?? 0,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch stats";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { vapiGetAllCalls } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const result = await vapiGetAllCalls();

    if (!result.success) {
      return NextResponse.json({ data: [] });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data: result.data || [] });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch calls";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

FILE: src/app/api/carriers/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import {
  getCarriers,
  createCarrier,
  mapTTMSCarrier,
} from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;
    const search = searchParams.get("search") || undefined;
    const page = Math.max(1, parseInt(searchParams.get("page") || "1", 10) || 1);
    const perPage = Math.max(1, Math.min(parseInt(searchParams.get("per_page") || "50", 10) || 50, 100));

    const result = await getCarriers({ search, per_page: perPage, page });
    const data = result.data.map(mapTTMSCarrier);

    return NextResponse.json({
      data,
      total: result.meta.total,
      page: result.meta.current_page,
      per_page: result.meta.per_page,
      total_pages: result.meta.last_page,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch carriers";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();

    if (!body.name) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "name is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const carrierBody: Record<string, unknown> = {
      name: body.name,
      contact_name: body.contact_name || "",
      email: body.email || "",
      telephone: body.phone || "",
      mc: body.mc_number || "",
      dot: body.dot_number || "",
      equipment_type: body.equipment_types?.[0] || "",
      status: true,
      approved: false,
    };

    const result = await createCarrier(carrierBody);
    const data = mapTTMSCarrier(result.data);

    return NextResponse.json({ data }, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create carrier";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/carriers/[id]/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import {
  getCarrier,
  updateCarrier,
  deleteCarrier,
  mapTTMSCarrier,
} from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const carrierId = parseInt(id, 10);

    if (isNaN(carrierId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid carrier ID" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const result = await getCarrier(carrierId);
    const data = mapTTMSCarrier(result.data);

    return NextResponse.json({ data });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch carrier";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function PATCH(
  request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const carrierId = parseInt(id, 10);
    const body = await request.json();

    if (isNaN(carrierId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid carrier ID" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const ttmsBody: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    if (body.name) ttmsBody.name = body.name;
    if (body.contact_name) ttmsBody.contact_name = body.contact_name;
    if (body.email) ttmsBody.email = body.email;
    if (body.phone) ttmsBody.telephone = body.phone;
    if (body.mc_number) ttmsBody.mc = body.mc_number;
    if (body.dot_number) ttmsBody.dot = body.dot_number;
    if (body.status !== undefined) ttmsBody.status = body.status;

    const result = await updateCarrier(carrierId, ttmsBody);
    const data = mapTTMSCarrier(result.data);

    return NextResponse.json({ data });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to update carrier";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function DELETE(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const carrierId = parseInt(id, 10);

    if (isNaN(carrierId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid carrier ID" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    await deleteCarrier(carrierId);
    return NextResponse.json({ data: { deleted: true } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to delete carrier";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/clients/customers/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

const BASE_URL = process.env.REDDOG_TTMS_BASE_URL || "https://reddog.t-tms.com";
const API_KEY = process.env.REDDOG_TTMS_API_KEY || "";

export const maxDuration = 30;

/**
 * GET /api/clients/customers
 *
 * Modes:
 *   ?client_id=123         — Fetch all customers for a specific client
 *   ?customer_city=X&customer_state=Y — Search customers by city+state (returns with parent client)
 *
 * Both modes paginate through all pages automatically.
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const clientId = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get("client_id");
  const customerCity = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get("customer_city");
  const customerState = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get("customer_state");

  if (!clientId && !customerCity) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "client_id or customer_city is required" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const allCustomers: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
    let page = 1;
    let lastPage = 1;

    while (page <= lastPage) {
      const qs = new URLSearchParams({ per_page: "100", page: String(page) });
      if (clientId) qs.set("client_id", clientId);
      if (customerCity) qs.set("customer_city", customerCity);
      if (customerState) qs.set("customer_state", customerState);

      const url = `${BASE_URL}/api/clients/customers?${qs.toString()}`;
      const res = await fetch(url, {
        headers: {
          Accept: "application/json",
          "X-API-KEY": API_KEY,
        },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15000),
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const text = await res.text().catch(() => "");
        throw new Error(`TTMS API ${res.status}: ${text || res.statusText}`);
      }

      const json = await res.json();
      if (json.data) {
        allCustomers.push(...json.data);
      }
      lastPage = json.meta?.last_page || 1;
      page++;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data: allCustomers });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Failed to fetch client customers:", err);
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to fetch customers";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/agent/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { runAgentCycle } from "@/lib/agent/orchestrator";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { parallelWithLimit } from "@/lib/concurrency";

export const maxDuration = 300;

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: activeAgents } = await supabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("user_id")
    .eq("enabled", true);

  const settled = await parallelWithLimit(activeAgents || [], 3, async (agent) => {
    try {
      const result = await runAgentCycle(agent.user_id);
      return { userId: agent.user_id, ...result };
    } catch (err) {
      await flushLlmUsage(agent.user_id).catch(() => {});
      throw err;
    }
  });

  const results = settled.map((r) =>
    r.status === "fulfilled"
      ? r.value
      : { userId: "unknown", error: (r.reason as Error)?.message ?? "unknown" }
  );

  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, results });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/check-escalations/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrders, type TTMSOrder } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import type { EscalationTrigger, EscalationOption, EscalationLoadContext } from "@/types/index";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Check TTMS orders for escalation triggers
// Run every 15 minutes via Vercel cron or external scheduler
// ============================================================

const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;

interface EscalationCandidate {
  order: TTMSOrder;
  trigger_type: EscalationTrigger;
  summary: string;
  options: EscalationOption[];
  ai_recommendation: string;
}

function buildLoadContext(order: TTMSOrder): EscalationLoadContext {
  const origin = order.shipfrom_city && order.shipfrom_state
    ? `${order.shipfrom_city}, ${order.shipfrom_state}`
    : null;
  const dest = order.shipto_city && order.shipto_state
    ? `${order.shipto_city}, ${order.shipto_state}`
    : null;

  return {
    order_id: order.id,
    load_number: order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`,
    origin,
    destination: dest,
    carrier_name: order.carrier_name || null,
    shipper_name: order.client_name || null,
    status: order.status,
    pickup_date: order.requested_pickup_date || null,
    carrier_rate: order.carrier_total_charge || null,
    shipper_rate: order.total_charge || null,
  };
}

function checkLatePickupRisk(order: TTMSOrder): EscalationCandidate | null {
  if (!order.requested_pickup_date) return null;

  const pickupDate = new Date(order.requested_pickup_date);
  const now = new Date();
  const hoursUntilPickup = (pickupDate.getTime() - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);

  // Escalate if pickup is within 12 hours and no carrier assigned
  const status = order.status?.toUpperCase();
  if (hoursUntilPickup > 0 && hoursUntilPickup <= 12 && (!order.carrier_id || status === "PENDING")) {
    const loadNum = order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`;
    return {
      order,
      trigger_type: "late_pickup_risk",
      summary: `Load ${loadNum} has pickup scheduled in ${Math.round(hoursUntilPickup)} hours but no carrier is assigned. Origin: ${order.shipfrom_city || "Unknown"}, ${order.shipfrom_state || ""}. Immediate action required to avoid service failure.`,
      options: [
        {
          key: "emergency_source",
          label: "Emergency carrier sourcing",
          action_type: "reassign",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id },
        },
        {
          key: "contact_shipper",
          label: "Notify shipper of delay risk",
          action_type: "reply",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, shipper_email: order.client_email },
        },
        {
          key: "request_extension",
          label: "Request pickup extension",
          action_type: "reply",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id },
        },
      ],
      ai_recommendation: "emergency_source",
    };
  }
  return null;
}

function checkNoCarrierCoverage(order: TTMSOrder): EscalationCandidate | null {
  const status = order.status?.toUpperCase();
  if (status !== "PENDING") return null;

  const created = new Date(order.created_at);
  const now = new Date();
  const hoursOld = (now.getTime() - created.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60);

  // Escalate if order is PENDING for more than 24 hours with no carrier
  if (hoursOld > 24 && !order.carrier_id) {
    const loadNum = order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`;
    return {
      order,
      trigger_type: "no_carrier_coverage",
      summary: `Load ${loadNum} has been pending for ${Math.round(hoursOld)} hours with no carrier coverage. Route: ${order.shipfrom_city || "?"}, ${order.shipfrom_state || "?"} → ${order.shipto_city || "?"}, ${order.shipto_state || "?"}. Consider expanding carrier search or adjusting rate.`,
      options: [
        {
          key: "increase_rate",
          label: "Increase posted rate",
          action_type: "counter_offer",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, current_rate: order.carrier_total_charge },
        },
        {
          key: "expand_search",
          label: "Expand carrier search radius",
          action_type: "reassign",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id },
        },
        {
          key: "use_vapi",
          label: "Start VAPI outbound calling",
          action_type: "reassign",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id },
        },
        {
          key: "cancel_order",
          label: "Cancel order",
          action_type: "cancel",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id },
        },
      ],
      ai_recommendation: "increase_rate",
    };
  }
  return null;
}

function checkCarrierLoadDrop(order: TTMSOrder): EscalationCandidate | null {
  // Detect if order was previously confirmed but reverted to PENDING
  // We check: carrier_id exists but status is PENDING (carrier was assigned then dropped)
  const status = order.status?.toUpperCase();
  if (status === "PENDING" && order.carrier_id && order.carrier_name) {
    const loadNum = order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`;
    return {
      order,
      trigger_type: "carrier_load_drop",
      summary: `CRITICAL: Carrier "${order.carrier_name}" appears to have dropped load ${loadNum}. Order status reverted to PENDING despite having carrier assigned. Route: ${order.shipfrom_city || "?"}, ${order.shipfrom_state || "?"} → ${order.shipto_city || "?"}, ${order.shipto_state || "?"}. Immediate re-coverage needed.`,
      options: [
        {
          key: "emergency_rebook",
          label: "Emergency re-book with new carrier",
          action_type: "reassign",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, dropped_carrier: order.carrier_name },
        },
        {
          key: "contact_carrier",
          label: "Contact carrier to confirm drop",
          action_type: "reply",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, carrier_email: order.carrier_email },
        },
        {
          key: "notify_shipper",
          label: "Notify shipper of situation",
          action_type: "reply",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, shipper_email: order.client_email },
        },
      ],
      ai_recommendation: "emergency_rebook",
    };
  }
  return null;
}

function checkRateCeilingExceeded(order: TTMSOrder): EscalationCandidate | null {
  // If carrier rate exceeds shipper rate (negative margin)
  if (
    order.carrier_total_charge &&
    order.total_charge &&
    order.carrier_total_charge > order.total_charge
  ) {
    const loadNum = order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`;
    const loss = order.carrier_total_charge - order.total_charge;
    return {
      order,
      trigger_type: "rate_ceiling_exceeded",
      summary: `Load ${loadNum} has negative margin: carrier rate $${order.carrier_total_charge.toLocaleString()} exceeds shipper rate $${order.total_charge.toLocaleString()} by $${loss.toLocaleString()}. This load will result in a loss if booked at current rates.`,
      options: [
        {
          key: "renegotiate_carrier",
          label: "Renegotiate carrier rate down",
          action_type: "counter_offer",
          metadata: {
            order_id: order.id,
            carrier_rate: order.carrier_total_charge,
            target_rate: order.total_charge * 0.85,
          },
        },
        {
          key: "renegotiate_shipper",
          label: "Request rate increase from shipper",
          action_type: "counter_offer",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, shipper_rate: order.total_charge },
        },
        {
          key: "accept_loss",
          label: "Accept loss (relationship priority)",
          action_type: "accept",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id, loss_amount: loss },
        },
        {
          key: "decline_load",
          label: "Decline / cancel load",
          action_type: "decline",
          metadata: { order_id: order.id },
        },
      ],
      ai_recommendation: "renegotiate_carrier",
    };
  }
  return null;
}

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // Verify cron secret — required
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (!CRON_SECRET || authHeader !== `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createClient();

    // Fetch recent orders from TTMS (last 200 to cover active loads)
    const [pendingRes, confirmedRes, transitRes] = await Promise.allSettled([
      getOrders({ status: "PENDING", per_page: 100 }),
      getOrders({ status: "CONFIRMED", per_page: 50 }),
      getOrders({ status: "IN TRANSIT", per_page: 50 }),
    ]);

    const allOrders: TTMSOrder[] = [];
    if (pendingRes.status === "fulfilled") allOrders.push(...pendingRes.value.data);
    if (confirmedRes.status === "fulfilled") allOrders.push(...confirmedRes.value.data);
    if (transitRes.status === "fulfilled") allOrders.push(...transitRes.value.data);

    // Run all checks against each order
    const candidates: EscalationCandidate[] = [];
    for (const order of allOrders) {
      const checks = [
        checkLatePickupRisk(order),
        checkNoCarrierCoverage(order),
        checkCarrierLoadDrop(order),
        checkRateCeilingExceeded(order),
      ];
      for (const result of checks) {
        if (result) candidates.push(result);
      }
    }

    if (candidates.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No new escalations", created: 0 });
    }

    // Get all active email connections to map tenants to their TTMS data.
    // Each tenant only sees escalations for loads involving their known carriers/shippers.
    const { data: profiles } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id")
      .limit(50);

    const tenantIds = profiles?.map((p) => p.id) ?? [];
    if (tenantIds.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No tenants found", created: 0 });
    }

    // Build a set of carrier emails per tenant for scoping — single query instead of N
    const { data: allCarriers } = await supabase
      .from("carriers")
      .select("tenant_id, email")
      .in("tenant_id", tenantIds);

    const tenantCarrierEmails = new Map<string, Set<string>>();
    for (const tenantId of tenantIds) {
      tenantCarrierEmails.set(tenantId, new Set());
    }
    for (const c of allCarriers || []) {
      const email = c.email?.toLowerCase();
      if (email) tenantCarrierEmails.get(c.tenant_id)?.add(email);
    }

    let created = 0;
    const errors: string[] = [];

    // Collect all escalation rows first, then insert in parallel chunks
    const escalationRows: Array<{
      tenant_id: string;
      ttms_order_id: number;
      trigger_type: EscalationTrigger;
      summary: string;
      options: EscalationOption[];
      ai_recommendation: string;
      load_context: EscalationLoadContext;
      status: string;
    }> = [];

    for (const candidate of candidates) {
      const loadContext = buildLoadContext(candidate.order);
      const orderCarrierEmail = candidate.order.carrier_email?.toLowerCase();

      // Determine which tenants should see this escalation
      const relevantTenants = orderCarrierEmail
        ? tenantIds.filter((tid) => tenantCarrierEmails.get(tid)?.has(orderCarrierEmail))
        : tenantIds;
      const targetTenants = relevantTenants.length > 0 ? relevantTenants : tenantIds;

      for (const tenantId of targetTenants) {
        escalationRows.push({
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          ttms_order_id: candidate.order.id,
          trigger_type: candidate.trigger_type,
          summary: candidate.summary,
          options: candidate.options,
          ai_recommendation: candidate.ai_recommendation,
          load_context: loadContext,
          status: "open",
        });
      }
    }

    // Insert in parallel chunks of 50 (can't batch due to partial unique index)
    const CHUNK = 50;
    for (let i = 0; i < escalationRows.length; i += CHUNK) {
      const chunk = escalationRows.slice(i, i + CHUNK);
      const results = await Promise.allSettled(
        chunk.map((row) =>
          supabase.from("escalations").insert(row).then(({ error }) => {
            if (error && error.code !== "23505") throw error;
            if (!error) created++;
          })
        )
      );
      for (const r of results) {
        if (r.status === "rejected") errors.push(String(r.reason));
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: `Checked ${allOrders.length} orders, found ${candidates.length} triggers, created ${created} escalations`,
      checked: allOrders.length,
      triggers: candidates.length,
      created,
      errors: errors.length > 0 ? errors : undefined,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Escalation check failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/delta-sync/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { syncEmails } from "@/lib/email-sync";
import { parallelWithLimit } from "@/lib/concurrency";

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // Verify CRON_SECRET
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Get all active email connections
    const { data: connections, error } = await supabase
      .from("email_connections")
      .select("tenant_id")
      .eq("is_active", true);

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    const settled = await parallelWithLimit(connections || [], 5, async (conn) => {
      await syncEmails(conn.tenant_id);
    });

    const synced = settled.filter((r) => r.status === "fulfilled").length;
    const failed = settled.filter((r) => r.status === "rejected").length;
    if (failed > 0) {
      console.error(`Delta sync: ${failed}/${settled.length} tenants failed`);
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data: { synced } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Delta sync cron failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/detect-ghosts/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { backfillOutcome } from "@/lib/learning/event-logger";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Detect ghosted negotiations (no activity for 48+ hours)
// Runs every 6 hours via Vercel cron
// ============================================================

const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;
const GHOST_THRESHOLD_HOURS = 48;

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (!CRON_SECRET || authHeader !== `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    const cutoff = new Date();
    cutoff.setHours(cutoff.getHours() - GHOST_THRESHOLD_HOURS);

    // Find stale negotiations
    const { data: stale, error: fetchError } = await supabase
      .from("email_negotiations")
      .select("id, tenant_id, last_negotiated_rate, interested_order")
      .in("status", ["offered", "negotiating"])
      .lt("updated_at", cutoff.toISOString())
      .limit(200);

    if (fetchError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: fetchError.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    if (!stale || stale.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No ghosted negotiations found", ghosted: 0 });
    }

    let ghostedCount = 0;

    for (const neg of stale) {
      // Update status to ghosted
      const { error: updateError } = await supabase
        .from("email_negotiations")
        .update({ status: "ghosted", updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
        .eq("id", neg.id);

      if (updateError) {
        console.error(`[detect-ghosts] Failed to ghost ${neg.id}:`, updateError.message);
        continue;
      }

      // Backfill outcome for learning loop
      backfillOutcome({
        tenantId: neg.tenant_id,
        negotiationId: neg.id,
        outcome: "ghosted",
        finalRate: null,
        shipperRate: null,
        targetRate: null,
        closedAt: new Date(),
        acceptedOnRound: null,
      }).catch((e) => console.error("[detect-ghosts] Backfill failed (non-fatal):", e));

      ghostedCount++;
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: `Marked ${ghostedCount} negotiations as ghosted`,
      ghosted: ghostedCount,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Ghost detection failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/distill-patterns/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { distillPatterns } from "@/lib/learning/pattern-distiller";
import { parallelWithLimit } from "@/lib/concurrency";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Distill negotiation patterns into learnings
// Runs every 6 hours via Vercel cron
// ============================================================

const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // Verify cron secret — required
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (!CRON_SECRET || authHeader !== `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Get all tenants
    const { data: profiles, error: profileError } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id")
      .limit(50);

    if (profileError || !profiles || profiles.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({
        message: "No tenants found",
        patternsExtracted: 0,
      });
    }

    const settled = await parallelWithLimit(profiles, 3, async (profile) => {
      return { id: profile.id, ...(await distillPatterns(profile.id)) };
    });

    let totalPatterns = 0;
    let totalEvents = 0;
    const allErrors: string[] = [];

    for (const r of settled) {
      if (r.status === "fulfilled") {
        totalPatterns += r.value.patternsExtracted;
        totalEvents += r.value.eventsProcessed;
        if (r.value.errors.length > 0) {
          allErrors.push(...r.value.errors.map((e: string) => `[${r.value.id}] ${e}`));
        }
      } else {
        allErrors.push(`Tenant failed: ${(r.reason as Error)?.message ?? "unknown"}`);
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: `Distilled ${totalPatterns} patterns from ${totalEvents} events across ${profiles.length} tenants`,
      tenants: profiles.length,
      eventsProcessed: totalEvents,
      patternsExtracted: totalPatterns,
      errors: allErrors.length > 0 ? allErrors : undefined,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Pattern distillation failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/extract-vapi/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { vapiGetAllCalls, type VapiCall } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { extractFromVapiCalls, type VapiExtraction } from "@/lib/ai/extract-vapi";
import { materializeLoad } from "@/lib/quote-board/incremental";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Extract order/rate from VAPI call transcripts
// Runs every 10 minutes — processes only NEW calls each time
//
// Optimized: fetches VAPI calls ONCE, extracts ONCE with Gemini,
// then distributes to all tenants. Caps at 10 calls/run to stay
// within cron-job.org's 30s timeout on Vercel Hobby plan.
// ============================================================

export const maxDuration = 60;

const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  const urlSecret = new URL(request.url).searchParams.get("secret");
  const isAuthorized =
    CRON_SECRET &&
    (authHeader === `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}` || urlSecret === CRON_SECRET);

  if (!isAuthorized) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Get all tenants
    const { data: profiles } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id")
      .limit(20);

    const tenantIds = profiles?.map((p) => p.id) ?? [];
    if (tenantIds.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No tenants found", synced: 0 });
    }

    // --- Step 1: Fetch VAPI calls ONCE (shared across all tenants) ---
    let allCalls: VapiCall[] = [];
    try {
      const result = await vapiGetAllCalls();
      allCalls = (result.data || []).filter((c) => c.transcript || c.summary);
      console.log(`[extract-vapi] Fetched ${allCalls.length} calls with content from VAPI`);
    } catch (err) {
      const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "VAPI API fetch failed";
      return NextResponse.json({ error: msg }, { status: 500 });
    }

    if (allCalls.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No VAPI calls with content", total_new: 0 });
    }

    // --- Step 2: Find which calls are already extracted (union across all tenants) ---
    const { data: allExisting } = await supabase
      .from("vapi_call_extractions")
      .select("call_id, tenant_id");

    // Build set of call_ids already extracted for ANY tenant
    const existingByTenant = new Map<string, Set<string>>();
    for (const row of allExisting || []) {
      if (!existingByTenant.has(row.tenant_id)) existingByTenant.set(row.tenant_id, new Set());
      existingByTenant.get(row.tenant_id)!.add(row.call_id);
    }

    // Find globally new calls (not extracted for the first tenant — same calls go to all)
    const allExistingCallIds = new Set((allExisting || []).map((r) => r.call_id));
    const newCalls = allCalls.filter((c) => !allExistingCallIds.has(c.call_id));

    console.log(`[extract-vapi] ${newCalls.length} new calls to extract`);

    if (newCalls.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No new VAPI calls", total_new: 0 });
    }

    // Cap per run
    // Keep low to finish within cron-job.org 30s timeout (Vercel Hobby plan)
    // 10 calls = 1 Gemini batch ≈ 5-10s total
    const MAX_CALLS = 10;
    const callsToProcess = newCalls.slice(0, MAX_CALLS);

    // --- Step 3: Run Gemini extraction ONCE ---
    let extractions: VapiExtraction[];
    try {
      extractions = await extractFromVapiCalls(
        callsToProcess.map((c) => ({
          call_id: c.call_id,
          caller: c.caller || "",
          summary: c.summary || "",
          transcript: c.transcript || "",
        })),
        tenantIds[0] // track LLM cost under first tenant
      );
      console.log(`[extract-vapi] Gemini extracted ${extractions.length} results`);
    } catch (err) {
      const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Gemini extraction failed";
      return NextResponse.json({ error: msg }, { status: 500 });
    }

    // Build extraction map
    const extMap = new Map<string, VapiExtraction>();
    for (const ext of extractions) extMap.set(ext.call_id, ext);

    // Build call lookup
    const callMap = new Map<string, VapiCall>();
    for (const c of callsToProcess) callMap.set(c.call_id, c);

    // --- Step 4: Build all rows for all tenants in one batch ---
    const now = new Date().toISOString();
    let totalNew = 0;
    const perTenant: Record<string, number> = {};
    const allRows: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
    const allAffectedOrders = new Map<string, Set<string>>();

    for (const tenantId of tenantIds) {
      const tenantExisting = existingByTenant.get(tenantId) || new Set();
      const tenantNewCalls = callsToProcess.filter((c) => !tenantExisting.has(c.call_id));
      let count = 0;

      for (const call of tenantNewCalls) {
        const ext = extMap.get(call.call_id);
        if (!ext) continue;
        allRows.push({
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          call_id: ext.call_id,
          phone_number: call.caller || null,
          order_id: ext.order_id || null,
          rate: ext.rate,
          ai_rate: ext.ai_rate,
          intent: ext.intent || "unknown",
          status: ext.intent === "booking" ? "negotiating" : ext.intent === "transfer" ? "transferred" : "called",
          call_started_at: call.started_at || call.ended_at || null,
          summary: (call.summary || "").slice(0, 500),
          extracted_at: now,
        });
        count++;
        if (ext.order_id) {
          if (!allAffectedOrders.has(tenantId)) allAffectedOrders.set(tenantId, new Set());
          allAffectedOrders.get(tenantId)!.add(ext.order_id);
        }
      }
      perTenant[tenantId] = count;
      totalNew += count;
    }

    // Single batch upsert for all tenants
    if (allRows.length > 0) {
      const { error } = await supabase
        .from("vapi_call_extractions")
        .upsert(allRows, { onConflict: "tenant_id,call_id" });
      if (error) {
        console.error(`[extract-vapi] Batch upsert error:`, error.message);
        totalNew = 0;
      }
    }

    // --- Step 5: Log to live activity feed per tenant ---
    for (const tenantId of tenantIds) {
      const count = perTenant[tenantId] || 0;
      if (count === 0) continue;
      const affected = allAffectedOrders.get(tenantId);
      const orderList = affected ? Array.from(affected).slice(0, 5).join(", ") : "";
      logActivity({
        tenantId,
        actionType: "vapi_sync",
        description: `VAPI sync: extracted ${count} new call${count !== 1 ? "s" : ""}${orderList ? ` for orders ${orderList}` : ""}`,
        outcome: "success",
        metadata: { calls_extracted: count, orders_affected: affected ? Array.from(affected) : [] },
      });
    }

    // --- Step 6: Materialize affected loads (parallel per tenant) ---
    const materializePromises: Promise<void>[] = [];
    for (const [tenantId, orderIds] of allAffectedOrders) {
      for (const loadId of orderIds) {
        materializePromises.push(
          materializeLoad(tenantId, loadId).catch((err) =>
            console.error(`[extract-vapi] Materialize failed ${loadId}:`, err)
          )
        );
      }
    }
    if (materializePromises.length > 0) {
      await Promise.allSettled(materializePromises);
      console.log(`[extract-vapi] Materialized ${materializePromises.length} loads`);
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: `Extracted ${totalNew} new VAPI calls`,
      total_new: totalNew,
      calls_fetched: allCalls.length,
      new_calls: callsToProcess.length,
      per_tenant: perTenant,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "VAPI extraction failed";
    console.error("[extract-vapi] Fatal error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
