FILE: src/app/api/cron/graph-renew/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { renewSubscription } from "@/lib/graph/subscription";

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // Verify CRON_SECRET
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Find connections with Graph subscriptions expiring in the next 24 hours
    const twentyFourHoursFromNow = new Date(
      Date.now() + 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000
    ).toISOString();

    const { data: connections, error } = await supabase
      .from("email_connections")
      .select("id, tenant_id, access_token, graph_subscription_id")
      .eq("is_active", true)
      .not("graph_subscription_id", "is", null)
      .lt("graph_subscription_expires_at", twentyFourHoursFromNow);

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    let renewed = 0;

    for (const connection of connections || []) {
      try {
        const { expirationDateTime } = await renewSubscription(
          connection.access_token,
          connection.graph_subscription_id!
        );

        await supabase
          .from("email_connections")
          .update({
            graph_subscription_expires_at: expirationDateTime,
          })
          .eq("id", connection.id);

        renewed++;
      } catch (renewError) {
        console.error(
          `Graph subscription renewal failed for connection ${connection.id}:`,
          renewError
        );
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data: { renewed } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error
        ? error.message
        : "Graph subscription renewal cron failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/refresh-quote-board/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { refreshQuoteBoard } from "@/lib/quote-board/refresh";
import { parallelWithLimit } from "@/lib/concurrency";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Daily full reconciliation of quote board
// Safety net — catches any data that incremental updates missed.
// Uses cached TTMS data so it's fast (~5-10s per tenant).
// ============================================================

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  const urlSecret = new URL(request.url).searchParams.get("secret");
  const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;
  const isAuthorized =
    CRON_SECRET &&
    (authHeader === `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}` || urlSecret === CRON_SECRET);

  if (!isAuthorized) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    const { data: profiles } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id")
      .limit(20);

    const tenantIds = profiles?.map((p) => p.id) ?? [];
    if (tenantIds.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No tenants found", refreshed: 0 });
    }

    const settled = await parallelWithLimit(tenantIds, 3, async (tenantId) => {
      const result = await refreshQuoteBoard(tenantId);
      return { tenantId, loads: result.loads_upserted, quotes: result.quotes_upserted };
    });

    let totalLoads = 0;
    let totalQuotes = 0;
    const failed = settled.filter((r) => r.status === "rejected").length;
    for (const r of settled) {
      if (r.status === "fulfilled") {
        totalLoads += r.value.loads;
        totalQuotes += r.value.quotes;
      }
    }

    if (failed > 0) {
      console.error(`[refresh-quote-board] ${failed}/${settled.length} tenants failed`);
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: `Reconciled ${totalLoads} loads, ${totalQuotes} quotes`,
      total_loads: totalLoads,
      total_quotes: totalQuotes,
      tenants: settled.length,
      failed,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Reconciliation failed";
    console.error("[refresh-quote-board] Fatal error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/sync-pods/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getUsers, getUser as getTtmsUser } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Sync pod assignments from TTMS → profiles table
// Runs every 10 minutes — detects pod additions and removals
//
// When a user's pod changes, updates profiles.ttms_pod_title.
// Frontend subscribes to Realtime on profiles — auto-refreshes
// when pod changes so pod-scoped data loads correctly.
// ============================================================

export const maxDuration = 30;

const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  const urlSecret = new URL(request.url).searchParams.get("secret");
  const isAuthorized =
    CRON_SECRET &&
    (authHeader === `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}` || urlSecret === CRON_SECRET);

  if (!isAuthorized) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Get all profiles with TTMS user IDs
    const { data: profiles } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id, email, ttms_user_id, ttms_pod_title")
      .not("ttms_user_id", "is", null);

    if (!profiles || profiles.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No TTMS-linked users", changes: 0 });
    }

    let changes = 0;
    const updates: { userId: string; email: string; oldPod: string | null; newPod: string | null }[] = [];

    // Check each user's current pod in TTMS
    for (const profile of profiles) {
      try {
        const { data: ttmsUser } = await getTtmsUser(profile.ttms_user_id);
        const currentPod = ttmsUser?.pod?.title ?? null;
        const storedPod = profile.ttms_pod_title ?? null;

        // Detect change: added to pod, removed from pod, or switched pod
        if (currentPod !== storedPod) {
          await supabase
            .from("profiles")
            .update({ ttms_pod_title: currentPod })
            .eq("id", profile.id);

          changes++;
          updates.push({
            userId: profile.id,
            email: profile.email || "unknown",
            oldPod: storedPod,
            newPod: currentPod,
          });

          const action = !storedPod && currentPod
            ? `added to pod "${currentPod}"`
            : storedPod && !currentPod
            ? `removed from pod "${storedPod}"`
            : `pod changed: "${storedPod}" → "${currentPod}"`;
          console.log(`[sync-pods] ${profile.email}: ${action}`);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[sync-pods] Failed to check ${profile.email}:`, err);
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: changes > 0 ? `${changes} pod change(s) detected` : "No pod changes",
      checked: profiles.length,
      changes,
      updates,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Pod sync failed";
    console.error("[sync-pods] Fatal error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/sync-ttms/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import {
  getOrders,
  getCarriers,
  getClients,
  type TTMSOrder,
  type TTMSCarrier,
  type TTMSClient,
} from "@/lib/ttms/client";

// ============================================================
// Cron: Sync carriers, orders (loads), and clients (shippers)
// from Reddog TTMS API into Supabase daily.
// Also auto-triggers if tables are empty.
//
// PERF: All upserts are batched (chunks of 500) instead of
//       per-row, reducing DB roundtrips from 500k+ to ~20.
// ============================================================

export const maxDuration = 120;

const CRON_SECRET = process.env.CRON_SECRET;
const BATCH_SIZE = 500;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // Verify cron secret — required for all access (cron or manual)
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  const urlSecret = new URL(request.url).searchParams.get("secret");
  const isAuthorized =
    CRON_SECRET &&
    (authHeader === `Bearer ${CRON_SECRET}` || urlSecret === CRON_SECRET);

  if (!isAuthorized) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Get all tenants
    const { data: profiles } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("id")
      .limit(20);

    const tenantIds = profiles?.map((p) => p.id) ?? [];
    if (tenantIds.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ message: "No tenants found", synced: 0 });
    }

    const stats = {
      carriers_synced: 0,
      loads_synced: 0,
      shippers_synced: 0,
      errors: [] as string[],
    };

    // --- SYNC CARRIERS (batched) ---
    try {
      const allCarriers: TTMSCarrier[] = [];
      let page = 1;
      let lastPage = 1;

      do {
        const result = await getCarriers({ per_page: 100, page });
        allCarriers.push(...result.data);
        lastPage = result.meta.last_page;
        page++;
      } while (page <= lastPage && page <= 50);

      console.log(`[sync-ttms] Fetched ${allCarriers.length} carriers from TTMS`);

      // Build all rows for all tenants at once
      const carrierRows = tenantIds.flatMap((tenantId) =>
        allCarriers.map((c) => ({
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          name: c.name,
          email: c.email || null,
          phone: c.telephone || null,
          mc_number: c.mc || null,
          dot_number: c.dot || null,
          equipment_types: c.equipment_type ? [c.equipment_type] : [],
          contact_name: c.contact_name || null,
          status: c.status,
          approved: c.approved,
        }))
      );

      // Upsert in batches
      for (let i = 0; i < carrierRows.length; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
        const batch = carrierRows.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from("carriers")
          .upsert(batch, { onConflict: "tenant_id,mc_number", ignoreDuplicates: true });
        if (error) {
          // Fallback: try name-based conflict
          await supabase
            .from("carriers")
            .upsert(batch, { onConflict: "tenant_id,name", ignoreDuplicates: true });
        }
      }
      stats.carriers_synced = carrierRows.length;
    } catch (e) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Carrier sync failed";
      console.error("[sync-ttms] Carrier sync error:", msg);
      stats.errors.push(msg);
    }

    // --- SYNC CLIENTS (Shippers — batched) ---
    try {
      const allClients: TTMSClient[] = [];
      let page = 1;
      let lastPage = 1;

      do {
        const result = await getClients({ per_page: 100, page });
        allClients.push(...result.data);
        lastPage = result.meta.last_page;
        page++;
      } while (page <= lastPage && page <= 50);

      console.log(`[sync-ttms] Fetched ${allClients.length} clients from TTMS`);

      const shipperRows = tenantIds.flatMap((tenantId) =>
        allClients.map((c) => ({
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          name: c.name,
          billing_email: c.email || null,
          logistics_email: c.email || null,
        }))
      );

      for (let i = 0; i < shipperRows.length; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
        const batch = shipperRows.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
        await supabase
          .from("shippers")
          .upsert(batch, { onConflict: "tenant_id,name", ignoreDuplicates: true });
      }
      stats.shippers_synced = shipperRows.length;
    } catch (e) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Client sync failed";
      console.error("[sync-ttms] Client sync error:", msg);
      stats.errors.push(msg);
    }

    // --- SYNC ORDERS (Loads — batched) ---
    try {
      const allOrders: TTMSOrder[] = [];
      const statuses = ["PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "IN TRANSIT", "DELIVERED"];

      for (const status of statuses) {
        let page = 1;
        let lastPage = 1;
        do {
          const result = await getOrders({ status, per_page: 100, page });
          allOrders.push(...result.data);
          lastPage = result.meta.last_page;
          page++;
        } while (page <= lastPage && page <= 20);
      }

      console.log(`[sync-ttms] Fetched ${allOrders.length} orders from TTMS`);

      const statusMap: Record<string, string> = {
        PENDING: "pending",
        CONFIRMED: "booked",
        "IN TRANSIT": "in_transit",
        IN_TRANSIT: "in_transit",
        DISPATCHED: "in_transit",
        DELIVERED: "delivered",
        CANCELLED: "cancelled",
        CANCELED: "cancelled",
      };

      const loadRows = tenantIds.flatMap((tenantId) =>
        allOrders.map((order) => ({
          tenant_id: tenantId,
          load_number: order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`,
          status: statusMap[order.status?.toUpperCase()] || "pending",
          origin_city: order.shipfrom_city || null,
          origin_state: order.shipfrom_state || null,
          dest_city: order.shipto_city || null,
          dest_state: order.shipto_state || null,
          equipment_type: order.equipment_type || null,
          weight_lbs: order.total_weight || null,
          commodity: order.order_items?.[0]?.description || null,
          pickup_date: order.requested_pickup_date || null,
          delivery_date: order.requested_delivery_date || null,
          carrier_rate: order.carrier_total_charge || null,
          shipper_rate: order.total_charge || null,
          tms_load_id: String(order.id),
          notes: order.notes || null,
          miles: order.total_miles || null,
        }))
      );

      for (let i = 0; i < loadRows.length; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
        const batch = loadRows.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
        await supabase
          .from("loads")
          .upsert(batch, { onConflict: "tenant_id,load_number", ignoreDuplicates: false });
      }
      stats.loads_synced = loadRows.length;
    } catch (e) {
      const msg = e instanceof Error ? e.message : "Order sync failed";
      console.error("[sync-ttms] Order sync error:", msg);
      stats.errors.push(msg);
    }

    console.log("[sync-ttms] Sync complete:", stats);

    return NextResponse.json({
      message: "TTMS sync complete",
      ...stats,
      errors: stats.errors.length > 0 ? stats.errors : undefined,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "TTMS sync failed";
    console.error("[sync-ttms] Fatal error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/cron/token-refresh/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

const AZURE_TOKEN_URL = `https://login.microsoftonline.com/${process.env.AZURE_AD_TENANT_ID}/oauth2/v2.0/token`;

export const maxDuration = 120;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  // Verify CRON_SECRET
  const authHeader = request.headers.get("authorization");
  if (authHeader !== `Bearer ${process.env.CRON_SECRET}`) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    // Find connections with tokens expiring in the next 10 minutes
    const tenMinutesFromNow = new Date(
      Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000
    ).toISOString();

    const { data: connections, error } = await supabase
      .from("email_connections")
      .select("id, tenant_id, refresh_token")
      .eq("is_active", true)
      .lt("token_expires_at", tenMinutesFromNow);

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    let refreshed = 0;

    for (const connection of connections || []) {
      try {
        const params = new URLSearchParams({
          client_id: process.env.AZURE_AD_CLIENT_ID!,
          client_secret: process.env.AZURE_AD_CLIENT_SECRET!,
          grant_type: "refresh_token",
          refresh_token: connection.refresh_token,
          scope:
            "openid profile email offline_access Mail.Read Mail.ReadWrite Mail.Send User.Read",
        });

        const response = await fetch(AZURE_TOKEN_URL, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/x-www-form-urlencoded" },
          body: params.toString(),
        });

        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error(`Token refresh failed: ${response.statusText}`);
        }

        const data = await response.json();
        const expiresAt = new Date(
          Date.now() + data.expires_in * 1000
        ).toISOString();

        await supabase
          .from("email_connections")
          .update({
            access_token: data.access_token,
            refresh_token: data.refresh_token || connection.refresh_token,
            token_expires_at: expiresAt,
          })
          .eq("id", connection.id);

        refreshed++;
      } catch (refreshError) {
        console.error(
          `Token refresh failed for connection ${connection.id}:`,
          refreshError
        );

        // Deactivate connection on failure
        await supabase
          .from("email_connections")
          .update({ is_active: false })
          .eq("id", connection.id);
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data: { refreshed } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Token refresh cron failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/custom-tags/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

/** GET — list all custom tags for the user */
export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from("custom_tags")
    .select("id, name, created_at")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .order("name");

  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  return NextResponse.json({ tags: data });
}

/** POST — create a new custom tag */
export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const { name } = await req.json();
  if (!name || typeof name !== "string" || name.trim().length === 0) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Tag name is required" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const trimmed = name.trim();

  // Block system tag names
  const reserved = ["IMP", "UNIMP", "IGNORE", "SHIPPER", "TENDER", "SHIPPER_STATUS", "UNCLASSIFIED", "BIDDING"];
  if (reserved.includes(trimmed.toUpperCase())) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "This name is reserved for a system tag" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from("custom_tags")
    .insert({ user_id: user.id, name: trimmed })
    .select("id, name, created_at")
    .single();

  if (error) {
    if (error.code === "23505") {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Tag already exists" }, { status: 409 });
    }
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ tag: data }, { status: 201 });
}

/** DELETE — remove a custom tag */
export async function DELETE(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  const { id } = await req.json();
  if (!id) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Tag id is required" }, { status: 400 });

  // Clear the custom_tag from any emails that had it
  const { data: tag } = await supabase
    .from("custom_tags")
    .select("name")
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (tag) {
    await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update({ custom_tag: null })
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .eq("custom_tag", tag.name);
  }

  const { error } = await supabase
    .from("custom_tags")
    .delete()
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("user_id", user.id);

  if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/email/send/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { sendEmail } from "@/lib/graph/send";
import { logNegotiationEvent } from "@/lib/learning/event-logger";
import { materializeQuote } from "@/lib/quote-board/incremental";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();
    const {
      to,
      cc,
      bcc,
      subject,
      body: emailBody,
      loadId,
      // Outbound offer metadata (optional — only from Outbound page)
      carrierName,
      loadNumber,
      offerRate,
      // Lane data for learning loop (optional)
      originCity,
      originState,
      destCity,
      destState,
      equipmentType,
      shipperRate,
    } = body;

    if (!to || !subject || !emailBody) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "to, subject, and body are required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    // Block outbound in test mode
    const svcSupabase = await createServiceClient();
    const { data: agentSettings } = await svcSupabase
      .from("agent_settings")
      .select("test_mode")
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .maybeSingle();

    if (agentSettings?.test_mode) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot send emails in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // Get access token
    const accessToken = await getAccessToken(user.id);

    // Send via Graph
    await sendEmail(accessToken, { to, cc, bcc, subject, body: emailBody });

    // Log to ai_activity_log
    await supabase.from("ai_activity_log").insert({
      tenant_id: user.id,
      action_type: "email_sent",
      action_description: `Sent email to ${to}: "${subject}"`,
      load_id: loadId || null,
      outcome: "sent",
      metadata: { to, subject },
    });

    // Create negotiation record for outbound offers so replies auto-route
    if (loadNumber && offerRate) {
      try {
        const { data: negRecord } = await supabase
          .from("email_negotiations")
          .insert({
            tenant_id: user.id,
            sender_email: to.toLowerCase(),
            sender_name: carrierName || null,
            mc_number: "NA",
            interested_order: loadNumber,
            last_negotiated_rate: offerRate,
            intent: "outbound_offer",
            status: "offered",
            round_count: 0,
          })
          .select("id")
          .single();

        // --- LEARNING LOOP: Log outbound offer event ---
        logNegotiationEvent({
          tenantId: user.id,
          eventType: "negotiation_outbound_offer",
          carrierEmail: to.toLowerCase(),
          carrierName: carrierName || null,
          carrierMc: null,
          carrierId: null,
          loadId: loadId || null,
          loadNumber,
          emailId: null,
          negotiationId: negRecord?.id || null,
          lane: {
            origin_city: originCity || null,
            origin_state: originState || null,
            dest_city: destCity || null,
            dest_state: destState || null,
          },
          equipmentType: equipmentType || null,
          rateState: {
            shipperRate: shipperRate || null,
            carrierOffer: null,
            aiCounterRate: offerRate,
            floorRate: null,
            targetRate: null,
            ceilingRate: null,
            roundNumber: 0,
          },
          contextSnapshot: { source: "outbound_offer", to, subject },
          modelUsed: "outbound",
          systemPromptHash: "outbound_offer_v1",
          actionTaken: "outbound_offer",
          aiResponseText: emailBody,
        }).catch((e) => console.error("[email/send] Event logging failed (non-fatal):", e));

        // Write-through: update quote board
        try {
          await materializeQuote(user.id, loadNumber, {
            source: "outbound",
            identifier: to.toLowerCase(),
            display_name: carrierName || to,
            latest_rate: offerRate,
            status: "offered",
            round_count: 0,
            is_known: false,
            carrier_id: null,
            mc_number: null,
            last_activity: new Date().toISOString(),
            reference_id: null,
          });
        } catch (qbErr) {
          console.error("[email/send] Quote board write-through failed (non-fatal):", qbErr);
        }
      } catch {
        // Non-fatal — negotiation tracking is best-effort
        console.error("[email/send] Failed to create outbound negotiation record");
      }
    }

    // --- LEARNING LOOP: Log all email sends (inbound replies without negotiation context) ---
    if (!loadNumber || !offerRate) {
      logNegotiationEvent({
        tenantId: user.id,
        eventType: "email_send",
        carrierEmail: to.toLowerCase(),
        carrierName: carrierName || null,
        carrierMc: null,
        carrierId: null,
        loadId: loadId || null,
        loadNumber: loadNumber || "",
        emailId: null,
        negotiationId: null,
        lane: {
          origin_city: originCity || null,
          origin_state: originState || null,
          dest_city: destCity || null,
          dest_state: destState || null,
        },
        equipmentType: equipmentType || null,
        rateState: {
          shipperRate: shipperRate || null,
          carrierOffer: null,
          aiCounterRate: null,
          floorRate: null,
          targetRate: null,
          ceilingRate: null,
          roundNumber: 0,
        },
        contextSnapshot: { source: "inbound_reply_send", to, subject },
        modelUsed: "manual",
        systemPromptHash: "email_send_v1",
        actionTaken: "email_send",
        aiResponseText: emailBody,
      }).catch((e) => console.error("[email/send] Event logging failed (non-fatal):", e));
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data: { success: true } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to send email";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/email/status/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    // Check email_connections table first
    const { data: connection } = await supabase
      .from("email_connections")
      .select("email_address, last_synced_at, is_active")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .single();

    if (connection) {
      return NextResponse.json({
        data: {
          connected: connection.is_active,
          email_address: connection.email_address,
          last_synced_at: connection.last_synced_at,
          is_active: connection.is_active,
        },
      });
    }

    // Fallback: check accounts table
    const { data: account } = await supabase
      .from("accounts")
      .select("access_token, expires_at")
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .eq("provider", "azure")
      .single();

    if (account) {
      const now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);
      const isActive = account.expires_at ? account.expires_at > now : false;

      return NextResponse.json({
        data: {
          connected: isActive,
          email_address: user.email || null,
          last_synced_at: null,
          is_active: isActive,
        },
      });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      data: {
        connected: false,
        email_address: null,
        last_synced_at: null,
        is_active: false,
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to check email status";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/[id]/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, markMessageAsRead } from "@/lib/graph-client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  _request: Request,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { id } = await params;

  const { data: email, error } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("*")
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (error || !email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  // Mark as read in DB + Outlook
  if (!email.is_read) {
    await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update({ is_read: true })
      .eq("id", id)
      .eq("user_id", user.id);

    // Also mark as read in Microsoft Outlook (non-fatal)
    if (email.graph_message_id) {
      getAccessToken(user.id)
        .then((token) => markMessageAsRead(token, email.graph_message_id))
        .catch((err) => console.error("[mark-read] Outlook sync failed:", err));
    }
  }

  return NextResponse.json(email);
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/[id]/attachment/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken } from "@/lib/graph-client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  request: Request,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { id } = await params;
  const { searchParams } = new URL(request.url);
  const attachmentName = searchParams.get("name");

  if (!attachmentName) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing name param" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const { data: email } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("graph_message_id")
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!email?.graph_message_id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  try {
    const accessToken = await getAccessToken(user.id);

    // Fetch attachments list — metadata only, no contentBytes (large PDFs exceed inline limits)
    const listRes = await fetch(
      `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages/${email.graph_message_id}/attachments?$select=id,name,contentType,size`,
      {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(20000),
      }
    );
    if (!listRes.ok) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to fetch attachments" }, { status: 502 });
    }

    const data = await listRes.json();
    const attachments = data.value || [];

    const att = attachments.find(
      (a: { name: string }) => a.name === attachmentName
    );
    if (!att) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Attachment not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    // Always fetch binary via /$value — more reliable for any attachment size
    const valRes = await fetch(
      `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages/${email.graph_message_id}/attachments/${att.id}/$value`,
      {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(60000),
      }
    );
    if (!valRes.ok) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Failed to fetch attachment bytes" }, { status: 502 });
    }
    const pdfBlob = new Blob([await valRes.arrayBuffer()], { type: att.contentType || "application/pdf" });

    return new Response(pdfBlob, {
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/pdf",
        "Content-Disposition": `inline; filename="${attachmentName}"`,
        "Cache-Control": "private, max-age=3600",
      },
    });
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load attachment";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/[id]/thread/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const { id } = await params;
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  // Get the email to find its conversation_id
  const { data: email, error: emailError } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("id, conversation_id")
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (emailError || !email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  // Fetch all emails in the same conversation
  let threadEmails = [email];
  if (email.conversation_id) {
    const { data: convEmails } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select(
        "id, subject, from_address, from_name, to_addresses, received_at, body_preview, body_html, is_read, category, conversation_id"
      )
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .eq("conversation_id", email.conversation_id)
      .order("received_at", { ascending: true });

    if (convEmails && convEmails.length > 0) {
      threadEmails = convEmails;
    }
  }

  // Fetch all replies we've sent for emails in this conversation
  const emailIds = threadEmails.map((e) => e.id);
  const { data: replies } = await supabase
    .from("email_replies")
    .select("id, email_id, reply_body, reply_to_address, source, sent_at")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .in("email_id", emailIds)
    .order("sent_at", { ascending: true });

  return NextResponse.json({
    emails: threadEmails,
    replies: replies ?? [],
  });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/add-to-ttms/route.ts
================================================
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { createOrder, getClient } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { getTtmsUserId } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";

function safeNum(v: unknown, fallback = 0): number {
  if (v === null || v === undefined || v === "NA" || v === "") return fallback;
  const n = Number(v);
  return isNaN(n) ? fallback : n;
}

function safeStr(v: unknown, fallback = ""): string {
  if (v === null || v === undefined || v === "NA") return fallback;
  return String(v).trim();
}

function safeDate(v: unknown): string | null {
  if (!v || v === "NA" || v === "") return null;
  const s = String(v).trim();
  const match = s.match(/^(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2})/);
  return match ? match[1] : null;
}

// Equipment code → type mapping (TL, LTL, PARTIAL)
const EQUIPMENT_TYPE_MAP: Record<string, string> = {
  "28FTPUP": "TL", "28FTREEFER": "TL", "40FTCONTAINER": "TL",
  "48FTFLATBED": "TL", "48FTREEFER": "TL", "48FTSIDELOAD": "TL", "48FTTRAILER": "TL",
  "53FTCONTAINER": "TL", "53FTFLATBED": "TL", "53FTREEFER": "TL", "53FTSIDELOAD": "TL", "53FTTRAILER": "TL",
  "CONSTOGA": "TL", "DOUBLEDROP": "TL", "DOUBLEPUP": "TL",
  "DRYVAN": "TL", "FLATBED": "TL", "FROZENTRUCKLOAD": "TL",
  "HOTSHOT": "TL", "INTERMODAL20": "TL", "INTERMODAL20DRAYAGE": "TL",
  "INTERMODAL40": "TL", "INTERMODAL53": "TL", "SPECIALIZED": "TL", "STEPDECK": "TL",
  "DRYVANPARTIAL": "PARTIAL", "FLATBEDPARTIAL": "PARTIAL",
  "FROZENPARTIAL": "PARTIAL", "REFRIGERATEDPARTIAL": "PARTIAL",
  "FROZENLTL": "LTL", "LTL": "LTL", "REFRIGERATEDLTL": "LTL",
};

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  // Block outbound in test mode
  const svcSupabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: agentSettings } = await svcSupabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .maybeSingle();

  if (agentSettings?.test_mode) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot create TTMS orders in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const { load } = await req.json();
  if (!load) return NextResponse.json({ error: "No load provided" }, { status: 400 });

  const weight = safeNum(load.total_weight, 1000);

  // Fetch client details from TTMS to populate client fields
  const clientId = safeNum(load.client_id);
  let clientData: { name?: string; phone?: string; email?: string; address?: string; city?: string; state?: string; zip?: string } = {};
  if (clientId > 0) {
    try {
      const clientResult = await getClient(clientId);
      if (clientResult.data) {
        clientData = {
          name: clientResult.data.name || "",
          phone: clientResult.data.telephone || "",
          email: clientResult.data.email || "",
          address: clientResult.data.address || "",
          city: clientResult.data.city || "",
          state: clientResult.data.state || "",
          zip: clientResult.data.zip || "",
        };
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[add-to-ttms] Failed to fetch client details:", err);
    }
  }

  // Build order_items — always at least one item (TTMS requires it)
  const rawItems = Array.isArray(load.order_items) && load.order_items.length > 0
    ? load.order_items.map((item: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
        description: safeStr(item.description, "General Freight"),
        class: safeStr(item.class, "50"),
        pallet: safeStr(item.pallet),
        unit: safeStr(item.unit),
        length: safeNum(item.length),
        width: safeNum(item.width),
        height: safeNum(item.height),
        weight: safeNum(item.weight, weight),
      }))
    : [{ description: "General Freight", class: "50", weight }];

  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    // Client
    client_id: clientId,
    client_name: clientData.name || safeStr(load.client_name),
    client_phone: clientData.phone || "",
    client_email: clientData.email || "",
    client_address: clientData.address || "",
    client_city: clientData.city || "",
    client_state: clientData.state || "",
    client_zip: clientData.zip || "",
    bill_type: safeStr(load.bill_type),

    // Ship From
    shipfrom_customer_id: safeNum(load.shipfrom_customer_id),
    shipfrom_name: safeStr(load.shipfrom_name),
    shipfrom_phone: safeStr(load.shipfrom_phone),
    shipfrom_email: safeStr(load.shipfrom_email),
    shipfrom_contact: safeStr(load.shipfrom_contact),
    shipfrom_address: safeStr(load.shipfrom_address),
    shipfrom_city: safeStr(load.shipfrom_city || load.origin_city),
    shipfrom_state: safeStr(load.shipfrom_state || load.origin_state),
    shipfrom_zip: safeStr(load.shipfrom_zip),
    shipfrom_apt_required: load.shipfrom_apt_required === true || load.shipfrom_apt_required === "true",
    shipfrom_notes: safeStr(load.shipfrom_notes),
    shipfrom_shipping_from_hours: safeStr(load.shipfrom_shipping_from_hours),
    shipfrom_shipping_to_hours: safeStr(load.shipfrom_shipping_to_hours),

    // Ship To
    shipto_customer_id: safeNum(load.shipto_customer_id),
    shipto_name: safeStr(load.shipto_name),
    shipto_phone: safeStr(load.shipto_phone),
    shipto_email: safeStr(load.shipto_email),
    shipto_contact: safeStr(load.shipto_contact),
    shipto_address: safeStr(load.shipto_address),
    shipto_city: safeStr(load.shipto_city || load.dest_city),
    shipto_state: safeStr(load.shipto_state || load.dest_state),
    shipto_zip: safeStr(load.shipto_zip),
    shipto_apt_required: load.shipto_apt_required === true || load.shipto_apt_required === "true",
    shipto_notes: safeStr(load.shipto_notes),
    shipto_receiving_from_hours: safeStr(load.shipto_receiving_from_hours),
    shipto_receiving_to_hours: safeStr(load.shipto_receiving_to_hours),

    // Order details
    order_type: "NORMAL",
    status: "PENDING",
    equipment_type: EQUIPMENT_TYPE_MAP[safeStr(load.equipment_type)] || "TL",
    equipment_id: safeNum(load.equipment_id),
    total_weight: weight,
    requirements: safeStr(load.requirements),
    notes: safeStr(load.notes),

    // Reference
    bol_number: safeStr(load.bol_number),
    reference_numbers: safeStr(load.reference_numbers),

    // Cost
    line_haul_charge: safeNum(load.line_haul_charge ?? load.shipper_rate),
    fuel_charge: safeNum(load.fuel_charge),
    accessorial_charge: safeNum(load.accessorial_charge),
    total_charge: safeNum(load.total_charge || (load.line_haul_charge ?? load.shipper_rate)),

    // Stops (extracted stops have no real customer IDs, so filtered to [])
    order_stops: Array.isArray(load.order_stops)
      ? load.order_stops
          .map((s: Record<string, unknown>) => ({
            stop_type: safeStr(s.type || s.stop_type, "DELIVERY"),
            customer_id: safeNum(s.customer_id),
            name: safeStr(s.location || s.name),
            address: safeStr(s.address),
            city: safeStr(s.city),
            state: safeStr(s.state),
            zip: safeStr(s.zip),
            notes: safeStr(s.notes),
          }))
          .filter((s: { customer_id: number }) => s.customer_id > 0)
      : [],

    order_items: rawItems,
    order_accessorials: Array.isArray(load.order_accessorials) ? load.order_accessorials : [],
  };

  // Times (optional strings)
  if (load.requested_pickup_time) body.requested_pickup_time = safeStr(load.requested_pickup_time);
  if (load.requested_delivery_time) body.requested_delivery_time = safeStr(load.requested_delivery_time);

  // Dates (only include when present)
  const pickup = safeDate(load.requested_pickup_date);
  const delivery = safeDate(load.requested_delivery_date);
  if (pickup) body.requested_pickup_date = pickup;
  if (delivery) body.requested_delivery_date = delivery;

  const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
  if (ttmsUserId) body.user_id = ttmsUserId;

  console.log("[add-to-ttms] payload →", JSON.stringify(body, null, 2));

  try {
    const result = await createOrder(body);
    console.log("[add-to-ttms] success →", result.data.id, result.data.load_number);

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "load_created",
      description: `Created TTMS order ${result.data.load_number}: ${body.shipfrom_city || "?"}, ${body.shipfrom_state || "?"} → ${body.shipto_city || "?"}, ${body.shipto_state || "?"}`,
      outcome: "created",
      metadata: { orderId: result.data.id, loadNumber: result.data.load_number, rate: body.total_charge },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, orderId: result.data.id, loadNumber: result.data.load_number });
  } catch (err) {
    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to create order";
    console.error("[add-to-ttms] TTMS error →", msg);
    return NextResponse.json({ success: false, error: msg }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/check-award/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

const OPENROUTER_API_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions";
const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are a freight logistics analyst. Determine whether an email represents a LOAD AWARD or a LOAD OFFER/PITCH.

**AWARDED (is_awarded = true):**
- The shipper is assigning this specific load TO the recipient's company
- Contains: "Carrier Notification", "Rate Confirmation", specific shipment numbers assigned to the carrier
- The carrier name (Red Dog Logistics, or the recipient) appears as the assigned carrier
- Has specific pickup dates, delivery appointments, PO numbers — everything needed to execute
- The tone is directive: "Please accept", "Your load", "Assigned to you"
- Load tender documents from a shipper's TMS system (automated notifications)

**PITCH / RFQ (is_awarded = false):**
- The shipper is requesting quotes/rates from potentially multiple brokers
- Contains: "Please send your rate", "What is your rate for", "RFQ", "Request for Quote"
- No specific carrier is named as the assignee
- Asking for availability or capacity
- The tone is inquiry: "Can you cover?", "What's your rate?", "Looking for carriers"
- Forwarded load boards, blast emails to multiple recipients

Respond with ONLY a JSON object (no markdown):
{
  "is_awarded": true/false,
  "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
  "reasoning": "one sentence explanation"
}`;

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
    error: authError,
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  try {
    const { emailId } = await request.json();

    const { data: email } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("subject, body_preview, from_address, from_name, manual_override")
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .single();

    if (!email) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    const emailText = `From: ${email.from_name || email.from_address}
Subject: ${email.subject || "(no subject)"}

${email.body_preview || ""}`;

    const _llmStart = Date.now();
    const response = await fetch(OPENROUTER_API_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}`,
        "HTTP-Referer": process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL || "https://localhost:3000",
        "X-Title": "TTMS Mailer",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: MODEL,
        temperature: 0.1,
        messages: [
          { role: "system", content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
          { role: "user", content: emailText },
        ],
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15000),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      return NextResponse.json({ result: null });
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    await trackLlmCall({ userId: user.id, model: MODEL, purpose: "check_award", data, startMs: _llmStart });
    const text: string = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || "";

    const jsonMatch = text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/);
    if (!jsonMatch) {
      return NextResponse.json({ result: null });
    }

    const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
    const isAwarded = parsed.is_awarded === true;
    const confidence = typeof parsed.confidence === "number" ? parsed.confidence : 0;
    const reasoning = parsed.reasoning || "";

    // If pitch detected with high confidence, retag email to TENDER
    // But NOT if the user manually set the category (respect manual override)
    if (!isAwarded && confidence >= 0.7 && !email.manual_override) {
      await supabase
        .from("emails")
        .update({
          category: "TENDER",
          ai_reasoning: `Pitch/RFQ detected (retagged from SHIPPER): ${reasoning}`,
          confidence,
        })
        .eq("id", emailId)
        .eq("user_id", user.id);
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      result: {
        is_awarded: isAwarded,
        confidence,
        reasoning,
      },
    });
  } catch {
    return NextResponse.json({ result: null });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/classify/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { classifyEmails } from "@/lib/claude";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  try {
    // Get unclassified emails
    const { data: unclassified } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("id, subject, from_address, from_name, body_preview")
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .eq("category", "UNCLASSIFIED")
      .order("received_at", { ascending: false })
      .limit(50);

    if (!unclassified || unclassified.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ classified: 0 });
    }

    // Get user preferences
    const { data: prefs } = await supabase
      .from("user_preferences")
      .select("important_keywords, ignore_domains")
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .single();

    const emailsForClassification = unclassified.map((e) => ({
      id: e.id,
      subject: e.subject,
      fromAddress: e.from_address,
      fromName: e.from_name,
      bodyPreview: e.body_preview,
    }));

    const results = await classifyEmails(emailsForClassification, {
      importantKeywords: prefs?.important_keywords || [],
      ignoreDomains: prefs?.ignore_domains || [],
    });

    // Update emails with classification
    for (const result of results) {
      await supabase
        .from("emails")
        .update({
          category: result.category,
          ai_reasoning: result.reasoning,
          confidence: result.confidence,
        })
        .eq("id", result.id)
        .eq("user_id", user.id);
    }

    if (results.length > 0) {
      logActivity({
        tenantId: user.id,
        actionType: "email_classified",
        description: `Classified ${results.length} email${results.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}`,
        outcome: "classified",
        metadata: { count: results.length },
      });
    }

    await flushLlmUsage(user.id);
    return NextResponse.json({ classified: results.length });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Classification failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/delete/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, createGraphClient } from "@/lib/graph-client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function DELETE(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
    error: authError,
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { emailId } = await request.json();

  if (!emailId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "emailId is required" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // Fetch the email to get the Graph message ID
  const { data: email, error: fetchError } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("graph_message_id")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (fetchError || !email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  // Delete from Microsoft Graph (move to Deleted Items)
  if (email.graph_message_id) {
    try {
      const accessToken = await getAccessToken(user.id);
      const client = createGraphClient(accessToken);
      await client.api(`/me/messages/${email.graph_message_id}`).delete();
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Failed to delete from Microsoft Graph:", err);
      // Continue to delete from local DB even if Graph deletion fails
    }
  }

  // Delete from local database
  const { error: deleteError } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .delete()
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id);

  if (deleteError) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: deleteError.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/draft-custom-reply/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

const OPENROUTER_API_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions";
const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const { emailId } = await req.json();

  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("name")
    .eq("id", user.id)
    .single();
  const senderName = profile?.name || user.email?.split("@")[0] || "Team";

  const { data: email } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("subject, from_name, from_address, body_preview, body_html, custom_tag")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!email) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  if (!email.custom_tag) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email has no custom tag" }, { status: 400 });

  const bodyText = (email.body_html
    ? email.body_html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ").replace(/\s{3,}/g, "\n").trim()
    : email.body_preview || ""
  ).slice(0, 3000);

  const systemPrompt = `You are drafting an email reply on behalf of a freight broker.

This email has been tagged by the user as: "${email.custom_tag}"

Use this tag as context to understand the nature of the sender and the relationship. For example:
- If tagged "customer" or "client", treat the sender as a customer/client and reply professionally and helpfully
- If tagged "partner", treat as a business partner
- If tagged "vendor", treat as a vendor/supplier
- For any other tag, infer the likely relationship from the tag name and email content, then reply appropriately

Your reply should:
- Be warm, professional, and concise — 3-5 sentences maximum
- Address the sender's question or concern based on the email content
- Use natural language, contractions are fine
- Avoid stiff phrases like "please be advised", "as per", "kindly note"
- Match the tone of the original email (formal or casual)

Sign off with "Best regards," on its own line, followed by the sender's name.

Respond ONLY with the reply text. No subject line, no metadata.`;

  const userMessage = `Draft a reply to this email. The sender is tagged as "${email.custom_tag}". Sign off with the name: ${senderName}

From: ${email.from_name ? `${email.from_name} <${email.from_address}>` : email.from_address}
Subject: ${email.subject || "(no subject)"}
Body: ${bodyText}`;

  try {
    const _llmStart = Date.now();
    const response = await fetch(OPENROUTER_API_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}`,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: MODEL,
        messages: [
          { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
          { role: "user", content: userMessage },
        ],
        max_tokens: 500,
        temperature: 0.4,
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(20000),
    });

    const text = await response.text();
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`AI error: ${response.status} ${text}`);

    const data = JSON.parse(text);
    await trackLlmCall({ userId: user.id, model: MODEL, purpose: "draft_custom_reply", data, startMs: _llmStart });
    const draft = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || "";
    if (!draft) throw new Error("No content returned");

    return NextResponse.json({ draft, customTag: email.custom_tag });
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate reply";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/draft-generic-reply/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { openrouterCall } from "@/lib/ai/openrouter-client";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const { emailId } = await req.json();
  if (!emailId) return NextResponse.json({ error: "emailId required" }, { status: 400 });

  // Fetch sender name
  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("name, display_name")
    .eq("id", user.id)
    .single();
  const senderName = profile?.display_name || profile?.name || "Red Dog Logistics";

  // Fetch email with all context
  const { data: email } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("subject, from_name, from_address, body_preview, body_html, category, detected_intent, has_attachments, custom_tag")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!email) return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });

  const bodyText = (email.body_html
    ? email.body_html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ").replace(/\s{3,}/g, "\n").trim()
    : email.body_preview || ""
  ).slice(0, 3000);

  const result = await openrouterCall({
    model: MODEL,
    purpose: "draft_generic_reply",
    maxTokens: 500,
    temperature: 0.4,
    timeoutMs: 15000,
    messages: [
      {
        role: "system",
        content: `You are drafting an email reply on behalf of ${senderName}, a freight broker at Red Dog Logistics.

Write a simple, professional reply to the email below. DO NOT:
- Look up or reference any load/order details beyond what is explicitly stated in the email
- Quote rates, prices, or dollar amounts
- Offer services or try to sell anything
- Make up information not in the email

DO:
- Respond naturally to what the email actually says
- Be concise — 2-4 sentences max
- Acknowledge the information or answer the question
- If the email is just an FYI/notification, a brief acknowledgment is fine ("Thank you for the update" etc.)
- Match the tone of the original (formal or casual)
- Use natural language, contractions are fine

Context about this email:
- Category: ${email.category || "unknown"}
- Detected intent: ${email.detected_intent || "unknown"}
${email.custom_tag ? `- Custom tag: ${email.custom_tag}` : ""}
${email.has_attachments ? "- Has attachments" : ""}

Sign off with "Best regards," followed by "${senderName}" on its own line.

Return ONLY the reply text. No subject line, no JSON, no metadata.`,
      },
      {
        role: "user",
        content: `Draft a reply to this email:

From: ${email.from_name ? `${email.from_name} <${email.from_address}>` : email.from_address}
Subject: ${email.subject || "(no subject)"}

${bodyText}`,
      },
    ],
  });

  const draft = result.content || "";
  if (!draft) return NextResponse.json({ error: "AI returned empty reply" }, { status: 500 });

  return NextResponse.json({ draft });
}

import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

const OPENROUTER_API_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions";
const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are drafting an email reply on behalf of a freight broker to a shipper who just sent a load tender or availability list.

Your reply should:
- Greet the shipper by first name if available
- Thank them for sending over their loads / availability
- Confirm you've received the information and are reviewing it
- Let them know you'll be in touch shortly with coverage options or follow-up questions
- Be warm, professional, and concise — 3-4 sentences maximum
- Use natural language, contractions are fine
- Avoid stiff phrases like "please be advised", "as per", "kindly note"

Sign off with "Best regards," on its own line, followed by the sender's name.

Respond ONLY with the reply text. No subject line, no metadata.`;

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const { emailId } = await req.json();

  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("name")
    .eq("id", user.id)
    .single();

  const senderName = profile?.name || user.email?.split("@")[0] || "Team";

  const { data: email } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("subject, from_name, from_address, body_preview, body_html")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  const bodyText = (email.body_html
    ? email.body_html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ").replace(/\s{3,}/g, "\n").trim()
    : email.body_preview || ""
  ).slice(0, 3000);

  const userMessage = `Draft a reply to this shipper's load tender email. Sign off with the name: ${senderName}

From: ${email.from_name ? `${email.from_name} <${email.from_address}>` : email.from_address}
Subject: ${email.subject || "(no subject)"}
Body: ${bodyText}`;

  try {
    const _llmStart = Date.now();
    const response = await fetch(OPENROUTER_API_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}`,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: MODEL,
        messages: [
          { role: "system", content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
          { role: "user", content: userMessage },
        ],
        max_tokens: 400,
        temperature: 0.5,
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(20000),
    });

    const text = await response.text();
    if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`AI error: ${response.status} ${text}`);

    const data = JSON.parse(text);
    await trackLlmCall({ userId: user.id, model: MODEL, purpose: "draft_shipper_reply", data, startMs: _llmStart });
    const draft = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || "";
    if (!draft) throw new Error("No content returned");

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "email_drafted",
      description: `AI drafted shipper reply for "${email.subject || "no subject"}"`,
      emailId,
      outcome: "drafted",
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ draft });
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate reply";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}
