FILE: src/app/api/emails/draft-status-reply/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";
import {
  resolveOrdersForStatus,
  formatOrderStatus,
  formatOrderDisplay,
} from "@/lib/agent/shipper-status-handler";
import { openrouterCall } from "@/lib/ai/openrouter-client";

const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

const EXTRACTION_PROMPT = `Extract shipment identifiers from this email. Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown.

Rules:
- load_numbers: numbers after words like "load", "shipment", "order" (e.g. "load 54321" → "54321")
- references: PO numbers, reference numbers, BOL numbers, tracking numbers, any alphanumeric codes the shipper is referencing to identify a shipment
- origin/destination: city and state if mentioned in context of where the load is going from/to
- If nothing is found for a field, use empty array or null

Return format:
{"load_numbers":[],"references":[],"origin_city":null,"dest_city":null,"origin_state":null,"dest_state":null}`;

const SYSTEM_PROMPT = `You are drafting an email reply on behalf of a freight broker to a shipper who is asking about the status of their load/shipment.

CRITICAL RULES — DO NOT HALLUCINATE:
- ONLY state facts that are explicitly present in the LOAD STATUS INFORMATION provided
- If a field is missing or says "null"/"Unknown", do NOT mention it or make up a value
- If Carrier is not listed, do NOT say a carrier has been assigned — say we are still working on securing a carrier
- If status is "PENDING", it means the load is NOT yet assigned to a carrier and NOT in transit
- If status is "DISPATCHED" or "IN_TRANSIT", a carrier is assigned and the load is moving
- If status is "DELIVERED", the load has been delivered
- NEVER invent carrier names, ETAs, or details that are not in the data

Your reply should:
- Greet the shipper by first name if available
- State the current status honestly based ONLY on the data provided
- NEVER use internal status words like "PENDING", "DISPATCHED", "IN_TRANSIT" in your reply
- If the load is not yet assigned to a carrier: say we're actively working on coverage and will update them once a carrier is confirmed
- If the load has a carrier and is in transit: mention the carrier and expected delivery date if available
- If delivered: confirm with the actual delivery date
- If no load was found: politely ask the shipper to share the reference number, PO number, or order number so you can look it up
- Be warm, professional, and concise — 3-5 sentences maximum
- Use natural language, contractions are fine

Sign off with "Best regards," on its own line, followed by the sender's name.

Respond ONLY with the reply text. No subject line, no metadata.`;

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const { emailId } = await req.json();

  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("name")
    .eq("id", user.id)
    .single();

  const senderName = profile?.name || user.email?.split("@")[0] || "Team";

  const { data: email } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("subject, from_name, from_address, body_preview, body_html, conversation_id")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  const bodyText = (email.body_html
    ? email.body_html.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ").replace(/\s{3,}/g, "\n").trim()
    : email.body_preview || ""
  ).slice(0, 3000);

  // Step 1: AI extraction of identifiers
  let clues = {
    loadNumbers: [] as string[],
    references: [] as string[],
    originCity: null as string | null,
    destCity: null as string | null,
    originState: null as string | null,
    destState: null as string | null,
  };

  try {
    const extractResult = await openrouterCall({
      model: MODEL,
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: EXTRACTION_PROMPT },
        { role: "user", content: `Subject: ${email.subject || ""}\nBody: ${bodyText.slice(0, 2000)}` },
      ],
      maxTokens: 300,
      temperature: 0,
      timeoutMs: 10000,
      purpose: "extract_status_clues",
    });

    const text = (extractResult.content || "").trim();
    const jsonStr = text.replace(/^```json?\s*/i, "").replace(/\s*```$/i, "");
    const parsed = JSON.parse(jsonStr);

    clues = {
      loadNumbers: (parsed.load_numbers || []).map(String),
      references: (parsed.references || []).map(String),
      originCity: parsed.origin_city || null,
      destCity: parsed.dest_city || null,
      originState: parsed.origin_state || null,
      destState: parsed.dest_state || null,
    };
  } catch {
    // Fallback to regex
    const clean = `${email.subject || ""} ${bodyText}`.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ");
    const loadPatterns = [
      /(?:load|shipment|order)\s+number\s*:?\s*#?\s*(\d{3,})/gi,
      /(?:load|shipment|order)\s*#\s*(\d{3,})/gi,
      /(?:load|shipment|order)\s+(\d{4,})/gi,
      /ORD-(\d+)/gi,
    ];
    for (const p of loadPatterns) {
      let m;
      while ((m = p.exec(clean)) !== null) clues.loadNumbers.push(m[1]);
    }
  }

  // Step 2: Resolve orders via cascade
  const resolved = await resolveOrdersForStatus(
    email.from_address,
    clues,
    email.conversation_id,
    user.id
  );

  // Step 3: Build context
  let loadContext: string;
  let displayInfo = "";
  const loadNumbers = resolved.map((r) => r.queriedIdentifier || String(r.order.id));

  if (resolved.length > 0) {
    loadContext = resolved.map((r) => formatOrderStatus(r.order, r.queriedIdentifier)).join("\n\n");
    displayInfo = resolved.map((r) => formatOrderDisplay(r.order, r.queriedIdentifier)).join("\n");
  } else {
    loadContext = "No matching load found in the system.";
  }

  // Step 4: Draft reply
  const userMessage = `Draft a status update reply to this shipper's inquiry. Sign off with the name: ${senderName}

From: ${email.from_name ? `${email.from_name} <${email.from_address}>` : email.from_address}
Subject: ${email.subject || "(no subject)"}
Body: ${bodyText}

LOAD STATUS INFORMATION:
${loadContext}`;

  try {
    const _llmStart = Date.now();
    const aiResult = await openrouterCall({
      model: MODEL,
      messages: [
        { role: "system", content: SYSTEM_PROMPT },
        { role: "user", content: userMessage },
      ],
      maxTokens: 500,
      temperature: 0.4,
      timeoutMs: 20000,
      purpose: "draft_status_reply",
    });

    await trackLlmCall({
      userId: user.id,
      model: MODEL,
      purpose: "draft_status_reply",
      data: { usage: aiResult.usage },
      startMs: _llmStart,
    });

    const draft = aiResult.content || "";
    if (!draft) throw new Error("No content returned");

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "email_drafted",
      description: `AI drafted shipper status reply for "${email.subject || "no subject"}"`,
      emailId,
      outcome: "drafted",
      metadata: {
        loadNumbers,
        matchMethods: resolved.map((r) => r.matchMethod),
        loadContext: loadContext.slice(0, 500),
      },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ draft, loadNumbers, loadContext: displayInfo || loadContext });
  } catch (err) {
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate reply";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/extract-load/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";
import { fetchPdfsFromLinks } from "@/lib/pdf-utils";

export const maxDuration = 300;

const OPENROUTER_API_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions";
const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";
const MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES = 20 * 1024 * 1024; // 20 MB per attachment

function stripHtml(html: string): string {
  return html
    .replace(/<style[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<script[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, "\n")
    .replace(/<\/?(p|div|tr|td|th|li)[^>]*>/gi, "\n")
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ")
    .replace(/&nbsp;/g, " ")
    .replace(/&amp;/g, "&")
    .replace(/&lt;/g, "<")
    .replace(/&gt;/g, ">")
    .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
    .replace(/\s{3,}/g, "\n\n")
    .trim();
}

interface GraphAttachment {
  "@odata.type": string;
  id: string;
  name: string;
  contentType: string;
  size: number;
  contentBytes?: string;
}

async function fetchPdfAttachments(
  accessToken: string,
  graphMessageId: string
): Promise<{ name: string; base64: string }[]> {
  try {
    // List attachments — metadata only, no contentBytes (avoids inline size limits)
    const res = await fetch(
      `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages/${graphMessageId}/attachments?$select=id,name,contentType,size`,
      {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(30000),
      }
    );
    if (!res.ok) return [];

    const data = await res.json();
    const attachments: GraphAttachment[] = data.value || [];
    const pdfs: { name: string; base64: string }[] = [];

    for (const att of attachments) {
      if (!att.name) continue;
      const isPdf =
        att.contentType?.toLowerCase().includes("pdf") ||
        att.name.toLowerCase().includes(".pdf");
      if (!isPdf) continue;
      if (att.size > MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES) continue;

      // Always fetch via /$value — more reliable than inline contentBytes
      const valRes = await fetch(
        `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages/${graphMessageId}/attachments/${att.id}/$value`,
        {
          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(60000),
        }
      );
      if (!valRes.ok) continue;
      const buf = await valRes.arrayBuffer();
      const base64 = Buffer.from(buf).toString("base64");
      if (base64) pdfs.push({ name: att.name, base64 });
    }

    return pdfs;
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

// Extract the next complete top-level JSON object from buffer.
// Returns [parsed object, remaining buffer] or null if no complete object yet.
function extractNextJsonObject(buffer: string): [Record<string, unknown>, string] | null {
  const start = buffer.indexOf("{");
  if (start === -1) return null;

  let depth = 0;
  let inString = false;
  let escape = false;

  for (let i = start; i < buffer.length; i++) {
    const ch = buffer[i];
    if (escape) { escape = false; continue; }
    if (ch === "\\") { escape = true; continue; }
    if (ch === '"') { inString = !inString; continue; }
    if (inString) continue;
    if (ch === "{") depth++;
    if (ch === "}") {
      depth--;
      if (depth === 0) {
        try {
          const obj = JSON.parse(buffer.slice(start, i + 1));
          return [obj as Record<string, unknown>, buffer.slice(i + 1)];
        } catch {
          return null;
        }
      }
    }
  }
  return null;
}

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const { emailId } = await req.json();

  const { data: email } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("subject, body_preview, body_html, from_name, from_address, received_at, has_attachments, graph_message_id")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (!email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  const bodyText = email.body_html
    ? stripHtml(email.body_html).slice(0, 12000)
    : (email.body_preview || "").slice(0, 12000);

  // Fetch PDFs from both Graph API attachments and links in email body (in parallel)
  const [graphPdfs, linkedPdfs] = await Promise.all([
    email.graph_message_id
      ? getAccessToken(user.id)
          .then((token) => fetchPdfAttachments(token, email.graph_message_id))
          .catch(() => [] as { name: string; base64: string }[])
      : Promise.resolve([] as { name: string; base64: string }[]),
    email.body_html
      ? fetchPdfsFromLinks(email.body_html)
      : Promise.resolve([] as { name: string; base64: string }[]),
  ]);
  const pdfAttachments = [...graphPdfs, ...linkedPdfs];

  const systemPrompt = `You are a freight logistics data extractor. Your job is to read an email (and any attached PDF load sheets) and extract load/shipment information.

IMPORTANT: The email or PDF may contain MULTIPLE lanes or loads — extract ALL of them as separate objects. Do not stop early. Extract every single lane listed.

CRITICAL: Only extract data that is ACTUALLY present in the email body or attached PDF. If there is no real load data to extract, return an empty array []. NEVER invent, fabricate, or guess load data. NEVER copy the example below as if it were real data.

For each load, extract:
- client_name: the shipper/client company name — look for it in the email subject, forwarded-from headers, signature blocks, PDF letterheads, or "From:" lines in forwarded chains. For example "Waupaca Northwoods LLC" from "Subject: Waupaca Northwoods Ready Orders". Use the actual company name, not the broker or forwarding person. If unknown, use "NA".
- origin_name: the name of the shipping facility/branch plant (e.g. "IKO Southwest Inc. - Hillsboro", "Waupaca Northwoods") — look for "Shipping Branch Plant", "Ship From", "Origin" labels. If unknown, use "NA".
- origin_city, origin_state: where the freight is picked up
- dest_name: the name of the receiving facility/customer (e.g. "QXO-QXO-Kansas City KS", "ABC Distribution Center") — look for "Ship To", "Destination", "Consignee" labels. If unknown, use "NA".
- dest_city, dest_state: where it delivers
- shipper_rate: the dollar amount for this lane (number, no $ sign)
- equipment_type: e.g. "Flatbed", "Van", "Reefer", "TL", "LTL" — look for "Vehicle Type" label in the PDF/email first, then infer from subject/body if not found
- requested_pickup_date: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or "NA"
- requested_delivery_date: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or "NA"
- total_weight: number in lbs or "NA"
- requirements: any special requirements mentioned (dock, appointment, etc.) or "NA"
- notes: any additional notes or "NA"
- bill_type: "Prepaid" or "Collect" or "Third Party" — look for "Terms:" label in the PDF/email. If unknown, use "NA".
- bol_number: the BOL or Shipment number (e.g. "SN3482768") — look for "Shipment #", "BOL #", "BOL Number" labels. If unknown, use "NA".
- references: array of { type, number } for all reference numbers found — extract ALL of these from the PDF/email:
  - "Shipment #" / "SN..." → type "IKO Reference"
  - "Order #" → type "Sales Order #"
  - "Customer PO #" / "PO #" → type "Customer PO #"
  - "PRO #" → type "PRO #"
  - "Sales Order #" → type "Sales Order #"
  - "Delivery #" → type "Delivery #"
  - Any other reference numbers → type "" (empty string)
  IMPORTANT: Only extract actual reference numbers with explicit labels (e.g. "Order # 12345"). Do NOT extract random words from sentences — e.g. "NO SMOKING ON IKO PROPERTY" does NOT contain a PRO # reference.
  If no references found, use empty array [].
- order_type: "NORMAL" by default
- status: "PENDING" by default
- order_items: array with { description, class, weight } — use freight description if available
- order_accessorials: empty array unless accessorials mentioned
- client_id: "NA" (unknown from email)
- shipfrom_customer_id: "NA"
- shipto_customer_id: "NA"
- shipfrom_apt_required: false
- shipto_apt_required: false

For "Flat Only" style emails listing destinations with rates:
- The ORIGIN is the facility address in the email signature / subject
- Each line like "CityName, ST  250.00" is a SEPARATE load (destination + rate)
- "split" means a single truck covers both stops (still one load, two delivery stops)
- Date "PICK UP TODAY" = the email received date
- Equipment "Flat Only" = Flatbed

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. No explanation, no markdown, no code fences. Just the raw JSON array.
If no real load data is present, respond with exactly: []

Example format (these are FICTIONAL placeholder cities — do not use them as real data):
[
  {
    "client_name": "Example Company LLC",
    "client_id": "NA",
    "shipfrom_customer_id": "NA",
    "shipto_customer_id": "NA",
    "shipfrom_apt_required": false,
    "shipto_apt_required": false,
    "order_type": "NORMAL",
    "equipment_type": "Flatbed",
    "total_weight": "NA",
    "requirements": "NA",
    "notes": "NA",
    "bill_type": "Prepaid",
    "bol_number": "SN1234567",
    "references": [
      { "type": "IKO Reference", "number": "SN1234567" },
      { "type": "Sales Order #", "number": "12345678" },
      { "type": "Customer PO #", "number": "9876543" }
    ],
    "requested_pickup_date": "2025-01-01",
    "requested_delivery_date": "NA",
    "status": "PENDING",
    "origin_name": "Example Shipper Facility",
    "origin_city": "OriginCity",
    "origin_state": "OS",
    "dest_name": "Example Receiver Facility",
    "dest_city": "DestCity",
    "dest_state": "DS",
    "shipper_rate": 500.00,
    "order_stops": [
      { "type": "pickup", "location": "OriginCity, OS", "address": "NA" },
      { "type": "delivery", "location": "DestCity, DS", "address": "NA" }
    ],
    "order_items": [{ "description": "General freight", "class": "50", "weight": "NA" }],
    "order_accessorials": []
  }
]`;

  const emailText = `Extract ALL loads from this email${pdfAttachments.length > 0 ? ` and the attached PDF${pdfAttachments.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}` : ""}. Return a complete JSON array with every lane — do not truncate or stop early.

From: ${email.from_name || email.from_address} <${email.from_address}>
Subject: ${email.subject || "(no subject)"}
Date: ${email.received_at}

Email body:
${bodyText}`;

  type ContentPart =
    | { type: "text"; text: string }
    | { type: "image_url"; image_url: { url: string } };

  const userContent: ContentPart[] = [{ type: "text", text: emailText }];
  for (const pdf of pdfAttachments) {
    userContent.push({
      type: "image_url",
      image_url: { url: `data:application/pdf;base64,${pdf.base64}` },
    });
  }

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const sse = (payload: unknown) =>
    encoder.encode(`data: ${JSON.stringify(payload)}\n\n`);

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      // Send attachment metadata immediately — before AI starts
      controller.enqueue(
        sse({ type: "meta", attachments: pdfAttachments.map((a) => a.name) })
      );

      try {
        const _llmStart = Date.now();
        const response = await fetch(OPENROUTER_API_URL, {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}`,
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            model: MODEL,
            messages: [
              { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
              { role: "user", content: userContent },
            ],
            max_tokens: 16000,
            temperature: 0.1,
            stream: true,
          }),
        });

        if (!response.ok || !response.body) {
          const errText = await response.text().catch(() => "");
          controller.enqueue(sse({ type: "error", message: `AI error: ${response.status} ${errText}` }));
          controller.close();
          return;
        }

        const reader = response.body.getReader();
        const decoder = new TextDecoder();
        let sseBuffer = "";
        let jsonBuffer = "";
        let streamUsage: { prompt_tokens?: number; completion_tokens?: number; total_cost?: number } = {};

        while (true) {
          const { done, value } = await reader.read();
          if (done) break;

          sseBuffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
          const lines = sseBuffer.split("\n");
          sseBuffer = lines.pop() || "";

          for (const line of lines) {
            if (!line.startsWith("data: ")) continue;
            const chunk = line.slice(6).trim();
            if (chunk === "[DONE]") continue;

            try {
              const parsed = JSON.parse(chunk);
              // Capture usage from the final chunk (OpenRouter sends it here)
              if (parsed.usage) {
                streamUsage = parsed.usage;
              }
              const token: string = parsed.choices?.[0]?.delta?.content || "";
              jsonBuffer += token;

              let result;
              while ((result = extractNextJsonObject(jsonBuffer)) !== null) {
                const [obj, remaining] = result;
                jsonBuffer = remaining;
                controller.enqueue(sse({ type: "load", ...obj }));
              }
            } catch {
              // Ignore malformed SSE chunks from OpenRouter
            }
          }
        }

        // Final pass — catch any trailing complete object
        let result;
        while ((result = extractNextJsonObject(jsonBuffer)) !== null) {
          const [obj, remaining] = result;
          jsonBuffer = remaining;
          controller.enqueue(sse({ type: "load", ...obj }));
        }

        await trackLlmCall({ userId: user.id, model: MODEL, purpose: "extract_load_sse", data: { usage: streamUsage, model: MODEL }, startMs: _llmStart });
        controller.enqueue(sse({ type: "done" }));
        controller.close();
      } catch (err) {
        const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Extraction failed";
        controller.enqueue(sse({ type: "error", message }));
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "text/event-stream",
      "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
      "Connection": "keep-alive",
    },
  });
}

FILE: src/app/api/emails/generate-rate-quote/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

const OPENROUTER_API_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions";
const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

interface ExtractedLoad {
  origin_city?: string;
  origin_state?: string;
  dest_city?: string;
  dest_state?: string;
  shipper_rate?: number | string;
  equipment_type?: string;
  requested_pickup_date?: string;
  requested_delivery_date?: string;
  total_weight?: string | number;
  requirements?: string;
  client_name?: string;
}

interface RateQuoteLine {
  index: number;
  origin: string;
  destination: string;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  our_rate: number | null;
  equipment_type: string;
  pickup_date: string;
  delivery_date: string;
  weight: string;
  reasoning: string;
}

export const maxDuration = 60;

/**
 * POST /api/emails/generate-rate-quote
 * Takes extracted loads and generates "our rate" for each + a draft email.
 */
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
    error: authError,
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  try {
    const { loads, shipperName, emailSubject } = (await request.json()) as {
      loads: ExtractedLoad[];
      shipperName: string;
      emailSubject: string;
    };

    if (!loads || loads.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "No loads provided" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // Get user profile for sign-off
    const { data: profile } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("name")
      .eq("id", user.id)
      .single();
    const agentName = profile?.name || "Team";

    // Get lane boundaries for context
    const { data: boundaries } = await supabase
      .from("lane_boundaries")
      .select("origin_state, dest_state, equipment_type, floor_rate, target_rate, ceiling_rate")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id);

    const boundaryContext = boundaries && boundaries.length > 0
      ? boundaries.map((b) =>
          `${b.origin_state}→${b.dest_state} (${b.equipment_type || "any"}): floor=$${b.floor_rate}, target=$${b.target_rate}, ceiling=$${b.ceiling_rate}`
        ).join("\n")
      : "No lane boundaries configured.";

    // Build load summary for AI
    const loadsSummary = loads.map((l, i) => ({
      index: i + 1,
      origin: [l.origin_city, l.origin_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "Unknown",
      destination: [l.dest_city, l.dest_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "Unknown",
      shipper_rate: l.shipper_rate && l.shipper_rate !== "NA" ? Number(l.shipper_rate) : null,
      equipment_type: l.equipment_type || "TL",
      pickup_date: l.requested_pickup_date || "NA",
      weight: l.total_weight ? String(l.total_weight) : "NA",
    }));

    const prompt = `You are a freight broker generating competitive rate quotes for a shipper's available loads.

## Your Lane Boundaries (if any)
${boundaryContext}

## Shipper's Loads
${JSON.stringify(loadsSummary, null, 2)}

## Instructions
For each load, generate "our_rate" — the rate we will offer the shipper. Follow these rules:

1. If the shipper provided a rate: Our rate should be the SAME as the shipper's rate or very close (within 2-5% above). We want to win the load. Do NOT undercut significantly — match or slightly beat their rate.
2. If NO shipper rate is provided: Estimate a fair market rate based on the lane (origin→destination), distance, and equipment type.
3. If lane boundaries exist for this origin_state→dest_state: Use the target_rate as a guide, but prioritize matching the shipper's offered rate.
4. Round all rates to the nearest $5 or $10.
5. For each load, provide a brief reasoning (1 sentence) for the rate.

Return a JSON array (no markdown). Each element:
{
  "index": <load number>,
  "our_rate": <number>,
  "reasoning": "<brief explanation>"
}`;

    const _llmStart = Date.now();
    const response = await fetch(OPENROUTER_API_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        Authorization: `Bearer ${process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY}`,
        "HTTP-Referer": process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL || "https://localhost:3000",
        "X-Title": "TTMS Mailer",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: MODEL,
        temperature: 0.2,
        messages: [
          { role: "system", content: "You are a freight rate analyst. Return valid JSON only." },
          { role: "user", content: prompt },
        ],
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(30000),
    });

    if (!response.ok) {
      const errText = await response.text();
      throw new Error(`AI error: ${response.status} ${errText}`);
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    await trackLlmCall({ userId: user.id, model: MODEL, purpose: "generate_rate_quote", data, startMs: _llmStart });
    const text: string = data.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || "";

    // Parse AI rates
    const jsonMatch = text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
    let aiRates: { index: number; our_rate: number; reasoning: string }[] = [];
    if (jsonMatch) {
      aiRates = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);
    }

    // Build rate quote lines
    const rateQuoteLines: RateQuoteLine[] = loadsSummary.map((load) => {
      const aiRate = aiRates.find((r) => r.index === load.index);
      return {
        index: load.index,
        origin: load.origin,
        destination: load.destination,
        shipper_rate: load.shipper_rate,
        our_rate: aiRate?.our_rate ?? load.shipper_rate,
        equipment_type: load.equipment_type,
        pickup_date: load.pickup_date,
        delivery_date: "NA",
        weight: load.weight,
        reasoning: aiRate?.reasoning || "",
      };
    });

    // Draft email
    const clientName = shipperName || loads[0]?.client_name || "Team";
    const draftEmail = `Hello ${clientName},

Thank you for sharing the available loads. Please find our rate offers for each load listed below.

${rateQuoteLines.map((l) => `• ${l.origin} → ${l.destination}: $${l.our_rate?.toLocaleString()} (${l.equipment_type})`).join("\n")}

We have also attached a CSV with the full rate details for your reference. We look forward to working with you on these lanes.

Please let us know if you have any questions or would like to proceed with any of these loads.

Best regards,
${agentName}`;

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "quote_received",
      description: `Generated rate quotes for ${rateQuoteLines.length} lane${rateQuoteLines.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} from ${clientName}`,
      outcome: "generated",
      metadata: { laneCount: rateQuoteLines.length, shipperName: clientName },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({
      rateQuoteLines,
      draftEmail,
      agentName,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Rate quote generation failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/retag/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";

export const maxDuration = 15;

const SYSTEM_CATEGORIES = ["IMP", "UNIMP", "IGNORE", "SHIPPER", "TENDER", "SHIPPER_STATUS"];

export async function PATCH(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { emailId, category, customTag } = await request.json();

  if (!emailId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "emailId is required" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // Custom tag flow: set custom_tag field, leave category unchanged
  if (customTag && typeof customTag === "string") {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update({
        custom_tag: customTag.trim(),
        manual_override: true,
      })
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id);

    if (error) return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "email_classified",
      description: `Custom tagged email as "${customTag.trim()}"`,
      emailId,
      outcome: `custom:${customTag.trim()}`,
      metadata: { manual: true, customTag: customTag.trim() },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, customTag: customTag.trim() });
  }

  // System category flow
  if (!category || !SYSTEM_CATEGORIES.includes(category)) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid request" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // When applying a system category, clear any custom tag
  const { error } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .update({
      category,
      custom_tag: null,
      manual_override: true,
    })
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id);

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  logActivity({
    tenantId: user.id,
    actionType: "email_classified",
    description: `Manually retagged email as ${category}`,
    emailId,
    outcome: category,
    metadata: { manual: true },
  });

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/send-quote-reply/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, sendReplyWithAttachment } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";

export const maxDuration = 30;

/**
 * POST /api/emails/send-quote-reply
 * Sends a reply email with a CSV attachment containing rate quotes.
 * Also creates a quoted_loads record and marks the email as "bidding".
 */
export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
    error: authError,
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  // Block outbound in test mode
  const svcSupabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: agentSettings } = await svcSupabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .maybeSingle();

  if (agentSettings?.test_mode) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot send emails in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const { emailId, replyBody, csvContent, csvFilename, lanes, shipperName, emailSubject } = await request.json();

    if (!replyBody?.trim()) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Reply body is required" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // Get email details
    const { data: email, error } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("graph_message_id, conversation_id, from_address, subject")
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .single();

    if (error || !email?.graph_message_id) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
    }

    // Convert plain text to HTML
    const replyHtml = replyBody
      .split(/\n\n+/)
      .map((para: string) =>
        `<p style="margin:0 0 12px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#333;">${para.replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</p>`
      )
      .join("");

    const accessToken = await getAccessToken(user.id);

    // Encode CSV to base64
    const csvBase64 = Buffer.from(csvContent, "utf-8").toString("base64");

    await sendReplyWithAttachment(
      accessToken,
      email.graph_message_id,
      replyHtml,
      {
        name: csvFilename || "rate_quotes.csv",
        contentType: "text/csv",
        contentBase64: csvBase64,
      }
    );

    // Track the reply
    const { data: replyRecord } = await supabase.from("email_replies").insert({
      user_id: user.id,
      email_id: emailId,
      conversation_id: email.conversation_id,
      reply_body: replyBody,
      reply_to_address: email.from_address,
      source: "shipper_quote",
      sent_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    }).select("id").single();

    // Mark email as "bidding" — we've sent a quote and are waiting for award
    await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update({ awarded_status: "bidding" })
      .eq("id", emailId)
      .eq("user_id", user.id);

    // Create quoted_loads record to track the bidding state
    if (email.conversation_id) {
      await supabase.from("quoted_loads").insert({
        user_id: user.id,
        email_id: emailId,
        reply_id: replyRecord?.id || null,
        conversation_id: email.conversation_id,
        shipper_address: email.from_address,
        shipper_name: shipperName || null,
        email_subject: emailSubject || email.subject || null,
        lanes: lanes || [],
        awarded_status: "bidding",
      });
    }

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "email_sent",
      description: `Sent rate quote reply to ${email.from_address} with CSV attachment`,
      emailId,
      outcome: "sent",
      metadata: { source: "shipper_quote", to: email.from_address, csvFilename, bidding: true },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Send quote reply error:", err);
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/send-reply/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, sendReply } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { backfillOutcome } from "@/lib/learning/event-logger";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function POST(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
    error: authError,
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const body = await request.json();
  const { emailId, replyBody, source = "manual", negotiationMeta } = body;
  // negotiationMeta is optional: { action, negotiationId, finalRate, shipperRate, targetRate, roundCount }

  if (!replyBody?.trim()) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Reply body is required" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // Get the email details
  const { data: email, error } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("graph_message_id, conversation_id, from_address")
    .eq("id", emailId)
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (error || !email) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Email not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  if (!email.graph_message_id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot reply — email has no Graph message ID" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  // Block outbound in test mode
  const svcSupabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: agentSettings } = await svcSupabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .maybeSingle();

  if (agentSettings?.test_mode) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot send emails in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    // Convert plain text to proper HTML paragraphs
    const replyHtml = replyBody
      .split(/\n\n+/)
      .map((para: string) =>
        `<p style="margin:0 0 12px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#333;">${para.replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</p>`
      )
      .join("");

    const accessToken = await getAccessToken(user.id);
    await sendReply(accessToken, email.graph_message_id, replyHtml);

    // Track the reply in our database
    await supabase.from("email_replies").insert({
      user_id: user.id,
      email_id: emailId,
      conversation_id: email.conversation_id,
      reply_body: replyBody,
      reply_to_address: email.from_address,
      source,
      sent_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    });

    // --- LEARNING LOOP: Backfill outcome on accept or reject ---
    if (negotiationMeta?.action === "accept" && negotiationMeta?.negotiationId) {
      backfillOutcome({
        tenantId: user.id,
        negotiationId: negotiationMeta.negotiationId,
        outcome: "accepted",
        finalRate: negotiationMeta.finalRate || null,
        shipperRate: negotiationMeta.shipperRate || null,
        targetRate: negotiationMeta.targetRate || null,
        closedAt: new Date(),
        acceptedOnRound: negotiationMeta.roundCount || null,
      }).catch((e) => console.error("[send-reply] Outcome backfill failed (non-fatal):", e));
    }

    if (negotiationMeta?.action === "reject" && negotiationMeta?.negotiationId) {
      backfillOutcome({
        tenantId: user.id,
        negotiationId: negotiationMeta.negotiationId,
        outcome: "rejected",
        finalRate: null,
        shipperRate: negotiationMeta.shipperRate || null,
        targetRate: negotiationMeta.targetRate || null,
        closedAt: new Date(),
        acceptedOnRound: null,
      }).catch((e) => console.error("[send-reply] Reject backfill failed (non-fatal):", e));
    }

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "email_sent",
      description: `Replied to ${email.from_address} (${source})`,
      emailId,
      outcome: "sent",
      metadata: { source, to: email.from_address },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("Send reply error:", err);
    const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/emails/sent/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

/**
 * GET /api/emails/sent
 * Returns sent emails from the emails table (category='SENT')
 * synced from Microsoft Graph Sent Items folder.
 */
export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { data: emails, error } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("id, graph_message_id, subject, from_address, from_name, to_addresses, received_at, body_preview, is_read, has_attachments, conversation_id")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .eq("category", "SENT")
    .order("received_at", { ascending: false })
    .limit(200);

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ items: emails || [], count: emails?.length || 0 });
}

FILE: src/app/api/escalations/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;
    const status = searchParams.get("status") || "open";
    const page = Math.max(1, Math.min(parseInt(searchParams.get("page") || "1", 10) || 1, 1000));
    const perPage = Math.max(1, Math.min(parseInt(searchParams.get("per_page") || "20", 10) || 20, 100));
    const offset = (page - 1) * perPage;

    let query = supabase
      .from("escalations")
      .select("*", { count: "exact" })
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
      .range(offset, offset + perPage - 1);

    if (status !== "all") {
      query = query.eq("status", status);
    }

    const { data, error, count } = await query;

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    // Also get open count for the badge
    const { count: openCount } = await supabase
      .from("escalations")
      .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .eq("status", "open");

    return NextResponse.json({
      data,
      total: count,
      openCount: openCount ?? 0,
      page,
      per_page: perPage,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch escalations";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();
    const {
      ttms_order_id,
      trigger_type,
      summary,
      options,
      ai_recommendation,
      load_context,
    } = body;

    if (!trigger_type || !summary || !options) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "trigger_type, summary, and options are required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from("escalations")
      .insert({
        tenant_id: user.id,
        ttms_order_id: ttms_order_id ?? null,
        trigger_type,
        summary,
        options,
        ai_recommendation: ai_recommendation ?? null,
        load_context: load_context ?? null,
        status: "open",
      })
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) {
      // Unique constraint violation = duplicate open escalation
      if (error.code === "23505") {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: "An open escalation already exists for this order and trigger" },
          { status: 409 }
        );
      }
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data }, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create escalation";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/escalations/[id]/resolve/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { logActivity } from "@/lib/activity-log";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function PATCH(
  request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const body = await request.json();
    const { chosen_option_key } = body;

    if (!chosen_option_key) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "chosen_option_key is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from("escalations")
      .update({
        resolved_option: chosen_option_key,
        resolved_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        status: "resolved",
        resolution_source: "dashboard",
      })
      .eq("id", id)
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    logActivity({
      tenantId: user.id,
      actionType: "escalation_resolved",
      description: `Resolved escalation: ${data.summary?.slice(0, 80) || id} → ${chosen_option_key}`,
      loadId: data.load_id || null,
      outcome: chosen_option_key,
      metadata: { escalationId: id },
    });

    return NextResponse.json({ data });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to resolve escalation";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

FILE: src/app/api/lane-boundaries/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

// GET — list all lane boundaries for the current user
export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from("lane_boundaries")
    .select("id, lane_description, origin_state, dest_state, equipment_type, floor_rate, target_rate, ceiling_rate, set_by, created_at, updated_at")
    .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ boundaries: data });
}

// POST — create a new lane boundary
export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const body = await req.json();
  const {
    lane_description,
    origin_state,
    dest_state,
    equipment_type,
    floor_rate,
    target_rate,
    ceiling_rate,
    set_by,
  } = body;

  if (!lane_description || !origin_state || !dest_state || floor_rate == null || target_rate == null || ceiling_rate == null) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Missing required fields" },
      { status: 400 }
    );
  }

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from("lane_boundaries")
    .insert({
      tenant_id: user.id,
      lane_description,
      origin_state,
      dest_state,
      equipment_type: equipment_type || "Dry Van",
      floor_rate: Number(floor_rate),
      target_rate: Number(target_rate),
      ceiling_rate: Number(ceiling_rate),
      set_by: set_by === "ai" ? "ai" : "agent",
    })
    .select()
    .single();

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ boundary: data }, { status: 201 });
}

// DELETE — delete a lane boundary by id (passed as ?id=xxx)
export async function DELETE(req: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const id = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get("id");
  if (!id) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing id" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const { error } = await supabase
    .from("lane_boundaries")
    .delete()
    .eq("id", id)
    .eq("tenant_id", user.id);

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}

FILE: src/app/api/lane-boundaries/ai/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { trackLlmCall } from "@/lib/ai/track-llm-call";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

const OPENROUTER_API_URL = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions";
const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  const body = await req.json();
  const { origin_state, dest_state, equipment_type } = body;

  if (!origin_state || !dest_state) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "Origin and destination states are required" },
      { status: 400 }
    );
  }

  const apiKey = process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY;
  if (!apiKey) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: "AI service not configured" },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }

  try {
    const prompt = `You are a freight brokerage rate analyst. Given a lane and equipment type, suggest realistic rate boundaries based on current US trucking market conditions.

Lane: ${origin_state} → ${dest_state}
Equipment: ${equipment_type || "Dry Van"}

Respond with ONLY a JSON object (no markdown, no code fences):
{
  "floor_rate": <number - minimum acceptable rate in USD, the absolute lowest you'd pay>,
  "target_rate": <number - ideal target rate in USD, what you'd aim to book at>,
  "ceiling_rate": <number - maximum rate in USD, the most you'd ever pay>,
  "reasoning": "<brief 1-2 sentence explanation of the rate range>"
}

Consider: distance, typical market rates for the equipment type, supply/demand dynamics for this corridor. Rates should be total linehaul rates (not per mile).`;

    const _llmStart = Date.now();
    const res = await fetch(OPENROUTER_API_URL, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        model: MODEL,
        messages: [{ role: "user", content: prompt }],
        temperature: 0.3,
        max_tokens: 300,
      }),
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const errText = await res.text();
      console.error("[lane-boundaries/ai] OpenRouter error:", errText);
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "AI request failed" },
        { status: 502 }
      );
    }

    const json = await res.json();
    await trackLlmCall({ userId: user.id, model: MODEL, purpose: "ai_lane_boundaries", data: json, startMs: _llmStart });
    const content = json.choices?.[0]?.message?.content || "";

    // Extract JSON from response (handle possible code fences)
    let parsed;
    try {
      const fenced = content.match(/```(?:json)?\s*([\s\S]*?)```/);
      const raw = fenced ? fenced[1].trim() : content.trim();
      parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    } catch {
      console.error("[lane-boundaries/ai] Failed to parse AI response:", content);
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Failed to parse AI response" },
        { status: 502 }
      );
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      floor_rate: Number(parsed.floor_rate),
      target_rate: Number(parsed.target_rate),
      ceiling_rate: Number(parsed.ceiling_rate),
      reasoning: parsed.reasoning || "",
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "AI suggestion failed";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

FILE: src/app/api/loads/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import {
  getOrders,
  createOrder,
  mapOrderToLoad,
} from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { getTtmsUserId, getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;
    const status = searchParams.get("status");
    const loadNumber = searchParams.get("load_number");
    const page = parseInt(searchParams.get("page") || "1", 10);
    const perPage = parseInt(searchParams.get("per_page") || "25", 10);

    // Map our status names to TTMS status names
    const statusMap: Record<string, string> = {
      pending: "PENDING",
      booked: "CONFIRMED",
      in_transit: "IN TRANSIT",
      delivered: "DELIVERED",
      cancelled: "CANCELLED",
    };

    // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
    // OLD: passed user_id: ttmsUserId — doesn't work reliably
    // NEW: get pod_id from TTMS user, pass pod_id for pod-centric filtering
    const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(user.id);

    const result = await getOrders({
      status: status ? statusMap[status] || status : undefined,
      load_number: loadNumber || undefined,
      per_page: perPage,
      page: page,
      pod_id: podInfo?.podId,
    });

    const data = result.data.map(mapOrderToLoad);

    return NextResponse.json({
      data,
      total: result.meta.total,
      page: result.meta.current_page,
      per_page: result.meta.per_page,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch loads";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  // Block outbound in test mode
  const svcSupabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: agentSettings } = await svcSupabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .maybeSingle();

  if (agentSettings?.test_mode) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot create loads in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();

    const orderBody: Record<string, unknown> = {
      order_type: "NORMAL",
      equipment_type: body.equipment_type || "TL",
      total_weight: body.weight_lbs || 0,
      notes: body.notes || "",
      requested_pickup_date: body.pickup_date || "",
      requested_delivery_date: body.delivery_date || "",
      status: "PENDING",
      order_items: body.commodity
        ? [{ description: body.commodity, class: "50", weight: body.weight_lbs || 0 }]
        : [],
    };

    if (body.client_id) orderBody.client_id = body.client_id;
    if (body.shipfrom_customer_id) orderBody.shipfrom_customer_id = body.shipfrom_customer_id;
    if (body.shipto_customer_id) orderBody.shipto_customer_id = body.shipto_customer_id;

    const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
    if (ttmsUserId) orderBody.user_id = ttmsUserId;

    const result = await createOrder(orderBody);
    const data = mapOrderToLoad(result.data);

    return NextResponse.json({ data }, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create load";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

FILE: src/app/api/loads/[id]/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import {
  getOrder,
  updateOrder,
  deleteOrder,
  mapOrderToLoad,
} from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const orderId = parseInt(id, 10);

    if (isNaN(orderId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid order ID" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    const result = await getOrder(orderId);
    const data = mapOrderToLoad(result.data);

    return NextResponse.json({ data });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch load";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function PATCH(
  request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  // Block outbound in test mode
  const svcSupabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: agentSettings } = await svcSupabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .maybeSingle();

  if (agentSettings?.test_mode) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot update loads in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const orderId = parseInt(id, 10);
    const body = await request.json();

    if (isNaN(orderId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid order ID" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    // Map our field names to TTMS field names
    const ttmsBody: Record<string, unknown> = {};
    if (body.status) {
      const statusMap: Record<string, string> = {
        pending: "PENDING",
        booked: "CONFIRMED",
        in_transit: "IN TRANSIT",
        delivered: "DELIVERED",
        cancelled: "CANCELLED",
      };
      ttmsBody.status = statusMap[body.status] || body.status;
    }
    if (body.notes !== undefined) ttmsBody.notes = body.notes;
    if (body.equipment_type) ttmsBody.equipment_type = body.equipment_type;
    if (body.carrier_id) ttmsBody.carrier_id = body.carrier_id;

    const result = await updateOrder(orderId, ttmsBody);
    const data = mapOrderToLoad(result.data);

    return NextResponse.json({ data });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to update load";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function DELETE(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  // Block outbound in test mode
  const svcDel = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: delSettings } = await svcDel
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .maybeSingle();

  if (delSettings?.test_mode) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Cannot delete loads in test mode. Disable test mode first." }, { status: 400 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const orderId = parseInt(id, 10);

    if (isNaN(orderId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid order ID" }, { status: 400 });
    }

    await deleteOrder(orderId);
    return NextResponse.json({ data: { deleted: true } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to delete load";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrder } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { id } = await params;
    const orderId = parseInt(id, 10);

    if (isNaN(orderId)) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "Invalid order ID" }, { status: 400 });

    return NextResponse.json({
      past_carriers: result.past_carriers || [],
    });

      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch carriers";

================================================
FILE: src/app/api/offer-email/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { generateOfferEmail, fetchBlastIntelligence } from "@/lib/carrier-scoring";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

export const maxDuration = 30;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Unauthorized" }), {
      status: 401,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  initLlmTracking(user.id);

  try {
    const body = await request.json();

    const {
      carrierName,
      carrierEmail,
      carrierLoadsCount,
      carrierLastRate,
      carrierLastDATRate,
      carrierLastShipmentDate,
      loadNumber,
      originCity,
      originState,
      destCity,
      destState,
      equipmentType,
      equipmentId,
      pickupDate,
      deliveryDate,
      weightLbs,
      commodity,
      miles,
      shipperRate,
      senderName,
    } = body;

    if (!carrierEmail || !loadNumber || !shipperRate || !senderName) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: "carrierEmail, loadNumber, shipperRate, and senderName are required" }),
        { status: 400, headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" } }
      );
    }

    // Fetch blast intelligence for learning loop
    let blastIntelligence;
    try {
      blastIntelligence = await fetchBlastIntelligence(
        supabase, user.id, carrierEmail,
        originState || "", destState || ""
      );
    } catch { /* non-fatal */ }

    // Stream progress steps via SSE-like newline-delimited JSON
    const encoder = new TextEncoder();
    const stream = new TransformStream();
    const writer = stream.writable.getWriter();

    const sendEvent = async (data: Record<string, unknown>) => {
      await writer.write(encoder.encode(JSON.stringify(data) + "\n"));
    };

    // Run generation in background and stream progress
    (async () => {
      try {
        const result = await generateOfferEmail(
          {
            carrierName: carrierName || carrierEmail,
            carrierEmail,
            carrierLoadsCount: carrierLoadsCount || 0,
            carrierLastRate: carrierLastRate || 0,
            carrierLastDATRate: carrierLastDATRate || null,
            carrierLastShipmentDate: carrierLastShipmentDate || "unknown",
            loadNumber,
            originCity: originCity || "",
            originState: originState || "",
            destCity: destCity || "",
            destState: destState || "",
            equipmentType: equipmentType || "TL",
            equipmentId: equipmentId || null,
            pickupDate: pickupDate || null,
            deliveryDate: deliveryDate || null,
            weightLbs: weightLbs || null,
            commodity: commodity || null,
            miles: miles || null,
            shipperRate,
            senderName,
            blastIntelligence,
          },
          async (step) => {
            await sendEvent({ type: "progress", ...step });
          }
        );

        await flushLlmUsage(user.id);
        await sendEvent({ type: "result", ...result });
      } catch (error) {
        const message =
          error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to generate offer email";
        await sendEvent({ type: "error", error: message });
      } finally {
        await writer.close();
      }
    })();

    return new Response(stream.readable, {
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "text/plain; charset=utf-8",
        "Transfer-Encoding": "chunked",
        "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to generate offer email";
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: message }), {
      status: 500,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }
}
