FILE: src/app/api/onboarding/complete/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const body = await request.json();
  const { supervised_mode } = body;

  const { error } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .update({
      onboarding_complete: true,
      onboarding_step: 7,
      supervised_mode: supervised_mode ?? true,
      autopilot_active: !supervised_mode,
    })
    .eq("id", user.id);

  if (error) {
    console.error("Onboarding complete error:", error);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ data: { success: true } });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/quote-board/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

// ============================================================
// Quote Board — Read API
//
// Reads from materialized quote_board_loads / quote_board_quotes
// tables. All aggregation is done by the /sync endpoint which
// calls refreshQuoteBoard() after VAPI sync.
//
// This route is fast — just DB reads, no external API calls.
// ============================================================

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function POST(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    let body: { period?: string } = {};
    try { body = await req.json(); } catch { /* empty body is fine */ }

    const period = body.period || "today";
    const sinceDate = period === "today"
      ? new Date(new Date().setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)).toISOString()
      : new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();

    // Fetch user profile name + ttms_user_id (for pod scoping)
    const { data: profile } = await supabase
      .from("profiles")
      .select("name, display_name, ttms_user_id")
      .eq("id", user.id)
      .single();
    const userName = profile?.name || profile?.display_name || "Agent";
    const hasPod = !!profile?.ttms_user_id;

    // Read materialized loads
    // OLD CODE (no pod scoping — all loads visible):
    // const { data: loadRows, error: loadErr } = await supabase
    //   .from("quote_board_loads")
    //   .select("*")
    //   .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
    //   .gte("latest_activity", sinceDate)
    //   .order("latest_activity", { ascending: false });
    let loadQuery = supabase
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .select("*")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .gte("latest_activity", sinceDate);

    // Pod scoping: if user has a pod, hide loads explicitly tagged as NOT in their pod.
    // Loads with in_user_pod=NULL (not yet tagged) are still shown until first sync runs.
    if (hasPod) {
      loadQuery = loadQuery.neq("in_user_pod", false);
    }

    const { data: loadRows, error: loadErr } = await loadQuery
      .order("latest_activity", { ascending: false });

    if (loadErr) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to read quote board: ${loadErr.message}`);
    }

    if (!loadRows || loadRows.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json({ loads: [], user_name: userName });
    }

    // Read all quotes for these loads in one query
    const loadIds = loadRows.map((l) => l.load_id);
    const { data: quoteRows, error: quoteErr } = await supabase
      .from("quote_board_quotes")
      .select("*")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .in("load_id", loadIds)
      .order("last_activity", { ascending: false });

    if (quoteErr) {
      console.error("[quote-board] Quote read error:", quoteErr.message);
    }

    // Group quotes by load_id
    const quotesByLoad = new Map<string, typeof quoteRows>();
    for (const q of quoteRows || []) {
      const existing = quotesByLoad.get(q.load_id) || [];
      existing.push(q);
      quotesByLoad.set(q.load_id, existing);
    }

    // Build response
    const loads = loadRows.map((load) => ({
      load_id: load.load_id,
      quote_count: load.quote_count,
      latest_activity: load.latest_activity,
      best_rate: load.best_rate != null ? Number(load.best_rate) : null,
      outbound_count: load.outbound_count,
      load_info: load.load_info,
      quotes: (quotesByLoad.get(load.load_id) || []).map((q) => ({
        source: q.source,
        identifier: q.identifier,
        display_name: q.display_name,
        latest_rate: q.latest_rate != null ? Number(q.latest_rate) : null,
        ai_rate: q.ai_rate != null ? Number(q.ai_rate) : null,
        status: q.status,
        round_count: q.round_count,
        is_known: q.is_known,
        carrier_id: q.carrier_id,
        mc_number: q.mc_number,
        last_activity: q.last_activity,
        reference_id: q.reference_id || null,
      })),
    }));

    return NextResponse.json({ loads, user_name: userName });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to load quote board";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/quote-board/[loadId]/scores/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrder, getOrders } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";
import { scoreCarrier, getScoreColor, getScoreLabel } from "@/lib/carrier-scoring";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  { params }: { params: Promise<{ loadId: string }> }
) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { loadId } = await params;

    // Find the TTMS numeric order ID from the load number
    let orderId: number | null = null;

    // Try local loads table first
    const { data: localLoad } = await supabase
      .from("loads")
      .select("tms_load_id")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .eq("load_number", loadId)
      .maybeSingle();

    if (localLoad?.tms_load_id) {
      orderId = parseInt(localLoad.tms_load_id, 10);
    }

    // Try parsing as direct numeric ID
    if (!orderId || isNaN(orderId)) {
      const parsed = parseInt(loadId, 10);
      if (!isNaN(parsed)) orderId = parsed;
    }

    // Fallback: search TTMS by load_number
    // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
    const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(user.id);
    if (!orderId) {
      try {
        const searchResult = await getOrders({ load_number: loadId, per_page: 1, pod_id: podInfo?.podId });
        if (searchResult.data?.length > 0) {
          orderId = searchResult.data[0].id;
        }
      } catch {
        // Non-fatal
      }
    }

    if (!orderId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ scores: {}, error: "Load not found in TMS" });
    }

    // Fetch order with past_carriers
    const result = await getOrder(orderId);
    const pastCarriers = result.past_carriers || [];

    // Score each carrier, key by lowercase email
    const scores: Record<
      string,
      {
        score: number;
        score_label: string;
        score_color: string;
        carrier_name: string;
        carrier_email: string;
        carrier_telephone: string;
        loads_count: number;
        carrier_total: number;
      }
    > = {};

    for (const pc of pastCarriers) {
      const s = scoreCarrier(pc);
      const key = (pc.carrier_email || "").toLowerCase();
      if (key) {
        scores[key] = {
          score: s,
          score_label: getScoreLabel(s),
          score_color: getScoreColor(s),
          carrier_name: pc.carrier_name,
          carrier_email: pc.carrier_email,
          carrier_telephone: pc.carrier_telephone,
          loads_count: pc.loads_count,
          carrier_total: pc.carrier_total,
        };
      }
      // Also key by phone for VAPI matching
      if (pc.carrier_telephone) {
        const digits = pc.carrier_telephone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
        if (digits.length >= 7) {
          scores[digits] = scores[key] || {
            score: s,
            score_label: getScoreLabel(s),
            score_color: getScoreColor(s),
            carrier_name: pc.carrier_name,
            carrier_email: pc.carrier_email,
            carrier_telephone: pc.carrier_telephone,
            loads_count: pc.loads_count,
            carrier_total: pc.carrier_total,
          };
        }
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ scores });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch scores";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/quote-board/backfill/route.ts
================================================
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { createClient as createRawClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js";
import { getOrdersCachedBatch } from "@/lib/ttms/order-cache";
import { getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";
import { fetchPodLoadIds } from "@/lib/ttms/pod-load-ids";

export const maxDuration = 120;

/**
 * POST /api/quote-board/backfill
 *
 * Fills load_info for all quote_board_loads that are missing it.
 * Streams progress via SSE.
 */
export async function POST() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return new Response(JSON.stringify({ error: "Unauthorized" }), {
      status: 401,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
    });
  }

  // Use raw supabase-js client (not SSR) to avoid streaming/cookie issues
  const db = createRawClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
  );

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    async start(controller) {
      function log(msg: string) {
        controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(`data: ${msg}\n\n`));
      }

      try {
        let filled = 0;
        let skipped = 0;
        let batch = 0;

        // Count total missing
        const { count } = await db
          .from("quote_board_loads")
          .select("*", { count: "exact", head: true })
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
          .is("load_info", null);

        const total = count || 0;
        log(`Starting backfill: ${total} loads missing load_info`);

        while (true) {
          const { data: missing } = await db
            .from("quote_board_loads")
            .select("load_id")
            .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
            .is("load_info", null)
            .limit(10);

          if (!missing || missing.length === 0) break;
          batch++;

          const loadIds = missing.map((r: { load_id: string }) => r.load_id);
          log(`Batch ${batch}: fetching ${loadIds.join(", ")}`);

          const cached = await getOrdersCachedBatch(user.id, loadIds);

          for (const loadId of loadIds) {
            const data = cached.get(loadId);
            if (data && data.loadInfo.origin_city) {
              const { error: updateErr } = await db
                .from("quote_board_loads")
                .update({ load_info: data.loadInfo })
                .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
                .eq("load_id", loadId);

              if (updateErr) {
                log(`ERROR ${loadId}: ${updateErr.message}`);
              } else {
                filled++;
                const route = [data.loadInfo.origin_city, data.loadInfo.origin_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ")
                  + " → "
                  + [data.loadInfo.dest_city, data.loadInfo.dest_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
                log(`✓ ${loadId}: ${route}`);
              }
            } else {
              // Mark with empty object so we skip next time
              await db
                .from("quote_board_loads")
                .update({ load_info: {} })
                .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
                .eq("load_id", loadId);
              skipped++;
              log(`✗ ${loadId}: not found in TTMS, skipped`);
            }
          }

          log(`Progress: ${filled + skipped}/${total} (${filled} filled, ${skipped} skipped)`);
        }

        log(`Done! ${filled} loads filled, ${skipped} not found`);

        // --- Pod scoping: tag loads as in/out of user's pod ---
        // OLD CODE (no pod scoping — ended here):
        // (backfill only filled load_info, no pod tagging)
        try {
          // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
          // OLD: const podLoadIds = await fetchPodLoadIds(ttmsUserId);
          // NEW: use pod_id instead of user_id
          const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(user.id);
          if (podInfo) {
            log("Tagging loads with pod scoping...");
            const podLoadIds = await fetchPodLoadIds(podInfo.ttmsUserId, podInfo.podId);
            if (podLoadIds) {
              const { data: allLoads } = await db
                .from("quote_board_loads")
                .select("load_id")
                .eq("tenant_id", user.id);

              if (allLoads && allLoads.length > 0) {
                const inPod = allLoads.filter((l: { load_id: string }) => podLoadIds.has(l.load_id));
                const outPod = allLoads.filter((l: { load_id: string }) => !podLoadIds.has(l.load_id));

                if (inPod.length > 0) {
                  await db
                    .from("quote_board_loads")
                    .update({ in_user_pod: true })
                    .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
                    .in("load_id", inPod.map((l: { load_id: string }) => l.load_id));
                }
                if (outPod.length > 0) {
                  await db
                    .from("quote_board_loads")
                    .update({ in_user_pod: false })
                    .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
                    .in("load_id", outPod.map((l: { load_id: string }) => l.load_id));
                }

                log(`Pod scoping: ${inPod.length} in-pod, ${outPod.length} out-of-pod`);
              }
            } else {
              log("Pod fetch failed, skipping pod scoping");
            }
          }
        } catch (podErr) {
          const podMsg = podErr instanceof Error ? podErr.message : "Pod scoping failed";
          log(`Pod scoping error (non-fatal): ${podMsg}`);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Backfill failed";
        log(`ERROR: ${msg}`);
      } finally {
        controller.close();
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "text/event-stream",
      "Cache-Control": "no-cache",
      Connection: "keep-alive",
    },
  });
}

FILE: src/app/api/quote-board/debug/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { materializeQuote } from "@/lib/quote-board/incremental";

export async function GET(req: Request) {
  const url = new URL(req.url);
  const loadId = url.searchParams.get("load_id") || "134637";
  const test = url.searchParams.get("test") === "1";

  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // If test=1, try writing a test quote to verify materializeQuote works
  let testResult = null;
  if (test) {
    const tenantId = url.searchParams.get("tenant_id");
    if (!tenantId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: "tenant_id required for test" }, { status: 400 });
    }
    try {
      await materializeQuote(tenantId, "ORD-134637", {
        source: "email",
        identifier: "test@debug.com",
        display_name: "Debug Test",
        latest_rate: 1245,
        status: "negotiating",
        round_count: 1,
        is_known: false,
        carrier_id: null,
        mc_number: null,
        last_activity: new Date().toISOString(),
        reference_id: null,
      });
      testResult = "materializeQuote succeeded";
    } catch (e) {
      testResult = `materializeQuote FAILED: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`;
    }
  }

  const { data: loads, error: loadErr } = await supabase
    .from("quote_board_loads")
    .select("*")
    .ilike("load_id", `%${loadId}%`);

  const { data: quotes, error: quoteErr } = await supabase
    .from("quote_board_quotes")
    .select("*")
    .ilike("load_id", `%${loadId}%`);

  return NextResponse.json({
    search: loadId,
    testResult,
    loads: { count: loads?.length || 0, data: loads, error: loadErr?.message },
    quotes: { count: quotes?.length || 0, data: quotes, error: quoteErr?.message },
  });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/quote-board/sync/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient, createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { materializeLoad, recomputeLoadAggregate } from "@/lib/quote-board/incremental";
import { getOrdersCachedBatch } from "@/lib/ttms/order-cache";
import { getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";
import { fetchPodLoadIds } from "@/lib/ttms/pod-load-ids";

export const maxDuration = 120;

/**
 * POST /api/quote-board/sync
 *
 * 1. Finds loads with missing load_info and fetches from TTMS (cached)
 * 2. Finds source rows changed since last materialization
 * 3. Materializes only affected loads
 */
export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const service = await createServiceClient();
    let filledLoadInfo = 0;
    let materialized = 0;

    // --- Step 1: Fill missing load_info + refresh loads without order_status (in batches of 20) ---
    // First pass: loads with null load_info
    while (true) {
      const { data: missingInfoLoads } = await service
        .from("quote_board_loads")
        .select("load_id")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
        .is("load_info", null)
        .limit(20);

      if (!missingInfoLoads || missingInfoLoads.length === 0) break;

      const loadIds = missingInfoLoads.map((r) => r.load_id);
      const cached = await getOrdersCachedBatch(user.id, loadIds);

      for (const [loadId, data] of cached) {
        await service
          .from("quote_board_loads")
          .update({ load_info: data.loadInfo })
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
          .eq("load_id", loadId);
        filledLoadInfo++;
      }

      if (missingInfoLoads.length < 20) break;
    }

    // --- Step 1b: Re-fetch load_info for loads missing order_status, then filter non-PENDING ---
    let removedNonPending = 0;
    {
      // Get all loads for this tenant
      const { data: allBoardLoads } = await service
        .from("quote_board_loads")
        .select("load_id, load_info")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id);

      console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Total board loads: ${allBoardLoads?.length || 0}`);
      if (allBoardLoads?.[0]) {
        const sample = allBoardLoads[0];
        console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Sample load_id: ${sample.load_id}, load_info type: ${typeof sample.load_info}, has order_status: ${!!(sample.load_info as Record<string, unknown>)?.order_status}`);
      }

      if (allBoardLoads && allBoardLoads.length > 0) {
        // Find loads missing order_status or shipper_rate in load_info
        const needsStatusRefresh = allBoardLoads.filter((l) => {
          const info = l.load_info as Record<string, unknown> | null;
          return info && (!info.order_status || !info.shipper_rate);
        });

        console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Loads missing order_status: ${needsStatusRefresh.length}`);

        if (needsStatusRefresh.length > 0) {
          const idsToRefresh = needsStatusRefresh.map((l) => l.load_id);
          console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Refreshing cache for: ${idsToRefresh.slice(0, 5).join(", ")}...`);

          // Invalidate cache for these so we get fresh data from TTMS API
          await service
            .from("ttms_order_cache")
            .delete()
            .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
            .in("order_id", idsToRefresh);

          // Re-fetch in batches
          for (let i = 0; i < idsToRefresh.length; i += 20) {
            const batch = idsToRefresh.slice(i, i + 20);
            const cached = await getOrdersCachedBatch(user.id, batch);
            console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Re-fetched batch: ${batch.length} requested, ${cached.size} returned`);
            for (const [loadId, data] of cached) {
              console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Load ${loadId} status: ${data.loadInfo.order_status}`);
              await service
                .from("quote_board_loads")
                .update({ load_info: data.loadInfo })
                .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
                .eq("load_id", loadId);
            }
          }
        }

        // Now re-read all loads and remove non-PENDING
        const { data: updatedLoads } = await service
          .from("quote_board_loads")
          .select("load_id, load_info")
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id);

        if (updatedLoads) {
          const statusCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
          const nonPendingIds = updatedLoads
            .filter((l) => {
              const info = l.load_info as Record<string, unknown> | null;
              const status = (info?.order_status as string | undefined) || "unknown";
              statusCounts[status] = (statusCounts[status] || 0) + 1;
              return status !== "unknown" && status.toUpperCase() !== "PENDING";
            })
            .map((l) => l.load_id);

          console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Status counts:`, JSON.stringify(statusCounts));
          console.log(`[quote-board/sync] Non-PENDING to remove: ${nonPendingIds.length}`);

          if (nonPendingIds.length > 0) {
            await service
              .from("quote_board_quotes")
              .delete()
              .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
              .in("load_id", nonPendingIds);
            await service
              .from("quote_board_loads")
              .delete()
              .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
              .in("load_id", nonPendingIds);
            removedNonPending = nonPendingIds.length;
          }
        }
      }
    }

    // --- Step 2: Incremental materialization of changed data ---
    const { data: lastRow } = await service
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .select("updated_at")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .order("updated_at", { ascending: false })
      .limit(1)
      .maybeSingle();

    const lastRefreshAt = lastRow?.updated_at
      || new Date(Date.now() - 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();

    const [negsResult, vapiResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
      service
        .from("email_negotiations")
        .select("interested_order")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
        .gt("updated_at", lastRefreshAt),
      service
        .from("vapi_call_extractions")
        .select("order_id")
        .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
        .gt("extracted_at", lastRefreshAt),
    ]);

    const changedNegs = negsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? negsResult.value.data || [] : [];
    const changedVapi = vapiResult.status === "fulfilled" ? vapiResult.value.data || [] : [];

    const changedLoadIds = new Set<string>();
    for (const row of changedNegs) {
      if (row.interested_order) changedLoadIds.add(row.interested_order);
    }
    for (const row of changedVapi) {
      if (row.order_id) changedLoadIds.add(row.order_id);
    }

    for (const loadId of changedLoadIds) {
      try {
        await materializeLoad(user.id, loadId);
        materialized++;
      } catch (err) {
        console.error(`[quote-board/sync] Materialize failed for ${loadId}:`, err);
      }
    }

    // --- Step 3: Pod scoping — tag loads as in/out of user's pod ---
    // OLD CODE (no pod scoping — all loads visible to all users):
    // return NextResponse.json({ filled_load_info: filledLoadInfo, refreshed: materialized });
    let podTagged = 0;
    // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(user.id);
    // OLD: const podLoadIds = await fetchPodLoadIds(ttmsUserId);
    // NEW: use pod_id instead of user_id
    const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(user.id);
    if (podInfo) {
      const podLoadIds = await fetchPodLoadIds(podInfo.ttmsUserId, podInfo.podId);
      if (podLoadIds) {
        // Fetch all load_ids for this user
        const { data: allLoads } = await service
          .from("quote_board_loads")
          .select("load_id")
          .eq("tenant_id", user.id);

        if (allLoads && allLoads.length > 0) {
          const inPod = allLoads.filter((l) => podLoadIds.has(l.load_id));
          const outPod = allLoads.filter((l) => !podLoadIds.has(l.load_id));

          // Batch update: mark loads IN the pod
          if (inPod.length > 0) {
            await service
              .from("quote_board_loads")
              .update({ in_user_pod: true })
              .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
              .in("load_id", inPod.map((l) => l.load_id));
          }

          // Batch update: mark loads NOT in the pod
          if (outPod.length > 0) {
            await service
              .from("quote_board_loads")
              .update({ in_user_pod: false })
              .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
              .in("load_id", outPod.map((l) => l.load_id));
          }

          podTagged = inPod.length;
        }
      } else {
        console.warn("[quote-board/sync] Pod fetch failed, skipping pod scoping");
      }
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      filled_load_info: filledLoadInfo,
      refreshed: materialized + removedNonPending,
      removed_non_pending: removedNonPending,
      pod_tagged: podTagged,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Sync failed";
    console.error("[quote-board/sync] Error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/quoted-loads/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

/**
 * GET /api/quoted-loads?status=bidding|awarded|all
 * Returns all quoted loads for the authenticated user.
 */
export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
    error: authError,
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const status = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get("status") || "all";

  let query = supabase
    .from("quoted_loads")
    .select("id, email_id, reply_id, conversation_id, shipper_address, shipper_name, email_subject, lanes, awarded_status, awarded_at, awarded_email_id, award_confidence, award_reasoning, created_at, updated_at")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

  if (status === "bidding") {
    query = query.eq("awarded_status", "bidding");
  } else if (status === "awarded") {
    query = query.eq("awarded_status", "awarded");
  }

  const { data, error } = await query.limit(100);

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ data: data || [] });
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/quotes/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;
    const loadId = searchParams.get("load_id");
    const page = Math.max(1, Math.min(parseInt(searchParams.get("page") || "1", 10) || 1, 1000));
    const perPage = Math.max(1, Math.min(parseInt(searchParams.get("per_page") || "20", 10) || 20, 100));
    const offset = (page - 1) * perPage;

    if (!loadId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "load_id query parameter is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const { data, error, count } = await supabase
      .from("carrier_quotes")
      .select("*, carrier:carriers(id, name, email, mc_number)", {
        count: "exact",
      })
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .eq("load_id", loadId)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
      .range(offset, offset + perPage - 1);

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data, total: count, page, per_page: perPage });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch quotes";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();
    const { load_id, carrier_id, quoted_rate, rate_per_mile } = body;

    if (!load_id || !carrier_id) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "load_id and carrier_id are required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    // Validate rate values
    if (quoted_rate !== undefined && quoted_rate !== null) {
      const rate = Number(quoted_rate);
      if (!isFinite(rate) || rate < 0 || rate > 50000) {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: "quoted_rate must be between $0 and $50,000" },
          { status: 400 }
        );
      }
    }
    if (rate_per_mile !== undefined && rate_per_mile !== null) {
      const rpm = Number(rate_per_mile);
      if (!isFinite(rpm) || rpm < 0 || rpm > 100) {
        return NextResponse.json(
          { error: "rate_per_mile must be between $0 and $100" },
          { status: 400 }
        );
      }
    }

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from("carrier_quotes")
      .insert({
        tenant_id: user.id,
        load_id,
        carrier_id,
        quoted_rate,
        rate_per_mile,
      })
      .select()
      .single();

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data }, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to create quote";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/rate-parameters/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from("rate_parameters")
      .select("*")
      .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch rate parameters";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const body = await request.json();
    const { lanes } = body;

    if (!lanes || !Array.isArray(lanes) || lanes.length === 0) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "At least one lane is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const rows = lanes.map(
      (lane: {
        lane_name?: string;
        origin: string;
        destination: string;
        equipment_type?: string;
        floor_rate?: string | number;
        target_rate?: string | number;
        ceiling_rate?: string | number;
      }) => {
        const floor = lane.floor_rate ? Number(lane.floor_rate) : null;
        const target = lane.target_rate ? Number(lane.target_rate) : null;
        const ceiling = lane.ceiling_rate ? Number(lane.ceiling_rate) : null;

        // Validate rates are positive and finite
        for (const [name, val] of [["floor_rate", floor], ["target_rate", target], ["ceiling_rate", ceiling]] as const) {
          if (val !== null && (!isFinite(val) || val < 0 || val > 100000)) {
            throw new RangeError(`${name} must be between $0 and $100,000, got ${val}`);
          }
        }

        // Validate ordering: floor <= target <= ceiling
        if (floor !== null && target !== null && floor > target) {
          throw new RangeError(`floor_rate ($${floor}) cannot exceed target_rate ($${target})`);
        }
        if (target !== null && ceiling !== null && target > ceiling) {
          throw new RangeError(`target_rate ($${target}) cannot exceed ceiling_rate ($${ceiling})`);
        }

        return {
          tenant_id: user.id,
          lane_name: lane.lane_name || `${lane.origin} → ${lane.destination}`,
          origin: lane.origin,
          destination: lane.destination,
          equipment_type: lane.equipment_type || "van",
          floor_rate: floor,
          target_rate: target,
          ceiling_rate: ceiling,
        };
      }
    );

    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from("rate_parameters")
      .insert(rows)
      .select();

    if (error) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ data, count: data.length }, { status: 201 });
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof RangeError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 400 });
    }
    const message =
      error instanceof Error
        ? error.message
        : "Failed to create rate parameters";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/settings/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { data: preferences, error } = await supabase
    .from("user_preferences")
    .select("id, auto_classify, important_keywords, ignore_domains, sync_interval_minutes, created_at, updated_at")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json(preferences);
}

export async function PUT(request: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const { data: { user }, error: authError } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (authError || !user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const body = await request.json();
  const updates: Record<string, unknown> = {};

  if (typeof body.auto_classify === "boolean") updates.auto_classify = body.auto_classify;
  if (Array.isArray(body.important_keywords)) updates.important_keywords = body.important_keywords;
  if (Array.isArray(body.ignore_domains)) updates.ignore_domains = body.ignore_domains;
  if (typeof body.sync_interval_minutes === "number") updates.sync_interval_minutes = body.sync_interval_minutes;

  const { error } = await supabase
    .from("user_preferences")
    .update(updates)
    .eq("user_id", user.id);

  if (error) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: 500 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ success: true });
}

FILE: src/app/api/vapi/call/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";

export const maxDuration = 15;

// GET /api/vapi/call?id=[call_id]
// Returns summary and metadata for a single VAPI call extraction.
export async function GET(req: Request) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  const { searchParams } = new URL(req.url);
  const callId = searchParams.get("id");

  if (!callId) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Missing id parameter" }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const { data, error } = await supabase
    .from("vapi_call_extractions")
    .select("call_id, phone_number, order_id, rate, intent, status, call_started_at, summary")
    .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
    .eq("call_id", callId)
    .single();

  if (error || !data) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Call not found" }, { status: 404 });
  }

  return NextResponse.json({ call: data });
}

FILE: src/app/api/vapi/negotiations/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { vapiGetNegotiations } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export const maxDuration = 15;

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  if (!user) {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 });
  }

  try {
    const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;
    const orderId = searchParams.get("order_id");
    const phone = searchParams.get("phone_number");
    const page = parseInt(searchParams.get("page") || "1", 10);

    if (!orderId && !phone) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: "Either order_id or phone_number is required" },
        { status: 400 }
      );
    }

    const result = await vapiGetNegotiations({
      order_id: orderId ? parseInt(orderId, 10) : undefined,
      phone_number: phone || undefined,
      page,
    });

    return NextResponse.json({
      data: result.data,
      total: result.meta?.total ?? 0,
      page: result.meta?.current_page ?? 1,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Failed to fetch negotiations";
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/webhooks/microsoft/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { createGraphClient, getAccessToken } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { classifyEmails } from "@/lib/claude";
import { fetchPdfAttachments, stripHtml } from "@/lib/pdf-utils";
import { detectTender } from "@/lib/ai/tender-detect";
import { detectAwardOnFollowUp } from "@/lib/award-detection";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";
import type { GraphMessage } from "@/types/index";

export const maxDuration = 60;

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  // Graph subscription validation: echo back validationToken
  const validationToken = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get("validationToken");
  if (validationToken) {
    return new NextResponse(validationToken, {
      status: 200,
      headers: { "Content-Type": "text/plain" },
    });
  }

  try {
    const payload = await request.json();
    const notifications = payload.value || [];
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();

    for (const notification of notifications) {
      // Validate clientState to prevent spoofed notifications
      const expectedState =
        process.env.GRAPH_WEBHOOK_CLIENT_STATE || "ttms-mailer-secret";
      if (notification.clientState && notification.clientState !== expectedState) {
        console.warn("Invalid clientState in webhook notification, skipping");
        continue;
      }

      const resourceData = notification.resourceData;
      if (!resourceData?.id) continue;

      // Detect if this is a sent items notification
      const resource = notification.resource || "";
      const isSentItem = resource.toLowerCase().includes("sentitems") || resource.toLowerCase().includes("sent items");

      // Look up the subscription to find the tenant
      const subscriptionId = notification.subscriptionId;
      const { data: connection } = await supabase
        .from("email_connections")
        .select("id, tenant_id, access_token, refresh_token")
        .eq("graph_subscription_id", subscriptionId)
        .single();

      if (!connection) continue;

      initLlmTracking(connection.tenant_id);

      try {
        // Use getAccessToken for automatic refresh handling
        const accessToken = await getAccessToken(connection.tenant_id);
        const client = createGraphClient(accessToken);

        // Fetch full message from Graph
        const message: GraphMessage = await client
          .api(`/me/messages/${resourceData.id}`)
          .select(
            "id,subject,from,toRecipients,receivedDateTime,bodyPreview,body,isRead,hasAttachments,conversationId"
          )
          .get();

        // Write to emails table
        const { data: upserted } = await supabase
          .from("emails")
          .upsert(
            {
              user_id: connection.tenant_id,
              graph_message_id: message.id,
              subject: message.subject,
              from_address:
                message.from?.emailAddress?.address || "unknown",
              from_name: message.from?.emailAddress?.name || null,
              to_addresses:
                message.toRecipients?.map(
                  (r) => r.emailAddress.address
                ) || [],
              received_at: message.receivedDateTime,
              body_preview: message.bodyPreview?.slice(0, 500) || null,
              body_html: message.body?.content || null,
              // OLD: is_read: message.isRead || false,
              // Removed is_read from upsert — app marks as read when user opens email
              has_attachments: message.hasAttachments || false,
              conversation_id: message.conversationId || null,
              ...(isSentItem ? { category: "SENT", is_read: true } : {}),
            },
            {
              onConflict: "user_id,graph_message_id",
              ignoreDuplicates: false,
            }
          )
          .select("id, subject, from_address, from_name, body_preview, category")
          .single();

        // Skip classification for sent items — they don't need AI categorization
        if (isSentItem) {
          console.log(`[webhook] Sent item stored: ${message.subject?.slice(0, 60)}`);
          continue;
        }

        // Auto-classify if the email is new (UNCLASSIFIED)
        if (upserted && (!upserted.category || upserted.category === "UNCLASSIFIED")) {
          try {
            const { data: prefs } = await supabase
              .from("user_preferences")
              .select("important_keywords, ignore_domains")
              .eq("user_id", connection.tenant_id)
              .single();

            const results = await classifyEmails(
              [
                {
                  id: upserted.id,
                  subject: upserted.subject,
                  fromAddress: upserted.from_address,
                  fromName: upserted.from_name,
                  bodyPreview: upserted.body_preview,
                },
              ],
              {
                importantKeywords: prefs?.important_keywords || [],
                ignoreDomains: prefs?.ignore_domains || [],
              }
            );

            if (results.length > 0) {
              await supabase
                .from("emails")
                .update({
                  category: results[0].category,
                  ai_reasoning: results[0].reasoning,
                  confidence: results[0].confidence,
                })
                .eq("id", upserted.id);

              // Phase 2: If email has attachments, run tender detection with PDF content
              if (message.hasAttachments && results[0].category !== "TENDER") {
                try {
                  const pdfs = await fetchPdfAttachments(accessToken, message.id);
                  if (pdfs.length > 0) {
                    const bodyText = message.body?.content
                      ? stripHtml(message.body.content).slice(0, 8000)
                      : (message.bodyPreview || "").slice(0, 8000);

                    const tenderResult = await detectTender({
                      subject: message.subject || "",
                      from: message.from?.emailAddress?.name
                        ? `${message.from.emailAddress.name} <${message.from.emailAddress.address}>`
                        : message.from?.emailAddress?.address || "",
                      body_text: bodyText,
                      pdf_attachments: pdfs,
                    }, connection.tenant_id);

                    if (tenderResult.is_tender && tenderResult.confidence >= 0.7) {
                      await supabase
                        .from("emails")
                        .update({
                          category: "TENDER",
                          ai_reasoning: `Tender detected from PDF content: ${tenderResult.reasoning}`,
                          confidence: tenderResult.confidence,
                        })
                        .eq("id", upserted.id);
                    }
                  }
                } catch (tenderErr) {
                  console.error(`Tender detection failed for ${upserted.id}:`, tenderErr);
                }
              }
            }
          } catch (classifyError) {
            console.error(
              `Webhook classification failed for ${upserted.id}:`,
              classifyError
            );
          }
        }

        // Phase 3: Check if this email is an award for a previously quoted load
        // Runs for ALL emails (not just unclassified) since award follow-ups may already be classified
        if (upserted) {
          try {
            await detectAwardOnFollowUp(
              connection.tenant_id,
              upserted.id,
              message.conversationId || null,
              {
                subject: message.subject,
                from_name: message.from?.emailAddress?.name || null,
                from_address: message.from?.emailAddress?.address || "unknown",
                body_preview: message.bodyPreview?.slice(0, 500) || null,
              }
            );
          } catch (awardErr) {
            console.error(`Award detection failed for ${upserted.id}:`, awardErr);
          }
        }
      } catch (msgError) {
        console.error(
          `Failed to process notification for message ${resourceData.id}:`,
          msgError
        );
      }
    }

    // Flush LLM usage for all notifications processed (uses last connection's tenant_id)
    if (notifications.length > 0) {
      try {
        const lastConn = notifications[notifications.length - 1];
        const { data: conn } = await supabase
          .from("email_connections")
          .select("tenant_id")
          .eq("subscription_id", lastConn.subscriptionId)
          .single();
        if (conn?.tenant_id) await flushLlmUsage(conn.tenant_id);
      } catch { /* best effort */ }
    }
    return NextResponse.json({ data: { processed: notifications.length } });
  } catch (error) {
    const message =
      error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Webhook processing failed";
    console.error("Microsoft webhook error:", message);
    return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 500 });
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/auth/callback/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from "next/server";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getUsers } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

export async function GET(request: Request) {
  const { searchParams, origin } = new URL(request.url);
  const code = searchParams.get("code");

  if (code) {
    const supabase = await createClient();
    const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.exchangeCodeForSession(code);

    if (!error && data.session) {
      const session = data.session;
      const userEmail = session.user.email;

      // --- TTMS Agent check (commented out — allow anyone to log in for now) ---
      if (userEmail) {
        try {
          const ttmsResult = await getUsers({ search: userEmail });
          const ttmsUser = ttmsResult.data?.find(
            (u) => u.email.toLowerCase() === userEmail.toLowerCase()
          );

          // TODO: re-enable agent-only restriction later
          // if (!ttmsUser || ttmsUser.pod?.title !== "Agent") {
          //   await supabase.auth.signOut();
          //   const errorMsg = encodeURIComponent(
          //     "You are not added as an Agent in our system. Please ask the authority to add you as an Agent."
          //   );
          //   return NextResponse.redirect(`${origin}/?error=not_agent&message=${errorMsg}`);
          // }

          // Save TTMS user ID and pod title to profiles if found
          if (ttmsUser) {
            await supabase
              .from("profiles")
              .update({
                ttms_user_id: ttmsUser.id,
                ttms_pod_title: ttmsUser.pod?.title ?? null,
                onboarding_complete: true,
                autopilot_active: false,
                supervised_mode: true,
              })
              .eq("id", session.user.id);
          } else {
            // No TTMS user — still mark onboarding complete (onboarding flow removed)
            await supabase
              .from("profiles")
              .update({ onboarding_complete: true })
              .eq("id", session.user.id);
          }
        } catch (err) {
          console.error("TTMS user check failed:", err);
          // If TTMS is down, don't block login — still mark onboarding complete
          await supabase
            .from("profiles")
            .update({ onboarding_complete: true })
            .eq("id", session.user.id);
        }
      }

      const providerToken = session.provider_token;
      const providerRefreshToken = session.provider_refresh_token;

      if (providerToken) {
        // Store in accounts table (legacy, still used by graph-client.ts)
        await supabase.from("accounts").upsert(
          {
            user_id: session.user.id,
            provider: "azure",
            access_token: providerToken,
            refresh_token: providerRefreshToken || null,
            expires_at: session.expires_at || null,
          },
          { onConflict: "user_id,provider" }
        );

        // Also store in email_connections for new architecture
        const tokenExpiresAt = new Date(Date.now() + 3600 * 1000).toISOString();
        await supabase.from("email_connections").upsert(
          {
            tenant_id: session.user.id,
            provider: "microsoft",
            email_address: session.user.email || "",
            access_token: providerToken,
            refresh_token: providerRefreshToken || "",
            token_expires_at: tokenExpiresAt,
            is_active: true,
          },
          { onConflict: "tenant_id" }
        );
      }

      const redirectTo = "/dashboard";

      const forwardedHost = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-host");
      const isLocalEnv = process.env.NODE_ENV === "development";
      if (isLocalEnv) {
        return NextResponse.redirect(`${origin}${redirectTo}`);
      } else if (forwardedHost) {
        return NextResponse.redirect(`https://${forwardedHost}${redirectTo}`);
      } else {
        return NextResponse.redirect(`${origin}${redirectTo}`);
      }
    }
  }

  return NextResponse.redirect(`${origin}/?error=auth_failed`);
}

FILE: src/app/onboarding/page.tsx
================================================
import { redirect } from "next/navigation";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { OnboardingWizard } from "@/components/onboarding/OnboardingWizard";

export default async function OnboardingPage() {
  const supabase = await createClient();
  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
  if (!user) redirect("/");

  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("onboarding_step, onboarding_complete, email")
    .eq("id", user.id)
    .single();

  if (profile?.onboarding_complete) redirect("/dashboard");

  // Check email connection
  const { data: emailConn } = await supabase
    .from("email_connections")
    .select("email_address, is_active")
    .eq("tenant_id", user.id)
    .single();

  // Also check accounts table as fallback
  const { data: account } = await supabase
    .from("accounts")
    .select("access_token")
    .eq("user_id", user.id)
    .eq("provider", "azure")
    .single();

  return (
    <OnboardingWizard
      currentStep={profile?.onboarding_step || 1}
      emailConnected={!!(emailConn?.is_active || account?.access_token)}
      emailAddress={
        emailConn?.email_address || profile?.email || user.email || ""
      }
    />
  );
}

FILE: src/components/agent/activity-feed.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

interface ActivityEntry {
  id: string;
  action: string;
  summary: string;
  load_id: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}

const ACTION_STYLES: Record<string, { color: string; icon: string; bg: string }> = {
  booked: { color: "text-green-700", icon: "B", bg: "bg-green-200/60" },
  created_order: { color: "text-blue-700", icon: "O", bg: "bg-blue-200/60" },
  sent_blast: { color: "text-blue-600", icon: "S", bg: "bg-blue-100/70" },
  sent: { color: "text-blue-600", icon: "S", bg: "bg-blue-100/70" },
  drafted: { color: "text-sky-600", icon: "D", bg: "bg-sky-100/70" },
  negotiated: { color: "text-purple-600", icon: "N", bg: "bg-purple-100/70" },
  classified: { color: "text-gray-600", icon: "C", bg: "bg-gray-200/60" },
  escalated: { color: "text-amber-700", icon: "!", bg: "bg-amber-200/60" },
  learning: { color: "text-teal-700", icon: "L", bg: "bg-teal-200/60" },
  cycle_event: { color: "text-gray-500", icon: "A", bg: "bg-gray-100/70" },
  extracted_load: { color: "text-indigo-600", icon: "E", bg: "bg-indigo-100/70" },
};

function timeAgo(dateStr: string): string {
  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();
  const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  if (mins < 1) return "just now";
  if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
  const hours = Math.floor(mins / 60);
  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
  return `${Math.floor(hours / 24)}d ago`;
}

export function ActivityFeed() {
  const [entries, setEntries] = useState<ActivityEntry[]>([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const supabase = createClient();

    // Initial fetch
    supabase
      .from("agent_activity")
      .select("id, action, summary, load_id, created_at")
      .order("created_at", { ascending: false })
      .limit(50)
      .then(({ data }) => {
        if (data) setEntries(data);
      });

    // Realtime subscription
    const channel = supabase
      .channel("agent-activity-feed")
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "INSERT", schema: "public", table: "agent_activity" },
        (payload) => {
          const newEntry = payload.new as ActivityEntry;
          setEntries((prev) => [newEntry, ...prev].slice(0, 100));
        }
      )
      .subscribe();

    return () => {
      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
    };
  }, []);

  return (
    <Card className="h-full">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold">Activity Feed</CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="p-0">
        <ScrollArea className="h-[500px]">
          <div className="space-y-0 px-4 pb-4">
            {entries.length === 0 && (
              <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground py-8 text-center">
                No activity yet. Enable the agent to get started.
              </p>
            )}
            {entries.map((entry) => {
              const style = ACTION_STYLES[entry.action] || { color: "text-gray-400", icon: "?", bg: "bg-muted" };
              return (
                <div
                  key={entry.id}
                  className="flex items-start gap-3 py-2 border-b last:border-0"
                >
                  <div
                    className={cn(
                      "flex-shrink-0 w-6 h-6 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold",
                      "backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm ring-1 ring-white/40 dark:ring-white/10",
                      style.color,
                      style.bg
                    )}
                  >
                    {style.icon}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <p className="text-sm leading-snug truncate">{entry.summary}</p>
                    <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
                      {timeAgo(entry.created_at)}
                      {entry.load_id && ` · ${entry.load_id}`}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                </div>
              );
            })}
          </div>
        </ScrollArea>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}
