FILE: src/components/agent/agent-toggle.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Play, Loader2, FlaskConical, Power, Zap, OctagonX } from "lucide-react";
import { LiveConsole, type ConsoleEvent } from "./live-console";

interface AgentSettings {
  enabled: boolean;
  draft_mode: boolean;
  test_mode: boolean;
  max_carrier_blast: number;
  max_negotiation_rounds: number;
  rate_ceiling_pct: number;
  auto_book_enabled: boolean;
}

type AgentMode = "off" | "test" | "live";

function deriveMode(s: AgentSettings): AgentMode {
  if (!s.enabled && !s.test_mode) return "off";
  if (s.test_mode) return "test";
  return "live";
}

interface AgentToggleProps {
  onRun?: () => void;
  running?: boolean;
  events?: ConsoleEvent[];
  onClearEvents?: () => void;
}

export function AgentToggle({ onRun, running = false, events = [], onClearEvents }: AgentToggleProps) {
  const [settings, setSettings] = useState<AgentSettings | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [runResult, setRunResult] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [stopping, setStopping] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch("/api/agent/settings")
      .then((r) => r.json())
      .then((data) => {
        setSettings(data);
        setLoading(false);
      })
      .catch(() => setLoading(false));
  }, []);

  const update = useCallback(async (fields: Record<string, unknown>) => {
    setSettings((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, ...fields } : prev));
    await fetch("/api/agent/settings", {
      method: "PATCH",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify(fields),
    });
  }, []);

  const emergencyStop = useCallback(async () => {
    setStopping(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/agent/emergency-stop", { method: "POST" });
      const data = await res.json();
      setSettings((prev) => (prev ? { ...prev, enabled: false, test_mode: false } : prev));
      setRunResult(`Stopped — ${data.drafts_discarded} draft(s) discarded, ${data.blasts_expired} blast(s) expired`);
    } catch {
      setRunResult("Emergency stop failed");
    }
    setStopping(false);
  }, []);

  const setMode = useCallback(
    async (mode: AgentMode) => {
      setRunResult(null);
      switch (mode) {
        case "off":
          await emergencyStop();
          break;
        case "test":
          await update({ enabled: true, test_mode: true });
          break;
        case "live":
          await update({ enabled: true, test_mode: false });
          break;
      }
    },
    [update, emergencyStop]
  );

  if (loading || !settings) {
    return (
      <Card>
        <CardContent className="p-6">
          <div className="animate-pulse h-8 bg-muted rounded w-32" />
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  const mode = deriveMode(settings);

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardContent className="p-6 space-y-5">
        {/* Mode selector + action buttons */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="inline-flex rounded-lg border bg-muted p-1 gap-1">
            <button
              onClick={() => setMode("off")}
              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all cursor-pointer ${
                mode === "off"
                  ? "bg-background text-foreground shadow-sm"
                  : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
              }`}
            >
              <Power className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Off
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setMode("test")}
              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all cursor-pointer ${
                mode === "test"
                  ? "bg-amber-500 text-white shadow-sm"
                  : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
              }`}
            >
              <FlaskConical className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Test
            </button>
            <button
              onClick={() => setMode("live")}
              className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-all cursor-pointer ${
                mode === "live"
                  ? "bg-emerald-600 text-white shadow-sm"
                  : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
              }`}
            >
              <Zap className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Live
            </button>
          </div>

          {mode !== "off" && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              {runResult && (
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">{runResult}</span>
              )}
              <Button
                size="sm"
                variant="outline"
                onClick={onRun}
                disabled={running || stopping}
              >
                {running ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-1.5" />
                ) : (
                  <Play className="h-4 w-4 mr-1.5" />
                )}
                {running ? "Running..." : "Run"}
              </Button>
              <Button
                size="sm"
                onClick={emergencyStop}
                disabled={stopping}
                className="bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 border-0"
              >
                {stopping ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin mr-1.5" />
                ) : (
                  <OctagonX className="h-4 w-4 mr-1.5" />
                )}
                Stop
              </Button>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Mode description */}
        {mode === "off" && (
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Agent is off. Emails sync but are not processed automatically.
          </p>
        )}

        {mode === "test" && (
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2.5 rounded-lg border border-amber-500/40 bg-amber-500/5 px-4 py-3">
            <FlaskConical className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-500 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400">
                Sandbox Mode
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">
                The agent processes real inbound emails — syncs, classifies, extracts loads, generates rate quotes, scores carriers — but <strong>sends nothing</strong>. No emails go out, no TTMS orders are created. All would-be outbound actions are saved as test drafts and deleted when you leave test mode.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {mode === "live" && (
          <div className="flex items-start gap-2.5 rounded-lg border border-emerald-500/40 bg-emerald-500/5 px-4 py-3">
            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-emerald-500 mt-0.5 shrink-0" />
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <p className="text-sm font-medium text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400">
                Live Mode
              </p>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">
                The agent is fully active. Negotiation replies send instantly. All other outbound emails are {settings.draft_mode ? "queued as drafts for your review" : "sent automatically"}.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Live mode sub-settings */}
        {mode === "live" && (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-6 pt-1">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Switch
                id="draft-mode"
                checked={settings.draft_mode}
                onCheckedChange={(v) => update({ draft_mode: v })}
              />
              <Label htmlFor="draft-mode" className="text-sm">
                Draft Mode
              </Label>
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Switch
                id="auto-book"
                checked={settings.auto_book_enabled}
                onCheckedChange={(v) => update({ auto_book_enabled: v })}
              />
              <Label htmlFor="auto-book" className="text-sm">
                Auto-Book
              </Label>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Numeric settings — visible for test + live */}
        {mode !== "off" && (
          <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 pt-1">
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <Label className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Max Carriers</Label>
              <Input
                type="number"
                min={1}
                max={10}
                value={settings.max_carrier_blast}
                onChange={(e) => update({ max_carrier_blast: parseInt(e.target.value) || 3 })}
                className="h-8"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <Label className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Max Rounds</Label>
              <Input
                type="number"
                min={1}
                max={10}
                value={settings.max_negotiation_rounds}
                onChange={(e) => update({ max_negotiation_rounds: parseInt(e.target.value) || 3 })}
                className="h-8"
              />
            </div>
            <div className="space-y-1">
              <Label className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Ceiling %</Label>
              <Input
                type="number"
                min={1}
                max={50}
                step={0.5}
                value={settings.rate_ceiling_pct}
                onChange={(e) => update({ rate_ceiling_pct: parseFloat(e.target.value) || 15 })}
                className="h-8"
              />
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Live Console — only visible when running or has events */}
        {(running || events.length > 0) && (
          <div className="pt-2 -mx-6 -mb-6">
            <LiveConsole
              events={events}
              running={running}
              onClear={onClearEvents || (() => {})}
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/agent/drafts-sidebar.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { ScrollArea } from "@/components/ui/scroll-area";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import { Send, Trash2, Pencil, Loader2, Zap, MessageSquare, FileText, Truck, Megaphone, FlaskConical } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

interface Draft {
  id: string;
  draft_type: string;
  to_address: string;
  to_name: string | null;
  subject: string;
  body_text: string;
  body_html: string;
  load_id: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  status: string;
  is_test: boolean;
}

const TYPE_CONFIG: Record<string, {
  label: string;
  icon: typeof Zap;
  badge: string;
  border: string;
  bg: string;
  glow: string;
  accent: string;
}> = {
  carrier_blast: {
    label: "Blast",
    icon: Megaphone,
    badge: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-200",
    border: "border-amber-200",
    bg: "bg-gradient-to-br from-amber-50/80 to-orange-50/40",
    glow: "hover:shadow-amber-200/30",
    accent: "text-amber-600",
  },
  negotiation_reply: {
    label: "Negotiate",
    icon: MessageSquare,
    badge: "bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 border-violet-200",
    border: "border-violet-200",
    bg: "bg-gradient-to-br from-violet-50/80 to-purple-50/40",
    glow: "hover:shadow-violet-200/30",
    accent: "text-violet-600",
  },
  shipper_confirmation: {
    label: "Load",
    icon: Truck,
    badge: "bg-sky-100 text-sky-700 border-sky-200",
    border: "border-sky-200",
    bg: "bg-gradient-to-br from-sky-50/80 to-blue-50/40",
    glow: "hover:shadow-sky-200/30",
    accent: "text-sky-600",
  },
  booking_confirmation: {
    label: "Booked",
    icon: Zap,
    badge: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-200",
    border: "border-emerald-200",
    bg: "bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-50/80 to-teal-50/40",
    glow: "hover:shadow-emerald-200/30",
    accent: "text-emerald-600",
  },
  tender_quote: {
    label: "Quote",
    icon: FileText,
    badge: "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 border-rose-200",
    border: "border-rose-200",
    bg: "bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-50/80 to-pink-50/40",
    glow: "hover:shadow-rose-200/30",
    accent: "text-rose-600",
  },
};

const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  label: "Draft",
  icon: FileText,
  badge: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-200",
  border: "border-gray-200",
  bg: "bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50/80 to-slate-50/40",
  glow: "hover:shadow-gray-200/30",
  accent: "text-gray-500",
};

function timeAgo(dateStr: string): string {
  const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();
  const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
  if (mins < 1) return "just now";
  if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
  const hours = Math.floor(mins / 60);
  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
  return `${Math.floor(hours / 24)}d ago`;
}

export function DraftsSidebar() {
  const [drafts, setDrafts] = useState<Draft[]>([]);
  const [editDraft, setEditDraft] = useState<Draft | null>(null);
  const [editText, setEditText] = useState("");
  const [sending, setSending] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [sendingAll, setSendingAll] = useState(false);

  const fetchDrafts = useCallback(async () => {
    const res = await fetch("/api/agent/drafts");
    if (res.ok) {
      const data = await res.json();
      setDrafts(data);
    }
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchDrafts();

    const supabase = createClient();
    const channel = supabase
      .channel("agent-drafts-sidebar")
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "*", schema: "public", table: "agent_drafts" },
        () => fetchDrafts()
      )
      .subscribe();

    return () => {
      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
    };
  }, [fetchDrafts]);

  const sendOne = useCallback(async (id: string) => {
    setSending(id);
    await fetch(`/api/agent/drafts/${id}/send`, { method: "POST" });
    setDrafts((prev) => prev.filter((d) => d.id !== id));
    setSending(null);
  }, []);

  const discardOne = useCallback(async (id: string) => {
    await fetch(`/api/agent/drafts/${id}/discard`, { method: "POST" });
    setDrafts((prev) => prev.filter((d) => d.id !== id));
  }, []);

  const sendAll = useCallback(async () => {
    setSendingAll(true);
    const realDrafts = drafts.filter((d) => !d.is_test);
    await Promise.allSettled(
      realDrafts.map((draft) =>
        fetch(`/api/agent/drafts/${draft.id}/send`, { method: "POST" })
      )
    );
    setDrafts((prev) => prev.filter((d) => d.is_test));
    setSendingAll(false);
  }, [drafts]);

  const saveEdit = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!editDraft) return;
    const bodyHtml = editText
      .split(/\n\n+/)
      .map(
        (para) =>
          `<p style="margin:0 0 12px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#333;">${para.replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</p>`
      )
      .join("");

    const supabase = createClient();
    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
    if (!user) return;
    await supabase
      .from("agent_drafts")
      .update({ body_text: editText, body_html: bodyHtml })
      .eq("id", editDraft.id)
      .eq("user_id", user.id)
      .eq("status", "pending");

    setDrafts((prev) =>
      prev.map((d) => (d.id === editDraft.id ? { ...d, body_text: editText, body_html: bodyHtml } : d))
    );
    setEditDraft(null);
  }, [editDraft, editText]);

  return (
    <>
      <Card className="h-full">
        <CardHeader className="pb-2">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-semibold flex items-center gap-2">
              Pending Drafts
              {drafts.length > 0 && (
                <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center h-5 min-w-5 px-1.5 rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-primary text-xs font-bold tabular-nums">
                  {drafts.length}
                </span>
              )}
            </CardTitle>
            {drafts.length > 0 && drafts.some((d) => !d.is_test) && (
              <Button size="sm" variant="outline" onClick={sendAll} disabled={sendingAll} className="h-7 text-xs">
                {sendingAll ? <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" /> : <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />}
                Send All
              </Button>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="p-0">
          <ScrollArea className="h-[500px]">
            <div className="space-y-2 px-4 pb-4">
              {drafts.length === 0 && (
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-12 text-center">
                  <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
                    <FileText className="h-5 w-5 text-muted-foreground" />
                  </div>
                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                    No pending drafts
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground/60 mt-1">
                    Run the agent to generate drafts
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
              {drafts.map((draft) => {
                const config = TYPE_CONFIG[draft.draft_type] || DEFAULT_CONFIG;
                const Icon = config.icon;

                return (
                  <div
                    key={draft.id}
                    className={cn(
                      "relative border rounded-xl p-3 space-y-2 transition-all duration-200",
                      "hover:shadow-md",
                      config.glow,
                      config.border,
                      config.bg,
                      draft.is_test && "border-dashed"
                    )}
                  >
                    {/* Top row: type badge + test badge + recipient */}
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                      <Badge
                        variant="outline"
                        className={cn(
                          "text-[10px] font-semibold gap-1 px-1.5 py-0",
                          config.badge
                        )}
                      >
                        <Icon className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                        {config.label}
                      </Badge>
                      {draft.is_test && (
                        <Badge
                          variant="outline"
                          className="text-[9px] font-bold tracking-wider px-1.5 py-0 border-amber-300 text-amber-600 bg-amber-50 gap-1"
                        >
                          <FlaskConical className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                          TEST
                        </Badge>
                      )}
                      {draft.load_id && (
                        <span className="text-[10px] font-mono text-muted-foreground/70 ml-auto">
                          {draft.load_id}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>

                    {/* Recipient */}
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                      <div className={cn(
                        "w-5 h-5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-[10px] font-bold shrink-0",
                        config.badge.split(" ")[0] + " " + config.badge.split(" ")[1]
                      )}>
                        {(draft.to_name || draft.to_address).charAt(0).toUpperCase()}
                      </div>
                      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate">
                        {draft.to_name || draft.to_address}
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground/50 ml-auto shrink-0">
                        {timeAgo(draft.created_at)}
                      </span>
                    </div>

                    {/* Subject */}
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium leading-tight truncate">{draft.subject}</p>

                    {/* Preview */}
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground/80 line-clamp-2 leading-relaxed">
                      {draft.body_text.slice(0, 140)}
                    </p>

                    {/* Actions */}
                    <div className="flex gap-1 pt-0.5">
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        variant="ghost"
                        className="h-7 text-xs rounded-lg"
                        onClick={() => {
                          setEditDraft(draft);
                          setEditText(draft.body_text);
                        }}
                      >
                        <Pencil className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                        Edit
                      </Button>
                      {!draft.is_test && (
                        <Button
                          size="sm"
                          variant="ghost"
                          className={cn("h-7 text-xs rounded-lg", config.accent)}
                          onClick={() => sendOne(draft.id)}
                          disabled={sending === draft.id}
                        >
                          {sending === draft.id ? (
                            <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin mr-1" />
                          ) : (
                            <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                          )}
                          Send
                        </Button>
                      )}
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        variant="ghost"
                        className="h-7 text-xs text-red-400 hover:text-red-500 rounded-lg ml-auto"
                        onClick={() => discardOne(draft.id)}
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3" />
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </ScrollArea>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Edit Dialog */}
      <Dialog open={!!editDraft} onOpenChange={(open) => !open && setEditDraft(null)}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-lg">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              Edit Draft
              {editDraft && (
                <Badge
                  variant="outline"
                  className={cn(
                    "text-[10px] font-semibold gap-1 px-1.5",
                    (TYPE_CONFIG[editDraft.draft_type] || DEFAULT_CONFIG).badge
                  )}
                >
                  {(() => {
                    const Icon = (TYPE_CONFIG[editDraft.draft_type] || DEFAULT_CONFIG).icon;
                    return <Icon className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />;
                  })()}
                  {(TYPE_CONFIG[editDraft.draft_type] || DEFAULT_CONFIG).label}
                </Badge>
              )}
            </DialogTitle>
          </DialogHeader>
          <div className="space-y-3">
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              To: {editDraft?.to_name || editDraft?.to_address}
            </p>
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">{editDraft?.subject}</p>
            <Textarea
              value={editText}
              onChange={(e) => setEditText(e.target.value)}
              rows={12}
              className="text-sm"
            />
            <div className="flex justify-end gap-2">
              <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setEditDraft(null)}>
                Cancel
              </Button>
              <Button onClick={saveEdit}>Save</Button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/agent/live-console.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useRef, useEffect } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Terminal, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";

export interface ConsoleEvent {
  id: number;
  phase: string;
  type: "start" | "info" | "success" | "warn" | "error" | "done";
  message: string;
  timestamp: Date;
  durationMs?: number;
}

const PHASE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  init: "text-violet-600",
  sync: "text-blue-600",
  classify: "text-cyan-600",
  process: "text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200",
  extract: "text-indigo-600",
  quote: "text-pink-600",
  negotiate: "text-purple-600",
  order: "text-teal-600",
  blast: "text-orange-600",
  draft: "text-sky-600",
  sweep: "text-amber-600",
  cleanup: "text-gray-500",
  done: "text-emerald-600",
  summary: "text-emerald-600",
  error: "text-red-600",
};

const TYPE_ICONS: Record<string, string> = {
  start: "\u25B6",
  info: "\u00B7",
  success: "\u2713",
  warn: "\u26A0",
  error: "\u2717",
  done: "\u2605",
};

const TYPE_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  start: "text-amber-500",
  info: "text-gray-400",
  success: "text-emerald-500",
  warn: "text-amber-500",
  error: "text-red-500",
  done: "text-emerald-500",
};

function formatTime(d: Date): string {
  return d.toLocaleTimeString("en-US", { hour12: false, hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit", second: "2-digit" });
}

interface LiveConsoleProps {
  events: ConsoleEvent[];
  running: boolean;
  onClear: () => void;
}

export function LiveConsole({ events, running, onClear }: LiveConsoleProps) {
  const scrollRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (scrollRef.current) {
      scrollRef.current.scrollTop = scrollRef.current.scrollHeight;
    }
  }, [events]);

  return (
    <div className="border-t">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2">
        <div className="text-xs font-mono flex items-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground">
          <Terminal className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-emerald-600" />
          Live Console
          {running && (
            <span className="relative flex h-2 w-2">
              <span className="animate-ping absolute inline-flex h-full w-full rounded-full bg-emerald-400 opacity-75" />
              <span className="relative inline-flex rounded-full h-2 w-2 bg-emerald-500" />
            </span>
          )}
        </div>
        {events.length > 0 && !running && (
          <Button
            size="sm"
            variant="ghost"
            onClick={onClear}
            className="h-6 text-[11px] px-2"
          >
            <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
            Clear
          </Button>
        )}
      </div>
      <div
        ref={scrollRef}
        className="h-[360px] overflow-y-auto font-mono text-[13px] leading-relaxed px-4 pb-4 space-y-0.5 bg-gray-50/50 dark:bg-gray-950/30 rounded-b-xl"
      >
        {events.map((evt) => (
          <div
            key={evt.id}
            className={cn(
              "flex gap-2 animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-1 duration-200",
              evt.type === "done" && "mt-2 pt-2 border-t"
            )}
          >
            <span className="text-gray-400 shrink-0 select-none">
              {formatTime(evt.timestamp)}
            </span>
            <span className={cn("shrink-0 w-3 text-center select-none", TYPE_COLORS[evt.type])}>
              {TYPE_ICONS[evt.type] || "\u00B7"}
            </span>
            <span className={cn("shrink-0 select-none font-medium", PHASE_COLORS[evt.phase] || "text-gray-500")}>
              [{evt.phase}]
            </span>
            <span
              className={cn(
                evt.type === "error" ? "text-red-600" :
                evt.type === "success" ? "text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400" :
                evt.type === "done" ? "text-emerald-700 dark:text-emerald-400 font-semibold" :
                evt.type === "warn" ? "text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400" :
                "text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-300"
              )}
            >
              {evt.message}
            </span>
          </div>
        ))}
        {running && (
          <div className="flex gap-2 items-center animate-pulse">
            <span className="text-gray-400 shrink-0">{formatTime(new Date())}</span>
            <span className="text-emerald-500">&#9613;</span>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/analytics/category-breakdown.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { PieChart, Pie, Cell, Sector, ResponsiveContainer } from "recharts";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";

interface CategoryBreakdownProps {
  importantCount: number;
  unimportantCount: number;
  ignoreCount: number;
  shipperCount?: number;
  unclassifiedCount: number;
}

const CATEGORIES = [
  { key: "important", label: "Important", color: "#f43f5e", soft: "bg-rose-50 text-rose-600" },
  { key: "shipper", label: "Shipper", color: "#10b981", soft: "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600" },
  { key: "unimportant", label: "Unimportant", color: "#f59e0b", soft: "bg-amber-50 text-amber-600" },
  { key: "ignore", label: "Ignore", color: "#94a3b8", soft: "bg-slate-50 text-slate-500" },
  { key: "unclassified", label: "Pending", color: "#6366f1", soft: "bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-600" },
];

export function CategoryBreakdown({
  importantCount,
  unimportantCount,
  ignoreCount,
  shipperCount = 0,
  unclassifiedCount,
}: CategoryBreakdownProps) {
  const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(-1);

  const raw = [
    { ...CATEGORIES[0], value: importantCount },
    { ...CATEGORIES[1], value: shipperCount },
    { ...CATEGORIES[2], value: unimportantCount },
    { ...CATEGORIES[3], value: ignoreCount },
    { ...CATEGORIES[4], value: unclassifiedCount },
  ].filter((d) => d.value > 0);

  const total = raw.reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0);

  // Custom shape that expands + glows on hover
  const renderShape = useCallback((props: any) => {
    const isActive = props.index === hovered;
    return (
      <Sector
        {...props}
        innerRadius={isActive ? props.innerRadius - 3 : props.innerRadius}
        outerRadius={isActive ? props.outerRadius + 8 : props.outerRadius}
        cornerRadius={5}
        style={isActive ? { filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))", transition: "all 0.2s" } : { transition: "all 0.2s" }}
      />
    );
  }, [hovered]);

  const hoveredItem = hovered >= 0 ? raw[hovered] : null;

  return (
    <Card className="h-full">
      <CardHeader className="pb-1">
        <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Category Breakdown</CardTitle>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Email distribution by AI classification</p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {total === 0 ? (
          <div className="h-[260px] flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            No data available
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-2">
            {/* Donut */}
            <div className="relative">
              <ResponsiveContainer width={200} height={200}>
                <PieChart>
                  <Pie
                    data={raw}
                    cx="50%"
                    cy="50%"
                    innerRadius={56}
                    outerRadius={82}
                    paddingAngle={3}
                    dataKey="value"
                    startAngle={90}
                    endAngle={-270}
                    stroke="none"
                    shape={renderShape}
                    onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(-1)}
                  >
                    {raw.map((entry, index) => (
                      <Cell
                        key={index}
                        fill={entry.color}
                        opacity={hovered >= 0 && hovered !== index ? 0.35 : 0.9}
                        onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(index)}
                        style={{ cursor: "pointer", transition: "opacity 0.2s" }}
                      />
                    ))}
                  </Pie>
                </PieChart>
              </ResponsiveContainer>
              {/* Center label */}
              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
                <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
                  {hoveredItem ? (
                    <>
                      <span className="text-2xl font-bold leading-none" style={{ color: hoveredItem.color }}>
                        {hoveredItem.value}
                      </span>
                      <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">{hoveredItem.label}</span>
                      <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">
                        {Math.round((hoveredItem.value / total) * 100)}%
                      </span>
                    </>
                  ) : (
                    <>
                      <span className="text-2xl font-bold leading-none">{total}</span>
                      <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-1">emails</span>
                    </>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Legend */}
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-full">
              {raw.map((item, i) => {
                const pct = Math.round((item.value / total) * 100);
                const isActive = hovered === i;
                return (
                  <div
                    key={item.label}
                    className={`flex items-center justify-between px-2.5 py-2 rounded-xl transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
                      ${isActive ? `${item.soft} shadow-sm scale-[1.03]` : "hover:bg-muted/40"}`}
                    onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(i)}
                    onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(-1)}
                  >
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
                      <div
                        className="h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm"
                        style={{ backgroundColor: item.color }}
                      />
                      <span className="text-[11px] truncate">{item.label}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 ml-1">
                      <span className="text-[11px] font-bold tabular-nums">{item.value}</span>
                      <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">{pct}%</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/analytics/emails-per-day-chart.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import {
  AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, Legend,
} from "recharts";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";

interface EmailsPerDayChartProps {
  data: { date: string; imp: number; unimp: number; ignore: number; shipper: number }[];
  days?: number;
}

function formatDate(dateStr: string, days: number) {
  const d = new Date(dateStr + "T12:00:00");
  if (days <= 7) return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short" });
  if (days <= 30) return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

// Show every Nth tick so it doesn't crowd
function getTickInterval(days: number) {
  if (days <= 7) return 0;
  if (days <= 30) return 3;
  return 6;
}

const CustomTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }: any) => {
  if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
  const d = new Date(label + "T12:00:00");
  const formatted = d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" });
  const total = payload.reduce((s: number, p: any) => s + (p.value ?? 0), 0);
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-border rounded-lg shadow-md p-3 text-xs min-w-[140px]">
      <p className="font-medium text-foreground mb-2">{formatted}</p>
      {payload.map((p: any) => (
        <div key={p.name} className="flex justify-between gap-4 mb-1">
          <span style={{ color: p.color }}>{p.name}</span>
          <span className="font-medium">{p.value}</span>
        </div>
      ))}
      <div className="border-t border-border mt-2 pt-1 flex justify-between">
        <span className="text-muted-foreground">Total</span>
        <span className="font-semibold">{total}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export function EmailsPerDayChart({ data, days = 30 }: EmailsPerDayChartProps) {
  const formatted = data.map((d) => ({
    ...d,
    label: formatDate(d.date, days),
  }));

  const hasData = data.some((d) => d.imp + d.unimp + d.ignore + d.shipper > 0);

  return (
    <Card className="h-full">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Email Volume</CardTitle>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Daily inbox activity by category</p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {!hasData ? (
          <div className="h-[260px] flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            No data for this period
          </div>
        ) : (
          <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={260}>
            <AreaChart data={formatted} margin={{ top: 4, right: 4, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
              <defs>
                <linearGradient id="colorImp" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#ef4444" stopOpacity={0.15} />
                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#ef4444" stopOpacity={0} />
                </linearGradient>
                <linearGradient id="colorShipper" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#10b981" stopOpacity={0.15} />
                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#10b981" stopOpacity={0} />
                </linearGradient>
                <linearGradient id="colorUnimp" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                  <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#f59e0b" stopOpacity={0.1} />
                  <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#f59e0b" stopOpacity={0} />
                </linearGradient>
              </defs>
              <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="hsl(var(--border))" vertical={false} />
              <XAxis
                dataKey="label"
                tick={{ fontSize: 10, fill: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" }}
                tickLine={false}
                axisLine={false}
                interval={getTickInterval(days)}
              />
              <YAxis
                tick={{ fontSize: 10, fill: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" }}
                tickLine={false}
                axisLine={false}
                allowDecimals={false}
              />
              <Tooltip content={<CustomTooltip />} />
              <Legend
                wrapperStyle={{ fontSize: 11, paddingTop: 8 }}
                iconType="circle"
                iconSize={7}
              />
              <Area
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="imp"
                name="Important"
                stroke="#ef4444"
                strokeWidth={2}
                fill="url(#colorImp)"
                dot={false}
                activeDot={{ r: 3, strokeWidth: 0 }}
              />
              <Area
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="shipper"
                name="Shipper"
                stroke="#10b981"
                strokeWidth={2}
                fill="url(#colorShipper)"
                dot={false}
                activeDot={{ r: 3, strokeWidth: 0 }}
              />
              <Area
                type="monotone"
                dataKey="unimp"
                name="Unimportant"
                stroke="#f59e0b"
                strokeWidth={1.5}
                fill="url(#colorUnimp)"
                dot={false}
                activeDot={{ r: 3, strokeWidth: 0 }}
                strokeDasharray="4 2"
              />
            </AreaChart>
          </ResponsiveContainer>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/analytics/llm-cost-chart.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import {
  BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer,
} from "recharts";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";

interface LlmCostChartProps {
  costPerDay: { date: string; cost: number }[];
  byPurpose: { purpose: string; calls: number; cost: number; tokens: number }[];
  byModel: { model: string; calls: number; cost: number; tokens: number }[];
  days: number;
}

function formatDate(dateStr: string, days: number) {
  const d = new Date(dateStr + "T12:00:00");
  if (days <= 7) return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short" });
  if (days <= 30) return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

function getTickInterval(days: number) {
  if (days <= 7) return 0;
  if (days <= 30) return 3;
  return 6;
}

function formatCost(val: number) {
  if (val >= 1) return `$${val.toFixed(2)}`;
  if (val >= 0.01) return `$${val.toFixed(3)}`;
  return `$${val.toFixed(4)}`;
}

function shortModel(model: string) {
  // e.g. "google/gemini-3-flash-preview" → "gemini-3-flash"
  const parts = model.split("/");
  const name = parts[parts.length - 1];
  return name.replace(/-preview$/, "").replace(/-lite$/, "-lite");
}

function formatPurpose(purpose: string) {
  return purpose
    .replace(/_/g, " ")
    .replace(/-/g, " ")
    .replace(/\b\w/g, (c) => c.toUpperCase());
}

const CostTooltip = ({ active, payload }: any) => {
  if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
  const rawDate = payload[0]?.payload?.date;
  const d = rawDate ? new Date(rawDate + "T12:00:00") : null;
  const formatted = d && !isNaN(d.getTime())
    ? d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" })
    : payload[0]?.payload?.label ?? "";
  const cost = payload[0]?.value ?? 0;
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-border rounded-lg shadow-md p-3 text-xs">
      <p className="font-medium text-foreground mb-1">{formatted}</p>
      <div className="flex justify-between gap-4">
        <span className="text-violet-600">Cost</span>
        <span className="font-medium">{formatCost(cost)}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

const PURPOSE_COLORS = [
  "bg-violet-100 text-violet-700",
  "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700",
  "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  "bg-rose-100 text-rose-700",
  "bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700",
  "bg-pink-100 text-pink-700",
  "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700",
];

export function LlmCostChart({ costPerDay, byPurpose, byModel, days }: LlmCostChartProps) {
  const formatted = costPerDay.map((d) => ({
    ...d,
    label: formatDate(d.date, days),
  }));

  const hasData = costPerDay.some((d) => d.cost > 0);

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
      {/* Cost per day chart */}
      <Card className="lg:col-span-2">
        <CardHeader className="pb-2">
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Daily AI Spend</CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">LLM API cost per day</p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {!hasData ? (
            <div className="h-[260px] flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              No LLM usage data for this period
            </div>
          ) : (
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={260}>
              <BarChart data={formatted} margin={{ top: 4, right: 4, left: -10, bottom: 0 }}>
                <defs>
                  <linearGradient id="colorLlm" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                    <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#8b5cf6" stopOpacity={0.8} />
                    <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#8b5cf6" stopOpacity={0.3} />
                  </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="hsl(var(--border))" vertical={false} />
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="label"
                  tick={{ fontSize: 10, fill: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" }}
                  tickLine={false}
                  axisLine={false}
                  interval={getTickInterval(days)}
                />
                <YAxis
                  tick={{ fontSize: 10, fill: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" }}
                  tickLine={false}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickFormatter={(v) => `$${v}`}
                />
                <Tooltip content={<CostTooltip />} />
                <Bar
                  dataKey="cost"
                  fill="url(#colorLlm)"
                  radius={[3, 3, 0, 0]}
                  maxBarSize={40}
                />
              </BarChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Breakdown tables */}
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {/* By Purpose */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-2">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">By Purpose</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-1.5">
            {byPurpose.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">No data</p>
            ) : (
              byPurpose.slice(0, 8).map((p, i) => (
                <div key={p.purpose} className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
                    <span className={`px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded text-[10px] font-medium ${PURPOSE_COLORS[i % PURPOSE_COLORS.length]}`}>
                      {p.calls}
                    </span>
                    <span className="truncate text-muted-foreground">{formatPurpose(p.purpose)}</span>
                  </div>
                  <span className="font-mono font-medium ml-2 shrink-0">{formatCost(p.cost)}</span>
                </div>
              ))
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        {/* By Model */}
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-2">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">By Model</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-1.5">
            {byModel.length === 0 ? (
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">No data</p>
            ) : (
              byModel.map((m) => {
                const totalCost = byModel.reduce((s, r) => s + r.cost, 0);
                const pct = totalCost > 0 ? Math.round((m.cost / totalCost) * 100) : 0;
                return (
                  <div key={m.model} className="space-y-1">
                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
                      <span className="truncate text-muted-foreground">{shortModel(m.model)}</span>
                      <span className="font-mono font-medium ml-2 shrink-0">{formatCost(m.cost)}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div className="h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                      <div
                        className="h-full bg-violet-500 rounded-full"
                        style={{ width: `${pct}%` }}
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex justify-between text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                      <span>{m.calls} calls</span>
                      <span>{(m.tokens / 1000).toFixed(1)}k tokens</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/analytics/negotiation-funnel.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";

interface NegotiationData {
  total: number;
  open: number;
  negotiating: number;
  accepted: number;
  rejected: number;
  closed: number;
  winRate: number;
  avgRounds: number;
  bestRate: number | null;
  avgRate: number | null;
}

interface FunnelStep {
  label: string;
  sub: string;
  value: number;
  color: string;
  bg: string;
  pct: number;
}

export function NegotiationFunnel({ data }: { data: NegotiationData }) {
  const total = data.total || 1; // avoid div by zero

  const steps: FunnelStep[] = [
    {
      label: "Carrier Contacted",
      sub: "AI sent negotiation email",
      value: data.total,
      color: "text-violet-700",
      bg: "bg-violet-500",
      pct: 100,
    },
    {
      label: "Under Negotiation",
      sub: "Active back-and-forth",
      value: data.negotiating,
      color: "text-amber-700",
      bg: "bg-amber-500",
      pct: Math.round((data.negotiating / total) * 100),
    },
    {
      label: "Booked",
      sub: "Carrier accepted the rate",
      value: data.accepted,
      color: "text-emerald-700",
      bg: "bg-emerald-500",
      pct: Math.round((data.accepted / total) * 100),
    },
  ];

  const hasData = data.total > 0;

  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Negotiation Funnel</CardTitle>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">How AI negotiations convert to bookings</p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {!hasData ? (
          <div className="h-40 flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            No negotiations in this period
          </div>
        ) : (
          <div className="space-y-3">
            {steps.map((step, i) => (
              <div key={step.label}>
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  <div>
                    <span className={`text-xs font-semibold ${step.color}`}>{step.label}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-1.5">· {step.sub}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span className="text-xs font-bold tabular-nums">{step.value}</span>
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground w-8 text-right">{step.pct}%</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div className="h-2 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div
                    className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-700 ${step.bg}`}
                    style={{ width: `${step.pct}%` }}
                  />
                </div>
                {i < steps.length - 1 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-end mt-1 pr-1">
                    <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                      {steps[i + 1].pct}% converted →
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            ))}

            {/* Stats row */}
            <div className="mt-4 pt-3 border-t border-border grid grid-cols-3 gap-2">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-lg font-bold text-emerald-600">{data.winRate}%</p>
                <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Win Rate</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center border-x border-border">
                <p className="text-lg font-bold">{data.avgRounds}</p>
                <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Avg Rounds</p>
              </div>
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-lg font-bold text-blue-600">
                  {data.avgRate != null ? `$${data.avgRate.toLocaleString()}` : "—"}
                </p>
                <p className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Avg Won Rate</p>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Rejected / Closed */}
            <div className="flex gap-4 pt-1">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <div className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-red-400" />
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Rejected: <strong>{data.rejected}</strong></span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <div className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-slate-400" />
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Closed: <strong>{data.closed}</strong></span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                <div className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-violet-300" />
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Open: <strong>{data.open}</strong></span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/analytics/stats-cards.tsx

import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Mail, AlertCircle, BarChart3, Eye } from "lucide-react";
import type { AnalyticsData } from "@/types/email";

export function StatsCards({ data }: { data: AnalyticsData }) {
  const cards = [
    {
      title: "Total Emails",
      value: data.totalEmails,
      icon: Mail,
      description: `Last 30 days`,
    },
    {
      title: "Important",
      value: data.importantCount,
      icon: AlertCircle,
      description: `${data.totalEmails > 0 ? Math.round((data.importantCount / data.totalEmails) * 100) : 0}% of total`,
    },
    {
      title: "Avg Per Day",
      value:
        data.emailsPerDay.length > 0
          ? Math.round(data.totalEmails / data.emailsPerDay.length)
          : 0,
      icon: BarChart3,
      description: "Emails received daily",
    },
    {
      title: "Unread Important",
      value: data.unreadImportant,
      icon: Eye,
      description: "Need your attention",
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
      {cards.map((card) => {
        const Icon = card.icon;
        return (
          <Card key={card.title}>
            <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2">
              <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">
                {card.title}
              </CardTitle>
              <Icon className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="text-2xl font-bold">{card.value}</div>
              <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                {card.description}
              </p>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        );
      })}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/analytics/top-senders-table.tsx

import {
  Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead,
  TableHeader, TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { CategoryBadge } from "@/components/inbox/category-badge";
import type { EmailCategory } from "@/types/database";

interface TopSendersTableProps {
  senders: {
    address: string;
    name: string | null;
    count: number;
    topCategory: string;
  }[];
}

export function TopSendersTable({ senders }: TopSendersTableProps) {
  const maxCount = senders[0]?.count ?? 1;

  return (
    <Card className="h-full">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Top Senders</CardTitle>
        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Most active email senders this period</p>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent>
        {senders.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="py-10 text-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">No data available</div>
        ) : (
          <Table>
            <TableHeader>
              <TableRow className="hover:bg-transparent">
                <TableHead className="text-xs">Sender</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="text-xs text-right">Emails</TableHead>
                <TableHead className="text-xs text-right">Category</TableHead>
              </TableRow>
            </TableHeader>
            <TableBody>
              {senders.map((sender) => {
                const barPct = Math.round((sender.count / maxCount) * 100);
                return (
                  <TableRow key={sender.address} className="hover:bg-muted/40 group">
                    <TableCell className="py-2">
                      <div>
                        <div className="font-medium text-xs truncate max-w-[180px]">
                          {sender.name || sender.address}
                        </div>
                        {sender.name && (
                          <div className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground truncate max-w-[180px]">
                            {sender.address}
                          </div>
                        )}
                        <div className="mt-1 h-1 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden w-28">
                          <div
                            className="h-full bg-primary/30 group-hover:bg-primary/50 transition-colors rounded-full"
                            style={{ width: `${barPct}%` }}
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="text-right font-semibold text-xs py-2">
                      {sender.count}
                    </TableCell>
                    <TableCell className="text-right py-2">
                      <CategoryBadge category={sender.topCategory as EmailCategory} />
                    </TableCell>
                  </TableRow>
                );
              })}
            </TableBody>
          </Table>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/analytics/vapi-chart.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import {
  AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid,
  Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer,
  PieChart, Pie, Cell, Sector,
} from "recharts";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";

interface VapiIntent {
  total: number;
  quoting: number;
  negotiating: number;
  booking: number;
  transfer: number;
  inquiring: number;
  unknown: number;
}

interface VapiChartProps {
  perDay: { date: string; count: number }[];
  intentData: VapiIntent;
}

const INTENT_CONFIG = [
  { key: "quoting", label: "Quoting", color: "#3b82f6", soft: "bg-blue-50 text-blue-600" },
  { key: "negotiating", label: "Negotiating", color: "#f59e0b", soft: "bg-amber-50 text-amber-600" },
  { key: "booking", label: "Booked", color: "#10b981", soft: "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600" },
  { key: "inquiring", label: "Inquiring", color: "#8b5cf6", soft: "bg-violet-50 text-violet-600" },
  { key: "transfer", label: "Transfer", color: "#64748b", soft: "bg-slate-50 text-slate-500" },
  { key: "unknown", label: "Other", color: "#cbd5e1", soft: "bg-gray-50 text-gray-500" },
];

const LineTooltip = ({ active, payload, label }: any) => {
  if (!active || !payload?.length) return null;
  const d = new Date(label + "T12:00:00");
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-border rounded-xl shadow-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs">
      <p className="font-medium mb-1">
        {d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" })}
      </p>
      <div className="flex justify-between gap-4">
        <span className="text-purple-600">Calls</span>
        <span className="font-semibold">{payload[0]?.value ?? 0}</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

export function VapiChart({ perDay, intentData }: VapiChartProps) {
  const [hovered, setHovered] = useState(-1);

  const pieData = INTENT_CONFIG
    .map((c) => ({ name: c.label, value: intentData[c.key as keyof VapiIntent] as number, color: c.color, soft: c.soft }))
    .filter((d) => d.value > 0);

  const hasCallData = perDay.some((d) => d.count > 0);
  const hasPieData = pieData.length > 0;
  const pieTotal = pieData.reduce((s, d) => s + d.value, 0);

  const renderShape = useCallback((props: any) => {
    const isActive = props.index === hovered;
    return (
      <Sector
        {...props}
        innerRadius={isActive ? props.innerRadius - 3 : props.innerRadius}
        outerRadius={isActive ? props.outerRadius + 7 : props.outerRadius}
        cornerRadius={5}
        style={isActive ? { filter: "drop-shadow(0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.18))", transition: "all 0.2s" } : { transition: "all 0.2s" }}
      />
    );
  }, [hovered]);

  const hoveredItem = hovered >= 0 ? pieData[hovered] : null;

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
      {/* Calls per day */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader className="pb-2">
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Calls Per Day</CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Daily VAPI call volume</p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {!hasCallData ? (
            <div className="h-[220px] flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              No calls in this period
            </div>
          ) : (
            <ResponsiveContainer width="100%" height={220}>
              <AreaChart data={perDay} margin={{ top: 4, right: 4, left: -20, bottom: 0 }}>
                <defs>
                  <linearGradient id="colorCalls" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                    <stop offset="5%" stopColor="#8b5cf6" stopOpacity={0.2} />
                    <stop offset="95%" stopColor="#8b5cf6" stopOpacity={0} />
                  </linearGradient>
                </defs>
                <CartesianGrid strokeDasharray="3 3" stroke="hsl(var(--border))" vertical={false} />
                <XAxis
                  dataKey="date"
                  tick={{ fontSize: 10, fill: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" }}
                  tickLine={false}
                  axisLine={false}
                  tickFormatter={(d) => new Date(d + "T12:00:00").toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" })}
                  interval="preserveStartEnd"
                />
                <YAxis
                  tick={{ fontSize: 10, fill: "hsl(var(--muted-foreground))" }}
                  tickLine={false}
                  axisLine={false}
                  allowDecimals={false}
                />
                <Tooltip content={<LineTooltip />} />
                <Area
                  type="monotone"
                  dataKey="count"
                  name="Calls"
                  stroke="#8b5cf6"
                  strokeWidth={2}
                  fill="url(#colorCalls)"
                  dot={false}
                  activeDot={{ r: 3, strokeWidth: 0 }}
                />
              </AreaChart>
            </ResponsiveContainer>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      {/* Intent breakdown donut */}
      <Card>
        <CardHeader className="pb-1">
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Call Intent Breakdown</CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">What carriers were calling about</p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          {!hasPieData ? (
            <div className="h-[220px] flex items-center justify-center text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              No intent data available
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
              {/* Donut */}
              <div className="relative flex-shrink-0">
                <ResponsiveContainer width={170} height={170}>
                  <PieChart>
                    <Pie
                      data={pieData}
                      cx="50%"
                      cy="50%"
                      innerRadius={48}
                      outerRadius={72}
                      paddingAngle={3}
                      dataKey="value"
                      startAngle={90}
                      endAngle={-270}
                      stroke="none"
                      shape={renderShape}
                      onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(-1)}
                    >
                      {pieData.map((entry, index) => (
                        <Cell
                          key={index}
                          fill={entry.color}
                          opacity={hovered >= 0 && hovered !== index ? 0.35 : 0.85}
                          onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(index)}
                          style={{ cursor: "pointer", transition: "opacity 0.2s" }}
                        />
                      ))}
                    </Pie>
                  </PieChart>
                </ResponsiveContainer>
                {/* Center label */}
                <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none">
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center">
                    {hoveredItem ? (
                      <>
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold leading-none" style={{ color: hoveredItem.color }}>
                          {hoveredItem.value}
                        </span>
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">{hoveredItem.name}</span>
                        <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">
                          {Math.round((hoveredItem.value / pieTotal) * 100)}%
                        </span>
                      </>
                    ) : (
                      <>
                        <span className="text-xl font-bold leading-none">{pieTotal}</span>
                        <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">calls</span>
                      </>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Legend */}
              <div className="flex-1 space-y-1.5 pt-1">
                {pieData.map((item, i) => {
                  const pct = pieTotal > 0 ? Math.round((item.value / pieTotal) * 100) : 0;
                  const isActive = hovered === i;
                  return (
                    <div
                      key={item.name}
                      className={`flex items-center justify-between px-2.5 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-all duration-200 cursor-pointer
                        ${isActive ? `${item.soft} shadow-sm scale-[1.03]` : "hover:bg-muted/40"}`}
                      onMouseEnter={() => setHovered(i)}
                      onMouseLeave={() => setHovered(-1)}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <div
                          className="h-2.5 w-2.5 rounded-full flex-shrink-0 shadow-sm"
                          style={{ backgroundColor: item.color }}
                        />
                        <span className="text-[11px]">{item.name}</span>
                      </div>
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <span className="text-[11px] font-bold tabular-nums">{item.value}</span>
                        <span className="text-[9px] text-muted-foreground">{pct}%</span>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
                {pieTotal > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between px-2.5 pt-2 border-t border-border/50">
                    <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground font-medium">Total</span>
                    <span className="text-[11px] font-bold">{pieTotal}</span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/auth/login-button.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Mail, Loader2 } from "lucide-react";

export function LoginButton() {
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);

  async function handleLogin() {
    setLoading(true);
    const supabase = createClient();

    const { error } = await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({
      provider: "azure",
      options: {
        scopes:
          "openid profile email offline_access Mail.Read Mail.ReadWrite Mail.Send User.Read",
        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback`,
      },
    });

    if (error) {
      console.error("Login error:", error);
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <Button
      onClick={handleLogin}
      disabled={loading}
      size="lg"
      className="gap-2 text-base px-8 py-6"
    >
      {loading ? (
        <Loader2 className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
      ) : (
        <Mail className="h-5 w-5" />
      )}
      {loading ? "Connecting..." : "Sign in with Microsoft Outlook"}
    </Button>
  );
}
