FILE: src/components/dashboard/ActiveLoadsTab.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useLoads } from "@/hooks/useLoads";
import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { Truck, RefreshCw } from "lucide-react";
import type { LoadStatus } from "@/types/index";

const statusVariant: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
  bidding: "bg-amber-50 text-amber-800",
  sourcing: "bg-blue-50 text-blue-700",
  booked: "bg-green-50 text-green-700",
  in_transit: "bg-amber-50 text-amber-700",
  delivered: "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700",
  cancelled: "bg-red-50 text-red-700",
};

export function ActiveLoadsTab() {
  const { loads, loading, error, refresh } = useLoads("pending");

  if (loading && loads.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
          <Skeleton key={i} className="h-40 w-full rounded-lg" />
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 text-center text-muted-foreground">
        <p className="text-sm">Failed to load active loads</p>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={refresh} className="mt-2 gap-2">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
          Retry
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (loads.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
        <Truck className="h-12 w-12 mb-3 opacity-40" />
        <p className="text-sm font-medium">No active loads</p>
        <p className="text-xs">Loads will appear here once created</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6">
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
        {loads.map((load) => (
          <Card key={load.id} className="p-4 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
            <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
              <div>
                <span className="font-semibold text-sm">
                  {load.load_number}
                </span>
              </div>
              <span
                className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase ${
                  statusVariant[load.status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700"
                }`}
              >
                {load.status.replace("_", " ")}
              </span>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-1.5 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1">
                <span className="font-medium text-foreground">
                  {load.origin_city || "TBD"}, {load.origin_state || ""}
                </span>
                <span className="text-muted-foreground mx-1">&rarr;</span>
                <span className="font-medium text-foreground">
                  {load.dest_city || "TBD"}, {load.dest_state || ""}
                </span>
              </div>

              {load.carrier && (
                <div>
                  Carrier: {load.carrier.name}
                  {load.carrier_rate && (
                    <span className="ml-1 text-green-600 font-medium">
                      ${load.carrier_rate.toLocaleString()}
                    </span>
                  )}
                </div>
              )}

              {load.equipment_type && <div>Equipment: {load.equipment_type}</div>}

              {load.weight_lbs && (
                <div>Weight: {load.weight_lbs.toLocaleString()} lbs</div>
              )}
            </div>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/dashboard/CallLogTab.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { Card } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { Phone, RefreshCw, Play, Clock, User, Hash } from "lucide-react";

interface VapiCall {
  call_id: string;
  status: string;
  caller: string;
  started_at: string;
  ended_at: string;
  duration?: number;
  transcript: string;
  summary: string;
  recording_url: string;
  ended_reason: string;
}

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<string, string> = {
  ended: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  completed: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  failed: "bg-red-100 text-red-700",
  "in-progress": "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  queued: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
};

/**
 * Extract order number from call summary or transcript.
 * Checks summary first (most reliable — AI-generated), then transcript.
 * Matches patterns like: "order 134680", "ORD-134680", "order number 134680",
 * "1 3 4 6 8 0" (spoken digits), "order #134680"
 */
function extractOrderNumber(call: VapiCall): string | null {
  const text = `${call.summary || ""}\n${call.transcript || ""}`;

  // Pattern 1: "order [#]134680" or "order number [#]134680" in summary/transcript
  const orderMatch = text.match(/order\s*(?:number|#|no\.?)?\s*#?\s*(\d{4,7})/i);
  if (orderMatch) return orderMatch[1];

  // Pattern 2: "ORD-134680"
  const ordPrefixMatch = text.match(/ORD-(\d{4,7})/i);
  if (ordPrefixMatch) return ordPrefixMatch[1];

  // Pattern 3: Spoken digits in transcript like "1 3 4 6 8 0" (4-7 digits separated by spaces)
  // Only check transcript for this since summary won't have spoken digits
  if (call.transcript) {
    const spokenMatch = call.transcript.match(/(?:order|number)[^\n]*?(\d(?:\s+\d){3,6})/i);
    if (spokenMatch) {
      const digits = spokenMatch[1].replace(/\s+/g, "");
      if (digits.length >= 4 && digits.length <= 7) return digits;
    }
  }

  return null;
}

function calcDuration(call: VapiCall): string {
  // Use explicit duration if available
  if (call.duration) {
    const m = Math.floor(call.duration / 60);
    const s = call.duration % 60;
    return `${m}:${String(s).padStart(2, "0")}`;
  }
  // Compute from started_at / ended_at
  if (call.started_at && call.ended_at) {
    const start = new Date(call.started_at).getTime();
    const end = new Date(call.ended_at).getTime();
    if (!isNaN(start) && !isNaN(end) && end > start) {
      const totalSec = Math.round((end - start) / 1000);
      const m = Math.floor(totalSec / 60);
      const s = totalSec % 60;
      return `${m}:${String(s).padStart(2, "0")}`;
    }
  }
  return "--";
}

export function CallLogTab() {
  const [calls, setCalls] = useState<VapiCall[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [expandedId, setExpandedId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [visibleCount, setVisibleCount] = useState(100);

  async function fetchCalls() {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/calls");
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch calls");
      const json = await res.json();
      setCalls(json.data || []);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchCalls();
  }, []);

  if (loading && calls.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
        {Array.from({ length: 4 }).map((_, i) => (
          <Skeleton key={i} className="h-20 w-full rounded-lg" />
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 text-center text-muted-foreground">
        <p className="text-sm">{error}</p>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={fetchCalls} className="mt-2 gap-2">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
          Retry
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (calls.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
        <Phone className="h-12 w-12 mb-3 opacity-40" />
        <p className="text-sm font-medium">No calls yet</p>
        <p className="text-xs">VAPI call data will appear here</p>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
        <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          {calls.length} call{calls.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
        </span>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={fetchCalls} className="gap-2">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4" />
          Refresh
        </Button>
      </div>

      {calls.slice(0, visibleCount).map((call) => (
        <Card
          key={call.call_id}
          className="p-4 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow cursor-pointer"
          onClick={() =>
            setExpandedId(expandedId === call.call_id ? null : call.call_id)
          }
        >
          <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="p-2 rounded-full bg-muted">
                <Phone className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                  <User className="h-3 w-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium">
                    {call.caller || "Unknown"}
                  </span>
                  {(() => {
                    const orderNum = extractOrderNumber(call);
                    if (!orderNum) return null;
                    return (
                      <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded bg-violet-100 text-violet-700 text-[10px] font-semibold">
                        <Hash className="h-2.5 w-2.5" />
                        ORD-{orderNum}
                      </span>
                    );
                  })()}
                </div>
                {call.summary && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5 line-clamp-1">
                    {call.summary}
                  </p>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                <Clock className="h-3 w-3" />
                {calcDuration(call)}
              </div>
              <span
                className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase ${
                  STATUS_COLORS[call.status] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700"
                }`}
              >
                {call.status}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>

          {(call.started_at || call.ended_at) && (
            <div className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground mt-2">
              {(() => {
                const dateStr = call.started_at || call.ended_at;
                const d = new Date(dateStr);
                if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return dateStr;
                const now = new Date();
                const diffMs = now.getTime() - d.getTime();
                const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
                const diffHours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
                const diffDays = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
                if (diffMins < 1) return "just now";
                if (diffMins < 60) return `${diffMins} min${diffMins !== 1 ? "s" : ""} ago`;
                if (diffHours < 24) return `about ${diffHours} hour${diffHours !== 1 ? "s" : ""} ago`;
                if (diffDays < 7) return `${diffDays} day${diffDays !== 1 ? "s" : ""} ago`;
                return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric", year: "numeric", hour: "numeric", minute: "2-digit" });
              })()}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Expanded details */}
          {expandedId === call.call_id && (
            <div className="mt-3 pt-3 border-t space-y-2">
              {call.summary && (
                <div>
                  <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-muted-foreground">
                    Summary
                  </span>
                  <p className="text-xs mt-0.5">{call.summary}</p>
                </div>
              )}
              {call.transcript && (
                <div>
                  <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase text-muted-foreground">
                    Transcript
                  </span>
                  <p className="text-xs mt-0.5 max-h-32 overflow-auto whitespace-pre-wrap bg-muted/50 rounded p-2">
                    {call.transcript}
                  </p>
                </div>
              )}
              {call.ended_reason && (
                <div className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  Ended: {call.ended_reason}
                </div>
              )}
              {call.recording_url && (
                <a
                  href={call.recording_url}
                  target="_blank"
                  rel="noopener noreferrer"
                  onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
                  className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-primary hover:underline"
                >
                  <Play className="h-3 w-3" />
                  Listen to recording
                </a>
              )}
            </div>
          )}
        </Card>
      ))}

      {calls.length > visibleCount && (
        <div className="text-center pt-2">
          <Button
            variant="outline"
            size="sm"
            onClick={() => setVisibleCount((c) => c + 100)}
          >
            Load More ({calls.length - visibleCount} remaining)
          </Button>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

================================================
FILE: src/components/dashboard/QuoteBoardTab.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import {
  FileText,
  RefreshCw,
  Search,
  DollarSign,
  MapPin,
  Truck,
  Calendar,
  Loader2,
  ArrowRight,
  ChevronRight,
  Users,
  Weight,
  Zap,
} from "lucide-react";

// ============================================================
// Types
// ============================================================

interface LoadInfo {
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  miles: number | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
  order_status: string | null;
}

interface QuoteBoardLoad {
  load_id: string;
  quote_count: number;
  latest_activity: string;
  best_rate: number | null;
  outbound_count: number;
  load_info: LoadInfo | null;
  quotes: { source: string; status: string; is_known: boolean }[];
}

type SyncStage = null | "refreshing" | "done";

// ============================================================
// Helpers
// ============================================================

function formatRoute(info: LoadInfo): string {
  const origin = [info.origin_city, info.origin_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
  const dest = [info.dest_city, info.dest_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ");
  if (origin && dest) return `${origin} → ${dest}`;
  if (origin) return origin;
  if (dest) return `→ ${dest}`;
  return "";
}

function formatPickupDay(dateStr: string): string {
  const d = new Date(dateStr);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return dateStr;
  const now = new Date();
  const diffDays = Math.round((d.getTime() - now.getTime()) / 86400000);
  if (diffDays === 0) return "Today";
  if (diffDays === 1) return "Tomorrow";
  if (diffDays === -1) return "Yesterday";
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

function formatWeight(lbs: number): string {
  if (lbs >= 1000) return `${(lbs / 1000).toFixed(lbs % 1000 === 0 ? 0 : 1)}k lbs`;
  return `${lbs.toLocaleString()} lbs`;
}

function relativeTime(iso: string): string {
  const d = new Date(iso);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return iso;
  const diffMs = Date.now() - d.getTime();
  const mins = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
  if (mins < 1) return "just now";
  if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
  const hours = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
  if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
  const days = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);
  if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`;
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { month: "short", day: "numeric" });
}

const STAGE_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  refreshing: "Refreshing...",
  done: "Up to date",
};

// ============================================================
// Component
// ============================================================

export function QuoteBoardTab() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [loads, setLoads] = useState<QuoteBoardLoad[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [userName, setUserName] = useState("");
  const [syncStage, setSyncStage] = useState<SyncStage>(null);
  const [syncSummary, setSyncSummary] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [statusFilter, setStatusFilter] = useState<string>("all");
  const [orderStatusFilter, setOrderStatusFilter] = useState<string>("PENDING");
  const [orderStatusExpanded, setOrderStatusExpanded] = useState(false);
  const [realtimeConnected, setRealtimeConnected] = useState(false);
  const doneTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null>(null);

  // Lightweight read from cache — no sync, no VAPI, just DB read
  const readBoard = useCallback(async (): Promise<QuoteBoardLoad[]> => {
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/quote-board", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ period: "week" }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) return [];
      const json = await res.json();
      const result = json.loads || [];
      setLoads(result);
      if (json.user_name) setUserName(json.user_name);
      return result;
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }, []);

  // Incremental refresh: checks for changed source data, materializes only affected loads, then reads.
  const fetchBoard = useCallback(async (silent = false) => {
    if (!silent) setLoading(true);
    setError(null);

    if (!silent) {
      setSyncSummary(null);
      setSyncStage("refreshing");
    }

    // Run lightweight incremental sync
    try {
      const syncRes = await fetch("/api/quote-board/sync", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: "{}",
      });

      if (syncRes.ok) {
        const syncData = await syncRes.json();
        if (!silent && syncData.refreshed > 0) {
          setSyncSummary(`${syncData.refreshed} load${syncData.refreshed !== 1 ? "s" : ""} updated`);
        }
      } else {
        console.error("[QuoteBoard] Sync endpoint returned", syncRes.status);
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[QuoteBoard] Sync fetch failed:", err);
    }

    // Read from cache
    await readBoard();
    setLoading(false);

    if (!silent) {
      setSyncStage("done");
      if (doneTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(doneTimerRef.current);
      doneTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSyncStage(null);
        setSyncSummary(null);
      }, 3000);
    }
  }, [readBoard]);

  // Initial load + Supabase Realtime subscription
  useEffect(() => {
    // Instant read from cache, then background sync
    readBoard().then((result) => {
      setLoading(false);
      if (!result || result.length === 0) {
        fetchBoard(false);
      } else {
        fetchBoard(true);
      }
    });

    // Subscribe to Realtime — auto-refresh when data changes
    const supabase = createClient();
    const channel = supabase
      .channel("quote-board-realtime")
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "*", schema: "public", table: "quote_board_loads" },
        () => {
          readBoard();
        }
      )
      .subscribe((status) => {
        setRealtimeConnected(status === "SUBSCRIBED");
      });

    return () => {
      if (doneTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(doneTimerRef.current);
      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
    };
  }, [fetchBoard, readBoard]);

  // No period toggle needed — always show last 7 days

  // Status filter pills config
  const STATUS_FILTERS: { key: string; label: string; color: string }[] = [
    { key: "all", label: "All", color: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground" },
    { key: "accepted", label: "Accepted", color: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-300" },
    { key: "negotiating", label: "Negotiating", color: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 border-amber-300" },
    { key: "offered", label: "Offered", color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-300" },
    { key: "called", label: "Called", color: "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 border-purple-300" },
    { key: "quoted", label: "Quoted", color: "bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border-slate-300" },
    { key: "rejected", label: "Rejected", color: "bg-red-100 text-red-700 border-red-300" },
  ];

  const ORDER_STATUS_FILTERS: { key: string; label: string; color: string }[] = [
    { key: "all", label: "All Statuses", color: "bg-primary text-primary-foreground" },
    { key: "PENDING", label: "Pending", color: "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300" },
    { key: "CONFIRMED", label: "Confirmed", color: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700 border-blue-300" },
    { key: "AWAITING_PICKUP", label: "Awaiting Pickup", color: "bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-700 border-cyan-300" },
    { key: "PICKED_UP", label: "Picked Up", color: "bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 border-indigo-300" },
    { key: "DELIVERED", label: "Delivered", color: "bg-green-100 text-green-700 border-green-300" },
    { key: "CARRIER_CHECK", label: "Carrier Check", color: "bg-orange-100 text-orange-700 border-orange-300" },
    { key: "PAID", label: "Paid", color: "bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-300" },
  ];

  const filteredLoads = loads
    .filter((l) => {
      if (search.trim()) {
        if (!l.load_id.toLowerCase().includes(search.trim().toLowerCase())) return false;
      }
      if (statusFilter !== "all") {
        if (!l.quotes.some((q) => q.status === statusFilter)) return false;
      }
      // Filter by TTMS order status
      if (orderStatusFilter !== "all") {
        const os = l.load_info?.order_status?.toUpperCase() || "PENDING";
        if (os !== orderStatusFilter) return false;
      }
      return true;
    });

  const isRefreshing = syncStage === "refreshing";

  // ============================================================
  // Render
  // ============================================================

  if (loading && loads.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="p-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
        {Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className="border rounded-xl p-5 space-y-3">
            <Skeleton className="h-5 w-48" />
            <Skeleton className="h-4 w-32" />
            <Skeleton className="h-4 w-40" />
            <Skeleton className="h-8 w-full rounded-lg" />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="p-6 space-y-5">
      {/* Toolbar */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          <div className="relative max-w-xs flex-1">
            <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
            <Input
              className="pl-9 h-9 text-sm"
              placeholder="Filter by order number..."
              value={search}
              onChange={(e) => setSearch(e.target.value)}
            />
          </div>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
            {filteredLoads.length} load{filteredLoads.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} this week
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
          {/* Progress indicator */}
          {syncStage && (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              {isRefreshing && (
                <div className="w-20 h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="h-full bg-primary rounded-full animate-pulse w-3/4" />
                </div>
              )}
              {syncStage === "done" && (
                <div className="w-20 h-1.5 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div className="h-full bg-green-500 rounded-full w-full" />
                </div>
              )}
              <span className="whitespace-nowrap">
                {syncStage === "done" && syncSummary
                  ? syncSummary
                  : STAGE_LABELS[syncStage] || ""}
              </span>
            </div>
          )}

          {realtimeConnected && (
            <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-green-600" title="Realtime connected">
              <Zap className="h-3 w-3" />
              Live
            </span>
          )}

          <Button
            variant="outline"
            size="sm"
            className="gap-2 h-9"
            onClick={() => fetchBoard()}
            disabled={isRefreshing}
          >
            {isRefreshing ? (
              <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
            ) : (
              <RefreshCw className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            )}
            Refresh
          </Button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Filter pills — single row */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
        {STATUS_FILTERS.map((f) => {
          const isActive = statusFilter === f.key;
          const count = f.key === "all"
            ? loads.length
            : loads.filter((l) => l.quotes.some((q) => q.status === f.key)).length;
          if (f.key !== "all" && count === 0) return null;
          return (
            <button
              key={f.key}
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setStatusFilter(f.key)}
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium transition-all border ${
                isActive
                  ? f.color
                  : "bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground border-transparent hover:bg-muted"
              }`}
            >
              {f.label}
              <span className={`text-[10px] ${isActive ? "opacity-80" : "opacity-60"}`}>
                {count}
              </span>
            </button>
          );
        })}

        <div className="w-px h-5 bg-border mx-1" />

        {/* Pending pill — always visible */}
        {(() => {
          const pendingCount = loads.filter((l) => (l.load_info?.order_status?.toUpperCase() || "PENDING") === "PENDING").length;
          const pendingActive = orderStatusFilter === "PENDING";
          return (
            <button
              type="button"
              onClick={() => { setOrderStatusFilter("PENDING"); setOrderStatusExpanded(false); }}
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium transition-all border ${
                pendingActive
                  ? "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300"
                  : "bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground border-transparent hover:bg-muted"
              }`}
            >
              Pending
              <span className={`text-[10px] ${pendingActive ? "opacity-80" : "opacity-60"}`}>{pendingCount}</span>
            </button>
          );
        })()}

        {/* Expand/collapse button */}
        <button
          type="button"
          onClick={() => setOrderStatusExpanded(!orderStatusExpanded)}
          className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-6 h-6 rounded-full border transition-all ${
            orderStatusExpanded
              ? "bg-muted text-foreground border-border"
              : "bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground border-transparent hover:bg-muted"
          }`}
        >
          <ChevronRight className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 transition-transform duration-200 ${orderStatusExpanded ? "rotate-180" : ""}`} />
        </button>

        {/* Expanded status pills */}
        {orderStatusExpanded && ORDER_STATUS_FILTERS.filter((f) => f.key !== "PENDING").map((f) => {
          const isActive = orderStatusFilter === f.key;
          const count = f.key === "all"
            ? loads.length
            : loads.filter((l) => (l.load_info?.order_status?.toUpperCase() || "PENDING") === f.key).length;
          if (f.key !== "all" && count === 0) return null;
          return (
            <button
              key={`os-${f.key}`}
              type="button"
              onClick={() => setOrderStatusFilter(f.key)}
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium transition-all border ${
                isActive
                  ? f.color
                  : "bg-muted/50 text-muted-foreground border-transparent hover:bg-muted"
              }`}
            >
              {f.label}
              <span className={`text-[10px] ${isActive ? "opacity-80" : "opacity-60"}`}>
                {count}
              </span>
            </button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <div className="p-4 border border-destructive/20 bg-destructive/5 rounded-lg text-sm text-destructive">
          {error}
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Empty state */}
      {!loading && filteredLoads.length === 0 && !error && (
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
          <FileText className="h-12 w-12 mb-3 opacity-40" />
          <p className="text-sm font-medium">
            {search ? `No loads match "${search}"` : "No quotes this week"}
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs mt-1">
            {search
              ? "Try a different order number"
              : "Carrier offers from emails, outbound campaigns, and VAPI calls will appear here"}
          </p>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Load cards grid */}
      {filteredLoads.length > 0 && (
        <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4">
          {filteredLoads.map((load) => {
            const info = load.load_info;
            const route = info ? formatRoute(info) : "";
            const newCount = load.quotes.filter((q) => !q.is_known).length;
            const hasAccepted = load.quotes.some((q) => q.status === "accepted");
            const negotiatingCount = load.quotes.filter((q) => q.status === "negotiating").length;

            return (
              <button
                key={load.load_id}
                type="button"
                className="border rounded-xl p-5 text-left hover:border-primary/40 hover:shadow-md transition-all group cursor-pointer"
                onClick={() => router.push(`/quote-board/${load.load_id}`)}
              >
                {/* Route header */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-1">
                  {route ? (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm font-semibold min-w-0">
                      <MapPin className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-primary shrink-0" />
                      <span className="truncate">{route}</span>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="text-sm font-semibold font-mono text-primary">
                      Load #{load.load_id}
                    </div>
                  )}
                  <Badge
                    variant="outline"
                    className={`text-[9px] uppercase tracking-wide font-semibold shrink-0 ml-2 ${
                      (info?.order_status || "PENDING") === "PENDING"
                        ? "bg-yellow-50 text-yellow-700 border-yellow-300"
                        : info?.order_status === "CONFIRMED"
                        ? "bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-300"
                        : info?.order_status === "AWAITING_PICKUP"
                        ? "bg-cyan-50 text-cyan-700 border-cyan-300"
                        : info?.order_status === "PICKED_UP" || info?.order_status === "IN TRANSIT"
                        ? "bg-indigo-50 text-indigo-700 border-indigo-300"
                        : info?.order_status === "DELIVERED"
                        ? "bg-green-50 text-green-700 border-green-300"
                        : info?.order_status === "PAID"
                        ? "bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border-emerald-300"
                        : info?.order_status === "CARRIER_CHECK"
                        ? "bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 border-orange-300"
                        : "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 border-gray-300"
                    }`}
                  >
                    {(info?.order_status || "PENDING").replace(/_/g, " ")}
                  </Badge>
                </div>

                {/* Load details line */}
                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground flex-wrap mb-3">
                  {info?.weight_lbs && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <Weight className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {formatWeight(info.weight_lbs)}
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {info?.equipment_type && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <Truck className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {info.equipment_type}
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {info?.pickup_date && (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-0.5">
                      <Calendar className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {formatPickupDay(info.pickup_date)} pickup
                    </span>
                  )}
                  {info?.miles && (
                    <span>{info.miles.toLocaleString()} mi</span>
                  )}
                </div>

                {/* Outbound summary */}
                {load.outbound_count > 0 && userName && (
                  <p className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground mb-3">
                    AI emailed {load.outbound_count} carrier{load.outbound_count !== 1 ? "s" : ""} as {userName}
                  </p>
                )}

                {/* Stats row */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-3">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-[10px] gap-1">
                      <Users className="h-3 w-3" />
                      {load.quote_count} carrier{load.quote_count !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
                    </Badge>
                    {newCount > 0 && (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px] bg-violet-50 text-violet-600 border-violet-300">
                        {newCount} new
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                    {hasAccepted && (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px] bg-green-50 text-green-600 border-green-300">
                        Accepted
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                    {negotiatingCount > 0 && !hasAccepted && (
                      <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[9px] bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border-amber-300">
                        {negotiatingCount} negotiating
                      </Badge>
                    )}
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Bottom row: best rate + time + arrow */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-3 border-t">
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                    {load.best_rate != null && (
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-0.5 text-green-600 font-semibold text-sm font-mono">
                        <DollarSign className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        {load.best_rate.toLocaleString()}
                        <span className="text-[9px] font-normal text-muted-foreground ml-0.5">best</span>
                      </div>
                    )}
                    {info?.shipper_rate != null && (
                      <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground font-mono">
                        Ship ${info.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                      {relativeTime(load.latest_activity)}
                    </span>
                    <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground group-hover:text-primary transition-colors" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </button>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}

    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/dashboard/sync-indicator.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useEffect, useState } from "react";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { formatDistanceToNow } from "date-fns";

export function SyncIndicator() {
  const [lastSync, setLastSync] = useState<string | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchSyncState() {
      const supabase = createClient();
      const {
        data: { user },
      } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
      if (!user) return;

      const { data } = await supabase
        .from("sync_state")
        .select("last_sync_at")
        .eq("user_id", user.id)
        .single();

      if (data?.last_sync_at) {
        setLastSync(data.last_sync_at);
      }
    }

    fetchSyncState();
    const interval = setInterval(fetchSyncState, 30000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  if (!lastSync) {
    return (
      <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Never synced</span>
    );
  }

  return (
    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
      Last sync: {formatDistanceToNow(new Date(lastSync), { addSuffix: true })}
    </span>
  );
}
