FILE: src/components/email-detail/ai-reasoning.tsx
================================================
import { Brain } from "lucide-react";

interface AiReasoningProps {
  reasoning: string | null;
  confidence: number | null;
  manualOverride: boolean;
}

export function AiReasoning({
  reasoning,
  confidence,
  manualOverride,
}: AiReasoningProps) {
  if (!reasoning && !manualOverride) return null;

  const pct = confidence !== null ? Math.round(confidence * 100) : null;

  return (
    <div className="rounded-lg border border-border/60 px-3.5 py-2.5 flex items-start gap-2.5">
      <Brain className="h-4 w-4 text-foreground/50 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
      <p className="flex-1 text-[13px] text-foreground/70 leading-relaxed min-w-0">
        {manualOverride && (
          <span className="italic mr-1">Manually re-tagged.</span>
        )}
        {reasoning}
      </p>
      {pct !== null && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0 mt-0.5">
          <div className="w-12 h-1 bg-muted rounded-full overflow-hidden">
            <div
              className="h-full bg-foreground/40 rounded-full"
              style={{ width: `${pct}%` }}
            />
          </div>
          <span className="text-[11px] font-medium text-foreground/50 tabular-nums">
            {pct}%
          </span>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/email-detail/auto-reply.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import {
  Sparkles,
  Send,
  X,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Check,
  Pencil,
  Truck,
  DollarSign,
  UserPlus,
  AlertTriangle,
} from "lucide-react";

interface NegotiationInfo {
  action: string;
  counterRate: number | null;
  carrierMc: string | null;
  carrierName: string | null;
  loadNumber: string;
  intent: string;
  isKnownCarrier?: boolean;
  roundCount?: number;
  escalation?: {
    reason: string;
    carrierAsk: number;
    ceiling: number;
    roundsCompleted: number;
  };
}

interface LoadInfo {
  load_number: string;
  origin: string;
  destination: string;
  equipment: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
}

interface AutoReplyProps {
  emailId: string;
  category: string;
}

export function AutoReply({ emailId, category }: AutoReplyProps) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);
  const [dismissed, setDismissed] = useState(false);
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [negotiation, setNegotiation] = useState<NegotiationInfo | null>(null);
  const [loadInfo, setLoadInfo] = useState<LoadInfo | null>(null);
  const [extractedInfo, setExtractedInfo] = useState<{
    origin_city?: string; origin_state?: string;
    dest_city?: string; dest_state?: string;
    equipment_type?: string; pickup_date?: string;
    quoted_rate?: number;
  } | null>(null);

  // Auto-generate draft for IMP emails
  useEffect(() => {
    if (category === "IMP" && !draft && !dismissed && !sent) {
      generateDraft();
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [emailId, category]);

  async function generateDraft() {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    setNegotiation(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/draft-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response from server");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to generate draft");
      setDraft(data.draft || "");
      if (data.negotiation) {
        setNegotiation(data.negotiation);
      }
      if (data.load_info) {
        setLoadInfo(data.load_info);
      }
      if (data.extracted_info) {
        setExtractedInfo(data.extracted_info);
      }
      if (data._debug) {
        console.log("[auto-reply] _debug:", JSON.stringify(data._debug));
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate draft");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    setSending(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, replyBody: draft, source: "ai_draft" }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response from server");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send reply");
      setSent(true);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply");
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  if (category !== "IMP" || dismissed) return null;

  if (sent) {
    return (
      <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
        <CardContent className="flex items-center gap-2 py-4">
          <Check className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">
            Reply sent successfully{negotiation?.loadNumber ? ` for ${negotiation.loadNumber}` : ""}
            {negotiation?.action === "accept" && " — Rate accepted"}
            {negotiation?.action === "counter" && ` — Countered at $${negotiation.counterRate?.toLocaleString()}`}
            {negotiation?.action === "reject" && ` — Countered at $${negotiation.counterRate?.toLocaleString()}`}
            {negotiation?.action === "quote" && ` — Quoted at $${negotiation.counterRate?.toLocaleString()}`}
          </span>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  // --- ESCALATION UI ---
  if (!loading && negotiation?.action === "escalate") {
    return (
      <Card className="border-orange-200 bg-orange-50/50">
        <CardHeader className="pb-3">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-orange-700">
              <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4" />
              Escalated to Human Agent
            </CardTitle>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
              onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}
            >
              <X className="h-4 w-4" />
            </Button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] border-purple-300 text-purple-700 gap-1">
              <Truck className="h-3 w-3" />
              Load {negotiation.loadNumber}
            </Badge>
            {negotiation.carrierName && (
              <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] border-gray-300 text-gray-600">
                {negotiation.carrierName}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {negotiation.escalation && (
              <>
                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] border-orange-300 text-orange-700 gap-1">
                  <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3" />
                  Carrier asks ${negotiation.escalation.carrierAsk.toLocaleString()}
                </Badge>
                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] border-red-300 text-red-700 gap-1">
                  Ceiling ${negotiation.escalation.ceiling.toLocaleString()}
                </Badge>
                <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] border-slate-300 text-slate-600">
                  {negotiation.escalation.roundsCompleted} rounds
                </Badge>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent>
          <p className="text-sm text-orange-800">
            {negotiation.escalation?.reason || "Negotiation exceeded max rounds. A human agent needs to review this."}
          </p>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-2">
            An escalation record has been created. Check the <a href="/escalations" className="underline">Escalations</a> page to take action.
          </p>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  const isNegotiation = !!negotiation;
  const borderColor = isNegotiation ? "border-purple-200" : "border-blue-200";
  const bgColor = isNegotiation ? "bg-purple-50/50" : "bg-blue-50/50";
  const accentColor = isNegotiation ? "text-purple-600" : "text-blue-600";

  return (
    <Card className={`${borderColor} ${bgColor}`}>
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium">
            {isNegotiation ? (
              <DollarSign className={`h-4 w-4 ${accentColor}`} />
            ) : (
              <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${accentColor}`} />
            )}
            {isNegotiation ? "AI Negotiation Reply" : "AI Suggested Reply"}
          </CardTitle>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
            onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}
          >
            <X className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Extracted info from email */}
        {extractedInfo && !loading && (
          <div className="mt-2 p-2.5 rounded-md bg-muted/60 border border-border/50">
            <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Extracted from email</span>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-0.5 mt-1 text-xs">
              {extractedInfo.origin_city ? (
                <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Origin:</span> {extractedInfo.origin_city}{extractedInfo.origin_state ? `, ${extractedInfo.origin_state}` : ""}</span>
              ) : null}
              {extractedInfo.dest_city ? (
                <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Dest:</span> {extractedInfo.dest_city}{extractedInfo.dest_state ? `, ${extractedInfo.dest_state}` : ""}</span>
              ) : null}
              {extractedInfo.equipment_type ? (
                <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Equipment:</span> {extractedInfo.equipment_type}</span>
              ) : null}
              {extractedInfo.pickup_date ? (
                <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Pickup:</span> {extractedInfo.pickup_date}</span>
              ) : null}
              {extractedInfo.quoted_rate ? (
                <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Carrier Rate:</span> <span className="font-semibold">${extractedInfo.quoted_rate.toLocaleString()}</span></span>
              ) : null}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Negotiation context bar */}
        {negotiation && (
          <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2 mt-2">
            <Badge
              variant="outline"
              className="text-[10px] border-purple-300 text-purple-700 gap-1"
            >
              <Truck className="h-3 w-3" />
              Load {negotiation.loadNumber}
            </Badge>
            {negotiation.carrierName && (
              <Badge
                variant="outline"
                className="text-[10px] border-gray-300 text-gray-600"
              >
                {negotiation.carrierName}
                {negotiation.carrierMc && negotiation.carrierMc !== "NA" && ` (MC# ${negotiation.carrierMc})`}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {negotiation.isKnownCarrier === false && (
              <Badge
                variant="outline"
                className="text-[10px] border-orange-300 text-orange-700 gap-1"
              >
                <UserPlus className="h-3 w-3" />
                New Contact
              </Badge>
            )}
            {negotiation.counterRate && (
              <Badge
                variant="outline"
                className="text-[10px] border-green-300 text-green-700 gap-1"
              >
                <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3" />
                {negotiation.action === "quote"
                  ? `Quoting $${negotiation.counterRate}`
                  : negotiation.action === "counter"
                    ? `Counter: $${negotiation.counterRate}`
                    : negotiation.action === "accept"
                      ? `Accepted: $${negotiation.counterRate}`
                      : `$${negotiation.counterRate}`}
              </Badge>
            )}
            {negotiation.roundCount != null && negotiation.roundCount > 0 && (
              <Badge
                variant="outline"
                className="text-[10px] border-slate-300 text-slate-600"
              >
                Round {negotiation.roundCount}
              </Badge>
            )}
            <Badge
              variant="outline"
              className={`text-[10px] ${
                negotiation.intent === "walk_away"
                  ? "border-red-300 text-red-600"
                  : "border-blue-300 text-blue-700"
              }`}
            >
              {negotiation.intent === "load_inquiry"
                ? "Load Inquiry"
                : negotiation.intent === "rate_offer"
                  ? "Rate Offer"
                  : negotiation.intent === "rate_counter"
                    ? "Rate Counter"
                    : negotiation.intent === "accept"
                      ? "Accepted"
                      : negotiation.intent === "walk_away"
                        ? "Carrier Declined"
                        : negotiation.intent}
            </Badge>
          </div>
        )}
      </CardHeader>
      {/* Matched load info */}
      {loadInfo && (
        <div className="mx-6 mb-0 p-3 rounded-lg bg-muted/50 border border-border/60">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 mb-2">
            <Truck className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
            <span className="text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">Matched Load</span>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1 text-xs">
            <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Order:</span> <span className="font-mono font-semibold">{loadInfo.load_number}</span></span>
            <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Route:</span> {loadInfo.origin} → {loadInfo.destination}</span>
            {loadInfo.equipment && <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Equipment:</span> {loadInfo.equipment}</span>}
            {loadInfo.shipper_rate != null && (
              <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Shipper Rate:</span> <span className="font-semibold text-green-600">${loadInfo.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}</span></span>
            )}
            {loadInfo.pickup_date && <span><span className="text-muted-foreground">Pickup:</span> {new Date(loadInfo.pickup_date).toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "short", month: "short", day: "numeric" })}</span>}
          </div>
        </div>
      )}

      <CardContent className="space-y-3">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 py-4 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
            {isNegotiation
              ? "Analyzing email and generating negotiation reply..."
              : "Generating reply..."}
          </div>
        ) : error ? (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{error}</p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
              <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
              Retry
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {editing ? (
              <Textarea
                value={draft}
                onChange={(e) => setDraft(e.target.value)}
                rows={6}
                className="bg-white text-sm"
              />
            ) : (
              <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-md bg-white p-3 text-sm border">
                {draft}
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
              <Button
                size="sm"
                onClick={handleSend}
                disabled={sending || !draft}
                className={
                  isNegotiation
                    ? "bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-700"
                    : undefined
                }
              >
                {sending ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1 animate-spin" />
                ) : (
                  <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                )}
                {isNegotiation ? "Send Negotiation Reply" : "Send Reply"}
              </Button>
              <Button
                variant="outline"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => setEditing(!editing)}
              >
                <Pencil className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                {editing ? "Done Editing" : "Edit"}
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
                <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Regenerate
              </Button>
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}
              >
                Dismiss
              </Button>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/email-detail/conversation-thread.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  MessageSquare,
  Sparkles,
  ChevronDown,
  Reply,
  Send,
  X,
  Loader2,
  Check,
} from "lucide-react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import { format } from "date-fns";

interface ThreadEmail {
  id: string;
  subject: string | null;
  from_address: string;
  from_name: string | null;
  to_addresses: string[];
  received_at: string;
  body_preview: string | null;
  body_html: string | null;
  is_read: boolean;
  category: string;
  conversation_id?: string | null;
}

interface ThreadReply {
  id: string;
  email_id: string;
  reply_body: string;
  reply_to_address: string;
  source: string;
  sent_at: string;
}

interface ThreadItem {
  type: "inbound" | "reply";
  id: string;
  timestamp: string;
  data: ThreadEmail | ThreadReply;
}

interface ConversationThreadProps {
  emailId: string;
  currentEmailId: string;
}

/* ── Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

function getInitials(name: string | null, email: string): string {
  if (name) {
    const parts = name.trim().split(/\s+/);
    if (parts.length >= 2) return (parts[0][0] + parts[1][0]).toUpperCase();
    return name.slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
  }
  return email.slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
}

function formatTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const d = new Date(dateStr);
  const now = new Date();
  const diffDays = Math.floor((now.getTime() - d.getTime()) / 86_400_000);
  if (diffDays === 0) return format(d, "h:mm a");
  if (diffDays < 7) return format(d, "EEE, h:mm a");
  return format(d, "MMM d, h:mm a");
}

/* ── EmailBubble ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

function EmailBubble({
  email,
  isCurrent,
  defaultExpanded,
  isLast,
}: {
  email: ThreadEmail;
  isCurrent: boolean;
  defaultExpanded: boolean;
  isLast: boolean;
}) {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(defaultExpanded);
  const iframeRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement>(null);
  const initials = getInitials(email.from_name, email.from_address);
  const displayName = email.from_name || email.from_address.split("@")[0];

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!expanded || !iframeRef.current || !email.body_html) return;

    const doc = iframeRef.current.contentDocument;
    if (!doc) return;

    doc.open();
    doc.write(`
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>
        <head>
          <style>
            body {
              font-family: 'Poppins', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
              font-size: 13px;
              line-height: 1.6;
              color: #1a1a1a;
              margin: 0;
              padding: 0;
              word-wrap: break-word;
            }
            img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }
            a { color: #2563eb; text-decoration: none; }
            a:hover { text-decoration: underline; }
            table { max-width: 100%; }
            blockquote { border-left: 3px solid #e5e7eb; padding-left: 12px; margin: 8px 0; color: #6b7280; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>${email.body_html}</body>
      </html>
    `);
    doc.close();

    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      if (iframeRef.current && doc.body) {
        iframeRef.current.style.height = doc.body.scrollHeight + 8 + "px";
      }
    });

    if (doc.body) resizeObserver.observe(doc.body);
    return () => resizeObserver.disconnect();
  }, [expanded, email.body_html]);

  return (
    <div className="relative flex gap-3">
      {/* Timeline connector */}
      {!isLast && (
        <div className="absolute left-[17px] top-[40px] bottom-[-8px] w-px bg-border" />
      )}

      {/* Avatar */}
      <div className="relative shrink-0 z-10">
        <div className="w-[36px] h-[36px] rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground select-none">
          {initials}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 pb-4">
        <button
          className="w-full text-left group"
          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-0.5">
            <span className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-foreground truncate">
              {displayName}
            </span>
            {isCurrent && (
              <span className="inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium bg-primary/10 text-primary rounded">
                viewing
              </span>
            )}
            <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground ml-auto shrink-0">
              {formatTime(email.received_at)}
            </span>
            <ChevronDown
              className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 ${
                expanded ? "rotate-180" : ""
              }`}
            />
          </div>

          {!expanded && (
            <p className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground/70 truncate leading-relaxed">
              {email.body_preview || email.subject || "(no content)"}
            </p>
          )}
        </button>

        {expanded && (
          <div className="mt-2">
            <div className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground/60 mb-2 flex flex-wrap gap-x-3">
              <span>From: {email.from_address}</span>
              {email.to_addresses?.length > 0 && (
                <span>To: {email.to_addresses.join(", ")}</span>
              )}
            </div>
            {email.body_html ? (
              <div className="rounded-lg border border-border/60 overflow-hidden bg-white">
                <iframe
                  ref={iframeRef}
                  className="w-full border-0 min-h-[60px]"
                  sandbox="allow-same-origin"
                  title="Email content"
                />
              </div>
            ) : (
              <div className="text-[13px] text-foreground/80 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
                {email.body_preview || "(no content)"}
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ── ReplyBubble ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

function ReplyBubble({
  reply,
  isLast,
}: {
  reply: ThreadReply;
  isLast: boolean;
}) {
  const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(true);
  const isAi = reply.source === "ai_draft" || reply.source === "ai_auto";

  return (
    <div className="relative flex gap-3">
      {/* Timeline connector */}
      {!isLast && (
        <div className="absolute left-[17px] top-[40px] bottom-[-8px] w-px bg-border" />
      )}

      {/* Avatar */}
      <div className="relative shrink-0 z-10">
        <div className="w-[36px] h-[36px] rounded-full bg-blue-100 flex items-center justify-center select-none">
          {isAi ? (
            <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-600" />
          ) : (
            <span className="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-600">You</span>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0 pb-4">
        <button
          className="w-full text-left group"
          onClick={() => setExpanded(!expanded)}
        >
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-0.5">
            <span className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-foreground">
              {isAi ? "AI Reply" : "You"}
            </span>
            {isAi && (
              <Badge
                variant="outline"
                className="text-[9px] px-1.5 py-0 border-blue-200 text-blue-600 bg-blue-50"
              >
                <Sparkles className="h-2.5 w-2.5 mr-0.5" />
                AI
              </Badge>
            )}
            <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground ml-auto shrink-0">
              {formatTime(reply.sent_at)}
            </span>
            <ChevronDown
              className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground shrink-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 ${
                expanded ? "rotate-180" : ""
              }`}
            />
          </div>

          {!expanded && (
            <p className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground/70 truncate leading-relaxed">
              {reply.reply_body.slice(0, 140)}
            </p>
          )}
        </button>

        {expanded && (
          <div className="mt-2">
            <div className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground/60 mb-2">
              To: {reply.reply_to_address}
            </div>
            <div className="rounded-lg border border-blue-100 bg-blue-50/40 p-3.5 text-[13px] text-foreground/90 leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap">
              {reply.reply_body}
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

/* ── ConversationThread ─────────────────────────────────────────── */

export function ConversationThread({
  emailId,
  currentEmailId,
}: ConversationThreadProps) {
  const [thread, setThread] = useState<ThreadItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [replyOpen, setReplyOpen] = useState(false);
  const [replyBody, setReplyBody] = useState("");
  const [replySending, setReplySending] = useState(false);
  const [replySent, setReplySent] = useState(false);
  const [replyError, setReplyError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  const buildThread = useCallback(
    (emails: ThreadEmail[], replies: ThreadReply[]): ThreadItem[] => {
      const items: ThreadItem[] = [];
      for (const email of emails) {
        items.push({
          type: "inbound",
          id: email.id,
          timestamp: email.received_at,
          data: email,
        });
      }
      for (const reply of replies) {
        items.push({
          type: "reply",
          id: reply.id,
          timestamp: reply.sent_at,
          data: reply,
        });
      }
      items.sort(
        (a, b) =>
          new Date(a.timestamp).getTime() - new Date(b.timestamp).getTime()
      );
      return items;
    },
    []
  );

  // Store raw data for merging realtime updates
  const emailsRef = useRef<ThreadEmail[]>([]);
  const repliesRef = useRef<ThreadReply[]>([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchThread() {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`/api/emails/${emailId}/thread`);
        if (!res.ok) return;
        const data = await res.json();

        emailsRef.current = data.emails ?? [];
        repliesRef.current = data.replies ?? [];
        setThread(buildThread(emailsRef.current, repliesRef.current));
      } catch {
        // silently fail
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }

    fetchThread();

    // Subscribe to realtime updates for new emails in this conversation + new replies
    const supabase = createClient();

    const channel = supabase
      .channel(`thread-${emailId}`)
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "INSERT", schema: "public", table: "email_replies" },
        (payload) => {
          const newReply = payload.new as ThreadReply;
          if (emailsRef.current.some((e) => e.id === newReply.email_id)) {
            if (!repliesRef.current.some((r) => r.id === newReply.id)) {
              repliesRef.current = [...repliesRef.current, newReply];
              setThread(buildThread(emailsRef.current, repliesRef.current));
            }
          }
        }
      )
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "INSERT", schema: "public", table: "emails" },
        (payload) => {
          const newEmail = payload.new as ThreadEmail;
          const currentConvId = emailsRef.current[0]?.conversation_id;
          if (currentConvId && newEmail.conversation_id === currentConvId) {
            if (!emailsRef.current.some((e) => e.id === newEmail.id)) {
              emailsRef.current = [...emailsRef.current, newEmail];
              setThread(buildThread(emailsRef.current, repliesRef.current));
            }
          }
        }
      )
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "UPDATE", schema: "public", table: "emails" },
        (payload) => {
          const updated = payload.new as ThreadEmail;
          if (emailsRef.current.some((e) => e.id === updated.id)) {
            emailsRef.current = emailsRef.current.map((e) =>
              e.id === updated.id ? { ...e, ...updated } : e
            );
            setThread(buildThread(emailsRef.current, repliesRef.current));
          }
        }
      )
      .subscribe();

    return () => {
      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
    };
  }, [emailId, buildThread]);

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-4 pl-12">
        <Skeleton className="h-14 w-full rounded-lg" />
        <Skeleton className="h-10 w-3/4 rounded-lg" />
        <Skeleton className="h-14 w-full rounded-lg" />
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (thread.length <= 1) return null;

  // Find the latest inbound email to reply to
  const latestInbound = [...thread].reverse().find((t) => t.type === "inbound");
  const latestInboundEmail = latestInbound?.data as ThreadEmail | undefined;

  async function handleThreadReply() {
    if (!replyBody.trim() || !latestInboundEmail) return;
    setReplySending(true);
    setReplyError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          emailId: latestInboundEmail.id,
          replyBody,
          source: "manual",
        }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send reply");
      setReplySent(true);
      setReplyBody("");
    } catch (err) {
      setReplyError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply");
    } finally {
      setReplySending(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div>
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-5">
        <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-foreground">
          Conversation
        </span>
        <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
          {thread.length} messages
        </span>
      </div>

      {/* Thread */}
      <div>
        {thread.map((item, idx) =>
          item.type === "inbound" ? (
            <EmailBubble
              key={item.id}
              email={item.data as ThreadEmail}
              isCurrent={item.id === currentEmailId}
              defaultExpanded={item.id === currentEmailId}
              isLast={idx === thread.length - 1 && !replyOpen}
            />
          ) : (
            <ReplyBubble
              key={item.id}
              reply={item.data as ThreadReply}
              isLast={idx === thread.length - 1 && !replyOpen}
            />
          )
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Reply at bottom of thread */}
      {latestInboundEmail && (
        <div className="mt-2 pl-[48px]">
          {replySent ? (
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 py-2">
              <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
              <span className="text-sm text-green-700">Reply sent</span>
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                className="text-xs text-green-600 hover:text-green-700 ml-1"
                onClick={() => { setReplySent(false); setReplyOpen(false); }}
              >
                Done
              </Button>
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                className="text-xs text-muted-foreground"
                onClick={() => { setReplySent(false); setReplyOpen(true); }}
              >
                Send another
              </Button>
            </div>
          ) : !replyOpen ? (
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              className="gap-2 text-xs"
              onClick={() => setReplyOpen(true)}
            >
              <Reply className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
              Reply
            </Button>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-[11px] text-muted-foreground">
                  Replying to <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{latestInboundEmail.from_name || latestInboundEmail.from_address}</span>
                </span>
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="sm"
                  className="h-6 w-6 p-0 text-muted-foreground"
                  onClick={() => { setReplyOpen(false); setReplyBody(""); setReplyError(null); }}
                >
                  <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </Button>
              </div>
              <Textarea
                value={replyBody}
                onChange={(e) => setReplyBody(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Type your reply..."
                className="min-h-[100px] text-sm resize-y"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === "Enter") {
                    e.preventDefault();
                    handleThreadReply();
                  }
                }}
              />
              {replyError && <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{replyError}</p>}
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">Ctrl+Enter to send</span>
                <Button
                  size="sm"
                  className="gap-2"
                  onClick={handleThreadReply}
                  disabled={replySending || !replyBody.trim()}
                >
                  {replySending ? <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" /> : <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />}
                  Send
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/email-detail/custom-tag-reply.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import {
  Tag,
  Send,
  X,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Check,
  Pencil,
  MessageSquarePlus,
} from "lucide-react";

interface CustomTagReplyProps {
  emailId: string;
  customTag: string;
}

export function CustomTagReply({ emailId, customTag }: CustomTagReplyProps) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);
  const [dismissed, setDismissed] = useState(false);
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  async function generateDraft() {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    setOpen(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/draft-custom-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to generate reply");
      setDraft(data.draft || "");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate reply");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    setSending(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, replyBody: draft, source: "custom_tag_reply" }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send reply");
      setSent(true);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply");
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  if (dismissed) return null;

  if (sent) {
    return (
      <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
        <CardContent className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3">
          <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">Reply sent</span>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  if (!open) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium gap-1 bg-violet-100 text-violet-800 dark:bg-violet-900/30 dark:text-violet-400">
          <Tag className="h-3 w-3" />
          {customTag}
        </Badge>
        <Button
          size="sm"
          className="gap-2 bg-violet-700 text-white hover:bg-violet-800 shadow-sm"
          onClick={generateDraft}
        >
          <MessageSquarePlus className="h-4 w-4" />
          Draft Reply
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="border-violet-200 bg-violet-50/40">
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-violet-800">
            <Tag className="h-4 w-4" />
            Reply — {customTag}
          </CardTitle>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
            onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}
          >
            <X className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-3">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
            Drafting reply based on &ldquo;{customTag}&rdquo; context…
          </div>
        ) : error ? (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{error}</p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
              <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
              Retry
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {editing ? (
              <Textarea
                value={draft}
                onChange={(e) => setDraft(e.target.value)}
                rows={6}
                className="bg-white text-sm"
              />
            ) : (
              <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-md border bg-white p-3 text-sm">
                {draft}
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <Button size="sm" onClick={handleSend} disabled={sending || !draft}>
                {sending ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1 animate-spin" />
                ) : (
                  <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                )}
                Send Reply
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setEditing(!editing)}>
                <Pencil className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                {editing ? "Done Editing" : "Edit"}
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
                <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Regenerate
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}>
                Dismiss
              </Button>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/email-detail/email-actions.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Button, buttonVariants } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";
import { Tag, ChevronDown, ArrowLeft, Loader2, Sparkles, Plus, Trash2 } from "lucide-react";
import type { EmailCategory } from "@/types/database";

type SystemCategory = "IMP" | "UNIMP" | "IGNORE" | "SHIPPER" | "TENDER" | "SHIPPER_STATUS";

interface EmailActionsProps {
  emailId: string;
  currentCategory: EmailCategory;
  currentCustomTag?: string | null;
}

const systemCategories: { value: SystemCategory; label: string }[] = [
  { value: "IMP", label: "Important" },
  { value: "SHIPPER", label: "Shipper" },
  { value: "SHIPPER_STATUS", label: "Status Inquiry" },
  { value: "TENDER", label: "Tender" },
  { value: "UNIMP", label: "Unimportant" },
  { value: "IGNORE", label: "Ignore" },
];

interface CustomTag {
  id: string;
  name: string;
}

export function EmailActions({ emailId, currentCategory, currentCustomTag }: EmailActionsProps) {
  const [retagging, setRetagging] = useState(false);
  const [aiRetagging, setAiRetagging] = useState(false);
  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [customTags, setCustomTags] = useState<CustomTag[]>([]);
  const [showNewTag, setShowNewTag] = useState(false);
  const [newTagName, setNewTagName] = useState("");
  const [creatingTag, setCreatingTag] = useState(false);
  const router = useRouter();

  useEffect(() => {
    fetch("/api/custom-tags")
      .then((r) => r.json())
      .then((d) => setCustomTags(d.tags || []))
      .catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  async function handleAiRetag() {
    setAiRetagging(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/ai/classify", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        setError(data.error || `Failed (${response.status})`);
        return;
      }
      router.refresh();
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Request failed");
    } finally {
      setAiRetagging(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleRetag(category: SystemCategory) {
    if (category === currentCategory && !currentCustomTag) return;
    setRetagging(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/emails/retag", {
        method: "PATCH",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, category }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        setError(data.error || `Failed (${response.status})`);
        return;
      }
      router.refresh();
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Request failed");
    } finally {
      setRetagging(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleCustomTag(tagName: string) {
    if (tagName === currentCustomTag) return;
    setRetagging(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/emails/retag", {
        method: "PATCH",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, customTag: tagName }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        setError(data.error || `Failed (${response.status})`);
        return;
      }
      router.refresh();
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Request failed");
    } finally {
      setRetagging(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleCreateTag() {
    const trimmed = newTagName.trim();
    if (!trimmed) return;
    setCreatingTag(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/custom-tags", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ name: trimmed }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) {
        setError(data.error || "Failed to create tag");
        return;
      }
      setCustomTags((prev) => [...prev, data.tag].sort((a, b) => a.name.localeCompare(b.name)));
      setNewTagName("");
      setShowNewTag(false);
      // Auto-apply the new tag to this email
      await handleCustomTag(trimmed);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to create tag");
    } finally {
      setCreatingTag(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleDeleteTag(e: React.MouseEvent, tagId: string, tagName: string) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    e.preventDefault();
    try {
      await fetch("/api/custom-tags", {
        method: "DELETE",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ id: tagId }),
      });
      setCustomTags((prev) => prev.filter((t) => t.id !== tagId));
      if (currentCustomTag === tagName) router.refresh();
    } catch {
      // silent
    }
  }

  async function handleDeleteEmail() {
    if (!confirm("Delete this email? This will also remove it from your Microsoft inbox.")) return;
    setDeleting(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const response = await fetch("/api/emails/delete", {
        method: "DELETE",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok) {
        setError(data.error || `Failed (${response.status})`);
        return;
      }
      router.push("/dashboard");
      router.refresh();
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Delete failed");
    } finally {
      setDeleting(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5">
      <Button variant="secondary" size="sm" onClick={() => router.back()}>
        <ArrowLeft data-icon="inline-start" className="size-3.5" />
        Back
      </Button>

      <DropdownMenu onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setShowNewTag(false); }}>
        <DropdownMenuTrigger
          className={cn(buttonVariants({ variant: "secondary", size: "sm" }), "gap-1")}
          disabled={retagging}
        >
          {retagging ? (
            <Loader2 className="size-3.5 animate-spin" />
          ) : (
            <Tag data-icon="inline-start" className="size-3.5" />
          )}
          Re-tag
          <ChevronDown className="size-3 opacity-50" />
        </DropdownMenuTrigger>
        <DropdownMenuContent align="start" className="w-56">
          {systemCategories.map((cat) => (
            <DropdownMenuItem
              key={cat.value}
              onClick={() => handleRetag(cat.value)}
              disabled={cat.value === currentCategory && !currentCustomTag}
            >
              {cat.label}
              {cat.value === currentCategory && !currentCustomTag && (
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto">(current)</span>
              )}
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          ))}

          {customTags.length > 0 && <DropdownMenuSeparator />}
          {customTags.map((tag) => (
            <DropdownMenuItem
              key={tag.id}
              onClick={() => handleCustomTag(tag.name)}
              className="group"
            >
              <Tag className="h-3 w-3 mr-1.5 text-violet-500" />
              {tag.name}
              {currentCustomTag === tag.name && (
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-auto mr-1">(current)</span>
              )}
              <button
                onClick={(e) => handleDeleteTag(e, tag.id, tag.name)}
                className="ml-auto opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:text-red-500 transition-opacity p-0.5"
              >
                <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3" />
              </button>
            </DropdownMenuItem>
          ))}

          <DropdownMenuSeparator />
          {showNewTag ? (
            <div className="px-2 py-1.5 flex gap-1.5" onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()} onPointerDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}>
              <Input
                value={newTagName}
                onChange={(e) => setNewTagName(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Tag name..."
                className="h-7 text-xs"
                autoFocus
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  e.stopPropagation();
                  if (e.key === "Enter") handleCreateTag();
                  if (e.key === "Escape") setShowNewTag(false);
                }}
              />
              <Button
                size="sm"
                className="h-7 px-2"
                disabled={creatingTag || !newTagName.trim()}
                onClick={(e) => { e.stopPropagation(); handleCreateTag(); }}
              >
                {creatingTag ? <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin" /> : <Plus className="h-3 w-3" />}
              </Button>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div
              role="menuitem"
              className="relative flex cursor-pointer select-none items-center gap-2 rounded-sm px-2 py-1.5 text-sm outline-none hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground"
              onClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); setShowNewTag(true); }}
              onPointerDown={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
              onPointerUp={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
              onSelect={(e: React.SyntheticEvent) => e.preventDefault()}
            >
              <Plus className="h-3 w-3 text-violet-500" />
              Add new tag...
            </div>
          )}
        </DropdownMenuContent>
      </DropdownMenu>

      <Button
        variant="secondary"
        size="sm"
        onClick={handleAiRetag}
        disabled={aiRetagging || retagging}
      >
        {aiRetagging ? (
          <Loader2 data-icon="inline-start" className="size-3.5 animate-spin" />
        ) : (
          <Sparkles data-icon="inline-start" className="size-3.5" />
        )}
        {aiRetagging ? "Classifying..." : "AI Reclassify"}
      </Button>

      <div className="flex-1" />

      <Button
        variant="ghost"
        size="sm"
        onClick={handleDeleteEmail}
        disabled={deleting}
        className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-600 hover:bg-red-50 dark:hover:bg-red-950/30"
      >
        {deleting ? (
          <Loader2 className="size-3.5 animate-spin" />
        ) : (
          <Trash2 className="size-3.5" />
        )}
      </Button>

      {error && (
        <span className="text-xs text-red-600">{error}</span>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/email-detail/email-body.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import DOMPurify from "dompurify";

export function EmailBody({ html }: { html: string | null }) {
  const iframeRef = useRef<HTMLIFrameElement>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!iframeRef.current || !html) return;

    const doc = iframeRef.current.contentDocument;
    if (!doc) return;

    const cleanHtml = DOMPurify.sanitize(html, {
      FORBID_TAGS: ["script", "style", "iframe", "object", "embed", "form"],
      FORBID_ATTR: ["onerror", "onload", "onclick", "onmouseover"],
    });

    doc.open();
    doc.write(`
      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>
        <head>
          <style>
            body {
              font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
              font-size: 14px;
              line-height: 1.6;
              color: #333;
              margin: 0;
              padding: 16px;
              word-wrap: break-word;
            }
            img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; }
            a { color: #2563eb; }
            table { max-width: 100%; }
          </style>
        </head>
        <body>${cleanHtml}</body>
      </html>
    `);
    doc.close();

    // Auto-resize iframe
    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
      if (iframeRef.current && doc.body) {
        iframeRef.current.style.height =
          doc.body.scrollHeight + 32 + "px";
      }
    });

    if (doc.body) {
      resizeObserver.observe(doc.body);
    }

    return () => resizeObserver.disconnect();
  }, [html]);

  if (!html) {
    return (
      <div className="p-8 text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm">
        No email content available
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <iframe
      ref={iframeRef}
      className="w-full border-0 min-h-[200px]"
      sandbox="allow-same-origin"
      title="Email content"
    />
  );
}
