import { format } from "date-fns";
import { CategoryBadge, ReplyBadge, CustomTagBadge } from "@/components/inbox/category-badge";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Paperclip } from "lucide-react";
import type { EmailDetail, ReplyStatus } from "@/types/email";

function getInitials(name: string | null, email: string): string {
  if (name) {
    const parts = name.trim().split(/\s+/);
    if (parts.length >= 2) return (parts[0][0] + parts[1][0]).toUpperCase();
    return name[0].toUpperCase();
  }
  return email[0].toUpperCase();
}

function getAvatarStyle(str: string): { bg: string; text: string } {
  const palettes = [
    { bg: "bg-blue-100/60", text: "text-blue-400" },
    { bg: "bg-emerald-100/60", text: "text-emerald-400" },
    { bg: "bg-violet-100/60", text: "text-violet-400" },
    { bg: "bg-amber-100/60", text: "text-amber-400" },
    { bg: "bg-rose-100/60", text: "text-rose-400" },
    { bg: "bg-teal-100/60", text: "text-teal-400" },
    { bg: "bg-indigo-100/60", text: "text-indigo-400" },
    { bg: "bg-sky-100/60", text: "text-sky-400" },
  ];
  let hash = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) hash = str.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);
  return palettes[Math.abs(hash) % palettes.length];
}

function intentLabel(intent: string): string {
  switch (intent) {
    case "load_inquiry": return "Load Inquiry";
    case "rate_offer": return "Rate Offer";
    case "rate_counter": return "Rate Counter";
    case "accept": return "Accepted";
    case "walk_away": return "Carrier Declined";
    default: return intent;
  }
}

export function EmailHeader({
  email,
  replyStatus,
  negotiationStatus,
  customTag,
}: {
  email: EmailDetail;
  replyStatus?: ReplyStatus;
  negotiationStatus?: { roundCount: number; intent: string } | null;
  customTag?: string | null;
}) {
  const initials = getInitials(email.from_name, email.from_address);
  const avatar = getAvatarStyle(email.from_address);

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      {/* Subject row */}
      <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4">
        <h1 className="text-xl font-semibold leading-tight">
          {email.subject || "(no subject)"}
        </h1>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0 flex-wrap justify-end">
          {negotiationStatus && (
            <>
              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 dark:bg-slate-800/50 dark:text-slate-400">
                Round {negotiationStatus.roundCount}
              </Badge>
              <Badge
                variant="secondary"
                className={`text-xs font-medium ${
                  negotiationStatus.intent === "walk_away"
                    ? "bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400"
                    : "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400"
                }`}
              >
                {intentLabel(negotiationStatus.intent)}
              </Badge>
            </>
          )}
          <ReplyBadge status={replyStatus ?? null} />
          <CategoryBadge category={email.category} />
          <CustomTagBadge tag={customTag} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Sender row with avatar */}
      <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
        <div
          className={`h-10 w-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-semibold shrink-0 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/40 shadow-sm ${avatar.bg} ${avatar.text}`}
        >
          {initials}
        </div>
        <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
            <div className="min-w-0">
              <span className="text-sm font-semibold">
                {email.from_name || email.from_address}
              </span>
              {email.from_name && (
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground ml-1.5">
                  &lt;{email.from_address}&gt;
                </span>
              )}
            </div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
              {email.has_attachments && (
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-muted-foreground">
                  <Paperclip className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                </span>
              )}
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                {format(new Date(email.received_at), "MMM d, yyyy 'at' h:mm a")}
              </span>
            </div>
          </div>
          {email.to_addresses.length > 0 && (
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-0.5">
              to {email.to_addresses.join(", ")}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/email-detail/load-extraction.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tooltip";
import {
  Wand2,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Copy,
  Check,
  Paperclip,
  FileText,
  Plus,
  DollarSign,
  Send,
  Pencil,
  ShieldQuestion,
} from "lucide-react";

interface ExtractedLoad {
  client_name?: string;
  client_id: string | number;
  shipfrom_customer_id: string | number;
  shipto_customer_id: string | number;
  shipfrom_apt_required: boolean;
  shipto_apt_required: boolean;
  order_type: string;
  equipment_type: string;
  total_weight: string | number;
  requirements: string;
  notes: string;
  requested_pickup_date: string;
  requested_delivery_date: string;
  status: string;
  origin_city?: string;
  origin_state?: string;
  dest_city?: string;
  dest_state?: string;
  shipper_rate?: number | string;
  order_stops: { type: string; location: string; address: string }[];
  order_items: { description: string; class: string; weight: string | number }[];
  order_accessorials: unknown[];
}

function na(val: string | number | boolean | null | undefined): string {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || val === "NA" || val === "") return "—";
  return String(val);
}

function fmt(val: string | number | null | undefined): string {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || val === "NA" || val === "") return "—";
  return String(val);
}

interface Shipper {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  billing_email: string | null;
  logistics_email: string | null;
}

interface MatchedClient {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  matchedVia: "name" | "email";
}

function normalizeForMatch(s: string): string {
  return s
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/\b(llc|inc|corp|corporation|co|ltd|limited|l\.l\.c\.?)\b/gi, "")
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9 ]/g, " ")
    .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
    .trim();
}

function matchShipperByName(clientName: string, shippers: Shipper[]): Shipper | null {
  if (!clientName || clientName === "NA") return null;
  const needle = normalizeForMatch(clientName);
  if (!needle) return null;
  for (const s of shippers) {
    if (normalizeForMatch(s.name) === needle) return s;
  }
  for (const s of shippers) {
    const hay = normalizeForMatch(s.name);
    if (hay.includes(needle) || needle.includes(hay)) return s;
  }
  const words = needle.split(" ").filter(w => w.length > 2);
  if (words.length > 0) {
    for (const s of shippers) {
      const hay = normalizeForMatch(s.name);
      if (words.every(w => hay.includes(w))) return s;
    }
  }
  return null;
}

function matchShipperByEmail(fromAddress: string, shippers: Shipper[]): Shipper | null {
  if (!fromAddress) return null;
  const email = fromAddress.toLowerCase().trim();
  // Try exact email match
  for (const s of shippers) {
    if (s.billing_email?.toLowerCase() === email || s.logistics_email?.toLowerCase() === email) return s;
  }
  // Try domain match — extract domain from the "From" address and match against shipper emails
  const fromDomain = email.split("@")[1];
  if (!fromDomain) return null;
  // Skip generic email providers
  const generic = ["gmail.com", "yahoo.com", "hotmail.com", "outlook.com", "aol.com", "icloud.com", "live.com", "msn.com", "protonmail.com"];
  if (generic.includes(fromDomain)) return null;
  for (const s of shippers) {
    const billingDomain = s.billing_email?.toLowerCase().split("@")[1];
    const logisticsDomain = s.logistics_email?.toLowerCase().split("@")[1];
    if (billingDomain === fromDomain || logisticsDomain === fromDomain) return s;
  }
  return null;
}

interface RateQuoteLine {
  index: number;
  origin: string;
  destination: string;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  our_rate: number | null;
  equipment_type: string;
  pickup_date: string;
  delivery_date: string;
  weight: string;
  reasoning: string;
}

interface LoadExtractionProps {
  emailId: string;
  fromAddress?: string;
  emailSubject?: string;
  category?: string;
  manualOverride?: boolean;
}

export function LoadExtraction({ emailId, fromAddress, emailSubject, category, manualOverride }: LoadExtractionProps) {
  const isTender = category === "TENDER";
  // If manually tagged as SHIPPER, skip pitch detection — treat as awarded
  const manuallySetToShipper = manualOverride === true && category === "SHIPPER";
  // null = not started, [] or [...] = streaming/done
  const [loads, setLoads] = useState<ExtractedLoad[] | null>(null);
  const [attachmentsProcessed, setAttachmentsProcessed] = useState<string[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [copiedRow, setCopiedRow] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [copiedAll, setCopiedAll] = useState(false);
  const [matchedClient, setMatchedClient] = useState<MatchedClient | null>(null);
  const [shippers, setShippers] = useState<Shipper[]>([]);
  const router = useRouter();

  // Shipper confirmation gate: null = not asked, true = awarded, false = just a pitch
  const [loadAwarded, setLoadAwarded] = useState<boolean | null>(null);
  const [awardCheck, setAwardCheck] = useState<{ checking: boolean; result: null | { is_awarded: boolean; confidence: number; reasoning: string } }>({ checking: false, result: null });
  // Track if email was retagged to TENDER by pitch detection
  const [retaggedToTender, setRetaggedToTender] = useState(false);

  // Rate quote state
  const [rateQuoteLines, setRateQuoteLines] = useState<RateQuoteLine[] | null>(null);
  const [draftEmail, setDraftEmail] = useState<string>("");
  const [rateLoading, setRateLoading] = useState(false);
  const [rateError, setRateError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);
  const [sendError, setSendError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Fetch shipper list once
  useEffect(() => {
    fetch("/api/shippers").then((r) => r.json())
      .then((json) => { if (json.data) setShippers(json.data); })
      .catch(() => {});
  }, []);

  // Progress 0–88 while streaming (time-based), snaps to 100 on done
  const [progress, setProgress] = useState(0);
  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);
  const startTimeRef = useRef<number>(0);
  const loadsRef = useRef(loads);
  const errorRef = useRef(error);
  loadsRef.current = loads;
  errorRef.current = error;

  useEffect(() => {
    if (loading) {
      setProgress(0);
      startTimeRef.current = Date.now();
      timerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
        const elapsed = Date.now() - startTimeRef.current;
        // Fills to 88% over ~25 seconds, then slows down
        setProgress(Math.min(88, (elapsed / 25000) * 100));
      }, 200);
    } else {
      if (timerRef.current) { clearInterval(timerRef.current); timerRef.current = null; }
      if (loadsRef.current !== null && loadsRef.current.length > 0 && !errorRef.current) {
        setProgress(100);
      } else if (errorRef.current) {
        setProgress(0);
      }
    }
    return () => { if (timerRef.current) clearInterval(timerRef.current); };
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [loading]);

  // Match client when shippers load or loads finish extracting
  useEffect(() => {
    if (shippers.length === 0 || loading) return;
    if (!loads || loads.length === 0) return;

    // 1. Try matching by extracted client_name from AI
    const clientName = loads[0]?.client_name;
    if (clientName && clientName !== "NA") {
      const match = matchShipperByName(clientName, shippers);
      if (match) {
        setMatchedClient({ id: match.id, name: match.name, matchedVia: "name" });
        return;
      }
    }

    // 2. Try matching by sender email address
    if (fromAddress) {
      const match = matchShipperByEmail(fromAddress, shippers);
      if (match) {
        setMatchedClient({ id: match.id, name: match.name, matchedVia: "email" });
        return;
      }
    }

    setMatchedClient(null);
  }, [shippers, loads, loading, fromAddress]);

  useEffect(() => {
    // Run extraction and award check in parallel (award check only needs emailId, not extracted loads)
    extract();
    if (!isTender && !manuallySetToShipper) {
      // Only run pitch detection if not manually overridden to SHIPPER
      checkAwardStatus();
    } else if (manuallySetToShipper) {
      // Manually tagged as SHIPPER — skip pitch detection, go straight to awarded flow
      setLoadAwarded(true);
    }
    // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, [emailId]);

  // Auto-generate rate quote when extraction finishes (TENDER only)
  const autoQuoteTriggered = useRef(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!loading && loads && loads.length > 0 && isTender && !autoQuoteTriggered.current && !rateQuoteLines) {
      autoQuoteTriggered.current = true;
      generateRateQuote();
    }
  }, [loading, loads]); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // Auto-decide based on AI award check result (only if confident)
  const autoDecided = useRef(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (autoDecided.current || !awardCheck.result || loadAwarded !== null) return;
    const { is_awarded, confidence } = awardCheck.result;
    if (confidence >= 0.8) {
      autoDecided.current = true;
      if (is_awarded) {
        setLoadAwarded(true);
      } else {
        // Pitch detected — backend already retagged to TENDER
        setLoadAwarded(false);
        setRetaggedToTender(true);
        // Refresh server component so the category badge updates from SHIPPER → TENDER
        router.refresh();
      }
    }
    // Low confidence → leave loadAwarded as null, show the prompt
  }, [awardCheck.result]); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  // Auto-generate rate quote when pitch is decided AND loads are ready
  useEffect(() => {
    if (loadAwarded === false && !loading && loads && loads.length > 0 && !rateQuoteLines && !rateLoading && !autoQuoteTriggered.current) {
      autoQuoteTriggered.current = true;
      generateRateQuote();
    }
  }, [loadAwarded, loading, loads]); // eslint-disable-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps

  async function extract() {
    setLoading(true);
    setLoads(null);
    setError(null);
    setAttachmentsProcessed([]);
    setRateQuoteLines(null);
    setDraftEmail("");
    setSent(false);
    setSendError(null);
    setRateError(null);
    setLoadAwarded(null);
    setAwardCheck({ checking: false, result: null });
    autoQuoteTriggered.current = false;
    autoDecided.current = false;

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/extract-load", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        throw new Error(data.error || "Extraction failed");
      }

      if (!res.body) throw new Error("No response body");

      const reader = res.body.getReader();
      const decoder = new TextDecoder();
      let buffer = "";
      let isDone = false;

      outer: while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split("\n");
        buffer = lines.pop() || "";

        for (const line of lines) {
          if (!line.startsWith("data: ")) continue;
          const raw = line.slice(6).trim();

          let event: Record<string, unknown>;
          try {
            event = JSON.parse(raw);
          } catch {
            continue;
          }

          if (event.type === "meta") {
            setAttachmentsProcessed((event.attachments as string[]) || []);
            setLoads([]);
          } else if (event.type === "load") {
            const { type: _type, ...loadData } = event;
            setLoads((prev) => [...(prev ?? []), loadData as unknown as ExtractedLoad]);
          } else if (event.type === "done") {
            isDone = true;
            break outer;
          } else if (event.type === "error") {
            throw new Error((event.message as string) || "Extraction failed");
          }
        }

        if (isDone) break;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to extract load data");
      setLoads(null);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  function copyRow(load: ExtractedLoad, i: number) {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(load, null, 2));
    setCopiedRow(i);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedRow(null), 2000);
  }

  function openPreview() {
    if (!loads || loads.length === 0) return;
    sessionStorage.setItem(`mailer_preview_loads_${emailId}`, JSON.stringify(loads));
    if (matchedClient) {
      sessionStorage.setItem(`mailer_matched_client_${emailId}`, JSON.stringify(matchedClient));
    } else {
      sessionStorage.removeItem(`mailer_matched_client_${emailId}`);
    }
    router.push(`/email/${emailId}/add-orders`);
  }

  function copyAll() {
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(loads, null, 2));
    setCopiedAll(true);
    setTimeout(() => setCopiedAll(false), 2000);
  }

  async function generateRateQuote() {
    if (!loads || loads.length === 0) return;
    setRateLoading(true);
    setRateError(null);
    setSent(false);
    setSendError(null);

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/generate-rate-quote", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          loads,
          shipperName: matchedClient?.name || loads[0]?.client_name || "",
          emailSubject: emailSubject || "",
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to generate rates");
      setRateQuoteLines(data.rateQuoteLines);
      setDraftEmail(data.draftEmail);
    } catch (err) {
      setRateError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Rate generation failed");
    } finally {
      setRateLoading(false);
    }
  }

  function buildCsv(): string {
    if (!rateQuoteLines) return "";
    const header = "Lane #,Origin,Destination,Shipper Rate,Our Rate,Equipment,Pickup Date,Weight";
    const rows = rateQuoteLines.map((l) =>
      `${l.index},"${l.origin}","${l.destination}",${l.shipper_rate ?? ""},${l.our_rate ?? ""},"${l.equipment_type}","${l.pickup_date}","${l.weight}"`
    );
    return [header, ...rows].join("\n");
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    if (!draftEmail.trim() || !rateQuoteLines) return;
    setSending(true);
    setSendError(null);

    try {
      const csvContent = buildCsv();
      // Build lane summaries for the quoted_loads record
      const laneSummaries = rateQuoteLines.map((l) => ({
        index: l.index,
        origin: l.origin,
        destination: l.destination,
        shipper_rate: l.shipper_rate,
        our_rate: l.our_rate,
        equipment_type: l.equipment_type,
        pickup_date: l.pickup_date,
        weight: l.weight,
      }));

      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-quote-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          emailId,
          replyBody: draftEmail,
          csvContent,
          csvFilename: "rate_quotes.csv",
          lanes: laneSummaries,
          shipperName: matchedClient?.name || loads?.[0]?.client_name || "",
          emailSubject: emailSubject || "",
        }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Send failed");
      setSent(true);
      setIsEditing(false);
    } catch (err) {
      setSendError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send");
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  async function checkAwardStatus() {
    setAwardCheck({ checking: true, result: null });
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/check-award", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (res.ok && data.result) {
        setAwardCheck({ checking: false, result: data.result });
      } else {
        setAwardCheck({ checking: false, result: null });
      }
    } catch {
      setAwardCheck({ checking: false, result: null });
    }
  }

  function handleRateChange(index: number, value: string) {
    if (!rateQuoteLines) return;
    const num = parseFloat(value);
    setRateQuoteLines((prev) =>
      prev!.map((l) => (l.index === index ? { ...l, our_rate: isNaN(num) ? null : num } : l))
    );
  }

  // Spinner before first SSE event
  if (loading && loads === null) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 py-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
        <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
        Scanning email for load data...
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-red-600">
        <span>Load extraction failed: {error}</span>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 text-xs px-2" onClick={extract}>
          <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
          Retry
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // Done and nothing found
  if (!loading && (!loads || loads.length === 0)) return null;

  const isStreaming = loading && loads !== null;
  const isDone = !loading && loads !== null && loads.length > 0;

  return (
    <Card className="border-border bg-white">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="space-y-1.5">
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-foreground">
              <Wand2 className="h-4 w-4" />
              Extracted Load Data
              <Badge
                variant="secondary"
                className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium"
              >
                {isStreaming && <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin" />}
                {isStreaming
                  ? loads!.length > 0
                    ? `${loads!.length} found…`
                    : "scanning…"
                  : `${loads!.length} load${loads!.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}`}
              </Badge>

              {/* Award status badge */}
              {!isTender && awardCheck.checking && (
                <Badge variant="secondary" className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium animate-pulse">
                  <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin" />
                  Checking...
                </Badge>
              )}
              {!isTender && awardCheck.result && (
                <Tooltip>
                  <TooltipTrigger>
                    <Badge
                      variant="secondary"
                      className={`flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium cursor-default ${
                        awardCheck.result.is_awarded
                          ? "bg-green-100 text-green-800 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400"
                          : "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400"
                      }`}
                    >
                      {awardCheck.result.is_awarded ? (
                        <Check className="h-3 w-3" />
                      ) : (
                        <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3" />
                      )}
                      {awardCheck.result.is_awarded ? "Awarded" : "Pitch"}
                    </Badge>
                  </TooltipTrigger>
                  <TooltipContent side="bottom" className="max-w-xs text-xs">
                    {awardCheck.result.reasoning}
                  </TooltipContent>
                </Tooltip>
              )}
            </CardTitle>

            {/* Progress bar — shows while streaming and stays green when done */}
            {(isStreaming || isDone) && (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="h-1.5 w-36 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gray-200">
                  <div
                    className={`h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out ${
                      isDone ? "bg-green-500" : "bg-blue-500"
                    }`}
                    style={{ width: `${progress}%` }}
                  />
                </div>
                <span
                  className={`text-xs font-medium tabular-nums ${
                    isDone ? "text-green-600" : "text-muted-foreground"
                  }`}
                >
                  {isDone ? (
                    <span className="flex items-center gap-1">
                      <Check className="h-3 w-3" />
                      Done
                    </span>
                  ) : (
                    `${Math.round(progress)}%`
                  )}
                </span>
              </div>
            )}

            {attachmentsProcessed.length > 0 && (
              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                <span className="flex items-center gap-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                  <Paperclip className="h-3 w-3" />
                  Auto scanned:
                </span>
                {attachmentsProcessed.map((name) => (
                  <a
                    key={name}
                    href={`/api/emails/${emailId}/attachment?name=${encodeURIComponent(name)}`}
                    target="_blank"
                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
                    className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 rounded border border-border bg-muted/60 px-2 py-0.5 text-xs text-foreground hover:bg-muted transition-colors"
                  >
                    <FileText className="h-3 w-3" />
                    {name}
                  </a>
                ))}
              </div>
            )}

            {matchedClient && (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-3 py-1.5">
                <Check className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-green-600 flex-shrink-0" />
                <span className="text-xs text-green-800">
                  <span className="font-semibold">{matchedClient.name}</span>
                  <span className="text-green-600 font-mono ml-1">#{matchedClient.id}</span>
                  <span className="text-green-600 ml-1.5">
                    — matched by {matchedClient.matchedVia === "email" ? "sender email" : "client name"}
                  </span>
                </span>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="h-7 text-xs gap-1"
              onClick={copyAll}
              disabled={isStreaming || !loads?.length}
            >
              {copiedAll ? <Check className="h-3 w-3 text-green-600" /> : <Copy className="h-3 w-3" />}
              {copiedAll ? "Copied!" : "Copy All JSON"}
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              size="sm"
              className="h-7"
              onClick={extract}
              disabled={loading}
            >
              <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
              Re-extract
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>

      <CardContent className="p-0">
        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
          <table className="w-full text-xs">
            <thead>
              <tr className="border-t border-border bg-muted/50 text-foreground">
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium w-8">#</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Origin</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Destination</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Rate</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Equipment</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Pickup</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Delivery</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Weight</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Requirements</th>
                <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Notes</th>
                <th className="px-3 py-2 w-8"></th>
              </tr>
            </thead>
            <tbody>
              {(loads ?? []).map((load, i) => {
                const origin = [load.origin_city, load.origin_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "—";
                const dest = [load.dest_city, load.dest_state].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "—";
                const rate =
                  load.shipper_rate && load.shipper_rate !== "NA"
                    ? `$${Number(load.shipper_rate).toLocaleString()}`
                    : "—";
                return (
                  <tr
                    key={i}
                    className={`border-t border-border ${i % 2 === 0 ? "bg-white" : "bg-muted/10"} hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors animate-in fade-in duration-300`}
                  >
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-muted-foreground font-mono">{i + 1}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{origin}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{dest}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 font-semibold text-green-700 font-mono whitespace-nowrap">{rate}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap">{fmt(load.equipment_type)}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap text-muted-foreground">{na(load.requested_pickup_date)}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap text-muted-foreground">{na(load.requested_delivery_date)}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap text-muted-foreground">
                      {load.total_weight && load.total_weight !== "NA"
                        ? `${Number(load.total_weight).toLocaleString()} lbs`
                        : "—"}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-muted-foreground max-w-[160px] truncate">{na(load.requirements)}</td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2 text-muted-foreground max-w-[200px] truncate">
                      {na(load.notes) === "—" ? "(made by AI)" : `${na(load.notes)} (made by AI)`}
                    </td>
                    <td className="px-3 py-2">
                      <Button
                        variant="ghost"
                        size="sm"
                        className="h-6 w-6 p-0"
                        onClick={() => copyRow(load, i)}
                        title="Copy JSON"
                      >
                        {copiedRow === i ? (
                          <Check className="h-3 w-3 text-green-600" />
                        ) : (
                          <Copy className="h-3 w-3 text-muted-foreground" />
                        )}
                      </Button>
                    </td>
                  </tr>
                );
              })}

              {isStreaming && loads!.length === 0 && (
                <tr className="border-t border-border">
                  <td colSpan={11} className="px-3 py-4 text-center text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin inline mr-2" />
                    Reading PDF and extracting loads…
                  </td>
                </tr>
              )}
            </tbody>
          </table>
        </div>
        {isDone && isTender && (
          <div className="flex items-center px-3 py-2 border-t border-border">
            {rateLoading ? (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="h-1.5 w-28 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gray-200">
                  <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-blue-500 animate-pulse" style={{ width: "60%" }} />
                </div>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Generating rates...</span>
              </div>
            ) : rateQuoteLines ? (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-green-600">
                <Check className="h-3 w-3" />
                Rates generated
              </div>
            ) : rateError ? (
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                className="h-7 gap-1 text-xs text-red-600"
                onClick={generateRateQuote}
              >
                <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3" />
                Retry rate generation
              </Button>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        )}

        {isDone && !isTender && loadAwarded === null && (
          <div className="border-t border-border px-4 py-3">
            <div className="flex items-start gap-3 rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 dark:border-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-950/30 p-3">
              <ShieldQuestion className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-600 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
              <div className="flex-1 space-y-2">
                <p className="text-sm font-medium text-amber-900 dark:text-amber-200">Is this load awarded to you?</p>

                {awardCheck.checking && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs text-amber-700">
                    <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin" />
                    AI analyzing email...
                  </div>
                )}

                {awardCheck.result && (
                  <div className={`flex items-start gap-2 rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-xs ${
                    awardCheck.result.is_awarded
                      ? "bg-green-100 text-green-800 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-300"
                      : "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-300"
                  }`}>
                    <span className="font-semibold flex-shrink-0">
                      AI says: {awardCheck.result.is_awarded ? "Awarded" : "Pitch / RFQ"}
                      {awardCheck.result.confidence >= 0.8 ? "" : " (uncertain)"}
                    </span>
                    <span className="text-[11px] opacity-80">— {awardCheck.result.reasoning}</span>
                  </div>
                )}

                {!awardCheck.checking && !awardCheck.result && (
                  <p className="text-xs text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400">
                    If this is a <strong>confirmed tender/award</strong>, proceed to add it to TTMS. If the shipper is just <strong>requesting a quote</strong> (pitch/RFQ), generate a rate quote instead.
                  </p>
                )}

                <div className="flex items-center gap-2 pt-1">
                  <Button
                    size="sm"
                    className="h-7 gap-1 bg-green-700 text-white hover:bg-green-800 text-xs"
                    onClick={() => setLoadAwarded(true)}
                  >
                    <Check className="h-3 w-3" />
                    Yes — Add to TTMS
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    variant="outline"
                    size="sm"
                    className="h-7 gap-1 text-xs"
                    onClick={() => {
                      setLoadAwarded(false);
                      setRetaggedToTender(true);
                      // Retag email to TENDER on backend, then refresh page badge
                      fetch("/api/emails/retag", {
                        method: "PATCH",
                        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
                        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, category: "TENDER" }),
                      }).then(() => router.refresh()).catch(() => {});
                    }}
                  >
                    <DollarSign className="h-3 w-3" />
                    No — Generate Rate Quote
                  </Button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}

        {isDone && !isTender && loadAwarded === true && (
          <div className="flex justify-end px-3 py-2 border-t border-border">
            <Button
              variant="default"
              size="sm"
              className="h-7 gap-1 bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800"
              onClick={openPreview}
            >
              <Plus className="h-3 w-3" />
              Preview &amp; Add {loads!.length} Order{loads!.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""} to TTMS
            </Button>
          </div>
        )}

        {isDone && !isTender && loadAwarded === false && (
          <div className="flex items-center px-3 py-2 border-t border-border">
            {rateLoading ? (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <div className="h-1.5 w-28 overflow-hidden rounded-full bg-gray-200">
                  <div className="h-full rounded-full bg-blue-500 animate-pulse" style={{ width: "60%" }} />
                </div>
                <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Generating rates...</span>
              </div>
            ) : rateQuoteLines ? (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-xs text-green-600">
                <Check className="h-3 w-3" />
                Rates generated
              </div>
            ) : rateError ? (
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="sm"
                className="h-7 gap-1 text-xs text-red-600"
                onClick={generateRateQuote}
              >
                <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3" />
                Retry rate generation
              </Button>
            ) : null}
          </div>
        )}

        {rateError && (
          <div className="px-3 py-2 text-xs text-red-600 border-t border-border">
            Rate generation failed: {rateError}
          </div>
        )}
      </CardContent>

      {/* Rate Quote Section */}
      {rateQuoteLines && rateQuoteLines.length > 0 && (
        <>
          <div className="border-t border-border" />
          <CardHeader className="pb-2 pt-4">
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-foreground">
              <DollarSign className="h-4 w-4" />
              Our Rate Offers
              <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">
                {rateQuoteLines.length} lane{rateQuoteLines.length !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
              </Badge>
              {sent && (
                <Badge className="bg-green-100 text-green-800 text-xs gap-1">
                  <Check className="h-3 w-3" /> Sent
                </Badge>
              )}
            </CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="p-0">
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="w-full text-xs">
                <thead>
                  <tr className="border-t border-border bg-muted/50 text-foreground">
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium w-8">#</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Origin</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Destination</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Shipper Rate</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Our Rate</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Equipment</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Pickup</th>
                    <th className="text-left px-3 py-2 font-medium">Weight</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {rateQuoteLines.map((line) => (
                    <tr
                      key={line.index}
                      className={`border-t border-border ${line.index % 2 === 0 ? "bg-white" : "bg-muted/10"} hover:bg-muted/30 transition-colors`}
                    >
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 text-muted-foreground font-mono">{line.index}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{line.origin}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 font-medium whitespace-nowrap">{line.destination}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 text-muted-foreground font-mono whitespace-nowrap">
                        {line.shipper_rate ? `$${line.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}` : "—"}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-1.5">
                        {isEditing ? (
                          <input
                            type="number"
                            className="w-20 h-6 px-1.5 text-xs font-mono font-semibold text-green-700 border border-border rounded bg-white"
                            value={line.our_rate ?? ""}
                            onChange={(e) => handleRateChange(line.index, e.target.value)}
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <span className="font-semibold text-green-700 font-mono">
                            {line.our_rate ? `$${line.our_rate.toLocaleString()}` : "—"}
                          </span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap">{line.equipment_type}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap text-muted-foreground">{line.pickup_date === "NA" ? "—" : line.pickup_date}</td>
                      <td className="px-3 py-2 whitespace-nowrap text-muted-foreground">
                        {line.weight === "NA" ? "—" : `${Number(line.weight).toLocaleString()} lbs`}
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>

            {/* Draft Email */}
            <div className="border-t border-border px-4 py-3 space-y-3">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <span className="text-xs font-medium text-foreground">Draft Reply</span>
                {!isEditing && (
                  <Button
                    variant="ghost"
                    size="sm"
                    className="h-6 text-xs gap-1"
                    onClick={() => setIsEditing(true)}
                    disabled={sent}
                  >
                    <Pencil className="h-3 w-3" />
                    Edit
                  </Button>
                )}
              </div>

              {isEditing ? (
                <textarea
                  className="w-full min-h-[160px] p-3 text-sm border border-border rounded-md bg-white resize-y focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-ring"
                  value={draftEmail}
                  onChange={(e) => setDraftEmail(e.target.value)}
                />
              ) : (
                <div className="rounded-md border border-border bg-muted/30 p-3 text-sm whitespace-pre-wrap text-foreground leading-relaxed">
                  {draftEmail}
                </div>
              )}

              {sendError && (
                <p className="text-xs text-red-600">{sendError}</p>
              )}

              <div className="flex items-center gap-2 justify-end">
                {isEditing && (
                  <Button
                    variant="outline"
                    size="sm"
                    className="h-7 text-xs"
                    onClick={() => setIsEditing(false)}
                  >
                    Done Editing
                  </Button>
                )}
                <Button
                  size="sm"
                  className="h-7 gap-1 bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 text-xs"
                  onClick={handleSend}
                  disabled={sending || sent || !draftEmail.trim()}
                >
                  {sending ? (
                    <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin" />
                  ) : sent ? (
                    <Check className="h-3 w-3" />
                  ) : (
                    <Send className="h-3 w-3" />
                  )}
                  {sending ? "Sending..." : sent ? "Sent!" : "Send with CSV"}
                </Button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </>
      )}
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/email-detail/manual-reply.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import { Reply, Send, X, Loader2, Check, Sparkles } from "lucide-react";

interface ManualReplyProps {
  emailId: string;
  fromAddress: string;
  subject?: string;
  category?: string;
  detectedIntent?: string;
  hasAttachments?: boolean;
}

export function ManualReply({
  emailId,
  fromAddress,
  subject,
  category,
  detectedIntent,
  hasAttachments,
}: ManualReplyProps) {
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);
  const [body, setBody] = useState("");
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [generating, setGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);

  async function handleGenerate() {
    setGenerating(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/draft-generic-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to generate reply");
      const draft = data.draft || "";
      if (!draft) throw new Error("AI returned empty reply");
      setBody(draft);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate AI reply");
    } finally {
      setGenerating(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    if (!body.trim()) return;
    setSending(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, replyBody: body, source: "manual" }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send reply");
      setSent(true);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply");
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  if (sent) {
    return (
      <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
        <CardContent className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3">
          <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">
            Reply sent to {fromAddress}
          </span>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="ml-auto text-xs text-green-600 hover:text-green-700"
            onClick={() => { setSent(false); setBody(""); }}
          >
            Send another
          </Button>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  if (!open) {
    return (
      <Button
        size="sm"
        variant="outline"
        className="gap-2"
        onClick={() => setOpen(true)}
      >
        <Reply className="h-4 w-4" />
        Reply
      </Button>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="border-border">
      <CardContent className="pt-4 space-y-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Replying to <span className="font-medium text-foreground">{fromAddress}</span>
          </span>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-6 w-6 p-0 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
            onClick={() => { setOpen(false); setBody(""); setError(null); }}
          >
            <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
          </Button>
        </div>

        {/* Context pills */}
        {(subject || category || detectedIntent) && (
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-1.5">
            {category && (
              <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
                {category}
              </span>
            )}
            {detectedIntent && detectedIntent !== "unknown" && (
              <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
                {detectedIntent.replace(/_/g, " ")}
              </span>
            )}
            {hasAttachments && (
              <span className="inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-muted px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-medium text-muted-foreground">
                📎 attachments
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
        )}

        <Textarea
          value={body}
          onChange={(e) => setBody(e.target.value)}
          placeholder="Type your reply or generate one with AI..."
          className="min-h-[120px] text-sm resize-y"
          autoFocus
          onKeyDown={(e) => {
            if ((e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) && e.key === "Enter") {
              e.preventDefault();
              handleSend();
            }
          }}
        />

        {error && (
          <p className="text-xs text-red-500">{error}</p>
        )}

        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
            <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">Ctrl+Enter to send</span>
            <Button
              size="sm"
              variant="outline"
              className="gap-1.5 text-xs h-7"
              onClick={handleGenerate}
              disabled={generating || sending}
            >
              {generating ? (
                <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin" />
              ) : (
                <Sparkles className="h-3 w-3" />
              )}
              {generating ? "Generating..." : "AI Draft"}
            </Button>
          </div>
          <Button
            size="sm"
            className="gap-2"
            onClick={handleSend}
            disabled={sending || !body.trim()}
          >
            {sending ? (
              <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
            ) : (
              <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
            )}
            Send Reply
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/email-detail/shipper-reply.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import {
  MessageSquarePlus,
  Send,
  X,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Check,
  Pencil,
} from "lucide-react";

interface ShipperReplyProps {
  emailId: string;
}

export function ShipperReply({ emailId }: ShipperReplyProps) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);
  const [dismissed, setDismissed] = useState(false);
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);

  async function generateDraft() {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    setOpen(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/draft-shipper-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to generate reply");
      setDraft(data.draft || "");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate reply");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    setSending(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, replyBody: draft, source: "shipper_reply" }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send reply");
      setSent(true);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply");
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  if (dismissed) return null;

  if (sent) {
    return (
      <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
        <CardContent className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3">
          <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">Reply sent to shipper</span>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  if (!open) {
    return (
      <Button
        size="sm"
        className="gap-2 bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 shadow-sm"
        onClick={generateDraft}
      >
        <MessageSquarePlus className="h-4 w-4" />
        Generate Reply
      </Button>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="border-blue-200 bg-blue-50/40">
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-blue-800">
            <MessageSquarePlus className="h-4 w-4" />
            Reply to Shipper
          </CardTitle>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
            onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}
          >
            <X className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-3">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
            Drafting reply…
          </div>
        ) : error ? (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{error}</p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
              <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
              Retry
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {editing ? (
              <Textarea
                value={draft}
                onChange={(e) => setDraft(e.target.value)}
                rows={6}
                className="bg-white text-sm"
              />
            ) : (
              <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-md border bg-white p-3 text-sm">
                {draft}
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <Button size="sm" onClick={handleSend} disabled={sending || !draft}>
                {sending ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1 animate-spin" />
                ) : (
                  <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                )}
                Send Reply
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setEditing(!editing)}>
                <Pencil className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                {editing ? "Done Editing" : "Edit"}
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
                <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Regenerate
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}>
                Dismiss
              </Button>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/email-detail/status-reply.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import {
  MapPin,
  Send,
  X,
  Loader2,
  RefreshCw,
  Check,
  Pencil,
} from "lucide-react";

interface StatusReplyProps {
  emailId: string;
}

export function StatusReply({ emailId }: StatusReplyProps) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState("");
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [sending, setSending] = useState(false);
  const [sent, setSent] = useState(false);
  const [dismissed, setDismissed] = useState(false);
  const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [open, setOpen] = useState(true);
  const [loadInfo, setLoadInfo] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const autoFetched = useRef(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!autoFetched.current) {
      autoFetched.current = true;
      generateDraft();
    }
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  }, []);

  async function generateDraft() {
    setLoading(true);
    setError(null);
    setOpen(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/draft-status-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to generate reply");
      setDraft(data.draft || "");
      if (data.loadContext) setLoadInfo(data.loadContext);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate reply");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  async function handleSend() {
    setSending(true);
    setError(null);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/emails/send-reply", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ emailId, replyBody: draft, source: "status_reply" }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      if (!text) throw new Error("Empty response");
      const data = JSON.parse(text);
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send reply");
      setSent(true);
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send reply");
    } finally {
      setSending(false);
    }
  }

  if (dismissed) return null;

  if (sent) {
    return (
      <Card className="border-green-200 bg-green-50">
        <CardContent className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3">
          <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
          <span className="text-sm font-medium text-green-700">Status update sent to shipper</span>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Card className="border-cyan-200 bg-cyan-50/40">
      <CardHeader className="pb-3">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-medium text-cyan-800">
            <MapPin className="h-4 w-4" />
            Shipper Status Reply
          </CardTitle>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="h-7 w-7 p-0"
            onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}
          >
            <X className="h-4 w-4" />
          </Button>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-3">
        {loading ? (
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
            Looking up load status & drafting reply…
          </div>
        ) : error ? (
          <div className="space-y-2">
            <p className="text-sm text-red-600">{error}</p>
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
              <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
              Retry
            </Button>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {loadInfo && (
              <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-md border border-cyan-200 bg-cyan-50 p-3 text-xs font-mono text-cyan-900">
                {loadInfo}
              </div>
            )}
            {editing ? (
              <Textarea
                value={draft}
                onChange={(e) => setDraft(e.target.value)}
                rows={6}
                className="bg-white text-sm"
              />
            ) : (
              <div className="whitespace-pre-wrap rounded-md border bg-white p-3 text-sm">
                {draft}
              </div>
            )}
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <Button size="sm" onClick={handleSend} disabled={sending || !draft}>
                {sending ? (
                  <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 mr-1 animate-spin" />
                ) : (
                  <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                )}
                Send Reply
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => setEditing(!editing)}>
                <Pencil className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                {editing ? "Done Editing" : "Edit"}
              </Button>
              <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={generateDraft}>
                <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
                Regenerate
              </Button>
              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setDismissed(true)}>
                Dismiss
              </Button>
            </div>
          </>
        )}
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/escalations/EscalationActions.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/dialog";
import { Loader2, Sparkles } from "lucide-react";
import type { Escalation } from "@/types/index";

interface EscalationActionsProps {
  escalation: Escalation;
  onResolve: (optionKey: string) => void;
}

export function EscalationActions({ escalation, onResolve }: EscalationActionsProps) {
  const [confirmKey, setConfirmKey] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [resolving, setResolving] = useState(false);

  const confirmOption = escalation.options.find((o) => o.key === confirmKey);

  async function handleConfirm() {
    if (!confirmKey) return;
    setResolving(true);
    try {
      await onResolve(confirmKey);
    } finally {
      setResolving(false);
      setConfirmKey(null);
    }
  }

  return (
    <>
      <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
        {escalation.options.map((option) => {
          const isRecommended = escalation.ai_recommendation === option.key;
          return (
            <Button
              key={option.key}
              size="sm"
              variant={isRecommended ? "default" : "outline"}
              onClick={() => setConfirmKey(option.key)}
              className="gap-1.5"
            >
              {isRecommended && <Sparkles className="h-3 w-3" />}
              {option.label}
            </Button>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      <Dialog open={confirmKey !== null} onOpenChange={() => setConfirmKey(null)}>
        <DialogContent>
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Confirm Resolution</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              Are you sure you want to resolve this escalation with:{" "}
              <span className="font-medium text-foreground">
                {confirmOption?.label}
              </span>
              ?
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setConfirmKey(null)}>
              Cancel
            </Button>
            <Button onClick={handleConfirm} disabled={resolving}>
              {resolving && <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />}
              Confirm
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/inbox/category-badge.tsx
================================================
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { Reply, Sparkles, Clock, Trophy, Tag } from "lucide-react";
import type { EmailCategory } from "@/types/database";
import type { ReplyStatus, AwardedStatus } from "@/types/email";

const categoryConfig: Record<
  EmailCategory,
  { label: string; className: string }
> = {
  IMP: {
    label: "Important",
    className: "bg-red-100 text-red-800 dark:bg-red-900/30 dark:text-red-400",
  },
  UNIMP: {
    label: "Unimportant",
    className:
      "bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800 dark:bg-yellow-900/30 dark:text-yellow-400",
  },
  IGNORE: {
    label: "Ignore",
    className:
      "bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 dark:bg-gray-800/50 dark:text-gray-400",
  },
  UNCLASSIFIED: {
    label: "Classifying...",
    className:
      "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400 animate-pulse",
  },
  SHIPPER: {
    label: "Shipper",
    className:
      "bg-green-100 text-green-800 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400",
  },
  TENDER: {
    label: "Tender",
    className:
      "bg-orange-100 text-orange-800 dark:bg-orange-900/30 dark:text-orange-400",
  },
  SHIPPER_STATUS: {
    label: "Status Inquiry",
    className:
      "bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800 dark:bg-cyan-900/30 dark:text-cyan-400",
  },
  SENT: {
    label: "Sent",
    className:
      "bg-blue-100 text-blue-800 dark:bg-blue-900/30 dark:text-blue-400",
  },
};

export function CategoryBadge({ category }: { category: EmailCategory }) {
  const config = categoryConfig[category];
  return (
    <Badge variant="secondary" className={cn("text-xs font-medium", config.className)}>
      {config.label}
    </Badge>
  );
}

export function AwardedStatusBadge({ status }: { status?: AwardedStatus }) {
  if (!status || status === "not_applicable") return null;

  if (status === "bidding") {
    return (
      <Badge
        variant="secondary"
        className="text-xs font-medium gap-1 bg-amber-100 text-amber-800 dark:bg-amber-900/30 dark:text-amber-400"
      >
        <Clock className="h-3 w-3" />
        Bidding
      </Badge>
    );
  }

  if (status === "awarded") {
    return (
      <Badge
        variant="secondary"
        className="text-xs font-medium gap-1 bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800 dark:bg-emerald-900/30 dark:text-emerald-400"
      >
        <Trophy className="h-3 w-3" />
        Awarded
      </Badge>
    );
  }

  return null;
}

export function ReplyBadge({ status }: { status: ReplyStatus }) {
  if (!status) return null;

  const isAi = status === "ai_replied";
  return (
    <Badge
      variant="secondary"
      className={cn(
        "text-xs font-medium gap-1",
        isAi
          ? "bg-purple-100 text-purple-700 dark:bg-purple-900/30 dark:text-purple-400"
          : "bg-green-100 text-green-700 dark:bg-green-900/30 dark:text-green-400"
      )}
    >
      {isAi ? (
        <Sparkles className="h-3 w-3" />
      ) : (
        <Reply className="h-3 w-3" />
      )}
      {isAi ? "AI Replied" : "Replied"}
    </Badge>
  );
}

export function CustomTagBadge({ tag }: { tag: string | null | undefined }) {
  if (!tag) return null;
  return (
    <Badge
      variant="secondary"
      className="text-xs font-medium gap-1 bg-violet-100 text-violet-800 dark:bg-violet-900/30 dark:text-violet-400"
    >
      <Tag className="h-3 w-3" />
      {tag}
    </Badge>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/inbox/category-tabs.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from "@/components/ui/tabs";
import type { EmailCategory } from "@/types/database";

interface CategoryTabsProps {
  activeTab: string;
  onTabChange: (tab: string) => void;
  counts: Record<string, number>;
}

const tabs: { value: string; label: string }[] = [
  { value: "ALL", label: "All" },
  { value: "IMP", label: "Important" },
  { value: "SHIPPER", label: "Shipper" },
  { value: "TENDER", label: "Tender" },
  { value: "SHIPPER_STATUS", label: "Status Inquiry" },
  { value: "BIDDING", label: "Bidding" },
  { value: "UNIMP", label: "Unimportant" },
  { value: "IGNORE", label: "Ignore" },
];

export function CategoryTabs({
  activeTab,
  onTabChange,
  counts,
}: CategoryTabsProps) {
  return (
    <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={onTabChange}>
      <TabsList>
        {tabs.map((tab) => (
          <TabsTrigger key={tab.value} value={tab.value} className="gap-1.5">
            {tab.label}
            {counts[tab.value] !== undefined && (
              <span className="text-xs bg-muted px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">
                {counts[tab.value]}
              </span>
            )}
          </TabsTrigger>
        ))}
      </TabsList>
    </Tabs>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/inbox/email-card.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import Link from "next/link";
import { format, isToday, isYesterday, formatDistanceToNow } from "date-fns";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { CategoryBadge, ReplyBadge, AwardedStatusBadge, CustomTagBadge } from "./category-badge";
import { Paperclip } from "lucide-react";
import type { EmailListItem } from "@/types/email";

function getInitials(name: string | null, email: string): string {
  if (name) {
    const parts = name.trim().split(/\s+/);
    if (parts.length >= 2) return (parts[0][0] + parts[1][0]).toUpperCase();
    return name[0].toUpperCase();
  }
  return email[0].toUpperCase();
}

function getAvatarStyle(str: string): { bg: string; text: string } {
  const palettes = [
    { bg: "bg-blue-100/60", text: "text-blue-400" },
    { bg: "bg-emerald-100/60", text: "text-emerald-400" },
    { bg: "bg-violet-100/60", text: "text-violet-400" },
    { bg: "bg-amber-100/60", text: "text-amber-400" },
    { bg: "bg-rose-100/60", text: "text-rose-400" },
    { bg: "bg-teal-100/60", text: "text-teal-400" },
    { bg: "bg-indigo-100/60", text: "text-indigo-400" },
    { bg: "bg-sky-100/60", text: "text-sky-400" },
  ];
  let hash = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < str.length; i++) hash = str.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);
  return palettes[Math.abs(hash) % palettes.length];
}

function formatTime(dateStr: string): string {
  const date = new Date(dateStr);
  if (isToday(date)) return format(date, "h:mm a");
  if (isYesterday(date)) return "Yesterday";
  const now = new Date();
  const diffDays = Math.floor((now.getTime() - date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (diffDays < 7) return format(date, "EEE"); // Mon, Tue, etc.
  if (date.getFullYear() === now.getFullYear()) return format(date, "MMM d");
  return format(date, "MMM d, yyyy");
}

export function EmailCard({ email }: { email: EmailListItem }) {
  const initials = getInitials(email.from_name, email.from_address);
  const avatar = getAvatarStyle(email.from_address);
  const senderName = email.from_name || email.from_address.split("@")[0];

  return (
    <Link
      href={`/email/${email.id}`}
      className={cn(
        "flex items-start gap-3 px-4 py-3 border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50",
        !email.is_read && "bg-primary/[0.03]"
      )}
    >
      {/* Glass avatar */}
      <div
        className={cn(
          "h-10 w-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-semibold shrink-0 mt-0.5 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/40 shadow-sm",
          avatar.bg,
          avatar.text
        )}
      >
        {initials}
      </div>

      {/* Content */}
      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 min-w-0">
            {!email.is_read && (
              <div className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-primary shrink-0" />
            )}
            <span
              className={cn(
                "text-sm truncate",
                !email.is_read ? "font-semibold text-foreground" : "font-medium text-foreground"
              )}
            >
              {senderName}
            </span>
          </div>
          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground shrink-0">
            {formatTime(email.received_at)}
          </span>
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-0.5">
          <p
            className={cn(
              "text-sm truncate flex-1",
              !email.is_read ? "text-foreground font-medium" : "text-muted-foreground"
            )}
          >
            {email.subject || "(no subject)"}
          </p>
          <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0">
            {email.has_attachments && (
              <Paperclip className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-muted-foreground" />
            )}
            <ReplyBadge status={email.reply_status ?? null} />
            <AwardedStatusBadge status={email.awarded_status} />
            <CategoryBadge category={email.category} />
            <CustomTagBadge tag={(email as unknown as { custom_tag?: string }).custom_tag} />
          </div>
        </div>

        <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate mt-0.5 leading-relaxed">
          {email.body_preview}
        </p>
      </div>
    </Link>
  );
}
