"use client";

import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Search } from "lucide-react";

interface EmailFiltersProps {
  search: string;
  onSearchChange: (value: string) => void;
}

export function EmailFilters({ search, onSearchChange }: EmailFiltersProps) {
  return (
    <div className="relative">
      <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-muted-foreground" />
      <Input
        placeholder="Search..."
        value={search}
        onChange={(e) => onSearchChange(e.target.value)}
        className="pl-9 max-w-sm"
      />
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/inbox/email-list.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo, useCallback, useRef } from "react";

/** Debounce a callback — returns a stable function that delays invocation. */
function useDebouncedCallback(fn: () => void, delay: number): () => void {
  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | undefined>(undefined);
  // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
  return useCallback(() => {
    clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);
    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => fn(), delay);
  }, [fn, delay]);
}
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import { CategoryTabs } from "./category-tabs";
import { EmailFilters } from "./email-filters";
import { EmailCard } from "./email-card";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import { Inbox, Bell, Plus, EyeOff } from "lucide-react";
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import type { EmailListItem, ReplyStatus } from "@/types/email";
import type { EmailCategory } from "@/types/database";

const PAGE_SIZE = 25;

export function EmailList() {
  const [emails, setEmails] = useState<EmailListItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("ALL");
  const [search, setSearch] = useState("");
  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
  const [newCount, setNewCount] = useState(0);
  const [counts, setCounts] = useState<Record<string, number>>({});
  const [hideIgnored, setHideIgnored] = useState(() => {
    if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
      return localStorage.getItem("hideIgnoredFromAll") === "true";
    }
    return false;
  });
  const router = useRouter();
  const activeTabRef = useRef(activeTab);
  const pageRef = useRef(page);

  // Keep refs in sync for realtime callback
  useEffect(() => { activeTabRef.current = activeTab; }, [activeTab]);
  useEffect(() => { pageRef.current = page; }, [page]);

  const fetchCounts = useCallback(async () => {
    const supabase = createClient();

    // Try fast RPC path first (single query, ~6 rows returned)
    const { data: rpcData, error: rpcError } = await supabase.rpc(
      "get_email_counts",
      { p_user_id: (await supabase.auth.getUser()).data.user?.id }
    );

    if (!rpcError && rpcData) {
      const countMap: Record<string, number> = {};
      let biddingTotal = 0;
      for (const row of rpcData as Array<{ category: string; cnt: number; bidding_count: number }>) {
        if (row.category === "ALL") {
          countMap.ALL = Number(row.cnt);
          biddingTotal = Number(row.bidding_count);
        } else {
          countMap[row.category] = Number(row.cnt);
        }
      }
      countMap.BIDDING = biddingTotal;
      setCounts(countMap);
      return;
    }

    // Fallback: original JS counting (works if RPC function not deployed yet)
    let { data: allEmails } = await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .select("category, awarded_status");

    if (!allEmails) {
      const fallback = await supabase.from("emails").select("category");
      allEmails = fallback.data as typeof allEmails;
    }

    if (allEmails) {
      // Exclude SENT from inbox counts
      const inboxEmails = allEmails.filter((e) => e.category !== "SENT");
      const countMap: Record<string, number> = { ALL: inboxEmails.length, BIDDING: 0 };
      for (const email of inboxEmails) {
        countMap[email.category] = (countMap[email.category] || 0) + 1;
        if ((email as { awarded_status?: string }).awarded_status === "bidding") {
          countMap.BIDDING++;
        }
      }
      setCounts(countMap);
    }
  }, []);

  // Debounced version for realtime handlers — prevents 50 calls during bulk sync
  const debouncedFetchCounts = useDebouncedCallback(fetchCounts, 1000);

  const fetchReplyStatuses = useCallback(
    async (emailIds: string[]): Promise<Record<string, ReplyStatus>> => {
      if (emailIds.length === 0) return {};
      const supabase = createClient();
      const { data: replies } = await supabase
        .from("email_replies")
        .select("email_id, source")
        .in("email_id", emailIds);

      const statusMap: Record<string, ReplyStatus> = {};
      if (replies) {
        for (const r of replies) {
          // If any reply is AI, mark as ai_replied; otherwise replied
          const isAi = r.source === "ai_draft" || r.source === "ai_auto";
          if (!statusMap[r.email_id] || isAi) {
            statusMap[r.email_id] = isAi ? "ai_replied" : "replied";
          }
        }
      }
      return statusMap;
    },
    []
  );

  const fetchEmails = useCallback(
    async (currentPage: number, currentTab: string, append: boolean = false) => {
      setLoading(true);
      const supabase = createClient();

      let query = supabase
        .from("emails")
        .select(
          "id, subject, from_address, from_name, received_at, body_preview, is_read, has_attachments, category, confidence, awarded_status, custom_tag"
        )
        .order("received_at", { ascending: false })
        .range(currentPage * PAGE_SIZE, (currentPage + 1) * PAGE_SIZE - 1);

      // Never show SENT emails in inbox
      query = query.neq("category", "SENT");

      if (currentTab === "BIDDING") {
        // Special tab: filter by awarded_status instead of category
        query = query.eq("awarded_status", "bidding");
      } else if (currentTab !== "ALL") {
        query = query.eq("category", currentTab as EmailCategory);
      }

      let { data, error } = await query;

      // Fallback: if query fails (e.g. awarded_status column missing), retry without it
      if (error) {
        console.error("Email fetch failed, retrying without awarded_status:", error.message);
        let fallbackQuery = supabase
          .from("emails")
          .select(
            "id, subject, from_address, from_name, received_at, body_preview, is_read, has_attachments, category, confidence"
          )
          .order("received_at", { ascending: false })
          .range(currentPage * PAGE_SIZE, (currentPage + 1) * PAGE_SIZE - 1);

        if (currentTab !== "ALL" && currentTab !== "BIDDING") {
          fallbackQuery = fallbackQuery.eq("category", currentTab as EmailCategory);
        }

        const fallback = await fallbackQuery;
        data = fallback.data as typeof data;
        error = fallback.error;
      }

      if (!error && data) {
        const emailIds = data.map((e) => e.id);
        const replyStatuses = await fetchReplyStatuses(emailIds);
        const enriched = data.map((e) => ({
          ...e,
          reply_status: replyStatuses[e.id] || null,
        })) as EmailListItem[];

        if (append) {
          setEmails((prev) => [...prev, ...enriched]);
        } else {
          setEmails(enriched);
        }
        setHasMore(data.length === PAGE_SIZE);
      }
      setLoading(false);
    },
    [fetchReplyStatuses]
  );

  // Auto-sync on first mount — fires in background so emails render instantly
  const hasSynced = useRef(false);
  useEffect(() => {
    if (hasSynced.current) return;
    hasSynced.current = true;
    // Fire and forget — sync fetches from Microsoft Graph, inserts into DB,
    // and realtime subscription picks up new emails as they arrive
    fetch("/api/emails/sync", { method: "POST" }).catch((err) =>
      console.error("Background sync failed:", err)
    );
  }, []);

  // Initial fetch + refetch on tab/page change
  useEffect(() => {
    fetchEmails(page, activeTab, page > 0);
    fetchCounts();
  }, [activeTab, page, fetchEmails, fetchCounts]);

  // Realtime subscription for new/updated emails
  useEffect(() => {
    const supabase = createClient();

    const channel = supabase
      .channel("realtime-inbox")
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "INSERT", schema: "public", table: "emails" },
        (payload) => {
          const newEmail = payload.new as EmailListItem;

          // If viewing first page, insert new email and keep sorted by received_at DESC
          // OLD CODE (prepended without sorting — caused random order during bulk sync):
          // if (pageRef.current === 0) {
          //   const matchesTab = tab === "ALL" || newEmail.category === tab || newEmail.category === "UNCLASSIFIED";
          //   if (matchesTab) {
          //     setEmails((prev) => {
          //       if (prev.some((e) => e.id === newEmail.id)) return prev;
          //       return [newEmail, ...prev];
          //     });
          //   }
          // }
          if (pageRef.current === 0) {
            const tab = activeTabRef.current;
            const matchesTab = tab === "ALL" || newEmail.category === tab || newEmail.category === "UNCLASSIFIED";
            if (matchesTab) {
              setEmails((prev) => {
                if (prev.some((e) => e.id === newEmail.id)) return prev;
                const next = [newEmail, ...prev];
                // Sort newest first — ensures correct order during bulk sync
                next.sort((a, b) =>
                  new Date(b.received_at).getTime() - new Date(a.received_at).getTime()
                );
                return next;
              });
            }
          }

          setNewCount((c) => c + 1);
          debouncedFetchCounts();
        }
      )
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "INSERT", schema: "public", table: "email_replies" },
        (payload) => {
          const reply = payload.new as { email_id: string; source: string };
          const isAi = reply.source === "ai_draft" || reply.source === "ai_auto";
          const status: ReplyStatus = isAi ? "ai_replied" : "replied";
          setEmails((prev) =>
            prev.map((e) =>
              e.id === reply.email_id ? { ...e, reply_status: status } : e
            )
          );
        }
      )
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "UPDATE", schema: "public", table: "emails" },
        (payload) => {
          const updated = payload.new as EmailListItem;
          const tab = activeTabRef.current;
          const matchesTab = tab === "ALL" || updated.category === tab ||
            (tab === "BIDDING" && (updated as { awarded_status?: string }).awarded_status === "bidding");

          setEmails((prev) => {
            const exists = prev.some((e) => e.id === updated.id);
            if (exists) {
              // Update in-place — category badge changes from "Classifying..." to actual tag
              if (!matchesTab) {
                // Category changed and no longer matches tab — remove it
                return prev.filter((e) => e.id !== updated.id);
              }
              // Preserve is_read from local state — don't let realtime updates reset read status
              return prev.map((e) => (e.id === updated.id ? { ...e, ...updated, is_read: e.is_read || updated.is_read } : e));
            } else if (matchesTab && pageRef.current === 0) {
              // Email was classified and now matches this tab — add it
              return [updated, ...prev];
            }
            return prev;
          });
          debouncedFetchCounts();
        }
      )
      .subscribe();

    return () => {
      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
    };
  }, [debouncedFetchCounts]);

  const filteredEmails = useMemo(() => {
    let result = emails;

    // Hide ignored emails from ALL tab when toggle is on
    if (hideIgnored && activeTab === "ALL") {
      result = result.filter((e) => e.category !== "IGNORE");
    }

    if (search) {
      const lower = search.toLowerCase();
      result = result.filter(
        (e) =>
          e.subject?.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
          e.from_address.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
          e.from_name?.toLowerCase().includes(lower) ||
          e.body_preview?.toLowerCase().includes(lower)
      );
    }

    return result;
  }, [emails, search, hideIgnored, activeTab]);

  function handleTabChange(tab: string) {
    setActiveTab(tab);
    setPage(0);
    setEmails([]);
    setNewCount(0);
  }

  if (loading && emails.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-96" />
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
        </div>
        {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, i) => (
          <Skeleton key={i} className="h-20 w-full" />
        ))}
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-4 flex-wrap">
        <CategoryTabs
          activeTab={activeTab}
          onTabChange={handleTabChange}
          counts={counts}
        />
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Button
            onClick={() => router.push("/inbox/compose")}
            className="group h-8 w-8 overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out hover:w-[5.2rem] hover:px-2.5"
            size="icon-sm"
          >
            <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-200 group-hover:rotate-90" />
            <span className="max-w-0 overflow-hidden whitespace-nowrap text-sm font-medium opacity-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out group-hover:max-w-[3rem] group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:ml-1">
              Write
            </span>
          </Button>
          <EmailFilters search={search} onSearchChange={setSearch} />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Hide ignored toggle — shown on IGNORE tab */}
      {activeTab === "IGNORE" && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Switch
            id="hide-ignored"
            checked={hideIgnored}
            onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
              setHideIgnored(checked);
              localStorage.setItem("hideIgnoredFromAll", String(checked));
            }}
          />
          <Label htmlFor="hide-ignored" className="text-xs text-muted-foreground flex items-center gap-1.5 cursor-pointer">
            <EyeOff className="h-3 w-3" />
            Hide ignored from All tab
          </Label>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* New email indicator when on a later page */}
      {newCount > 0 && page > 0 && (
        <button
          onClick={() => {
            setPage(0);
            setNewCount(0);
          }}
          className="w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 py-2 px-4 bg-primary/5 border border-primary/20 rounded-lg text-sm text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 transition-colors"
        >
          <Bell className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
          {newCount} new email{newCount !== 1 ? "s" : ""} — click to refresh
        </button>
      )}

      <div className="border rounded-lg overflow-hidden">
        {filteredEmails.length === 0 ? (
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-16 text-muted-foreground">
            <Inbox className="h-12 w-12 mb-3" />
            <p className="text-sm font-medium">No emails found</p>
            <p className="text-xs">
              {search
                ? "Try a different search term"
                : "Sync your inbox to get started"}
            </p>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {filteredEmails.map((email) => (
              <EmailCard key={email.id} email={email} />
            ))}
            {hasMore && (
              <div className="p-4 text-center">
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  size="sm"
                  onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + 1)}
                  disabled={loading}
                >
                  {loading ? "Loading..." : "Load More"}
                </Button>
              </div>
            )}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/loads/CarrierScoringPanel.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { useCarrierScoring } from "@/hooks/useCarrierScoring";
import { getScoreColor, getScoreLabel } from "@/lib/carrier-scoring";
import type { ScoredCarrier } from "@/lib/carrier-scoring";
import type { TTMSPastCarrier } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

type ScoredCarrierWithDAT = ScoredCarrier & { carrier_charge?: number; market_rate?: number | null };
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Textarea } from "@/components/ui/textarea";
import { Skeleton } from "@/components/ui/skeleton";
import {
  Sheet,
  SheetContent,
  SheetHeader,
  SheetTitle,
  SheetDescription,
} from "@/components/ui/sheet";
import {
  Send,
  Check,
  Sparkles,
  Loader2,
  Users,
  Mail,
  X,
  ShieldCheck,
  ShieldAlert,
  Route,
  Radio,
  TrendingUp,
} from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";

interface LoadInfo {
  id: string;
  load_number: string;
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  equipment_id: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
  commodity: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  total_miles: number | null;
}

interface CarrierScoringPanelProps {
  loadId: string;
  load: LoadInfo;
  senderName: string;
}

interface GeneratedEmail {
  subject: string;
  body: string;
  offerRate: number;
  reasoning?: string;
}

interface ProgressStep {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  status: "running" | "done" | "error";
}

function ScoreAnalysisContent({ carrier, score }: { carrier: ScoredCarrier; score: number }) {
  const lc = carrier.loads_count ?? 0;
  const rating = (carrier.carrier_rating ?? "").toUpperCase();
  const approved = carrier.carrier_approved === 1;
  const insured = carrier.insurance_valid === 1;
  const isActive = carrier.carrier_status === 1;
  const isHealthy = (rating === "SATISFACTORY" || rating === "CONDITIONAL") && approved;

  let laneScore = 0;
  if (lc >= 6) laneScore = 35;
  else if (lc >= 4) laneScore = 28;
  else if (lc >= 2) laneScore = 20;
  else if (lc >= 1) laneScore = 10;

  const ratingScore = (rating === "SATISFACTORY" || rating === "CONDITIONAL") ? 25 : 0;
  const approvalScore = approved ? 15 : 0;
  const insuranceScore = insured ? 15 : 0;

  const healthElab = isHealthy && insured
    ? "This score confirms that the carrier meets all regulatory requirements. Their Operating Authority (MC/DOT) is active, and their Insurance Certificates (Auto Liability, Cargo, etc.) are currently on file and have not expired. This indicates a low-risk partnership with no safety red flags or administrative lapses."
    : isHealthy && !insured
    ? "The carrier\u2019s Operating Authority and safety rating are satisfactory, but their insurance documentation needs verification. Confirm that Auto Liability and Cargo certificates are current before booking to mitigate risk."
    : !isHealthy && insured
    ? "While insurance is current and valid, the carrier\u2019s safety rating or approval status needs review. Operating Authority may be conditional or pending \u2014 verify compliance before proceeding with a load assignment."
    : "Multiple compliance flags detected. Both safety rating and insurance status need verification before this carrier can be considered for load assignment. Recommend a full compliance review.";

  const laneElab = lc >= 6
    ? `The carrier has hauled this lane ${lc} times, establishing them as a highly experienced specialist for this route. They have deep familiarity with pickup/delivery requirements, transit times, and any operational nuances for this corridor. This level of repeat business signals strong reliability.`
    : lc >= 4
    ? `${lc} loads on this lane demonstrates strong familiarity with this route. The carrier understands the transit requirements, common pickup/delivery patterns, and typical scheduling for this corridor. They are well past the \u201Ctrial\u201D phase and building a specialized presence.`
    : lc >= 2
    ? `The carrier is categorized as a Solid Repeat Carrier for this specific route. While ${lc} loads establish a pattern, it demonstrates that the carrier is familiar with the pickup/delivery requirements and transit times for this corridor. They aren\u2019t just a \u201Cone-off\u201D provider; they are building a specialized presence in this lane.`
    : lc === 1
    ? "The carrier has completed one load on this lane previously. While limited, this single delivery demonstrates some familiarity with the route\u2019s pickup/delivery requirements. They are still in the early stages of establishing lane consistency."
    : "No prior loads recorded on this lane. The carrier would be new to this route, meaning transit times and pickup/delivery nuances are unproven. Consider them if other scoring factors are strong, but expect a learning curve.";

  const availElab = isActive
    ? "This metric signals that the carrier has successfully updated their capacity or \u201Cposted\u201D their truck within our current window. It reduces the time spent on dead-end calls, as the carrier is verified to have equipment ready for dispatch immediately."
    : "The carrier is currently showing as inactive in our system. This may indicate they have no available equipment, are not currently accepting loads, or have a temporary operational hold. Reaching out may result in longer response times or declined offers.";

  const perfElab = carrier.carrier_total && lc > 0
    ? `This is the \u201Cproof of concept.\u201D By referencing the previous successful delivery on this lane, we validate both their operational reliability (they finish what they start) and price benchmarking. Since the last load was handled at $${carrier.carrier_total.toLocaleString()}, it provides a firm baseline for current negotiations.`
    : "No rate history or delivery data available for this lane. Without past performance benchmarks, negotiations will rely on market rates and carrier qualifications rather than historical pricing data.";

  const strengths: string[] = [];
  const limiters: string[] = [];

  if (ratingScore + approvalScore + insuranceScore >= 55) strengths.push("compliance (Health)");
  else if (ratingScore + approvalScore + insuranceScore >= 40) strengths.push("partial compliance (Health)");
  else limiters.push("compliance gaps");

  if (carrier.carrier_total && lc > 0) strengths.push("reliability (Delivered)");
  if (laneScore >= 28) strengths.push("strong lane experience");
  else if (laneScore >= 20) limiters.push('their "Lane History" is still growing');
  else if (laneScore > 0) limiters.push("limited lane history");
  else limiters.push("no lane history");
  if (!isActive) limiters.push("inactive status");

  const summaryText = `The ${score}/100 (${getScoreLabel(score)}) rating is a weighted average of these points.${
    strengths.length > 0 ? ` They score ${score >= 80 ? "perfectly" : "well"} on ${strengths.join(" and ")}` : ""
  }${
    limiters.length > 0
      ? `${strengths.length > 0 ? ", with their score" : ". Their score is"} ${score >= 80 ? "likely capped at " + score + " only" : "limited"} because ${limiters.join(" and ")}.`
      : "."
  }${
    laneScore < 35 && lc > 0 ? ` As they move more loads on this lane, this score will likely trend ${score >= 80 ? "toward 90+." : "upward."}` : ""
  }`;

  const sections = [
    {
      icon: insured && isHealthy
        ? <ShieldCheck className="h-5 w-5 text-green-600 shrink-0" />
        : <ShieldAlert className="h-5 w-5 text-amber-500 shrink-0" />,
      title: "Health Score: Risk & Compliance",
      status: `Status: ${isHealthy ? "Good" : "Needs Review"} / ${isActive ? "Active" : "Inactive"}`,
      elaboration: healthElab,
    },
    {
      icon: <Route className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-600 shrink-0" />,
      title: "Lane History: Consistency",
      status: `Metric: ${lc} Load${lc !== 1 ? "s" : ""} on Lane`,
      elaboration: laneElab,
    },
    {
      icon: <Radio className="h-5 w-5 text-emerald-600 shrink-0" />,
      title: "Availability: Real-Time Readiness",
      status: `Status: ${isActive ? "Active & Available" : "Inactive"}`,
      elaboration: availElab,
    },
    {
      icon: <TrendingUp className="h-5 w-5 text-purple-600 shrink-0" />,
      title: "Past Performance: Reliability & Pricing",
      status: carrier.carrier_total && lc > 0
        ? `Last Rate: $${carrier.carrier_total.toLocaleString()}${carrier.shipment_date ? ` (${carrier.shipment_date})` : ""}\nOutcome: Delivered`
        : "No rate history available",
      elaboration: perfElab,
    },
  ];

  return (
    <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-5 pb-6 space-y-5">
      {/* Score hero */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-4 pt-2">
        <span
          className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-14 h-14 rounded-full text-lg font-bold border-2 ${getScoreColor(score)}`}
        >
          {score}
        </span>
        <div>
          <p className="text-base font-bold text-foreground">{carrier.carrier_name}</p>
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{carrier.carrier_email}</p>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Sections */}
      {sections.map((section, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="rounded-lg border bg-muted/30 p-4 space-y-2">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
            {section.icon}
            <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">
              {i + 1}. {section.title}
            </p>
          </div>
          {section.status.split("\n").map((line, j) => (
            <p key={j} className="text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground/80 pl-[30px]">
              {line}
            </p>
          ))}
          <p className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed pl-[30px]">
            <span className="font-semibold text-foreground/70">Elaboration:</span>{" "}
            {section.elaboration}
          </p>
        </div>
      ))}

      {/* Summary */}
      <div className="rounded-lg border bg-muted/50 p-4 space-y-2">
        <p className="text-sm font-bold text-foreground">
          Summary: Why {score}/100?
        </p>
        <p className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed">
          {summaryText}
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

export function CarrierScoringPanel({
  loadId,
  load,
  senderName,
}: CarrierScoringPanelProps) {
  const { carriers, loading, error } = useCarrierScoring(loadId);
  const [sentCarrierIds, setSentCarrierIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
  const [generatedEmails, setGeneratedEmails] = useState<Record<number, GeneratedEmail>>({});
  const [generatingIds, setGeneratingIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
  const [sendingIds, setSendingIds] = useState<Set<number>>(new Set());
  const [expandedId, setExpandedId] = useState<number | null>(null);
  const [analysisCarrier, setAnalysisCarrier] = useState<ScoredCarrier | null>(null);
  const [showAll, setShowAll] = useState(false);
  const [progressSteps, setProgressSteps] = useState<Record<number, ProgressStep[]>>({});

  const INITIAL_LIMIT = 10;
  const visibleCarriers = showAll ? carriers : carriers.slice(0, INITIAL_LIMIT);
  const hasMore = carriers.length > INITIAL_LIMIT;

  async function handleGenerate(carrier: ScoredCarrier) {
    setGeneratingIds((prev) => new Set(prev).add(carrier.carrier_id));
    setProgressSteps((prev) => ({ ...prev, [carrier.carrier_id]: [] }));

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/offer-email", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          carrierName: carrier.carrier_name,
          carrierEmail: carrier.carrier_email,
          carrierLoadsCount: carrier.loads_count,
          carrierLastRate: (carrier as ScoredCarrierWithDAT).carrier_charge || carrier.carrier_total,
          carrierLastDATRate: (carrier as ScoredCarrierWithDAT).market_rate || null,
          carrierLastShipmentDate: carrier.shipment_date,
          loadNumber: load.load_number,
          originCity: load.origin_city,
          originState: load.origin_state,
          destCity: load.dest_city,
          destState: load.dest_state,
          equipmentType: load.equipment_type,
          equipmentId: load.equipment_id,
          pickupDate: load.pickup_date,
          deliveryDate: load.delivery_date,
          weightLbs: load.weight_lbs,
          commodity: load.commodity,
          miles: load.total_miles,
          shipperRate: load.shipper_rate,
          senderName,
        }),
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));
        throw new Error(errData.error || "Failed to generate email");
      }

      // Parse streaming NDJSON response
      const reader = res.body?.getReader();
      if (!reader) throw new Error("No response stream");

      const decoder = new TextDecoder();
      let buffer = "";

      while (true) {
        const { done, value } = await reader.read();
        if (done) break;

        buffer += decoder.decode(value, { stream: true });
        const lines = buffer.split("\n");
        buffer = lines.pop() || "";

        for (const line of lines) {
          if (!line.trim()) continue;
          try {
            const event = JSON.parse(line);
            if (event.type === "progress") {
              setProgressSteps((prev) => {
                const existing = prev[carrier.carrier_id] || [];
                const idx = existing.findIndex((s: ProgressStep) => s.id === event.id);
                const step: ProgressStep = { id: event.id, label: event.label, status: event.status };
                if (idx >= 0) {
                  const updated = [...existing];
                  updated[idx] = step;
                  return { ...prev, [carrier.carrier_id]: updated };
                }
                return { ...prev, [carrier.carrier_id]: [...existing, step] };
              });
            } else if (event.type === "result") {
              setGeneratedEmails((prev) => ({
                ...prev,
                [carrier.carrier_id]: {
                  subject: event.subject,
                  body: event.body,
                  offerRate: event.offerRate,
                  reasoning: event.reasoning || undefined,
                },
              }));
              setExpandedId(carrier.carrier_id);
            } else if (event.type === "error") {
              throw new Error(event.error);
            }
          } catch (parseErr) {
            if (parseErr instanceof SyntaxError) continue;
            throw parseErr;
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to generate email");
    } finally {
      setGeneratingIds((prev) => {
        const next = new Set(prev);
        next.delete(carrier.carrier_id);
        return next;
      });
    }
  }

  async function handleSend(carrier: ScoredCarrier) {
    const email = generatedEmails[carrier.carrier_id];
    if (!email) return;

    setSendingIds((prev) => new Set(prev).add(carrier.carrier_id));

    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/email/send", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          to: carrier.carrier_email,
          subject: email.subject,
          body: email.body.replace(/\n/g, "<br>"),
          loadId: load.id,
          carrierName: carrier.carrier_name,
          loadNumber: load.load_number,
          offerRate: email.offerRate,
          originCity: load.origin_city,
          originState: load.origin_state,
          destCity: load.dest_city,
          destState: load.dest_state,
          equipmentType: load.equipment_type,
          shipperRate: load.shipper_rate,
        }),
      });

      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(data.error || "Failed to send email");

      toast.success(`Offer sent to ${carrier.carrier_name}`);
      setSentCarrierIds((prev) => new Set(prev).add(carrier.carrier_id));
      setExpandedId(null);
    } catch (err) {
      toast.error(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to send email");
    } finally {
      setSendingIds((prev) => {
        const next = new Set(prev);
        next.delete(carrier.carrier_id);
        return next;
      });
    }
  }

  function updateEmail(carrierId: number, field: "subject" | "body", value: string) {
    setGeneratedEmails((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      [carrierId]: { ...prev[carrierId], [field]: value },
    }));
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="px-6 py-5 space-y-3">
        <Skeleton className="h-4 w-40" />
        <div className="space-y-2">
          <Skeleton className="h-16 w-full rounded-lg" />
          <Skeleton className="h-16 w-full rounded-lg" />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error) {
    return (
      <div className="px-6 py-5 text-sm text-destructive">
        Failed to load carriers: {error}
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (carriers.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="px-6 py-6 flex items-center gap-2.5 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
        <Users className="h-4 w-4" />
        No past carriers found for this lane
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="px-6 py-5 space-y-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2.5">
        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground tracking-tight">
          Best Carriers
        </h3>
        <Badge variant="outline" className="text-[10px] font-mono px-1.5">
          {carriers.length}
        </Badge>
      </div>

      <div className="space-y-2">
        {visibleCarriers.map((carrier, idx) => {
          const isSent = sentCarrierIds.has(carrier.carrier_id);
          const isGenerating = generatingIds.has(carrier.carrier_id);
          const isSending = sendingIds.has(carrier.carrier_id);
          const hasEmail = !!generatedEmails[carrier.carrier_id];
          const isExpanded = expandedId === carrier.carrier_id && hasEmail;
          const email = generatedEmails[carrier.carrier_id];

          return (
            <div
              key={carrier.carrier_id}
              className="rounded-lg border bg-background overflow-hidden transition-colors hover:bg-muted/20"
            >
              {/* Carrier row */}
              <div className="flex items-center gap-5 px-5 py-3.5">
                {/* Rank */}
                <span className="text-sm font-mono font-semibold text-muted-foreground w-5 shrink-0 text-center">
                  {idx + 1}
                </span>

                {/* Score badge — click to open analysis */}
                <button
                  type="button"
                  className="shrink-0 cursor-pointer hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity"
                  onClick={() => setAnalysisCarrier(carrier)}
                >
                  <div className="flex flex-col items-center w-12">
                    <span
                      className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-full text-sm font-bold border-2 ${getScoreColor(carrier.score)}`}
                    >
                      {carrier.score}
                    </span>
                    <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                      {getScoreLabel(carrier.score)}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </button>

                {/* Carrier info */}
                <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                  <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-foreground truncate tracking-tight">
                    {carrier.carrier_name}
                  </p>
                  <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground truncate flex items-center gap-1.5 mt-1">
                    <Mail className="h-3 w-3 shrink-0 opacity-60" />
                    <span>{carrier.carrier_email}</span>
                  </p>
                </div>

                {/* Actions */}
                <div className="shrink-0">
                  {isSent ? (
                    <div className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-green-700 text-xs font-semibold px-3.5 py-2 rounded-lg bg-green-50 border border-green-200">
                      <Check className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      Sent
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        variant="outline"
                        className="gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium h-9 px-3"
                        disabled={isGenerating}
                        onClick={() => handleGenerate(carrier)}
                      >
                        {isGenerating ? (
                          <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
                        ) : (
                          <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        )}
                        {hasEmail ? "Regenerate" : "Generate"}
                      </Button>
                      {isExpanded && (
                        <Button
                          size="sm"
                          variant="ghost"
                          className="h-9 w-9 p-0"
                          onClick={() => setExpandedId(null)}
                        >
                          <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                        </Button>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  )}
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Progress steps during generation */}
              {isGenerating && progressSteps[carrier.carrier_id]?.length > 0 && (
                <div className="border-t bg-muted/10 px-5 py-3 space-y-1.5">
                  {progressSteps[carrier.carrier_id].map((step: ProgressStep) => (
                    <div key={step.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs">
                      {step.status === "running" ? (
                        <Loader2 className="h-3 w-3 animate-spin text-blue-500 shrink-0" />
                      ) : step.status === "done" ? (
                        <Check className="h-3 w-3 text-green-600 shrink-0" />
                      ) : (
                        <X className="h-3 w-3 text-amber-500 shrink-0" />
                      )}
                      <span className={step.status === "done" ? "text-green-700" : step.status === "error" ? "text-amber-600" : "text-foreground"}>
                        {step.label}
                      </span>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Inline email preview */}
              {isExpanded && email && !isSent && (
                <div className="border-t bg-muted/20 px-5 py-4 space-y-3">
                  {/* AI Reasoning */}
                  {email.reasoning && (
                    <div className="flex items-start gap-2 text-xs bg-blue-50 border border-blue-200 rounded-md px-3 py-2">
                      <Sparkles className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-blue-500 shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                      <span className="text-blue-700">{email.reasoning}</span>
                    </div>
                  )}

                  {/* To */}
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs">
                    <span className="text-muted-foreground font-medium w-14 shrink-0">To</span>
                    <span className="text-foreground">{carrier.carrier_email}</span>
                  </div>

                  {/* Subject */}
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-medium w-14 shrink-0 pt-2">Subject</span>
                    <Input
                      value={email.subject}
                      onChange={(e) => updateEmail(carrier.carrier_id, "subject", e.target.value)}
                      className="text-sm h-9"
                    />
                  </div>

                  {/* Body */}
                  <div className="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground font-medium w-14 shrink-0 pt-2">Body</span>
                    <Textarea
                      value={email.body}
                      onChange={(e) => updateEmail(carrier.carrier_id, "body", e.target.value)}
                      rows={8}
                      className="text-sm"
                    />
                  </div>

                  {/* Send */}
                  <div className="flex justify-end pt-1">
                    <Button
                      size="sm"
                      className="gap-1.5 text-xs font-medium h-9 px-4"
                      disabled={isSending || !email.subject || !email.body}
                      onClick={() => handleSend(carrier)}
                    >
                      {isSending ? (
                        <Loader2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 animate-spin" />
                      ) : (
                        <Send className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
                      )}
                      Send Email
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>

      {hasMore && !showAll && (
        <div className="flex justify-center">
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
            onClick={() => setShowAll(true)}
          >
            View {carriers.length - INITIAL_LIMIT} more carrier{carriers.length - INITIAL_LIMIT !== 1 ? "s" : ""}
          </Button>
        </div>
      )}

      {showAll && hasMore && (
        <div className="flex justify-center">
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            className="text-xs text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
            onClick={() => setShowAll(false)}
          >
            Show less
          </Button>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Score analysis sheet */}
      <Sheet
        open={analysisCarrier !== null}
        onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setAnalysisCarrier(null); }}
      >
        <SheetContent side="right" className="sm:max-w-md p-0 flex flex-col">
          <SheetHeader className="px-5 pt-5 pb-3 border-b">
            <SheetTitle>Carrier Performance Analysis</SheetTitle>
            <SheetDescription>
              Detailed scoring breakdown for this carrier on your lane
            </SheetDescription>
          </SheetHeader>
          {analysisCarrier && (
            <ScoreAnalysisContent
              carrier={analysisCarrier}
              score={analysisCarrier.score}
            />
          )}
        </SheetContent>
      </Sheet>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/loads/LoadCard.tsx
