"use client";

import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from "@/components/ui/card";
import type { Load, LoadStatus } from "@/types/index";

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
  bidding: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-800",
  sourcing: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  booked: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  in_transit: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  delivered: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-700",
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  bidding: "Bidding",
  sourcing: "Sourcing",
  booked: "Booked",
  in_transit: "In Transit",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

interface LoadCardProps {
  load: Load;
}

export function LoadCard({ load }: LoadCardProps) {
  return (
    <Card className="hover:shadow-md transition-shadow">
      <CardHeader className="pb-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <span className="font-mono font-semibold text-primary text-sm">
            {load.load_number}
          </span>
          <span
            className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS[load.status]}`}
          >
            {STATUS_LABELS[load.status]}
          </span>
        </div>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-2 text-sm">
        {/* Route */}
        <div className="font-medium">
          {load.origin_city && load.origin_state
            ? `${load.origin_city}, ${load.origin_state.toUpperCase()}`
            : "TBD"}{" "}
          &rarr;{" "}
          {load.dest_city && load.dest_state
            ? `${load.dest_city}, ${load.dest_state.toUpperCase()}`
            : "TBD"}
        </div>

        {/* Carrier + Rate */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-muted-foreground">
          <span>{load.carrier?.name ?? "No carrier"}</span>
          <span className="font-mono">
            {load.carrier_rate
              ? `$${load.carrier_rate.toLocaleString()}`
              : "--"}
          </span>
        </div>

        {/* Equipment + Weight */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-muted-foreground">
          <span>{load.equipment_type ?? "No equipment"}</span>
          <span>
            {load.weight_lbs
              ? `${load.weight_lbs.toLocaleString()} lbs`
              : "--"}
          </span>
        </div>

        {/* Dates */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs text-muted-foreground pt-1 border-t">
          <span>
            PU:{" "}
            {load.pickup_date
              ? new Date(load.pickup_date).toLocaleDateString()
              : "TBD"}
          </span>
          <span>
            DEL:{" "}
            {load.delivery_date
              ? new Date(load.delivery_date).toLocaleDateString()
              : "TBD"}
          </span>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/loads/LoadDetail.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator";
import {
  Tabs,
  TabsContent,
  TabsList,
  TabsTrigger,
} from "@/components/ui/tabs";
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from "@/components/ui/table";
import { Loader2, Save, ArrowLeft } from "lucide-react";
import { toast } from "sonner";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import type { LoadStatus, QuoteStatus } from "@/types/index";

const STATUS_COLORS: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
  bidding: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-800",
  sourcing: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  booked: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  in_transit: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  delivered: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground",
  cancelled: "bg-red-100 text-red-700",
};

const STATUS_LABELS: Record<LoadStatus, string> = {
  pending: "Pending",
  bidding: "Bidding",
  sourcing: "Sourcing",
  booked: "Booked",
  in_transit: "In Transit",
  delivered: "Delivered",
  cancelled: "Cancelled",
};

const QUOTE_STATUS_COLORS: Record<QuoteStatus, string> = {
  pending: "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700",
  negotiating: "bg-amber-100 text-amber-700",
  best: "bg-blue-100 text-blue-700",
  booked: "bg-green-100 text-green-700",
  declined: "bg-red-100 text-red-700",
  out: "bg-muted text-muted-foreground",
};

interface LoadData {
  id: string;
  load_number: string;
  status: string;
  origin_city?: string | null;
  origin_state?: string | null;
  dest_city?: string | null;
  dest_state?: string | null;
  equipment_type?: string | null;
  weight_lbs?: number | null;
  commodity?: string | null;
  pickup_date?: string | null;
  delivery_date?: string | null;
  carrier_rate?: number | null;
  shipper_rate?: number | null;
  gross_profit?: number | null;
  notes?: string | null;
  total_miles?: number | null;
  carrier?: { id: string; name: string; email?: string | null } | null;
  shipper?: { id: string; name: string } | null;
  [key: string]: unknown;
}

interface QuoteData {
  id: string | number;
  carrier?: { name: string } | null;
  quoted_rate?: number | null;
  rate_per_mile?: number | null;
  status: string;
  ai_counter_rate?: number | null;
  created_at: string;
}

interface ActivityData {
  id: string;
  action_description: string;
  action_type: string;
  outcome?: string | null;
  created_at: string;
}

interface LoadDetailProps {
  load: LoadData;
  quotes?: QuoteData[];
  activities?: ActivityData[];
}

export function LoadDetail({ load, quotes = [], activities = [] }: LoadDetailProps) {
  const router = useRouter();
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    origin_city: load.origin_city ?? "",
    origin_state: load.origin_state ?? "",
    dest_city: load.dest_city ?? "",
    dest_state: load.dest_state ?? "",
    equipment_type: load.equipment_type ?? "",
    weight_lbs: load.weight_lbs?.toString() ?? "",
    commodity: load.commodity ?? "",
    pickup_date: load.pickup_date ?? "",
    delivery_date: load.delivery_date ?? "",
    shipper_rate: load.shipper_rate?.toString() ?? "",
    notes: load.notes ?? "",
  });

  async function handleSave() {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`/api/loads/${load.id}`, {
        method: "PATCH",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          ...form,
          weight_lbs: form.weight_lbs ? Number(form.weight_lbs) : null,
          shipper_rate: form.shipper_rate ? Number(form.shipper_rate) : null,
        }),
      });
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to update load");
      toast.success("Load updated successfully");
    } catch {
      toast.error("Failed to update load");
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      {/* Header */}
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => router.push("/loads")}>
            <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
            Back
          </Button>
          <div>
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold font-mono">{load.load_number}</h1>
              <span
                className={`inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${STATUS_COLORS[load.status as LoadStatus] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700"}`}
              >
                {STATUS_LABELS[load.status as LoadStatus] || load.status}
              </span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
              {load.origin_city && load.origin_state
                ? `${load.origin_city}, ${load.origin_state.toUpperCase()}`
                : "TBD"}{" "}
              &rarr;{" "}
              {load.dest_city && load.dest_state
                ? `${load.dest_city}, ${load.dest_state.toUpperCase()}`
                : "TBD"}
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
          {load.carrier?.name && (
            <Badge variant="outline">{load.carrier.name}</Badge>
          )}
          {load.shipper?.name && (
            <Badge variant="secondary">{load.shipper.name}</Badge>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Summary cards */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-2">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Carrier Rate</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold font-mono">
              {load.carrier_rate ? `$${load.carrier_rate.toLocaleString()}` : "--"}
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-2">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Shipper Rate</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold font-mono">
              {load.shipper_rate ? `$${load.shipper_rate.toLocaleString()}` : "--"}
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-2">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Gross Profit</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold font-mono">
              {load.gross_profit != null ? `$${load.gross_profit.toLocaleString()}` : "--"}
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
        <Card>
          <CardHeader className="pb-2">
            <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">Equipment</CardTitle>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent>
            <div className="text-2xl font-bold">
              {load.equipment_type ?? "--"}
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>

      {/* Tabs */}
      <Tabs defaultValue="details">
        <TabsList>
          <TabsTrigger value="details">Details</TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="quotes">
            Quotes {quotes.length > 0 && `(${quotes.length})`}
          </TabsTrigger>
          <TabsTrigger value="timeline">
            Timeline {activities.length > 0 && `(${activities.length})`}
          </TabsTrigger>
        </TabsList>

        {/* Details Tab */}
        <TabsContent value="details" className="mt-4">
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                <CardTitle>Load Details</CardTitle>
                <Button onClick={handleSave} disabled={saving} size="sm">
                  {saving ? (
                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
                  ) : (
                    <Save className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                  )}
                  Save Changes
                </Button>
              </div>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Origin City</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.origin_city}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, origin_city: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Origin State</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.origin_state}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, origin_state: e.target.value })}
                    maxLength={2}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Destination City</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.dest_city}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, dest_city: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Destination State</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.dest_state}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, dest_state: e.target.value })}
                    maxLength={2}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Equipment Type</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.equipment_type}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, equipment_type: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Weight (lbs)</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="number"
                    value={form.weight_lbs}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, weight_lbs: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Commodity</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.commodity}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, commodity: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Shipper Rate ($)</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="number"
                    value={form.shipper_rate}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, shipper_rate: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Pickup Date</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="date"
                    value={form.pickup_date}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, pickup_date: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-2">
                  <Label>Delivery Date</Label>
                  <Input
                    type="date"
                    value={form.delivery_date}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, delivery_date: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="col-span-2 space-y-2">
                  <Label>Notes</Label>
                  <Input
                    value={form.notes}
                    onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, notes: e.target.value })}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </TabsContent>

        {/* Quotes Tab */}
        <TabsContent value="quotes" className="mt-4">
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Carrier Quotes</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              {quotes.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center py-8">
                  No quotes received yet
                </p>
              ) : (
                <Table>
                  <TableHeader>
                    <TableRow>
                      <TableHead>Carrier</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-right">Quoted Rate</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-right">Rate/Mile</TableHead>
                      <TableHead>Status</TableHead>
                      <TableHead className="text-right">AI Counter</TableHead>
                      <TableHead>Date</TableHead>
                    </TableRow>
                  </TableHeader>
                  <TableBody>
                    {quotes.map((quote) => (
                      <TableRow key={quote.id}>
                        <TableCell className="font-medium">
                          {quote.carrier?.name ?? "Unknown"}
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-right font-mono">
                          {quote.quoted_rate
                            ? `$${quote.quoted_rate.toLocaleString()}`
                            : "--"}
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-right font-mono">
                          {quote.rate_per_mile
                            ? `$${quote.rate_per_mile.toFixed(2)}`
                            : "--"}
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell>
                          <span
                            className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${QUOTE_STATUS_COLORS[quote.status as QuoteStatus] || "bg-gray-100 text-gray-700"}`}
                          >
                            {quote.status}
                          </span>
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-right font-mono">
                          {quote.ai_counter_rate
                            ? `$${quote.ai_counter_rate.toLocaleString()}`
                            : "--"}
                        </TableCell>
                        <TableCell className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
                          {new Date(quote.created_at).toLocaleDateString()}
                        </TableCell>
                      </TableRow>
                    ))}
                  </TableBody>
                </Table>
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </TabsContent>

        {/* Timeline Tab */}
        <TabsContent value="timeline" className="mt-4">
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Activity Timeline</CardTitle>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
              {activities.length === 0 ? (
                <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground text-center py-8">
                  No activity recorded yet
                </p>
              ) : (
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  {activities.map((activity) => (
                    <div
                      key={activity.id}
                      className="flex items-start gap-3 pb-4 border-b last:border-b-0"
                    >
                      <div className="w-2 h-2 rounded-full bg-primary mt-2 shrink-0" />
                      <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                          <span className="text-sm font-medium">
                            {activity.action_description}
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap">
                            {new Date(activity.created_at).toLocaleString()}
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mt-1">
                          <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
                            {activity.action_type.replace(/_/g, " ")}
                          </Badge>
                          {activity.outcome && (
                            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                              {activity.outcome}
                            </span>
                          )}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              )}
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </TabsContent>
      </Tabs>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/onboarding/OnboardingWizard.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useCallback } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
} from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
import {
  Select,
  SelectContent,
  SelectItem,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectValue,
} from "@/components/ui/select";
import {
  CheckCircle2,
  Mail,
  Truck,
  Upload,
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  ArrowLeft,
  ArrowRight,
  Rocket,
  Users,
  DollarSign,
  Mic,
  Clock,
  X,
} from "lucide-react";

const TOTAL_STEPS = 7;

const STEP_LABELS = [
  "Email",
  "TMS",
  "Carriers",
  "Rates",
  "Voice",
  "SLA",
  "Go Live",
];

interface OnboardingWizardProps {
  currentStep: number;
  emailConnected: boolean;
  emailAddress: string;
}

interface CarrierForm {
  name: string;
  email: string;
  phone: string;
  mc_number: string;
  equipment_types: string[];
}

interface RateLane {
  id: string;
  lane_name: string;
  origin: string;
  destination: string;
  equipment_type: string;
  floor_rate: string;
  target_rate: string;
  ceiling_rate: string;
}

interface ShipperRow {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  sla_update_interval_hours: number;
}

export function OnboardingWizard({
  currentStep: initialStep,
  emailConnected,
  emailAddress,
}: OnboardingWizardProps) {
  const router = useRouter();
  const supabase = createClient();

  const [step, setStep] = useState(initialStep);
  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);

  // Step 3 — Carriers
  const [carrierForm, setCarrierForm] = useState<CarrierForm>({
    name: "",
    email: "",
    phone: "",
    mc_number: "",
    equipment_types: [],
  });
  const [carriersImported, setCarriersImported] = useState(0);
  const [carrierSaving, setCarrierSaving] = useState(false);

  // Step 4 — Rate Parameters
  const [rateLanes, setRateLanes] = useState<RateLane[]>([
    {
      id: crypto.randomUUID(),
      lane_name: "",
      origin: "",
      destination: "",
      equipment_type: "van",
      floor_rate: "",
      target_rate: "",
      ceiling_rate: "",
    },
  ]);
  const [rateLanesSaved, setRateLanesSaved] = useState(0);

  // Step 5 — Voice Persona
  const [agentName, setAgentName] = useState("");
  const [voiceType, setVoiceType] = useState("");

  // Step 6 — SLA / Shippers
  const [shippers, setShippers] = useState<ShipperRow[]>([
    { id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: "", sla_update_interval_hours: 4 },
  ]);
  const [shippersSaved, setShippersSaved] = useState(0);

  // Step 7 — Go Live
  const [supervisedMode, setSupervisedMode] = useState(true);
  const [launching, setLaunching] = useState(false);

  const saveStepProgress = useCallback(
    async (nextStep: number) => {
      try {
        const {
          data: { user },
        } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
        if (!user) return;

        await supabase
          .from("profiles")
          .update({ onboarding_step: nextStep })
          .eq("id", user.id);
      } catch {
        // Silently continue — step progress is non-critical
      }
    },
    [supabase]
  );

  const goNext = useCallback(async () => {
    if (step < TOTAL_STEPS) {
      const next = step + 1;
      setStep(next);
      await saveStepProgress(next);
    }
  }, [step, saveStepProgress]);

  const goBack = useCallback(() => {
    if (step > 1) setStep(step - 1);
  }, [step]);

  // ---------- Step 1: Email ----------
  const handleReconnect = async () => {
    await supabase.auth.signInWithOAuth({
      provider: "azure" as "google",
      options: {
        redirectTo: `${window.location.origin}/auth/callback?next=/onboarding`,
        scopes: "openid email profile offline_access Mail.Read Mail.Send",
      },
    });
  };

  // ---------- Step 3: Carrier ----------
  const toggleEquipment = (type: string) => {
    setCarrierForm((prev) => ({
      ...prev,
      equipment_types: prev.equipment_types.includes(type)
        ? prev.equipment_types.filter((t) => t !== type)
        : [...prev.equipment_types, type],
    }));
  };

  const handleAddCarrier = async () => {
    if (!carrierForm.name) return;
    setCarrierSaving(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/carriers", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify(carrierForm),
      });
      if (res.ok) {
        setCarriersImported((c) => c + 1);
        setCarrierForm({
          name: "",
          email: "",
          phone: "",
          mc_number: "",
          equipment_types: [],
        });
      }
    } catch {
      // handle silently
    } finally {
      setCarrierSaving(false);
    }
  };

  // ---------- Step 4: Rate Params ----------
  const addRateLane = () => {
    setRateLanes((prev) => [
      ...prev,
      {
        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
        lane_name: "",
        origin: "",
        destination: "",
        equipment_type: "van",
        floor_rate: "",
        target_rate: "",
        ceiling_rate: "",
      },
    ]);
  };

  const updateRateLane = (id: string, field: keyof RateLane, value: string) => {
    setRateLanes((prev) =>
      prev.map((lane) => (lane.id === id ? { ...lane, [field]: value } : lane))
    );
  };

  const removeRateLane = (id: string) => {
    setRateLanes((prev) => prev.filter((lane) => lane.id !== id));
  };

  const saveRateLanes = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/rate-parameters", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          lanes: rateLanes.filter((l) => l.origin && l.destination),
        }),
      });
      if (res.ok) {
        const data = await res.json();
        setRateLanesSaved(data.count || rateLanes.filter((l) => l.origin && l.destination).length);
      }
    } catch {
      // handle silently
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  // ---------- Step 6: Shippers ----------
  const addShipper = () => {
    setShippers((prev) => [
      ...prev,
      { id: crypto.randomUUID(), name: "", sla_update_interval_hours: 4 },
    ]);
  };

  const updateShipper = (
    id: string,
    field: keyof ShipperRow,
    value: string | number
  ) => {
    setShippers((prev) =>
      prev.map((s) => (s.id === id ? { ...s, [field]: value } : s))
    );
  };

  const removeShipper = (id: string) => {
    setShippers((prev) => prev.filter((s) => s.id !== id));
  };

  const saveShippers = async () => {
    setSaving(true);
    try {
      const toSave = shippers.filter((s) => s.name.trim());
      let saved = 0;
      for (const shipper of toSave) {
        const res = await fetch("/api/shippers", {
          method: "POST",
          headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            name: shipper.name,
            sla_update_interval_hours: shipper.sla_update_interval_hours,
          }),
        });
        if (res.ok) saved++;
      }
      setShippersSaved(saved);
    } catch {
      // handle silently
    } finally {
      setSaving(false);
    }
  };

  // ---------- Step 7: Launch ----------
  const handleLaunch = async () => {
    setLaunching(true);
    try {
      const res = await fetch("/api/onboarding/complete", {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ supervised_mode: supervisedMode }),
      });

      const data = await res.json();
      if (!res.ok) {
        console.error("Launch error:", data.error);
        setLaunching(false);
        return;
      }

      // Full page reload so the server re-reads the updated profile
      window.location.href = "/dashboard";
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Launch failed:", err);
      setLaunching(false);
    }
  };

  // ---------- Progress ----------
  const progressPercent = ((step - 1) / (TOTAL_STEPS - 1)) * 100;

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-background flex flex-col">
      {/* Header */}
      <header className="border-b bg-background/95 backdrop-blur supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-background/60">
        <div className="mx-auto max-w-3xl px-6 py-4 flex items-center justify-between">
          <h1 className="text-lg font-semibold tracking-tight">TTMS Mailer</h1>
          <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Step {step} of {TOTAL_STEPS}
          </span>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* Progress bar */}
      <div className="mx-auto w-full max-w-3xl px-6 pt-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
          {STEP_LABELS.map((label, i) => {
            const stepNum = i + 1;
            const isComplete = stepNum < step;
            const isCurrent = stepNum === step;
            return (
              <div key={label} className="flex items-center gap-2 flex-1">
                <div
                  className={`flex items-center justify-center w-7 h-7 rounded-full text-xs font-medium shrink-0 transition-colors ${
                    isComplete
                      ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground"
                      : isCurrent
                        ? "bg-primary text-primary-foreground ring-2 ring-primary/30"
                        : "bg-muted text-muted-foreground"
                  }`}
                >
                  {isComplete ? (
                    <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                  ) : (
                    stepNum
                  )}
                </div>
                {i < STEP_LABELS.length - 1 && (
                  <div
                    className={`h-0.5 flex-1 rounded-full transition-colors ${
                      isComplete ? "bg-primary" : "bg-muted"
                    }`}
                  />
                )}
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
        <div className="flex justify-between text-[11px] text-muted-foreground mb-1 px-0.5">
          {STEP_LABELS.map((label) => (
            <span key={label} className="flex-1 text-center first:text-left last:text-right">
              {label}
            </span>
          ))}
        </div>
        <div className="h-1.5 w-full rounded-full bg-muted overflow-hidden">
          <div
            className="h-full rounded-full bg-primary transition-all duration-500 ease-out"
            style={{ width: `${progressPercent}%` }}
          />
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Step content */}
      <main className="flex-1 flex items-start justify-center px-6 py-8">
        <div className="w-full max-w-3xl">
          {/* ===== STEP 1: Email ===== */}
          {step === 1 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <Mail className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Email Connection
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Connect your Microsoft 365 mailbox to get started.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                {emailConnected ? (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-3 rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 p-4">
                    <CheckCircle2 className="w-5 h-5 text-green-600 shrink-0" />
                    <div>
                      <p className="text-sm font-medium text-green-800">
                        Your Microsoft 365 mailbox is connected
                      </p>
                      <p className="text-sm text-green-700">{emailAddress}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                ) : (
                  <div className="space-y-3">
                    <div className="rounded-lg border border-amber-200 bg-amber-50 p-4">
                      <p className="text-sm text-amber-800">
                        No email connection detected. Please reconnect your
                        Microsoft 365 account.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <Button onClick={handleReconnect} variant="outline" size="lg">
                      <Mail className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                      Reconnect Microsoft 365
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* ===== STEP 2: TMS ===== */}
          {step === 2 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <Truck className="w-5 h-5" />
                  TMS Integration
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Connect your Transportation Management System for seamless
                  data sync.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                  {[
                    "AscendTMS",
                    "McLeod",
                    "TMW",
                    "RedDog TTMS",
                  ].map((tms) => (
                    <div
                      key={tms}
                      className="relative rounded-lg border bg-muted/30 p-4 opacity-60"
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="font-medium text-sm">{tms}</span>
                        <Badge variant="secondary">Coming Soon</Badge>
                      </div>
                      <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground mt-1">
                        Integration available in a future release.
                      </p>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* ===== STEP 3: Carriers ===== */}
          {step === 3 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <Users className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Import Your Carriers
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Add carriers manually or upload a CSV file.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-6">
                {/* CSV Upload placeholder */}
                <div className="rounded-lg border-2 border-dashed border-muted-foreground/25 p-6 text-center">
                  <Upload className="w-8 h-8 mx-auto text-muted-foreground mb-2" />
                  <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mb-2">
                    Upload a CSV file with carrier data
                  </p>
                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" disabled>
                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" />
                    Upload CSV
                  </Button>
                </div>

                {/* Manual Form */}
                <div className="space-y-4">
                  <h3 className="text-sm font-medium">Add Manually</h3>
                  <div className="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
                      <Label htmlFor="carrier-name">Carrier Name *</Label>
                      <Input
                        id="carrier-name"
                        placeholder="e.g. Swift Transport"
                        value={carrierForm.name}
                        onChange={(e) =>
                          setCarrierForm((f) => ({
                            ...f,
                            name: e.target.value,
                          }))
                        }
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
                      <Label htmlFor="carrier-email">Email</Label>
                      <Input
                        id="carrier-email"
                        type="email"
                        placeholder="dispatch@carrier.com"
                        value={carrierForm.email}
                        onChange={(e) =>
                          setCarrierForm((f) => ({
                            ...f,
                            email: e.target.value,
                          }))
                        }
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
                      <Label htmlFor="carrier-phone">Phone</Label>
                      <Input
                        id="carrier-phone"
                        placeholder="(555) 123-4567"
                        value={carrierForm.phone}
                        onChange={(e) =>
                          setCarrierForm((f) => ({
                            ...f,
                            phone: e.target.value,
                          }))
                        }
                      />
                    </div>
                    <div className="space-y-1.5">
                      <Label htmlFor="carrier-mc">MC Number</Label>
                      <Input
                        id="carrier-mc"
                        placeholder="MC-123456"
                        value={carrierForm.mc_number}
                        onChange={(e) =>
                          setCarrierForm((f) => ({
                            ...f,
                            mc_number: e.target.value,
                          }))
                        }
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <div className="space-y-1.5">
                    <Label>Equipment Types</Label>
                    <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                      {["van", "flatbed", "reefer"].map((type) => (
                        <button
                          key={type}
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => toggleEquipment(type)}
                          className={`rounded-lg border px-3 py-1.5 text-sm capitalize transition-colors ${
                            carrierForm.equipment_types.includes(type)
                              ? "border-primary bg-primary/10 text-primary font-medium"
                              : "border-border text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted"
                          }`}
                        >
                          {type}
                        </button>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>

                  <Button
                    onClick={handleAddCarrier}
                    disabled={!carrierForm.name || carrierSaving}
                    size="lg"
                  >
                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" />
                    {carrierSaving ? "Adding..." : "Add Carrier"}
                  </Button>
                </div>

                {carriersImported > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 p-3">
                    <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-green-600" />
                    <span className="text-sm text-green-800">
                      {carriersImported} carrier{carriersImported !== 1 ? "s" : ""}{" "}
                      imported
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* ===== STEP 4: Rate Parameters ===== */}
          {step === 4 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Set Rate Parameters
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Define your rate lanes to help the AI negotiate within your
                  acceptable ranges.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                {/* Rate lanes table */}
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {rateLanes.map((lane, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={lane.id}
                      className="rounded-lg border p-4 space-y-3"
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground">
                          Lane {idx + 1}
                        </span>
                        {rateLanes.length > 1 && (
                          <button
                            type="button"
                            onClick={() => removeRateLane(lane.id)}
                            className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive transition-colors"
                          >
                            <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4" />
                          </button>
                        )}
                      </div>
                      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Origin</Label>
                          <Input
                            placeholder="City, ST"
                            value={lane.origin}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              updateRateLane(lane.id, "origin", e.target.value)
                            }
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Destination</Label>
                          <Input
                            placeholder="City, ST"
                            value={lane.destination}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              updateRateLane(
                                lane.id,
                                "destination",
                                e.target.value
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Equipment</Label>
                          <Select
                            value={lane.equipment_type}
                            onValueChange={(val) =>
                              updateRateLane(lane.id, "equipment_type", val as string)
                            }
                          >
                            <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                              <SelectValue placeholder="Type" />
                            </SelectTrigger>
                            <SelectContent>
                              <SelectItem value="van">Van</SelectItem>
                              <SelectItem value="flatbed">Flatbed</SelectItem>
                              <SelectItem value="reefer">Reefer</SelectItem>
                            </SelectContent>
                          </Select>
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Lane Name</Label>
                          <Input
                            placeholder="Optional"
                            value={lane.lane_name}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              updateRateLane(
                                lane.id,
                                "lane_name",
                                e.target.value
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Floor ($)</Label>
                          <Input
                            type="number"
                            placeholder="1500"
                            value={lane.floor_rate}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              updateRateLane(
                                lane.id,
                                "floor_rate",
                                e.target.value
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Target ($)</Label>
                          <Input
                            type="number"
                            placeholder="1800"
                            value={lane.target_rate}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              updateRateLane(
                                lane.id,
                                "target_rate",
                                e.target.value
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="space-y-1">
                          <Label className="text-xs">Ceiling ($)</Label>
                          <Input
                            type="number"
                            placeholder="2200"
                            value={lane.ceiling_rate}
                            onChange={(e) =>
                              updateRateLane(
                                lane.id,
                                "ceiling_rate",
                                e.target.value
                              )
                            }
                          />
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <Button variant="outline" onClick={addRateLane}>
                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" />
                    Add Lane
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    onClick={saveRateLanes}
                    disabled={saving}
                    size="lg"
                  >
                    {saving ? "Saving..." : "Save Rate Parameters"}
                  </Button>
                </div>

                {rateLanesSaved > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 p-3">
                    <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-green-600" />
                    <span className="text-sm text-green-800">
                      {rateLanesSaved} rate lane{rateLanesSaved !== 1 ? "s" : ""}{" "}
                      saved
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* ===== STEP 5: Voice Persona ===== */}
          {step === 5 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <Mic className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Voice Persona
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Configure your AI agent&apos;s identity and voice settings.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                <div className="space-y-1.5">
                  <Label htmlFor="agent-name">AI Agent Name</Label>
                  <Input
                    id="agent-name"
                    placeholder="e.g. Alex"
                    value={agentName}
                    onChange={(e) => setAgentName(e.target.value)}
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="space-y-1.5">
                  <Label>Voice</Label>
                  <Select value={voiceType} onValueChange={(val) => setVoiceType(val as string)}>
                    <SelectTrigger className="w-full sm:w-64">
                      <SelectValue placeholder="Select a voice" />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      <SelectItem value="professional-male">
                        Professional Male
                      </SelectItem>
                      <SelectItem value="professional-female">
                        Professional Female
                      </SelectItem>
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
                <div className="rounded-lg border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 p-4">
                  <p className="text-sm text-blue-800">
                    Voice features coming in Phase 3. Your preferences will be
                    saved for when this feature launches.
                  </p>
                </div>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* ===== STEP 6: SLA / Shippers ===== */}
          {step === 6 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <Clock className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Shipper SLA Settings
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Configure update frequency for each shipper relationship.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
                <div className="space-y-3">
                  {shippers.map((shipper, idx) => (
                    <div
                      key={shipper.id}
                      className="flex items-end gap-3 rounded-lg border p-3"
                    >
                      <div className="flex-1 space-y-1">
                        <Label className="text-xs">
                          Shipper {idx + 1} — Name
                        </Label>
                        <Input
                          placeholder="e.g. Acme Logistics"
                          value={shipper.name}
                          onChange={(e) =>
                            updateShipper(shipper.id, "name", e.target.value)
                          }
                        />
                      </div>
                      <div className="w-40 space-y-1">
                        <Label className="text-xs">Update Freq (hrs)</Label>
                        <Select
                          value={String(shipper.sla_update_interval_hours)}
                          onValueChange={(val) =>
                            updateShipper(
                              shipper.id,
                              "sla_update_interval_hours",
                              Number(val)
                            )
                          }
                        >
                          <SelectTrigger className="w-full">
                            <SelectValue />
                          </SelectTrigger>
                          <SelectContent>
                            <SelectItem value="1">Every 1 hour</SelectItem>
                            <SelectItem value="2">Every 2 hours</SelectItem>
                            <SelectItem value="4">Every 4 hours</SelectItem>
                            <SelectItem value="8">Every 8 hours</SelectItem>
                            <SelectItem value="12">Every 12 hours</SelectItem>
                            <SelectItem value="24">Every 24 hours</SelectItem>
                          </SelectContent>
                        </Select>
                      </div>
                      {shippers.length > 1 && (
                        <button
                          type="button"
                          onClick={() => removeShipper(shipper.id)}
                          className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-destructive transition-colors mb-1"
                        >
                          <X className="w-4 h-4" />
                        </button>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>

                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                  <Button variant="outline" onClick={addShipper}>
                    <Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" />
                    Add Shipper
                  </Button>
                  <Button
                    onClick={saveShippers}
                    disabled={saving || !shippers.some((s) => s.name.trim())}
                    size="lg"
                  >
                    {saving ? "Saving..." : "Save Shippers"}
                  </Button>
                </div>

                {shippersSaved > 0 && (
                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-green-200 bg-green-50 p-3">
                    <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 text-green-600" />
                    <span className="text-sm text-green-800">
                      {shippersSaved} shipper{shippersSaved !== 1 ? "s" : ""}{" "}
                      saved
                    </span>
                  </div>
                )}
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* ===== STEP 7: Go Live ===== */}
          {step === 7 && (
            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
                  <Rocket className="w-5 h-5" />
                  Ready to Go Live
                </CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>
                  Review your setup and launch TTMS Mailer.
                </CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="space-y-6">
                {/* Summary cards */}
                <div className="grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-3">
                  <div className="rounded-lg border p-3 text-center">
                    <Mail className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto text-muted-foreground mb-1" />
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Email</p>
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium">
                      {emailConnected ? (
                        <span className="text-green-600 flex items-center justify-center gap-1">
                          <CheckCircle2 className="w-3.5 h-3.5" />
                          Connected
                        </span>
                      ) : (
                        <span className="text-amber-600">Not connected</span>
                      )}
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-lg border p-3 text-center">
                    <Users className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto text-muted-foreground mb-1" />
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Carriers</p>
                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold">{carriersImported}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-lg border p-3 text-center">
                    <DollarSign className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto text-muted-foreground mb-1" />
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Rate Lanes</p>
                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold">{rateLanesSaved}</p>
                  </div>
                  <div className="rounded-lg border p-3 text-center">
                    <Clock className="w-5 h-5 mx-auto text-muted-foreground mb-1" />
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">Shippers</p>
                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold">{shippersSaved}</p>
                  </div>
                </div>

                {/* Supervised Mode */}
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between rounded-lg border p-4">
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm font-medium">Supervised Mode</p>
                    <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      Every AI action queued for your approval before sending
                    </p>
                  </div>
                  <Switch
                    checked={supervisedMode}
                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => setSupervisedMode(checked as boolean)}
                  />
                </div>

                {/* Launch button */}
                <Button
                  onClick={handleLaunch}
                  disabled={launching}
                  size="lg"
                  className="w-full h-12 text-base font-semibold"
                >
                  <Rocket className="w-5 h-5 mr-2" />
                  {launching ? "Launching..." : "Launch TTMS Mailer"}
                </Button>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          )}

          {/* Navigation buttons */}
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-6">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              onClick={goBack}
              disabled={step === 1}
            >
              <ArrowLeft className="w-4 h-4 mr-1" />
              Back
            </Button>

            {step < TOTAL_STEPS && (
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                {[2, 3, 4, 6].includes(step) && (
                  <Button variant="ghost" onClick={goNext}>
                    Skip for now
                  </Button>
                )}
                <Button onClick={goNext} size="lg">
                  Continue
                  <ArrowRight className="w-4 h-4 ml-1" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/components/settings/classification-rules.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState } from "react";
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
import { X, Plus } from "lucide-react";

interface ClassificationRulesProps {
  importantKeywords: string[];
  ignoreDomains: string[];
  onKeywordsChange: (keywords: string[]) => void;
  onDomainsChange: (domains: string[]) => void;
}

export function ClassificationRules({
  importantKeywords,
  ignoreDomains,
  onKeywordsChange,
  onDomainsChange,
}: ClassificationRulesProps) {
  const [newKeyword, setNewKeyword] = useState("");
  const [newDomain, setNewDomain] = useState("");

  function addKeyword() {
    const kw = newKeyword.trim();
    if (kw && !importantKeywords.includes(kw)) {
      onKeywordsChange([...importantKeywords, kw]);
      setNewKeyword("");
    }
  }

  function removeKeyword(kw: string) {
    onKeywordsChange(importantKeywords.filter((k) => k !== kw));
  }

  function addDomain() {
    const d = newDomain.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (d && !ignoreDomains.includes(d)) {
      onDomainsChange([...ignoreDomains, d]);
      setNewDomain("");
    }
  }

  function removeDomain(d: string) {
    onDomainsChange(ignoreDomains.filter((dom) => dom !== d));
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-4">
      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">
            Important Keywords
          </CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Emails containing these keywords will be more likely tagged as
            Important
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-3">
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Input
              placeholder="e.g. urgent, load confirmation"
              value={newKeyword}
              onChange={(e) => setNewKeyword(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && addKeyword()}
              className="max-w-sm"
            />
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={addKeyword}>
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Add
            </Button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            {importantKeywords.map((kw) => (
              <Badge key={kw} variant="secondary" className="gap-1 pr-1">
                {kw}
                <button
                  onClick={() => removeKeyword(kw)}
                  className="ml-1 hover:bg-muted rounded-full p-0.5"
                >
                  <X className="h-3 w-3" />
                </button>
              </Badge>
            ))}
            {importantKeywords.length === 0 && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                No keywords added
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>

      <Card>
        <CardHeader>
          <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">Ignore Domains</CardTitle>
          <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
            Emails from these domains will be automatically tagged as Ignore
          </p>
        </CardHeader>
        <CardContent className="space-y-3">
          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Input
              placeholder="e.g. newsletter.com, marketing.co"
              value={newDomain}
              onChange={(e) => setNewDomain(e.target.value)}
              onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === "Enter" && addDomain()}
              className="max-w-sm"
            />
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={addDomain}>
              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
              Add
            </Button>
          </div>
          <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2">
            {ignoreDomains.map((d) => (
              <Badge key={d} variant="secondary" className="gap-1 pr-1">
                {d}
                <button
                  onClick={() => removeDomain(d)}
                  className="ml-1 hover:bg-muted rounded-full p-0.5"
                >
                  <X className="h-3 w-3" />
                </button>
              </Badge>
            ))}
            {ignoreDomains.length === 0 && (
              <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                No domains added
              </span>
            )}
          </div>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  );
}

"use client";

import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
import { Label } from "@/components/ui/label";
import { Switch } from "@/components/ui/switch";
import {
  Select,
  SelectContent,
  SelectItem,
  SelectTrigger,
  SelectValue,
} from "@/components/ui/select";

interface SyncPreferencesProps {
  autoClassify: boolean;
  syncInterval: number;
  onAutoClassifyChange: (value: boolean) => void;
  onSyncIntervalChange: (value: number) => void;
}

export function SyncPreferences({
  autoClassify,
  syncInterval,
  onAutoClassifyChange,
  onSyncIntervalChange,
}: SyncPreferencesProps) {
  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader>
        <CardTitle className="text-sm font-medium">
          Sync & Classification
        </CardTitle>
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="space-y-6">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <Label htmlFor="auto-classify" className="text-sm font-medium">
              Auto-classify emails
            </Label>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              Automatically classify new emails after syncing
            </p>
          </div>
          <Switch
            id="auto-classify"
            checked={autoClassify}
            onCheckedChange={onAutoClassifyChange}
          />
        </div>

        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
          <div>
            <Label className="text-sm font-medium">Sync interval</Label>
            <p className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">
              How often to check for new emails
            </p>
          </div>
          <Select
            value={String(syncInterval)}
            onValueChange={(v) => v && onSyncIntervalChange(parseInt(v))}
          >
            <SelectTrigger className="w-32">
              <SelectValue />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="5">5 min</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="15">15 min</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="30">30 min</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="60">1 hour</SelectItem>
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  );
}

FILE: src/components/shell/LeftNav.tsx
================================================
"use client";

import { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { usePathname, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
import { createClient } from "@/lib/supabase/client";
import {
  Mail,
  Send,
  SendHorizontal,
  Truck,
  Package,
  Users,
  Building,
  AlertTriangle,
  BarChart3,
  Settings,
  Ruler,
  Zap,
  LayoutGrid,
  Phone,
} from "lucide-react";

const dashboardItems = [
  { href: "/dashboard", label: "Inbox", icon: Mail },
  { href: "/sent", label: "Sent", icon: SendHorizontal },
  { href: "/dashboard?tab=active-loads", label: "Active Loads", icon: Truck },
  { href: "/dashboard?tab=quote-board", label: "Quote Board", icon: LayoutGrid },
  { href: "/dashboard?tab=call-log", label: "Call Log", icon: Phone },
];

const autopilotItems = [
  { href: "/outbound", label: "Outbound", icon: Send },
  { href: "/agent", label: "Agent", icon: Zap },
];

const operationsItems = [
  { href: "/loads", label: "Load Builder", icon: Package },
  { href: "/carriers", label: "Carrier Network", icon: Users },
  { href: "/shippers", label: "Shipper Accounts", icon: Building },
  { href: "/lane-boundaries", label: "Lane Boundaries", icon: Ruler },
  { href: "/escalations", label: "Escalations", icon: AlertTriangle },
  { href: "/analytics", label: "Analytics", icon: BarChart3 },
  { href: "/settings", label: "Settings", icon: Settings },
];

interface DashboardStats {
  activeLoads: number;
  aiActionsToday: number;
  openEscalations: number;
  loadsDelivered: number;
  unreadCount: number;
}

export function LeftNav() {
  const pathname = usePathname();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();
  const currentTab = searchParams.get("tab");
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats>({
    activeLoads: 0,
    aiActionsToday: 0,
    openEscalations: 0,
    loadsDelivered: 0,
    unreadCount: 0,
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchStats() {
      try {
        const res = await fetch("/api/analytics/stats");
        if (res.ok) {
          const data = await res.json();
          setStats({
            activeLoads: data.activeLoads ?? 0,
            aiActionsToday: data.aiActionsToday ?? 0,
            openEscalations: data.openEscalations ?? 0,
            loadsDelivered: data.loadsDelivered ?? 0,
            unreadCount: data.unreadCount ?? 0,
          });
        }
      } catch {
        // silently fail
      }
    }

    fetchStats();
    const interval = setInterval(fetchStats, 60000);
    return () => clearInterval(interval);
  }, []);

  // Real-time subscription for instant unread dot updates
  useEffect(() => {
    const supabase = createClient();

    const channel = supabase
      .channel("leftnav-unread")
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "INSERT", schema: "public", table: "emails" },
        (payload) => {
          const email = payload.new as { is_read?: boolean };
          if (!email.is_read) {
            setStats((prev) => ({ ...prev, unreadCount: prev.unreadCount + 1 }));
          }
        }
      )
      .on(
        "postgres_changes",
        { event: "UPDATE", schema: "public", table: "emails" },
        (payload) => {
          const oldEmail = payload.old as { is_read?: boolean };
          const newEmail = payload.new as { is_read?: boolean };
          if (oldEmail.is_read === false && newEmail.is_read === true) {
            setStats((prev) => ({ ...prev, unreadCount: Math.max(0, prev.unreadCount - 1) }));
          } else if (oldEmail.is_read === true && newEmail.is_read === false) {
            setStats((prev) => ({ ...prev, unreadCount: prev.unreadCount + 1 }));
          }
        }
      )
      .subscribe();

    return () => {
      supabase.removeChannel(channel);
    };
  }, []);

  function isActive(href: string) {
    if (href.startsWith("/dashboard?tab=")) {
      const tab = new URL(href, "http://x").searchParams.get("tab");
      return pathname === "/dashboard" && currentTab === tab;
    }
    if (href === "/dashboard") {
      return pathname === "/dashboard" && !currentTab;
    }
    return pathname.startsWith(href);
  }

  return (
    <aside className="w-56 border-r bg-background h-screen flex flex-col">
      {/* Logo */}
      <div className="h-14 px-4 border-b flex items-center">
        <Link href="/dashboard" className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <div className="p-1.5 bg-primary rounded-lg">
            <Truck className="h-4 w-4 text-primary-foreground" />
          </div>
          <span className="font-semibold text-lg">TTMS Mailer</span>
        </Link>
      </div>

      {/* Navigation */}
      <nav className="flex-1 overflow-auto py-4">
        {/* Dashboard Section */}
        <div className="px-4 mb-1">
          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
            Dashboard
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="px-2 space-y-0.5 mb-4">
          {dashboardItems.map((item) => {
            const Icon = item.icon;
            const active = isActive(item.href);
            return (
              <Link
                key={item.href}
                href={item.href}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
                  active
                    ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                    : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground"
                )}
              >
                <Icon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                <span className="flex-1">{item.label}</span>
                {item.href === "/dashboard" && stats.unreadCount > 0 && (
                  <span className="h-2 w-2 rounded-full bg-red-500" />
                )}
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        {/* Autopilot Section */}
        <div className="px-4 mb-1">
          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
            Autopilot
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="px-2 space-y-0.5 mb-4">
          {autopilotItems.map((item) => {
            const Icon = item.icon;
            const active = isActive(item.href);
            return (
              <Link
                key={item.href}
                href={item.href}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
                  active
                    ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                    : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground"
                )}
              >
                <Icon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                <span className="flex-1">{item.label}</span>
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </div>

        {/* Operations Section */}
        <div className="px-4 mb-1">
          <span className="text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-muted-foreground">
            Operations
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="px-2 space-y-0.5">
          {operationsItems.map((item) => {
            const Icon = item.icon;
            const active = isActive(item.href);
            const isEscalation = item.href === "/escalations";
            return (
              <Link
                key={item.href}
                href={item.href}
                className={cn(
                  "flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-sm font-medium transition-colors",
                  active
                    ? "bg-primary/10 text-primary"
                    : "text-muted-foreground hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground"
                )}
              >
                <Icon className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
                <span className="flex-1">{item.label}</span>
                {isEscalation && stats.openEscalations > 0 && (
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center h-5 min-w-[20px] px-1.5 rounded-full bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 text-[10px] font-semibold">
                    {stats.openEscalations}
                  </span>
                )}
              </Link>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      </nav>

      {/* Bottom Stats */}
      <div className="border-t p-3 space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">Active Loads</span>
          <span className="font-semibold text-green-600">
            {stats.activeLoads}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">AI Actions Today</span>
          <span className="font-semibold text-green-600">
            {stats.aiActionsToday}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">Escalations</span>
          <span
            className={cn(
              "font-semibold",
              stats.openEscalations > 0
                ? "text-amber-600"
                : "text-muted-foreground"
            )}
          >
            {stats.openEscalations}
          </span>
        </div>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-between text-xs">
          <span className="text-muted-foreground">Loads Delivered</span>
          <span className="font-semibold text-foreground">
            {stats.loadsDelivered}
          </span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </aside>
  );
}
