      const accepted = history.filter((s) => s === "accepted").length;
      const responseRate = responded / total;
      const acceptRate = total > 0 ? accepted / total : 0;

      let bonus = 0;
      if (responseRate > 0.8) bonus += 15;
      else if (responseRate < 0.2) bonus -= 10;
      if (acceptRate > 0.5) bonus += 5;

      const recentStatuses = history.slice(0, 3);
      if (recentStatuses.length >= 3 && recentStatuses.every((s) => s === "expired")) {
        bonus -= 15;
      }

      carrier.score = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, carrier.score + bonus));
    }
  }

  // Sort and pick top N
  scored.sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score);
  const topCarriers = scored.slice(0, maxBlast);

  // Get sender name
  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("display_name")
    .eq("id", userId)
    .single();
  const senderName = profile?.display_name || "Red Dog Logistics";

  // Generate offer emails in parallel (with blast intelligence for learning loop)
  const offerResults = await Promise.allSettled(
    topCarriers.map(async (carrier) => {
      let blastIntelligence;
      try {
        blastIntelligence = await fetchBlastIntelligence(
          supabase, userId, carrier.carrier_email,
          order.shipfrom_state || "", order.shipto_state || ""
        );
      } catch { /* non-fatal */ }

      const offerParams: OfferEmailParams = {
        carrierName: carrier.carrier_name,
        carrierEmail: carrier.carrier_email,
        carrierLoadsCount: carrier.loads_count,
        carrierLastRate: carrier.carrier_charge || carrier.carrier_total,
        carrierLastDATRate: carrier.market_rate || null,
        carrierLastShipmentDate: carrier.shipment_date,
        loadNumber: loadId,
        originCity: order.shipfrom_city || "",
        originState: order.shipfrom_state || "",
        destCity: order.shipto_city || "",
        destState: order.shipto_state || "",
        equipmentType: order.equipment_type || "TL",
        equipmentId: order.equipment_id || null,
        pickupDate: order.requested_pickup_date || null,
        deliveryDate: order.requested_delivery_date || null,
        weightLbs: order.total_weight || null,
        commodity: order.order_items?.[0]?.description || null,
        miles: order.total_miles || null,
        shipperRate: shipperRate,
        senderName,
        blastIntelligence,
      };
      const offerResult = await generateOfferEmail(offerParams);
      return { carrier, offerResult };
    })
  );

  // Send/draft + track (in test mode: sendOrDraft creates is_test=true drafts, never sends)
  let sentCount = 0;
  for (const result of offerResults) {
    if (result.status === "rejected") continue;
    const { carrier, offerResult } = result.value;
    const { subject, body, datRate, reasoning } = offerResult;
    const offerRate = typeof offerResult.offerRate === "number" && isFinite(offerResult.offerRate)
      ? offerResult.offerRate
      : shipperRate;

    // sendOrDraft handles test mode internally:
    //   test_mode=true  → creates draft with is_test=true (never sends)
    //   draft_mode=true → creates draft for human review
    //   live mode       → sends immediately via Graph API
    await sendOrDraft(userId, {
      draftType: "carrier_blast",
      toAddress: carrier.carrier_email,
      toName: carrier.carrier_name,
      subject,
      bodyText: body,
      loadId,
      metadata: { offerRate, carrierScore: carrier.score, carrierId: carrier.carrier_id, reblast: true, datRate, reasoning },
    });

    // In test mode: DON'T insert real carrier_blasts rows (would pollute
    // scoring data and make the load appear "already blasted" on next cycle).
    // The is_test=true draft in agent_drafts is sufficient for review.
    if (!testMode) {
      await supabase.from("carrier_blasts").insert({
        user_id: userId,
        load_id: loadId,
        carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
        carrier_email: carrier.carrier_email,
        carrier_name: carrier.carrier_name,
        carrier_mc: carrier.carrier_mc,
        carrier_score: carrier.score,
        offer_rate: offerRate,
        status: "sent",
        expires_at: new Date(Date.now() + 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString(),
      });
    }
    sentCount++;
  }

  await logActivity(userId, "sent_blast", `${prefix}Blasted ${label} to ${sentCount} carrier(s) (top: ${topCarriers[0]?.carrier_name}, score ${topCarriers[0]?.score})`, {
    loadId,
    cycleId,
    metadata: { reblast: true, test_mode: testMode || undefined, previouslyContacted: excludeEmails.size },
  });
  await emitAndLog("reblast", "success", `${prefix}${label} → ${sentCount} carrier(s) ${testMode ? "drafted" : "blasted"} (${excludeEmails.size} previously contacted)`);
  actions.push(`${prefix}Reblast: ${label} → ${sentCount} carriers`);
  return true;
}

/**
 * Finds unbooked loads from two sources and blasts carriers:
 *
 * SOURCE 1 — TTMS PENDING orders: Fetches recent PENDING orders from TTMS API
 * where carrier_id is null (no carrier assigned). These are loads that exist in
 * the TMS but haven't been covered yet — the agent proactively finds best-scored
 * past carriers on the lane and drafts outbound offer emails.
 *
 * SOURCE 2 — Previously blasted loads: Loads where all carrier blasts have
 * expired/declined (none accepted/sent/countered). Re-blasts to the next
 * best-scored past carriers that haven't been contacted yet.
 *
 * Called from the orchestrator after stale blast expiry (Step 4.75).
 */
export async function reblastUnbookedLoads(
  userId: string,
  cycleId: string,
  emitAndLog: (
    phase: string,
    type: "start" | "info" | "success" | "warn" | "error" | "done",
    message: string,
    durationMs?: number
  ) => Promise<void>,
  actions: string[]
): Promise<number> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const testMode = await isTestModeCached(userId);
  const prefix = testMode ? "[TEST] " : "";
  let totalBlasted = 0;

  // Helper: check if agent was stopped mid-reblast
  async function isStopped(): Promise<boolean> {
    invalidateSettingsCache(userId);
    const s = await getCachedSettings(userId);
    return !s?.enabled;
  }

  await emitAndLog("reblast", "start", "Scanning for unbooked loads (TTMS PENDING + expired blasts)...");

  // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(userId);
  // OLD: passed user_id: ttmsUserId — doesn't work reliably
  // NEW: use pod_id for pod-centric filtering
  const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(userId);

  // ── SOURCE 1: Fresh PENDING orders from TTMS with no carrier ──
  try {
    const pendingOrders = await getOrders({ status: "PENDING", per_page: 15, pod_id: podInfo?.podId });
    const uncoveredOrders = (pendingOrders.data || []).filter(
      (o: TTMSOrder) => o.carrier_id === null && o.total_charge > 0
    );

    if (uncoveredOrders.length > 0) {
      await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", `Found ${uncoveredOrders.length} PENDING order(s) in TTMS with no carrier assigned`);

      // Check which ones we've already blasted (by TTMS order ID)
      // In live mode: check carrier_blasts table
      // In test mode: also check agent_drafts (since test mode skips carrier_blasts inserts)
      const orderIds = uncoveredOrders.map((o: TTMSOrder) => String(o.id));
      const { data: existingBlasts } = await supabase
        .from("carrier_blasts")
        .select("load_id")
        .eq("user_id", userId)
        .in("load_id", orderIds);

      // Also check by load_number for orders that have one
      const loadNumbers = uncoveredOrders
        .filter((o: TTMSOrder) => o.load_number)
        .map((o: TTMSOrder) => String(o.load_number));
      const { data: existingByLn } = loadNumbers.length > 0
        ? await supabase
            .from("carrier_blasts")
            .select("load_id")
            .eq("user_id", userId)
            .in("load_id", loadNumbers)
        : { data: [] };

      // In test mode, also check agent_drafts for pending test drafts
      // (since we skip carrier_blasts inserts in test mode)
      const allCandidateIds = [...orderIds, ...loadNumbers];
      const { data: existingTestDrafts } = testMode && allCandidateIds.length > 0
        ? await supabase
            .from("agent_drafts")
            .select("load_id")
            .eq("user_id", userId)
            .eq("is_test", true)
            .eq("draft_type", "carrier_blast")
            .eq("status", "pending")
            .in("load_id", allCandidateIds)
        : { data: [] };

      const alreadyHandled = new Set([
        ...(existingBlasts || []).map((b: { load_id: string }) => b.load_id),
        ...(existingByLn || []).map((b: { load_id: string }) => b.load_id),
        ...(existingTestDrafts || []).map((d: { load_id: string }) => d.load_id),
      ]);

      // Filter to truly new orders we haven't touched
      const newOrders = uncoveredOrders.filter(
        (o: TTMSOrder) =>
          !alreadyHandled.has(String(o.id)) &&
          !alreadyHandled.has(String(o.load_number || ""))
      );

      if (newOrders.length > 0) {
        await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", `${newOrders.length} PENDING order(s) not yet blasted — sending to best carriers`);

        // Cap at 3 new orders per cycle
        const toProcess = newOrders.slice(0, 3);
        for (const order of toProcess) {
          // Check for emergency stop before each blast
          if (await isStopped()) {
            await emitAndLog("reblast", "warn", "Agent was stopped — aborting reblast");
            return totalBlasted;
          }

          const loadId = order.load_number ? String(order.load_number) : String(order.id);
          const rate = order.total_charge || order.line_haul_charge || 0;
          const lane = `${order.shipfrom_city}, ${order.shipfrom_state} → ${order.shipto_city}, ${order.shipto_state}`;
          const label = `TTMS #${order.id} (${lane})`;

          try {
            const success = await blastOrderToCarriers(
              userId, cycleId, order, loadId,
              rate, new Set(), label,
              emitAndLog, actions
            );
            if (success) totalBlasted++;
          } catch (err) {
            const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
            await emitAndLog("reblast", "error", `Failed to blast ${label}: ${msg}`);
          }
        }
      } else {
        await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", `All ${uncoveredOrders.length} PENDING orders already have active blasts`);
      }
    } else {
      await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", "No uncovered PENDING orders in TTMS");
    }
  } catch (err) {
    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
    await emitAndLog("reblast", "error", `TTMS PENDING scan failed (non-fatal): ${msg}`);
  }

  // ── SOURCE 2: Previously blasted loads where all blasts expired/declined ──
  const { data: allBlasts } = await supabase
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .select("load_id, status, carrier_email")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .not("load_id", "like", "TEST-%");

  if (allBlasts && allBlasts.length > 0) {
    // Group by load_id
    const blastsByLoad = new Map<string, { statuses: string[]; emails: Set<string> }>();
    for (const b of allBlasts) {
      if (!blastsByLoad.has(b.load_id)) {
        blastsByLoad.set(b.load_id, { statuses: [], emails: new Set() });
      }
      const entry = blastsByLoad.get(b.load_id)!;
      entry.statuses.push(b.status);
      if (b.carrier_email) entry.emails.add(b.carrier_email);
    }

    // Find loads where ALL blasts are expired/declined (none active)
    const staleLoadIds: string[] = [];
    for (const [loadId, { statuses }] of blastsByLoad) {
      const hasActive = statuses.some((s) => s === "sent" || s === "countered" || s === "accepted");
      if (!hasActive) staleLoadIds.push(loadId);
    }

    if (staleLoadIds.length > 0) {
      await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", `${staleLoadIds.length} previously blasted load(s) have all blasts expired/declined`);

      // Cap at 3 re-blasts per cycle
      const toReblast = staleLoadIds.slice(0, 3);
      for (const loadId of toReblast) {
        // Check for emergency stop before each re-blast
        if (await isStopped()) {
          await emitAndLog("reblast", "warn", "Agent was stopped — aborting reblast");
          return totalBlasted;
        }

        try {
          // Find TTMS order ID from loads table
          const { data: loadRow } = await supabase
            .from("loads")
            .select("ttms_order_id, shipper_rate")
            .eq("load_number", loadId)
            .maybeSingle();

          if (!loadRow?.ttms_order_id) {
            // Try treating loadId as TTMS order ID directly
            const orderId = parseInt(loadId, 10);
            if (isNaN(orderId)) {
              await emitAndLog("reblast", "warn", `Load ${loadId}: no TTMS order found — skipping`);
              continue;
            }
            const { data: order } = await getOrder(orderId);
            // Skip if order now has a carrier (booked outside the agent)
            if (order.carrier_id) continue;

            const rate = order.total_charge || order.line_haul_charge || 0;
            const alreadyEmailed = blastsByLoad.get(loadId)?.emails || new Set();
            const lane = `${order.shipfrom_city}, ${order.shipfrom_state} → ${order.shipto_city}, ${order.shipto_state}`;

            const success = await blastOrderToCarriers(
              userId, cycleId, order, loadId,
              rate, alreadyEmailed, `Re-blast ${loadId} (${lane})`,
              emitAndLog, actions
            );
            if (success) totalBlasted++;
            continue;
          }

          // Verify the order is still unbooked in TTMS
          const { data: order } = await getOrder(loadRow.ttms_order_id);
          if (order.carrier_id) {
            await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", `Load ${loadId}: already booked in TTMS (${order.carrier_name}) — skipping`);
            continue;
          }

          const rate = typeof loadRow.shipper_rate === "string"
            ? parseFloat(loadRow.shipper_rate)
            : loadRow.shipper_rate || order.total_charge || 0;

          const alreadyEmailed = blastsByLoad.get(loadId)?.emails || new Set();
          const lane = `${order.shipfrom_city}, ${order.shipfrom_state} → ${order.shipto_city}, ${order.shipto_state}`;

          const success = await blastOrderToCarriers(
            userId, cycleId, order, loadId,
            rate, alreadyEmailed, `Re-blast ${loadId} (${lane})`,
            emitAndLog, actions
          );
          if (success) totalBlasted++;
        } catch (err) {
          const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
          await emitAndLog("reblast", "error", `Re-blast failed for ${loadId}: ${msg}`);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  if (totalBlasted > 0) {
    await emitAndLog("reblast", "success", `${prefix}Reblast complete — ${totalBlasted} load(s) sent to carriers`);
  } else {
    await emitAndLog("reblast", "info", "No loads needed (re)blasting this cycle");
  }

  return totalBlasted;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agent/carrier-reply-handler.ts
================================================
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, sendReply, sendNewEmail } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { getOrder } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { parseCarrierIntent, generateNegotiationReply, calculateRates } from "@/lib/negotiate";
import { sendOrDraft, createDraft } from "./draft-manager";
import { isTestModeCached, getCachedSettings } from "./settings-cache";
import { logActivity } from "./activity-logger";
import { escalate } from "./safety";
import { handleAcceptance } from "./race-manager";
import { logNegotiationEvent, buildLearningContext, formatLearningsForPrompt } from "@/lib/learning";

interface EmailRow {
  id: string;
  from_address: string;
  from_name: string | null;
  subject: string | null;
  body_html: string | null;
  body_preview: string | null;
  graph_message_id: string | null;
  received_at: string;
}

interface BlastRow {
  id: string;
  load_id: string;
  carrier_id: number | null;
  carrier_email: string;
  carrier_name: string | null;
  carrier_mc: string | null;
  carrier_score: number | null;
  offer_rate: number | null;
  status: string;
}

/**
 * Match an incoming email to an active carrier blast by from_address + load number.
 */
export async function matchBlastReply(email: EmailRow): Promise<BlastRow | null> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // Check if from_address has any active blast
  const { data: blasts } = await supabase
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .select("id, load_id, carrier_id, carrier_email, carrier_name, carrier_mc, carrier_score, offer_rate, status")
    .eq("carrier_email", email.from_address)
    .in("status", ["sent", "countered"])
    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });

  if (!blasts?.length) return null;

  // If multiple active blasts, match by load number in subject
  const loadNumberMatch = email.subject?.match(/Load\s+(\S+)/i);
  if (loadNumberMatch) {
    const blast = blasts.find((b) => b.load_id === loadNumberMatch[1]);
    if (blast) return blast;
  }

  // Fallback: use the most recent blast for this carrier
  return blasts[0];
}

/**
 * Handle a carrier reply to one of our blasts.
 */
export async function handleCarrierReply(userId: string, email: EmailRow): Promise<void> {
  const blast = await matchBlastReply(email);
  if (!blast) return;

  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const emailBody = email.body_preview || email.body_html || "";

  // Parse intent using existing parseCarrierIntent()
  const intent = await parseCarrierIntent(emailBody, email.subject || "");

  // Log negotiation event for learning loop (skip in test mode — don't pollute learnings)
  const shipperRate = Number(blast.offer_rate) || 0;
  const rates = shipperRate > 0 ? calculateRates(shipperRate) : null;
  const testMode = await isTestModeCached(userId);

  if (!testMode) {
    await logNegotiationEvent({
      tenantId: userId,
      eventType: `carrier_${intent.intent}`,
      carrierEmail: blast.carrier_email,
      carrierName: blast.carrier_name,
      carrierMc: blast.carrier_mc,
      carrierId: blast.carrier_id ? String(blast.carrier_id) : null,
      loadId: blast.load_id,
      loadNumber: blast.load_id,
      emailId: email.id,
      negotiationId: blast.id,
      lane: {},
      equipmentType: null,
      rateState: {
        shipperRate,
        carrierOffer: intent.amount,
        aiCounterRate: null,
        floorRate: rates?.minAccept ?? null,
        targetRate: rates?.targetRate ?? null,
        ceilingRate: rates?.maxPayout ?? null,
        roundNumber: 0,
      },
      contextSnapshot: { intent: intent.intent, carrier_score: blast.carrier_score },
      modelUsed: "google/gemini-3-flash-preview",
      systemPromptHash: "agent-pipeline",
      actionTaken: "received",
      aiResponseText: "",
    });
  } else {
    // Log learning activity to activity feed so it's visible in test mode
    await logActivity(userId, "learning", `Learning captured: ${blast.carrier_name || blast.carrier_email} → ${intent.intent}${intent.amount ? ` @ $${intent.amount}` : ""} on ${blast.load_id}`, {
      loadId: blast.load_id,
      emailId: email.id,
      metadata: { test_mode: true, intent: intent.intent, carrier_offer: intent.amount, carrier_score: blast.carrier_score },
    });
  }

  // Get agent settings (cached)
  const cachedSettings = await getCachedSettings(userId);
  const maxRounds = cachedSettings?.max_negotiation_rounds || 3;
  const ceilingPct = cachedSettings?.rate_ceiling_pct || 15;
  const ceiling = rates ? rates.targetRate * (1 + ceilingPct / 100) : 0;

  switch (intent.intent) {
    case "accept": {
      await handleAcceptance(
        userId,
        blast.load_id,
        blast.carrier_email,
        Number(blast.offer_rate),
        blast.carrier_id
      );
      break;
    }

    case "rate_offer":
    case "rate_counter": {
      const counterRate = intent.amount || 0;

      if (counterRate === 0) {
        // No specific rate — treat as walk away
        await supabase.from("carrier_blasts").update({ status: "declined" }).eq("id", blast.id).eq("user_id", userId);
        await logActivity(userId, "negotiated", `${blast.carrier_name} walked away from ${blast.load_id}`, {
          loadId: blast.load_id,
        });
        break;
      }

      if (rates && counterRate > ceiling) {
        await escalate(
          userId,
          blast.load_id,
          `${blast.carrier_name} countered $${counterRate}, above ceiling $${ceiling.toFixed(0)}`
        );
        break;
      }

      if (rates && counterRate <= rates.targetRate) {
        // At or below target — auto accept
        await handleAcceptance(userId, blast.load_id, blast.carrier_email, counterRate, blast.carrier_id);
        break;
      }

      // Between target and ceiling — negotiate
      // Count previous replies as rounds
      const { count: replyCount } = await supabase
        .from("email_replies")
        .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
        .eq("email_id", email.id);

      const currentRound = (replyCount || 0) + 1;

      if (currentRound >= maxRounds) {
        await escalate(
          userId,
          blast.load_id,
          `Max rounds (${maxRounds}) reached with ${blast.carrier_name}`
        );
        break;
      }

      // Fetch load details from TTMS for better negotiation context
      let loadOriginCity: string | null = null;
      let loadOriginState: string | null = null;
      let loadDestCity: string | null = null;
      let loadDestState: string | null = null;
      let loadEquipment: string | null = null;
      let loadWeight: number | null = null;
      let loadMiles: number | null = null;
      try {
        const orderId = Number(blast.load_id);
        if (!isNaN(orderId) && orderId > 0) {
          const { data: order } = await getOrder(orderId);
          loadOriginCity = order.shipfrom_city || null;
          loadOriginState = order.shipfrom_state || null;
          loadDestCity = order.shipto_city || null;
          loadDestState = order.shipto_state || null;
          loadEquipment = order.equipment_type || null;
          loadWeight = order.total_weight || null;
          loadMiles = order.total_miles || null;
        }
      } catch {
        // Non-fatal — negotiate with partial context
      }

      // Get sender name from profile
      const { data: profile } = await supabase
        .from("profiles")
        .select("display_name, name")
        .eq("id", userId)
        .single();
      const senderName = profile?.display_name || profile?.name || "Red Dog Logistics";

      // Build learning context for this carrier + lane
      const learningCtx = await buildLearningContext({
        tenantId: userId,
        carrierEmail: blast.carrier_email,
        carrierMc: blast.carrier_mc,
        originState: loadOriginState,
        destState: loadDestState,
        equipmentType: loadEquipment,
      });
      const learningsPromptSection = formatLearningsForPrompt(learningCtx);

      // Generate negotiation reply with learning context injected
      const replyResult = await generateNegotiationReply(
        {
          carrierName: blast.carrier_name,
          carrierEmail: blast.carrier_email,
          carrierMc: blast.carrier_mc,
          loadNumber: blast.load_id,
          loadDetails: {
            origin_city: loadOriginCity,
            origin_state: loadOriginState,
            dest_city: loadDestCity,
            dest_state: loadDestState,
            equipment_type: loadEquipment,
            weight_lbs: loadWeight,
            commodity: null,
            shipper_rate: shipperRate,
            carrier_rate: counterRate,
            miles: loadMiles,
          },
          rateParams: rates
            ? { floor_rate: rates.minAccept, target_rate: rates.targetRate, ceiling_rate: rates.maxPayout }
            : null,
          existingQuote: null,
          negotiationRecord: null,
          conversationHistory: [],
          senderName,
          isKnownCarrier: !!blast.carrier_mc,
          currentEmail: {
            subject: email.subject,
            body: emailBody,
            fromName: email.from_name,
            fromAddress: email.from_address,
          },
        },
        { intent: intent.intent, amount: counterRate },
        learningsPromptSection
      );

      if (replyResult.action === "escalate") {
        await escalate(userId, blast.load_id, `Negotiation escalated with ${blast.carrier_name}`);
        break;
      }

      // Negotiation replies — send immediately in live mode, draft in test mode
      const replyHtml = replyResult.draft
        .split(/\n\n+/)
        .map(
          (para) =>
            `<p style="margin:0 0 12px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#333;">${para.replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</p>`
        )
        .join("");

      if (testMode) {
        // TEST MODE: Draft the negotiation reply instead of sending
        await createDraft({
          userId,
          draftType: "negotiation_reply",
          toAddress: email.from_address,
          toName: blast.carrier_name || undefined,
          subject: `Re: ${email.subject || ""}`,
          bodyText: replyResult.draft,
          bodyHtml: replyHtml,
          replyToMessageId: email.graph_message_id || undefined,
          emailId: email.id,
          loadId: blast.load_id,
          isTest: true,
        });
        await logActivity(userId, "drafted", `[TEST] Drafted negotiation reply to ${blast.carrier_name} for ${blast.load_id}`, {
          loadId: blast.load_id,
          emailId: email.id,
          metadata: { test_mode: true },
        });
      } else {
        // LIVE: Send immediately — speed matters in rate negotiations
        const token = await getAccessToken(userId);
        if (email.graph_message_id) {
          await sendReply(token, email.graph_message_id, replyHtml);
        } else {
          await sendNewEmail(token, { address: email.from_address, name: blast.carrier_name || undefined }, `Re: ${email.subject}`, replyHtml);
        }

        // Track in email_replies
        const supabaseForReply = await createServiceClient();
        await supabaseForReply.from("email_replies").insert({
          email_id: email.id,
          reply_body: replyHtml,
          source: "agent",
          sent_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        });

        await logActivity(userId, "sent", `Negotiation reply to ${blast.carrier_name} for ${blast.load_id}`, {
          loadId: blast.load_id,
          emailId: email.id,
        });
      }

      // Update blast status
      await supabase.from("carrier_blasts").update({ status: "countered" }).eq("id", blast.id).eq("user_id", userId);
      break;
    }

    case "walk_away": {
      await supabase.from("carrier_blasts").update({ status: "declined" }).eq("id", blast.id).eq("user_id", userId);
      await logActivity(userId, "negotiated", `${blast.carrier_name} declined ${blast.load_id}`, {
        loadId: blast.load_id,
      });

      // Check if ALL carriers declined
      const { count } = await supabase
        .from("carrier_blasts")
        .select("id", { count: "exact", head: true })
        .eq("user_id", userId)
        .eq("load_id", blast.load_id)
        .in("status", ["sent", "countered"]);

      if (count === 0) {
        await escalate(userId, blast.load_id, `All carriers declined ${blast.load_id} — no coverage`);
      }
      break;
    }

    default: {
      // Question / general inquiry — log but don't auto-respond
      await logActivity(userId, "negotiated", `${blast.carrier_name} sent inquiry about ${blast.load_id}`, {
        loadId: blast.load_id,
        emailId: email.id,
      });
      break;
    }
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agent/draft-manager.ts
================================================
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getAccessToken, sendReply, sendNewEmail, sendReplyWithAttachment } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { logActivity } from "./activity-logger";
import { getCachedSettings } from "./settings-cache";

type DraftType = "carrier_blast" | "negotiation_reply" | "shipper_confirmation" | "booking_confirmation" | "tender_quote" | "shipper_status_reply";

export async function createDraft(params: {
  userId: string;
  draftType: DraftType;
  toAddress: string;
  toName?: string;
  subject: string;
  bodyText: string;
  bodyHtml: string;
  replyToMessageId?: string;
  emailId?: string;
  loadId?: string;
  negotiationId?: string;
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
  isTest?: boolean;
}): Promise<string> {
  const row = {
    user_id: params.userId,
    draft_type: params.draftType,
    to_address: params.toAddress,
    to_name: params.toName || null,
    subject: params.subject,
    body_text: params.bodyText,
    body_html: params.bodyHtml,
    reply_to_message_id: params.replyToMessageId || null,
    email_id: params.emailId || null,
    load_id: params.loadId || null,
    negotiation_id: params.negotiationId || null,
    metadata: params.metadata || {},
    status: "pending",
    is_test: params.isTest || false,
  };

  // Retry up to 3 times on transient Supabase failures
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 3; attempt++) {
    const supabase = await createServiceClient();
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from("agent_drafts")
      .insert(row)
      .select("id")
      .single();

    if (!error && data) return data.id;

    const isTransient = error?.message?.includes("fetch failed") ||
      error?.message?.includes("ECONNRESET") ||
      error?.message?.includes("socket hang up");

    if (!isTransient || attempt === 2) {
      throw new Error(`Failed to create draft: ${error?.message}`);
    }

    await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, 1000 * (attempt + 1)));
  }

  throw new Error("Failed to create draft after 3 attempts");
}

export async function sendDraft(draftId: string, userId: string): Promise<void> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data: draft, error } = await supabase
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .select("id, draft_type, to_address, to_name, subject, body_html, reply_to_message_id, email_id, load_id, metadata, is_test")
    .eq("id", draftId)
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("status", "pending")
    .single();

  if (error || !draft) throw new Error("Draft not found or already sent");

  // HARD BLOCK: Test drafts can NEVER be sent
  if (draft.is_test) {
    throw new Error("Cannot send test mode drafts. Disable test mode first.");
  }

  const token = await getAccessToken(userId);

  const rawAtt = draft.metadata?.attachment as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
  const attachment =
    rawAtt && typeof rawAtt.name === "string" && typeof rawAtt.contentType === "string" && typeof rawAtt.contentBase64 === "string"
      ? { name: rawAtt.name, contentType: rawAtt.contentType, contentBase64: rawAtt.contentBase64 }
      : undefined;

  if (draft.reply_to_message_id && attachment) {
    await sendReplyWithAttachment(token, draft.reply_to_message_id, draft.body_html, attachment);
  } else if (draft.reply_to_message_id) {
    await sendReply(token, draft.reply_to_message_id, draft.body_html);
  } else {
    await sendNewEmail(
      token,
      { address: draft.to_address, name: draft.to_name || undefined },
      draft.subject,
      draft.body_html
    );
  }

  await supabase
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .update({ status: "sent", sent_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq("id", draftId)
    .eq("status", "pending");

  if (draft.email_id) {
    await supabase.from("email_replies").insert({
      email_id: draft.email_id,
      reply_body: draft.body_html,
      source: "agent",
      sent_at: new Date().toISOString(),
    });
  }

  await logActivity(userId, "sent", `Sent ${draft.draft_type} to ${draft.to_address}`, {
    loadId: draft.load_id || undefined,
  });
}

export async function discardDraft(draftId: string, userId: string): Promise<void> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  await supabase
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .update({ status: "discarded", discarded_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq("id", draftId)
    .eq("user_id", userId);
}

export async function listPendingDrafts(userId: string) {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data } = await supabase
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .select("id, draft_type, to_address, to_name, subject, body_text, body_html, load_id, created_at, status, is_test")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("status", "pending")
    .order("created_at", { ascending: false });
  return data || [];
}

/**
 * Check if test_mode is enabled for a user.
 */
export async function isTestMode(userId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data } = await supabase
    .from("agent_settings")
    .select("test_mode")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .single();
  return data?.test_mode === true;
}

/**
 * Gate function: ALL outbound emails go through this.
 * TEST MODE: Creates draft with is_test=true. Never sends.
 * DRAFT MODE: Saves to drafts table for human review.
 * LIVE MODE: Sends immediately via Graph API.
 */
export async function sendOrDraft(
  userId: string,
  params: {
    draftType: DraftType;
    toAddress: string;
    toName?: string;
    subject: string;
    bodyText: string;
    replyToMessageId?: string;
    emailId?: string;
    loadId?: string;
    negotiationId?: string;
    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>;
  }
): Promise<void> {
  const bodyHtml = params.bodyText
    .split(/\n\n+/)
    .map(
      (para) =>
        `<p style="margin:0 0 12px 0;font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,sans-serif;font-size:14px;line-height:1.6;color:#333;">${para.replace(/\n/g, "<br>")}</p>`
    )
    .join("");

  const settings = await getCachedSettings(userId);
  const testMode = settings?.test_mode === true;

  // TEST MODE: Create draft with is_test=true. Never send.
  if (testMode) {
    await createDraft({ userId, ...params, bodyHtml, isTest: true });
    await logActivity(userId, "drafted", `[TEST] Drafted ${params.draftType} to ${params.toAddress}`, {
      loadId: params.loadId,
      metadata: { test_mode: true },
    });
    return;
  }

  if (settings?.draft_mode) {
    await createDraft({ userId, ...params, bodyHtml });
    await logActivity(userId, "drafted", `Drafted ${params.draftType} to ${params.toAddress}`, {
      loadId: params.loadId,
    });
  } else {
    const token = await getAccessToken(userId);
    const attachment = params.metadata?.attachment as
      | { name: string; contentType: string; contentBase64: string }
      | undefined;

    if (params.replyToMessageId && attachment) {
      await sendReplyWithAttachment(token, params.replyToMessageId, bodyHtml, attachment);
    } else if (params.replyToMessageId) {
      await sendReply(token, params.replyToMessageId, bodyHtml);
    } else {
      await sendNewEmail(
        token,
        { address: params.toAddress, name: params.toName },
        params.subject,
        bodyHtml
      );
    }
    await logActivity(userId, "sent", `Sent ${params.draftType} to ${params.toAddress}`, {
      loadId: params.loadId,
    });
  }
}

/**
 * Delete all test drafts for a user. Called when test_mode is turned off.
 */
export async function clearTestDrafts(userId: string): Promise<number> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data } = await supabase
    .from("agent_drafts")
    .delete()
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("is_test", true)
    .eq("status", "pending")
    .select("id");
  return data?.length || 0;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agent/extract-loads.ts
================================================
import { getAccessToken } from "@/lib/graph-client";
import { openrouterCall } from "@/lib/ai/openrouter-client";
import { fetchPdfsFromLinks } from "@/lib/pdf-utils";

const MODEL = "google/gemini-3-flash-preview";
const MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES = 20 * 1024 * 1024;

// Copied from extract-load route — do not modify
function stripHtml(html: string): string {
  return html
    .replace(/<style[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<script[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, " ")
    .replace(/<br\s*\/?>/gi, "\n")
    .replace(/<\/?(p|div|tr|td|th|li)[^>]*>/gi, "\n")
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, " ")
    .replace(/&nbsp;/g, " ")
    .replace(/&amp;/g, "&")
    .replace(/&lt;/g, "<")
    .replace(/&gt;/g, ">")
    .replace(/&quot;/g, '"')
    .replace(/\s{3,}/g, "\n\n")
    .trim();
}

interface GraphAttachment {
  "@odata.type": string;
  id: string;
  name: string;
  contentType: string;
  size: number;
  contentBytes?: string;
}

// Copied from extract-load route — do not modify
async function fetchPdfAttachments(
  accessToken: string,
  graphMessageId: string
): Promise<{ name: string; base64: string }[]> {
  try {
    const res = await fetch(
      `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages/${graphMessageId}/attachments?$select=id,name,contentType,size`,
      {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(30000),
      }
    );
    if (!res.ok) return [];

    const data = await res.json();
    const attachments: GraphAttachment[] = data.value || [];
    const pdfs: { name: string; base64: string }[] = [];

    for (const att of attachments) {
      if (!att.name) continue;
      const isPdf =
        att.contentType?.toLowerCase().includes("pdf") ||
        att.name.toLowerCase().includes(".pdf");
      if (!isPdf) continue;
      if (att.size > MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES) continue;

      const valRes = await fetch(
        `https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/me/messages/${graphMessageId}/attachments/${att.id}/$value`,
        {
          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${accessToken}` },
          signal: AbortSignal.timeout(60000),
        }
      );
      if (!valRes.ok) continue;
      const buf = await valRes.arrayBuffer();
      const base64 = Buffer.from(buf).toString("base64");
      if (base64) pdfs.push({ name: att.name, base64 });
    }

    return pdfs;
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

// Copied exactly from extract-load route lines 153-219
const systemPrompt = `You are a freight logistics data extractor. Your job is to read an email (and any attached PDF load sheets) and extract load/shipment information.

IMPORTANT: The email or PDF may contain MULTIPLE lanes or loads — extract ALL of them as separate objects. Do not stop early. Extract every single lane listed.

CRITICAL: Only extract data that is ACTUALLY present in the email body or attached PDF. If there is no real load data to extract, return an empty array []. NEVER invent, fabricate, or guess load data. NEVER copy the example below as if it were real data.

For each load, extract:
- client_name: the shipper/client company name — look for it in the email subject, forwarded-from headers, signature blocks, PDF letterheads, or "From:" lines in forwarded chains. For example "Waupaca Northwoods LLC" from "Subject: Waupaca Northwoods Ready Orders". Use the actual company name, not the broker or forwarding person. If unknown, use "NA".
- origin_name: the name of the shipping facility/branch plant (e.g. "IKO Southwest Inc. - Hillsboro", "Waupaca Northwoods") — look for "Shipping Branch Plant", "Ship From", "Origin" labels. If unknown, use "NA".
- origin_city, origin_state: where the freight is picked up
- dest_name: the name of the receiving facility/customer (e.g. "QXO-QXO-Kansas City KS", "ABC Distribution Center") — look for "Ship To", "Destination", "Consignee" labels. If unknown, use "NA".
- dest_city, dest_state: where it delivers
- shipper_rate: the dollar amount for this lane (number, no $ sign)
- equipment_type: e.g. "Flatbed", "Van", "Reefer", "TL", "LTL" — look for "Vehicle Type" label in the PDF/email first, then infer from subject/body if not found
- requested_pickup_date: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or "NA"
- requested_delivery_date: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or "NA"
- total_weight: number in lbs or "NA"
- requirements: any special requirements mentioned (dock, appointment, etc.) or "NA"
- notes: any additional notes or "NA"
- bill_type: "Prepaid" or "Collect" or "Third Party" — look for "Terms:" label in the PDF/email. If unknown, use "NA".
- bol_number: the BOL or Shipment number (e.g. "SN3482768") — look for "Shipment #", "BOL #", "BOL Number" labels. If unknown, use "NA".
- references: array of { type, number } for all reference numbers found — extract ALL of these from the PDF/email:
  - "Shipment #" / "SN..." → type "IKO Reference"
  - "Order #" → type "Sales Order #"
  - "Customer PO #" / "PO #" → type "Customer PO #"
  - "PRO #" → type "PRO #"
  - "Sales Order #" → type "Sales Order #"
  - "Delivery #" → type "Delivery #"
  - Any other reference numbers → type "" (empty string)
  IMPORTANT: Only extract actual reference numbers with explicit labels (e.g. "Order # 12345"). Do NOT extract random words from sentences — e.g. "NO SMOKING ON IKO PROPERTY" does NOT contain a PRO # reference.
  If no references found, use empty array [].
- order_type: "NORMAL" by default
- status: "PENDING" by default
- order_items: array with { description, class, weight } — use freight description if available
- order_accessorials: empty array unless accessorials mentioned
- client_id: "NA" (unknown from email)
- shipfrom_customer_id: "NA"
- shipto_customer_id: "NA"
- shipfrom_apt_required: false
- shipto_apt_required: false

For "Flat Only" style emails listing destinations with rates:
- The ORIGIN is the facility address in the email signature / subject
- Each line like "CityName, ST  250.00" is a SEPARATE load (destination + rate)
- "split" means a single truck covers both stops (still one load, two delivery stops)
- Date "PICK UP TODAY" = the email received date
- Equipment "Flat Only" = Flatbed

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. No explanation, no markdown, no code fences. Just the raw JSON array.
If no real load data is present, respond with exactly: []

Example format (these are FICTIONAL placeholder cities — do not use them as real data):
[
  {
    "client_name": "Example Company LLC",
    "client_id": "NA",
    "shipfrom_customer_id": "NA",
    "shipto_customer_id": "NA",
    "shipfrom_apt_required": false,
    "shipto_apt_required": false,
    "order_type": "NORMAL",
    "equipment_type": "Flatbed",
    "total_weight": "NA",
    "requirements": "NA",
    "notes": "NA",
    "bill_type": "Prepaid",
    "bol_number": "SN1234567",
    "references": [
      { "type": "IKO Reference", "number": "SN1234567" },
      { "type": "Sales Order #", "number": "12345678" },
      { "type": "Customer PO #", "number": "9876543" }
    ],
    "requested_pickup_date": "2025-01-01",
    "requested_delivery_date": "NA",
    "status": "PENDING",
    "origin_name": "Example Shipper Facility",
    "origin_city": "OriginCity",
    "origin_state": "OS",
    "dest_name": "Example Receiver Facility",
    "dest_city": "DestCity",
    "dest_state": "DS",
    "shipper_rate": 500.00,
    "order_stops": [
      { "type": "pickup", "location": "OriginCity, OS", "address": "NA" },
      { "type": "delivery", "location": "DestCity, DS", "address": "NA" }
    ],
    "order_items": [{ "description": "General freight", "class": "50", "weight": "NA" }],
    "order_accessorials": []
  }
]`;

export interface ExtractedLoad {
  client_name?: string;
  origin_name?: string;
  origin_city?: string;
  origin_state?: string;
  dest_name?: string;
  dest_city?: string;
  dest_state?: string;
  shipper_rate?: number | string;
  equipment_type: string;
  total_weight: string | number;
  requirements: string;
  notes: string;
  bill_type?: string;
  bol_number?: string;
  references?: { type: string; number: string }[];
  requested_pickup_date: string;
  requested_delivery_date: string;
  status: string;
  order_type: string;
  order_items: { description: string; class: string; weight: string | number }[];
  order_accessorials: unknown[];
  client_id: string | number;
  shipfrom_customer_id: string | number;
  shipto_customer_id: string | number;
  shipfrom_apt_required: boolean;
  shipto_apt_required: boolean;
  order_stops: { type: string; location: string; address: string }[];
}

/**
 * Extract loads from an email body + PDF attachments.
 * Non-streaming — returns the full array directly.
 */
export async function extractLoadsFromEmail(params: {
  emailBody: string;
  accessToken: string;
  graphMessageId: string | null;
  fromName: string | null;
  fromAddress: string;
  subject: string | null;
  receivedAt: string;
}): Promise<{ loads: ExtractedLoad[]; confidence: number }> {
  // 1. Strip HTML → plain text (max 12000 chars)
  const bodyText = stripHtml(params.emailBody).slice(0, 12000);

  // 2. Fetch PDF attachments from Graph API + linked PDFs in email body
  const [graphPdfs, linkedPdfs] = await Promise.all([
    params.graphMessageId
      ? fetchPdfAttachments(params.accessToken, params.graphMessageId)
      : Promise.resolve([]),
    fetchPdfsFromLinks(params.emailBody),
  ]);
  const pdfAttachments = [...graphPdfs, ...linkedPdfs];

  // 3. Build message content
  const emailText = `Extract ALL loads from this email${pdfAttachments.length > 0 ? ` and the attached PDF${pdfAttachments.length > 1 ? "s" : ""}` : ""}. Return a complete JSON array with every lane — do not truncate or stop early.

From: ${params.fromName || params.fromAddress} <${params.fromAddress}>
Subject: ${params.subject || "(no subject)"}
Date: ${params.receivedAt}

Email body:
${bodyText}`;

  type ContentPart = { type: "text"; text: string } | { type: "image_url"; image_url: { url: string } };
  const userContent: ContentPart[] = [{ type: "text", text: emailText }];
  for (const pdf of pdfAttachments) {
    userContent.push({ type: "image_url", image_url: { url: `data:application/pdf;base64,${pdf.base64}` } });
  }

  // 4. Call OpenRouter via retry-enabled client
  const extractResult = await openrouterCall({
    model: MODEL,
    messages: [
      { role: "system", content: systemPrompt },
      { role: "user", content: userContent },
    ],
    maxTokens: 16000,
    temperature: 0.1,
    timeoutMs: 120000,
    purpose: "extract_loads_from_email",
  });

  const text = extractResult.content || "";

  // 5. Parse JSON array from response
  const jsonMatch = text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/);
  if (!jsonMatch) return { loads: [], confidence: 0 };

  try {
    const loads: ExtractedLoad[] = JSON.parse(jsonMatch[0]);

    // 6. Estimate confidence
    const confidence = loads.length > 0 && loads.every((l) => l.origin_city && l.dest_city)
      ? 0.9
      : loads.length > 0
        ? 0.7
        : 0;

    return { loads, confidence };
  } catch {
    return { loads: [], confidence: 0 };
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agent/orchestrator.ts
================================================
import { syncEmails } from "@/lib/email-sync";
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { processShipperEmail } from "./shipper-pipeline";
import { processTenderEmail } from "./tender-pipeline";
import { handleCarrierReply, matchBlastReply } from "./carrier-reply-handler";
import { handleShipperStatusInquiry } from "./shipper-status-handler";
import { reblastUnbookedLoads } from "./carrier-blast";
import { logActivity } from "./activity-logger";
import { sendOrDraft } from "./draft-manager";
import { getCachedSettings, invalidateSettingsCache, isTestModeCached } from "./settings-cache";
import { draftReply } from "@/lib/ai/draft";
import { flushLlmUsage } from "@/lib/ai/flush-llm-usage";
import { initLlmTracking } from "@/lib/ai/init-llm-tracking";

export type EmitFn = (event: {
  phase: string;
  type: "start" | "info" | "success" | "warn" | "error" | "done";
  message: string;
}) => void;

const noop: EmitFn = () => {};

// Priority order: carrier replies first (time-sensitive), then awarded quotes, then new loads
const CATEGORY_PRIORITY: Record<string, number> = {
  IMP: 0,
  SHIPPER: 1,
  TENDER: 2,
  UNIMP: 3,
  IGNORE: 4,
};

async function timed<T>(fn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<[T, number]> {
  const start = Date.now();
  const result = await fn();
  return [result, Date.now() - start];
}

export async function runAgentCycle(
  userId: string,
  emit: EmitFn = noop
): Promise<{
  processed: number;
  actions: string[];
}> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const cycleId = crypto.randomUUID();

  // Initialize LLM cost tracking — all openrouterCall() invocations
  // during this cycle will write directly to llm_usage
  initLlmTracking(userId);

  // Helper: emit + persist to agent_activity (dual-write)
  const emitAndLog = async (
    phase: string,
    type: "start" | "info" | "success" | "warn" | "error" | "done",
    message: string,
    durationMs?: number
  ) => {
    emit({ phase, type, message });
    await logActivity(userId, "cycle_event", message, {
      cycleId,
      phase,
      level: type === "error" ? "error" : type === "warn" ? "warn" : "info",
      durationMs,
    });
  };

  // Check if agent is enabled (cached — avoids repeated DB reads)
  invalidateSettingsCache(userId); // fresh read at cycle start
  const agentSettings = await getCachedSettings(userId);

  if (!agentSettings?.enabled) {
    emit({ phase: "init", type: "warn", message: "Agent is disabled" });
    return { processed: 0, actions: ["Agent disabled"] };
  }

  const testMode = agentSettings.test_mode;
  const prefix = testMode ? "[TEST] " : "";
  const actions: string[] = [];

  await emitAndLog("init", "start", testMode ? "Agent cycle starting in TEST MODE — sandbox active" : "Agent cycle starting...");

  if (testMode) {
    await emitAndLog("init", "info", "Nothing will be sent outbound. All actions will be drafted.");
    actions.push("🧪 TEST MODE — no emails will be sent, no TTMS orders created");
    await logActivity(userId, "classified", "[TEST] Agent cycle started in TEST MODE — sandbox active, nothing goes outbound", { cycleId });
  }

  // ── STEP 1: Sync + Classify ──
  await emitAndLog("sync", "start", "Syncing emails from Outlook...");
  try {
    const [{ synced }, syncMs] = await timed(() => syncEmails(userId));
    if (synced > 0) {
      await emitAndLog("sync", "success", `Synced ${synced} new email${synced > 1 ? "s" : ""} (${(syncMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, syncMs);
      actions.push(`Synced ${synced} emails`);
    } else {
      await emitAndLog("sync", "info", `No new emails to sync (${(syncMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, syncMs);
    }
  } catch (err) {
    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "unknown";
    await emitAndLog("sync", "error", `Sync error: ${msg}`);
    actions.push(`Sync error: ${msg}`);
  }

  // ── STEP 1.5: Process Awarded Quotes (quote → order lifecycle) ──
  await emitAndLog("process", "start", "Checking for awarded quotes...");
  const { data: awardedEmails } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("*")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("category", "SHIPPER")
    .eq("awarded_status", "awarded")
    .eq("agent_processed", false)
    .order("received_at", { ascending: true })
    .limit(10);

  if (awardedEmails?.length) {
    await emitAndLog("process", "info", `Found ${awardedEmails.length} awarded quote(s) to convert to orders`);
    for (const email of awardedEmails) {
      // Re-check if agent was killed mid-cycle
      invalidateSettingsCache(userId);
      const live = await getCachedSettings(userId);
      if (!live?.enabled) {
        await emitAndLog("process", "warn", "Agent was stopped — aborting");
        break;
      }

      const shortSubject = (email.subject || "No subject").slice(0, 60);
      try {
        await emitAndLog("process", "start", `[quote→order] Converting awarded quote: "${shortSubject}"`);
        const [, procMs] = await timed(() => processShipperEmail(userId, email, { awardedFromQuote: true }));
        await emitAndLog("process", "success", `${prefix}Awarded quote processed — order created (${(procMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, procMs);
        actions.push(`${prefix}Awarded quote → order: ${email.subject}`);
      } catch (err) {
        const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
        await emitAndLog("process", "error", `Error converting awarded quote "${shortSubject}": ${msg}`);
        await logActivity(userId, "escalated", `Error converting awarded quote "${email.subject}": ${msg}`, {
          emailId: email.id,
          cycleId,
        });
      }
      // In test mode, don't mark as processed — so live mode can re-process the same emails
      if (!testMode) {
        await supabase.from("emails").update({ agent_processed: true }).eq("id", email.id).eq("user_id", userId);
      }
    }
  }

  // ── STEP 2: Get classified but unprocessed emails ──
  await emitAndLog("classify", "start", "Checking for unprocessed emails...");
  const { data: unprocessed } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("*")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("agent_processed", false)
    .in("category", ["IMP", "SHIPPER", "TENDER", "SHIPPER_STATUS"])
    .order("received_at", { ascending: true })
    .limit(50);

  // Auto-mark IGNORE/UNIMP as processed so they don't pile up
  if (!testMode) {
    await supabase
      .from("emails")
      .update({ agent_processed: true })
      .eq("user_id", userId)
      .eq("agent_processed", false)
      .in("category", ["IGNORE", "UNIMP", "UNCLASSIFIED"]);
  }

  if (!unprocessed?.length) {
    await emitAndLog("classify", "info", "No unprocessed emails in queue");
  } else {
    // Sort by priority: IMP first (time-sensitive carrier replies), then SHIPPER, then TENDER
    unprocessed.sort((a, b) => (CATEGORY_PRIORITY[a.category] ?? 99) - (CATEGORY_PRIORITY[b.category] ?? 99));

    // Count by category
    const counts: Record<string, number> = {};
    for (const e of unprocessed) {
      counts[e.category] = (counts[e.category] || 0) + 1;
    }
    const breakdown = Object.entries(counts).map(([k, v]) => `${v} ${k}`).join(", ");
    await emitAndLog("classify", "success", `Found ${unprocessed.length} unprocessed: ${breakdown}`);

  // ── STEP 3: Route each email by category ──
  let emailIndex = 0;
  for (const email of unprocessed) {
    emailIndex++;
    const shortSubject = (email.subject || "No subject").slice(0, 60);

    // Re-check if agent was killed mid-cycle (emergency stop)
    const { data: liveSettings } = await supabase
      .from("agent_settings")
      .select("enabled")
      .eq("user_id", userId)
      .single();

    if (!liveSettings?.enabled) {
      await emitAndLog("process", "warn", "Agent was stopped — aborting remaining emails");
      break;
    }

    try {
      switch (email.category) {
        case "TENDER": {
          await emitAndLog("process", "start", `[${emailIndex}/${unprocessed.length}] Processing TENDER: "${shortSubject}"`);
          await emitAndLog("extract", "info", "Extracting loads from email + PDF attachments...");
          const [tenderResult, tenderMs] = await timed(() => processTenderEmail(userId, email));
          const tenderEscalated = tenderResult.startsWith("escalated");
          await emitAndLog("process", tenderEscalated ? "warn" : "success", `${prefix}Tender ${tenderResult} (${(tenderMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, tenderMs);
          actions.push(`${prefix}Tender: ${email.subject}`);
          break;
        }

        case "SHIPPER": {
          await emitAndLog("process", "start", `[${emailIndex}/${unprocessed.length}] Processing SHIPPER: "${shortSubject}"`);
          await emitAndLog("extract", "info", "Extracting load details...");
          const [, shipperMs] = await timed(() => processShipperEmail(userId, email));
          await emitAndLog("process", "success", `${prefix}Shipper processed — ${testMode ? "order simulated, blast skipped" : "order created, carriers blasted"} (${(shipperMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, shipperMs);
          actions.push(`${prefix}Shipper: ${email.subject}`);
          break;
        }

        case "IMP": {
          await emitAndLog("process", "start", `[${emailIndex}/${unprocessed.length}] Processing IMP: "${shortSubject}"`);
          const blast = await matchBlastReply(email);
          if (blast) {
            await emitAndLog("negotiate", "info", `Matched carrier reply from ${email.from_address} → load ${blast.load_id}`);
            const [, negMs] = await timed(() => handleCarrierReply(userId, email));
            await emitAndLog("negotiate", "success", `${prefix}Carrier reply handled (${(negMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, negMs);
            actions.push(`${prefix}Carrier reply: ${email.from_address}`);
          } else {
            // Not a blast reply — draft an AI reply (carrier inquiry, rate offer, status update, etc.)
            await emitAndLog("process", "info", `Drafting reply for IMP from ${email.from_address}...`);
            const { data: profile } = await supabase.from("profiles").select("display_name, name").eq("id", userId).single();
            const senderName = profile?.display_name || profile?.name || "Red Dog Logistics";
            const { draft } = await draftReply({
              emailBody: email.body_preview || email.body_html || "",
              fromAddress: email.from_address,
              subject: email.subject || "",
              detectedIntent: email.detected_intent || "unknown",
              agentName: senderName,
            });
            await sendOrDraft(userId, {
              draftType: "negotiation_reply",
              toAddress: email.from_address,
              toName: email.from_name || undefined,
              subject: `Re: ${email.subject || ""}`,
              bodyText: draft,
              replyToMessageId: email.graph_message_id || undefined,
              emailId: email.id,
            });
            await emitAndLog("process", "success", `${prefix}Reply drafted for IMP: "${shortSubject}"`);
            actions.push(`${prefix}IMP reply: ${email.subject}`);
          }
          break;
        }

        case "SHIPPER_STATUS": {
          await emitAndLog("process", "start", `[${emailIndex}/${unprocessed.length}] Processing SHIPPER_STATUS: "${shortSubject}"`);
          await emitAndLog("process", "info", `Drafting status reply for shipper inquiry from ${email.from_address}...`);
          const [statusResult, statusMs] = await timed(() => handleShipperStatusInquiry(userId, email));
          await emitAndLog("process", statusResult ? "success" : "warn", `${prefix}Status reply ${statusResult ? "drafted" : "failed"} (${(statusMs / 1000).toFixed(1)}s)`, statusMs);
          actions.push(`${prefix}Status inquiry: ${email.subject}`);
          break;
        }

        case "UNIMP":
          await emitAndLog("process", "info", `[${emailIndex}/${unprocessed.length}] Skipping UNIMP: "${shortSubject}"`);
          break;
        case "IGNORE":
          await emitAndLog("process", "info", `[${emailIndex}/${unprocessed.length}] Skipping IGNORE: "${shortSubject}"`);
          break;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
      await emitAndLog("process", "error", `Error on "${shortSubject}": ${msg}`);
      await logActivity(userId, "escalated", `Error processing email "${email.subject}": ${msg}`, {
        emailId: email.id,
        cycleId,
      });
    }

    // Mark as processed (skip in test mode — so live mode can re-process the same emails)
    if (!testMode) {
      await supabase.from("emails").update({ agent_processed: true }).eq("id", email.id).eq("user_id", userId);
    }
  }
  } // end if/else unprocessed emails

  // ── STEP 4: Expire stale carrier blasts (4+ hours old) ──
  await emitAndLog("cleanup", "info", "Expiring stale carrier blasts...");
  const fourHoursAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 4 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
  const { data: expired } = await supabase
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .update({ status: "expired" })
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .in("status", ["sent", "countered"])
    .lt("expires_at", fourHoursAgo)
    .select("id");

  if (expired?.length) {
    await emitAndLog("cleanup", "info", `Expired ${expired.length} stale blast(s)`);
  }

  // ── STEP 4.5: Expire stale quoted_loads (bidding for 7+ days) ──
  const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
  const { data: expiredQuotes } = await supabase
    .from("quoted_loads")
    .update({ awarded_status: "expired" })
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("awarded_status", "bidding")
    .lt("created_at", sevenDaysAgo)
    .select("id");

  if (expiredQuotes?.length) {
    await emitAndLog("cleanup", "info", `Expired ${expiredQuotes.length} stale quote(s) (7+ days without award)`);
  }

  // ── Check if agent was stopped before doing more work ──
  invalidateSettingsCache(userId);
  const postProcessSettings = await getCachedSettings(userId);
  const wasStopped = !postProcessSettings?.enabled;

  // ── STEP 4.75: Reblast unbooked loads to fresh carriers ──
  // Skip if agent was stopped (reblast is expensive — multiple TTMS + AI calls)
  let reblastCount = 0;
  if (!wasStopped) {
    reblastCount = await reblastUnbookedLoads(userId, cycleId, emitAndLog, actions);
  }

  // ── STEP 5: Sweep unreplied past emails (when fewer than 5 new emails) ──
  // Skip if agent was stopped
  const newEmailCount = unprocessed?.length || 0;
  let sweepCount = 0;
  if (!wasStopped && newEmailCount < 5) {
    sweepCount = await sweepUnrepliedEmails(userId, cycleId, testMode, prefix, emitAndLog, actions, supabase);
  }

  const totalProcessed = (awardedEmails?.length || 0) + newEmailCount + sweepCount + reblastCount;
  // Batch-flush all LLM usage from this cycle — 1 DB write instead of N
  const flushed = await flushLlmUsage(userId, cycleId);
  if (flushed > 0) {
    await emitAndLog("cleanup", "info", `Logged ${flushed} LLM call(s) to usage tracker`);
  }

  await emitAndLog("done", "done", `Agent cycle complete — processed ${newEmailCount} new email${newEmailCount !== 1 ? "s" : ""}${reblastCount > 0 ? `, reblasted ${reblastCount} unbooked load(s)` : ""}${sweepCount > 0 ? `, swept ${sweepCount} unreplied` : ""}`);

  return { processed: totalProcessed, actions };
}

// ============================================================
// Sweep: find past unreplied emails and generate replies
// ============================================================

async function sweepUnrepliedEmails(
  userId: string,
  cycleId: string,
  testMode: boolean,
  prefix: string,
  emitAndLog: (phase: string, type: "start" | "info" | "success" | "warn" | "error" | "done", message: string, durationMs?: number) => Promise<void>,
  actions: string[],
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  supabase: any
): Promise<number> {
  await emitAndLog("sweep", "start", "Sweeping past emails for unreplied IMP/SHIPPER/TENDER/bidding...");

  // 1. Get last 40 emails with relevant categories or bidding status
  const { data: candidates } = await supabase
    .from("emails")
    .select("id, from_address, from_name, subject, body_preview, body_html, graph_message_id, category, awarded_status, detected_intent, received_at")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .or("category.in.(IMP,SHIPPER,TENDER),awarded_status.eq.bidding")
    .order("received_at", { ascending: false })
    .limit(40);

  if (!candidates?.length) {
    await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", "No candidate emails to sweep");
    return 0;
  }

  // 2. Get all email IDs that already have a reply (email_replies) or a pending/sent draft (agent_drafts)
  const candidateIds = candidates.map((e: { id: string }) => e.id);

  const [repliesResult, draftsResult] = await Promise.all([
    supabase
      .from("email_replies")
      .select("email_id")
      .in("email_id", candidateIds),
    supabase
      .from("agent_drafts")
      .select("email_id")
      .in("email_id", candidateIds)
      .in("status", ["pending", "sent"]),
  ]);

  const repliedIds = new Set<string>([
    ...(repliesResult.data || []).map((r: { email_id: string }) => r.email_id),
    ...(draftsResult.data || []).map((d: { email_id: string }) => d.email_id),
  ]);

  // 3. Filter to unreplied only
  const unreplied = candidates.filter((e: { id: string }) => !repliedIds.has(e.id));

  if (unreplied.length === 0) {
    await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Checked ${candidates.length} past emails — all have replies`);
    return 0;
  }

  await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Found ${unreplied.length} unreplied email(s) out of ${candidates.length} checked`);

  // 4. Get sender name for replies
  const { data: profile } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("display_name, name")
    .eq("id", userId)
    .single();
  const senderName = profile?.display_name || profile?.name || "Red Dog Logistics";

  // 5. Process each unreplied email through the proper pipeline
  let swept = 0;
  for (const email of unreplied) {
    // Check for emergency stop every 3 emails (not circuit breaker — real stop button)
    if (swept > 0 && swept % 3 === 0) {
      invalidateSettingsCache(userId);
      const stopCheck = await getCachedSettings(userId);
      if (!stopCheck?.enabled) {
        await emitAndLog("sweep", "warn", "Agent was stopped — aborting sweep");
        break;
      }
    }

    const shortSubject = (email.subject || "No subject").slice(0, 60);

    try {
      switch (email.category) {
        case "TENDER":
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Processing unreplied TENDER: "${shortSubject}"`);
          await processTenderEmail(userId, email);
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "success", `${prefix}Tender processed: "${shortSubject}"`);
          break;

        case "SHIPPER":
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Processing unreplied SHIPPER: "${shortSubject}"`);
          await processShipperEmail(userId, email);
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "success", `${prefix}Shipper processed: "${shortSubject}"`);
          break;

        case "SHIPPER_STATUS": {
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Drafting status reply for: "${shortSubject}"`);
          await handleShipperStatusInquiry(userId, email);
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "success", `${prefix}Status reply drafted: "${shortSubject}"`);
          break;
        }

        case "IMP": {
          // Check if this is a carrier blast reply — route through negotiation
          const blast = await matchBlastReply(email);
          if (blast) {
            await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Processing unreplied carrier reply: "${shortSubject}"`);
            await handleCarrierReply(userId, email);
            await emitAndLog("sweep", "success", `${prefix}Carrier reply handled: "${shortSubject}"`);
          } else {
            // Generic IMP — draft a reply
            await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Drafting reply for IMP: "${shortSubject}"`);
            const { draft } = await draftReply({
              emailBody: email.body_preview || email.body_html || "",
              fromAddress: email.from_address,
              subject: email.subject || "",
              detectedIntent: email.detected_intent || "unknown",
              agentName: senderName,
            });
            await sendOrDraft(userId, {
              draftType: "negotiation_reply",
              toAddress: email.from_address,
              toName: email.from_name || undefined,
              subject: `Re: ${email.subject || ""}`,
              bodyText: draft,
              replyToMessageId: email.graph_message_id || undefined,
              emailId: email.id,
            });
            await emitAndLog("sweep", "success", `${prefix}Reply drafted for: "${shortSubject}"`);
          }
          break;
        }

        default: {
          // Bidding or other — generic draft reply
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "info", `Drafting reply for ${email.category}: "${shortSubject}"`);
          const { draft } = await draftReply({
            emailBody: email.body_preview || email.body_html || "",
            fromAddress: email.from_address,
            subject: email.subject || "",
            detectedIntent: email.detected_intent || "unknown",
            agentName: senderName,
          });
          await sendOrDraft(userId, {
            draftType: "negotiation_reply",
            toAddress: email.from_address,
            toName: email.from_name || undefined,
            subject: `Re: ${email.subject || ""}`,
            bodyText: draft,
            replyToMessageId: email.graph_message_id || undefined,
            emailId: email.id,
          });
          await emitAndLog("sweep", "success", `${prefix}Reply drafted for: "${shortSubject}"`);
          break;
        }
      }

      actions.push(`${prefix}Sweep: ${email.subject}`);
      swept++;
    } catch (err) {
      const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Unknown error";
      await emitAndLog("sweep", "error", `Error processing "${shortSubject}": ${msg}`);
    }
  }

  if (swept > 0) {
    await logActivity(userId, "classified", `${prefix}Sweep: generated ${swept} reply/replies for unreplied emails`, { cycleId });
  }

  return swept;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agent/race-manager.ts
================================================
import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { updateOrder } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { sendOrDraft } from "./draft-manager";
import { isTestModeCached, getCachedSettings } from "./settings-cache";
import { logActivity } from "./activity-logger";
import { backfillOutcome } from "@/lib/learning";

export async function handleAcceptance(
  userId: string,
  loadId: string,
  winnerEmail: string,
  agreedRate: number,
  carrierId: number | null
): Promise<void> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // 1. Check if already booked (another carrier won the race)
  const { data: existingWinner } = await supabase
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .select("id")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("load_id", loadId)
    .eq("status", "accepted")
    .maybeSingle();

  if (existingWinner) {
    // Too late — send "load covered"
    await sendOrDraft(userId, {
      draftType: "booking_confirmation",
      toAddress: winnerEmail,
      subject: `Load ${loadId} — Already Covered`,
      bodyText: `Hi, thanks for the quick response on ${loadId}. Unfortunately another carrier confirmed just ahead of you. We'll keep you in mind for the next one on this lane.\n\nRegards,\nRed Dog Logistics`,
      loadId,
    });
    return;
  }

  // 2. Mark winner
  await supabase
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .update({ status: "accepted", accepted_at: new Date().toISOString() })
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("load_id", loadId)
    .eq("carrier_email", winnerEmail);

  // 3. Cancel all other carriers
  const { data: losers } = await supabase
    .from("carrier_blasts")
    .select("id, carrier_email, carrier_name")
    .eq("user_id", userId)
    .eq("load_id", loadId)
    .neq("carrier_email", winnerEmail)
    .in("status", ["sent", "countered"]);

  for (const loser of losers || []) {
    await supabase.from("carrier_blasts").update({ status: "cancelled" }).eq("id", loser.id).eq("user_id", userId);
    await sendOrDraft(userId, {
      draftType: "booking_confirmation",
      toAddress: loser.carrier_email,
      toName: loser.carrier_name || undefined,
      subject: `Load ${loadId} — Covered`,
      bodyText: `Hi ${loser.carrier_name || ""}, thanks for looking at ${loadId}. That one just got covered. We'll reach out next time we have something on this lane.\n\nRegards,\nRed Dog Logistics`,
      loadId,
    });
  }

  // 4. Book in TTMS (skip in test mode)
  const cachedSettings = await getCachedSettings(userId);
  const testMode = cachedSettings?.test_mode === true;

  if (testMode) {
    await logActivity(userId, "booked", `[TEST] Would book ${loadId} in TTMS with ${winnerEmail} @ $${agreedRate}`, {
      loadId,
      metadata: { test_mode: true },
    });
  } else if (cachedSettings?.auto_book_enabled && carrierId) {
    try {
      await updateOrder(Number(loadId), {
        carrier_id: carrierId,
        carrier_rate: agreedRate,
        status: "BOOKED",
      });
    } catch (err) {
      await logActivity(userId, "escalated", `Failed to book ${loadId} in TTMS: ${err instanceof Error ? err.message : "unknown"}`, { loadId });
    }
  }

  // 5. Send booking confirmation to winner
  await sendOrDraft(userId, {
    draftType: "booking_confirmation",
    toAddress: winnerEmail,
    subject: `Booking Confirmation — Load ${loadId}`,
    bodyText: `Confirmed! You're booked on ${loadId} at $${agreedRate}. We'll send dispatch details shortly.\n\nRegards,\nRed Dog Logistics`,
    loadId,
  });

  // 6. Log
  await logActivity(userId, "booked", `${loadId} booked with ${winnerEmail} @ $${agreedRate}`, { loadId });

  // 7. Backfill outcome for learning loop — record this acceptance
  if (!testMode) {
    const { data: winnerBlast } = await supabase
      .from("carrier_blasts")
      .select("id, offer_rate")
      .eq("user_id", userId)
      .eq("load_id", loadId)
      .eq("carrier_email", winnerEmail)
      .eq("status", "accepted")
      .maybeSingle();

    if (winnerBlast) {
      await backfillOutcome({
        tenantId: userId,
        negotiationId: winnerBlast.id,
        outcome: "accepted",
        finalRate: agreedRate,
        shipperRate: Number(winnerBlast.offer_rate) || null,
        targetRate: null,
        closedAt: new Date(),
        acceptedOnRound: null,
      });
    }
  } else {
    await logActivity(userId, "learning", `Learning captured: ${winnerEmail} accepted ${loadId} @ $${agreedRate} — outcome recorded`, {
      loadId,
      metadata: { test_mode: true, agreed_rate: agreedRate, carrier: winnerEmail },
    });
  }
}
