/**
 * Quote Board — Incremental Materialization
 *
 * Updates materialized tables (quote_board_loads / quote_board_quotes)
 * for individual loads without re-aggregating the entire board.
 *
 * Used by write-through hooks in draft-reply, carrier-blast, VAPI cron.
 */

import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrderCached } from "@/lib/ttms/order-cache";
import type { QuoteBoardQuote, LoadInfo } from "./refresh";

/**
 * Upsert a single quote and recompute the load aggregate.
 * ~3 DB queries. Non-fatal — callers should wrap in try/catch.
 */
export async function materializeQuote(
  tenantId: string,
  loadId: string,
  quote: {
    source: QuoteBoardQuote["source"];
    identifier: string;
    display_name: string;
    latest_rate: number | null;
    ai_rate?: number | null;
    status: string;
    round_count: number;
    is_known: boolean;
    carrier_id: string | null;
    mc_number: string | null;
    last_activity: string;
    reference_id: string | null;
  }
): Promise<void> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // 1. Upsert this quote
  const { error: quoteErr } = await supabase
    .from("quote_board_quotes")
    .upsert(
      {
        tenant_id: tenantId,
        load_id: loadId,
        source: quote.source,
        identifier: quote.identifier,
        display_name: quote.display_name,
        latest_rate: quote.latest_rate,
        ai_rate: quote.ai_rate ?? null,
        status: quote.status,
        round_count: quote.round_count,
        is_known: quote.is_known,
        carrier_id: quote.carrier_id,
        mc_number: quote.mc_number,
        last_activity: quote.last_activity,
        reference_id: quote.reference_id,
      },
      { onConflict: "tenant_id,load_id,identifier" }
    );

  if (quoteErr) {
    console.error("[materializeQuote] quote upsert failed:", quoteErr.message, { tenantId, loadId, identifier: quote.identifier });
  } else {
    console.log("[materializeQuote] quote upserted:", { loadId, identifier: quote.identifier, rate: quote.latest_rate, status: quote.status });
  }

  // 2. Recompute load aggregate
  await recomputeLoadAggregate(tenantId, loadId);
}

/**
 * Recompute load-level aggregates from existing quote_board_quotes rows.
 * Pure DB read + write — no external API calls.
 */
export async function recomputeLoadAggregate(
  tenantId: string,
  loadId: string
): Promise<void> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // Read all quotes for this load
  const { data: quotes } = await supabase
    .from("quote_board_quotes")
    .select("latest_rate, source, last_activity")
    .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
    .eq("load_id", loadId);

  if (!quotes || quotes.length === 0) {
    // No quotes left — remove the load row
    await supabase
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .delete()
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .eq("load_id", loadId);
    return;
  }

  const rates = quotes
    .map((q) => q.latest_rate)
    .filter((r): r is number => r != null);
  const bestRate = rates.length > 0 ? Math.min(...rates) : null;
  const outboundCount = quotes.filter((q) => q.source === "outbound").length;
  const latestActivity = quotes
    .map((q) => q.last_activity)
    .filter(Boolean)
    .sort()
    .pop() || null;

  // Fetch load_info from cache (fast, no API call on cache hit)
  // Strip ORD- prefix for numeric TTMS API lookup
  let loadInfo: LoadInfo | null = null;
  try {
    const numericId = loadId.replace(/^ORD-/i, "");
    const cached = await getOrderCached(tenantId, numericId);
    if (cached) loadInfo = cached.loadInfo;
  } catch {
    // Non-fatal — load_info may be null
  }

  const { error: loadErr } = await supabase
    .from("quote_board_loads")
    .upsert(
      {
        tenant_id: tenantId,
        load_id: loadId,
        quote_count: quotes.length,
        latest_activity: latestActivity,
        best_rate: bestRate,
        outbound_count: outboundCount,
        load_info: loadInfo,
      },
      { onConflict: "tenant_id,load_id" }
    );

  if (loadErr) {
    console.error("[recomputeLoadAggregate] loads upsert failed:", loadErr.message, { tenantId, loadId });
  } else {
    console.log("[recomputeLoadAggregate] load upserted:", { loadId, quoteCount: quotes.length, bestRate, hasLoadInfo: !!loadInfo });
  }
}

/**
 * Full materialize for a single load — fetches all source data
 * for this load_id only, builds quotes, upserts.
 * Used by VAPI cron post-extraction and incremental refresh.
 */
export async function materializeLoad(
  tenantId: string,
  loadId: string
): Promise<void> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // Fetch source data for this specific load in parallel
  const [negResult, vapiResult, carriersResult] = await Promise.allSettled([
    supabase
      .from("email_negotiations")
      .select("sender_email, sender_name, last_negotiated_rate, status, round_count, intent, mc_number, conversation_id, updated_at, created_at")
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .eq("interested_order", loadId),

    supabase
      .from("vapi_call_extractions")
      .select("call_id, phone_number, rate, ai_rate, status, call_started_at, extracted_at")
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .eq("order_id", loadId),

    supabase
      .from("carriers")
      .select("id, name, email, phone, mc_number")
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId),
  ]);

  const negotiations = negResult.status === "fulfilled" ? negResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const vapiExtractions = vapiResult.status === "fulfilled" ? vapiResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const carriers = carriersResult.status === "fulfilled" ? carriersResult.value.data || [] : [];

  // Build carrier lookup maps
  const carrierByEmail = new Map<string, (typeof carriers)[0]>();
  const carrierByPhone = new Map<string, (typeof carriers)[0]>();
  for (const c of carriers) {
    if (c.email) carrierByEmail.set(c.email.toLowerCase(), c);
    if (c.phone) {
      const digits = c.phone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
      if (digits.length >= 7) carrierByPhone.set(digits, c);
    }
  }

  // Enrich from cached past_carriers
  try {
    const numericLoadId = loadId.replace(/^ORD-/i, "");
    const cached = await getOrderCached(tenantId, numericLoadId);
    if (cached) {
      for (const pc of cached.pastCarriers) {
        if (pc.carrier_email && !carrierByEmail.has(pc.carrier_email.toLowerCase())) {
          carrierByEmail.set(pc.carrier_email.toLowerCase(), {
            id: pc.carrier_email,
            name: pc.carrier_name,
            email: pc.carrier_email,
            phone: pc.carrier_telephone,
            mc_number: pc.carrier_mc,
          });
        }
        if (pc.carrier_telephone) {
          const digits = pc.carrier_telephone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
          if (digits.length >= 7 && !carrierByPhone.has(digits)) {
            carrierByPhone.set(digits, {
              id: pc.carrier_telephone,
              name: pc.carrier_name,
              email: pc.carrier_email,
              phone: pc.carrier_telephone,
              mc_number: pc.carrier_mc,
            });
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } catch {
    // Non-fatal
  }

  function resolveCarrier(email?: string | null, phone?: string | null) {
    if (email) {
      const match = carrierByEmail.get(email.toLowerCase());
      if (match)
        return { is_known: true, carrier_id: match.id, display_name: match.name, mc_number: match.mc_number };
    }
    if (phone) {
      const digits = phone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
      if (digits.length >= 7) {
        const match = carrierByPhone.get(digits);
        if (match)
          return { is_known: true, carrier_id: match.id, display_name: match.name, mc_number: match.mc_number };
      }
    }
    return { is_known: false, carrier_id: null, display_name: email || phone || "Unknown", mc_number: null };
  }

  // Build quotes
  const quoteRows: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
  const seen = new Map<string, Record<string, unknown>>();

  // email_negotiations
  for (const neg of negotiations) {
    const carrier = resolveCarrier(neg.sender_email);
    const source = neg.intent === "outbound_offer" ? "outbound" : "email";
    const identifier = neg.sender_email || "";
    const row = {
      tenant_id: tenantId,
      load_id: loadId,
      source,
      identifier,
      display_name: neg.sender_name || carrier.display_name,
      latest_rate: neg.last_negotiated_rate != null ? Number(neg.last_negotiated_rate) : null,
      ai_rate: null,
      status: neg.status || "open",
      round_count: neg.round_count || 0,
      is_known: carrier.is_known,
      carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
      mc_number: neg.mc_number || carrier.mc_number,
      last_activity: neg.updated_at || neg.created_at,
      reference_id: null,
    };
    // Keep most recent by identifier
    const existing = seen.get(identifier);
    if (!existing || (row.last_activity as string) > (existing.last_activity as string)) {
      seen.set(identifier, row);
    }
  }

  // vapi_call_extractions
  for (const ext of vapiExtractions) {
    const phone = ext.phone_number || "";
    const carrier = resolveCarrier(null, phone);
    const row = {
      tenant_id: tenantId,
      load_id: loadId,
      source: "vapi_call",
      identifier: phone,
      display_name: carrier.display_name,
      latest_rate: ext.rate != null ? Number(ext.rate) : null,
      ai_rate: (ext as Record<string, unknown>).ai_rate != null ? Number((ext as Record<string, unknown>).ai_rate) : null,
      status: ext.status || "called",
      round_count: 0,
      is_known: carrier.is_known,
      carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
      mc_number: carrier.mc_number,
      last_activity: ext.call_started_at || ext.extracted_at,
      reference_id: ext.call_id || null,
    };
    const existing = seen.get(phone);
    if (!existing || (row.last_activity as string) > (existing.last_activity as string)) {
      seen.set(phone, row);
    }
  }

  // Filter: keep quotes with rate, or outbound/vapi_call source
  for (const [, row] of seen) {
    if (row.latest_rate != null || row.source === "outbound" || row.source === "vapi_call") {
      quoteRows.push(row);
    }
  }

  if (quoteRows.length === 0) {
    // No valid quotes — clean up
    await supabase.from("quote_board_quotes").delete().eq("tenant_id", tenantId).eq("load_id", loadId);
    await supabase.from("quote_board_loads").delete().eq("tenant_id", tenantId).eq("load_id", loadId);
    return;
  }

  // Upsert quotes
  await supabase
    .from("quote_board_quotes")
    .upsert(quoteRows, { onConflict: "tenant_id,load_id,identifier" });

  // Recompute load aggregate
  await recomputeLoadAggregate(tenantId, loadId);
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/quote-board/refresh.ts
================================================
// ============================================================
// Quote Board — Refresh / Materialize
//
// Aggregates data from email_negotiations, emails,
// vapi_call_extractions, and cached TTMS orders, then upserts
// into quote_board_loads and quote_board_quotes.
//
// Uses the service client (bypasses RLS) for writes.
// Uses ttms_order_cache to avoid repeated external API calls.
// ============================================================

import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrdersCachedBatch } from "@/lib/ttms/order-cache";
import { getTtmsPodInfo } from "@/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id";
import { fetchPodLoadIds } from "@/lib/ttms/pod-load-ids";

// ---- Types (same shape as the old route) ----

export interface QuoteBoardQuote {
  source: "email" | "outbound" | "vapi_negotiation" | "vapi_call";
  identifier: string;
  display_name: string;
  latest_rate: number | null;
  ai_rate: number | null;
  status: string;
  round_count: number;
  is_known: boolean;
  carrier_id: string | null;
  mc_number: string | null;
  last_activity: string;
  reference_id: string | null;
}

export interface LoadInfo {
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  miles: number | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
  order_status: string | null;
}

export interface RefreshResult {
  loads_upserted: number;
  quotes_upserted: number;
  error?: string;
}

export type ProgressCallback = (msg: string) => void;

/**
 * Refresh the materialized quote board for a tenant.
 * Reads from source tables + cached TTMS data, aggregates, and
 * upserts into quote_board_loads / quote_board_quotes.
 */
export async function refreshQuoteBoard(tenantId: string, daysCutoff?: number, onProgress?: ProgressCallback): Promise<RefreshResult> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  const days = daysCutoff !== undefined ? daysCutoff : 7;
  const cutoffDate = days === 0
    ? new Date("2020-01-01").toISOString()  // effectively all time
    : new Date(Date.now() - days * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString();
  const sevenDaysAgo = cutoffDate;

  onProgress?.("Fetching emails & negotiations...");
  // --- Fetch all sources in parallel ---
  const [negResult, emailsResult, vapiExtractionsResult, carriersResult] =
    await Promise.allSettled([
      supabase
        .from("email_negotiations")
        .select("interested_order, sender_email, sender_name, last_negotiated_rate, status, round_count, intent, mc_number, conversation_id, updated_at, created_at")
        .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
        .gte("updated_at", sevenDaysAgo)
        .order("updated_at", { ascending: false }),

      supabase
        .from("emails")
        .select(
          "id, from_address, from_name, extracted_fields, detected_intent, received_at, user_id, conversation_id"
        )
        .eq("user_id", tenantId)
        .in("detected_intent", ["carrier_rate_quote", "carrier_rate_counter"])
        .gte("received_at", sevenDaysAgo)
        .order("received_at", { ascending: false }),

      supabase
        .from("vapi_call_extractions")
        .select("call_id, phone_number, order_id, rate, ai_rate, status, call_started_at, extracted_at")
        .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
        .gte("call_started_at", sevenDaysAgo)
        .order("call_started_at", { ascending: false }),

      supabase
        .from("carriers")
        .select("id, name, email, phone, mc_number")
        .eq("tenant_id", tenantId),
    ]);

  const negotiations =
    negResult.status === "fulfilled" ? negResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const emails =
    emailsResult.status === "fulfilled" ? emailsResult.value.data || [] : [];
  const vapiExtractions =
    vapiExtractionsResult.status === "fulfilled"
      ? vapiExtractionsResult.value.data || []
      : [];
  const carriers =
    carriersResult.status === "fulfilled"
      ? carriersResult.value.data || []
      : [];

  // --- Build conversation_id → most-recent email UUID map ---
  const conversationToEmailId = new Map<string, string>();
  for (const email of emails) {
    const convId = (email as { conversation_id?: string }).conversation_id;
    if (convId && email.id) {
      if (!conversationToEmailId.has(convId)) {
        conversationToEmailId.set(convId, email.id);
      }
    }
  }

  onProgress?.(`${negotiations.length} negotiations, ${emails.length} emails, ${vapiExtractions.length} VAPI calls found`);

  // --- Collect order IDs ---
  const orderIds = new Set<string>();
  for (const neg of negotiations) {
    if (neg.interested_order) orderIds.add(neg.interested_order);
  }
  for (const email of emails) {
    const fields = (email.extracted_fields || {}) as { load_id?: string };
    if (fields.load_id) orderIds.add(fields.load_id);
  }
  for (const ext of vapiExtractions) {
    if (ext.order_id) orderIds.add(ext.order_id);
  }

  // --- Fetch order details from cache (24h TTL, API on miss) ---
  onProgress?.(`Loading details for ${orderIds.size} orders...`);
  const orderIdList = Array.from(orderIds);
  const cachedOrders = await getOrdersCachedBatch(tenantId, orderIdList);

  // --- Build carrier lookup maps ---
  const carrierByEmail = new Map<string, (typeof carriers)[0]>();
  const carrierByPhone = new Map<string, (typeof carriers)[0]>();
  for (const c of carriers) {
    if (c.email) carrierByEmail.set(c.email.toLowerCase(), c);
    if (c.phone) {
      const digits = c.phone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
      if (digits.length >= 7) carrierByPhone.set(digits, c);
    }
  }

  // Enrich carrier maps from cached past_carriers
  const loadInfoMap = new Map<string, LoadInfo>();
  for (const [orderId, cached] of cachedOrders) {
    loadInfoMap.set(orderId, cached.loadInfo);
    for (const pc of cached.pastCarriers) {
      if (pc.carrier_email && !carrierByEmail.has(pc.carrier_email.toLowerCase())) {
        carrierByEmail.set(pc.carrier_email.toLowerCase(), {
          id: pc.carrier_email,
          name: pc.carrier_name,
          email: pc.carrier_email,
          phone: pc.carrier_telephone,
          mc_number: pc.carrier_mc,
        });
      }
      if (pc.carrier_telephone) {
        const digits = pc.carrier_telephone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
        if (digits.length >= 7 && !carrierByPhone.has(digits)) {
          carrierByPhone.set(digits, {
            id: pc.carrier_telephone,
            name: pc.carrier_name,
            email: pc.carrier_email,
            phone: pc.carrier_telephone,
            mc_number: pc.carrier_mc,
          });
        }
      }
    }
  }

  function resolveCarrier(email?: string | null, phone?: string | null) {
    if (email) {
      const match = carrierByEmail.get(email.toLowerCase());
      if (match)
        return { is_known: true, carrier_id: match.id, display_name: match.name, mc_number: match.mc_number };
    }
    if (phone) {
      const digits = phone.replace(/\D/g, "").slice(-10);
      if (digits.length >= 7) {
        const match = carrierByPhone.get(digits);
        if (match)
          return { is_known: true, carrier_id: match.id, display_name: match.name, mc_number: match.mc_number };
      }
    }
    return { is_known: false, carrier_id: null, display_name: email || phone || "Unknown", mc_number: null };
  }

  // --- Merge into load map ---
  const loadMap = new Map<string, QuoteBoardQuote[]>();

  function addQuote(loadId: string, quote: QuoteBoardQuote) {
    if (!loadId) return;
    const existing = loadMap.get(loadId) || [];
    existing.push(quote);
    loadMap.set(loadId, existing);
  }

  const negKeys = new Set<string>();

  // A) email_negotiations
  for (const neg of negotiations) {
    const key = `${(neg.sender_email || "").toLowerCase()}::${neg.interested_order}`;
    negKeys.add(key);
    const carrier = resolveCarrier(neg.sender_email);
    const source = neg.intent === "outbound_offer" ? "outbound" : "email";
    addQuote(neg.interested_order, {
      source: source as "email" | "outbound",
      identifier: neg.sender_email || "",
      display_name: neg.sender_name || carrier.display_name,
      latest_rate: neg.last_negotiated_rate != null ? Number(neg.last_negotiated_rate) : null,
      ai_rate: null,
      status: neg.status || "open",
      round_count: neg.round_count || 0,
      is_known: carrier.is_known,
      carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
      mc_number: neg.mc_number || carrier.mc_number,
      last_activity: neg.updated_at || neg.created_at,
      reference_id: neg.conversation_id
        ? (conversationToEmailId.get(neg.conversation_id) || null)
        : null,
    });
  }

  // B) Supplementary emails
  for (const email of emails) {
    const fields = (email.extracted_fields || {}) as { load_id?: string; quoted_rate?: number };
    const loadId = fields.load_id;
    if (!loadId) continue;
    const key = `${(email.from_address || "").toLowerCase()}::${loadId}`;
    if (negKeys.has(key)) continue;
    const carrier = resolveCarrier(email.from_address);
    addQuote(loadId, {
      source: "email",
      identifier: email.from_address || "",
      display_name: email.from_name || carrier.display_name,
      latest_rate: fields.quoted_rate != null ? Number(fields.quoted_rate) : null,
      ai_rate: null,
      status: "quoted",
      round_count: 0,
      is_known: carrier.is_known,
      carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
      mc_number: carrier.mc_number,
      last_activity: email.received_at,
      reference_id: email.id || null,
    });
  }

  // C) VAPI call extractions (replaces both old VAPI negotiations + extractions sections)
  for (const ext of vapiExtractions) {
    if (!ext.order_id) continue;
    const phone = ext.phone_number || "";
    const carrier = resolveCarrier(null, phone);
    addQuote(ext.order_id, {
      source: "vapi_call",
      identifier: phone,
      display_name: carrier.display_name,
      latest_rate: ext.rate != null ? Number(ext.rate) : null,
      ai_rate: (ext as Record<string, unknown>).ai_rate != null ? Number((ext as Record<string, unknown>).ai_rate) : null,
      status: ext.status || "called",
      round_count: 0,
      is_known: carrier.is_known,
      carrier_id: carrier.carrier_id,
      mc_number: carrier.mc_number,
      last_activity: ext.call_started_at || ext.extracted_at,
      reference_id: ext.call_id || null,
    });
  }

  // --- Filter out non-PENDING orders (PICKED_UP, DELIVERED, etc. don't belong on quote board) ---
  let filteredByStatus = 0;
  for (const [loadId, ] of loadMap) {
    const cached = cachedOrders.get(loadId);
    const status = cached?.loadInfo?.order_status;
    // If we have a cached status and it's not PENDING, remove from quote board
    if (status && status.toUpperCase() !== "PENDING") {
      loadMap.delete(loadId);
      filteredByStatus++;
    }
  }
  if (filteredByStatus > 0) {
    onProgress?.(`Filtered out ${filteredByStatus} non-PENDING loads`);
  }

  // --- Filter + dedupe ---
  for (const [loadId, quotes] of loadMap) {
    const filtered = quotes.filter(
      (q) => q.latest_rate != null || q.source === "outbound" || q.source === "vapi_call"
    );
    if (filtered.length === 0) {
      loadMap.delete(loadId);
    } else {
      loadMap.set(loadId, filtered);
    }
  }

  // --- Upsert into materialized tables (batched) ---
  const BATCH_SIZE = 500;
  const allLoadRows: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];
  const allQuoteRows: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];

  for (const [loadId, quotes] of loadMap) {
    // Dedupe by identifier
    const byIdentifier = new Map<string, QuoteBoardQuote>();
    for (const q of quotes) {
      const existing = byIdentifier.get(q.identifier);
      if (!existing || q.last_activity > existing.last_activity) {
        byIdentifier.set(q.identifier, q);
      }
    }
    const dedupedQuotes = Array.from(byIdentifier.values()).sort(
      (a, b) => new Date(b.last_activity).getTime() - new Date(a.last_activity).getTime()
    );

    const rates = dedupedQuotes.map((q) => q.latest_rate).filter((r): r is number => r != null);
    const bestRate = rates.length > 0 ? Math.min(...rates) : null;
    const outboundCount = dedupedQuotes.filter((q) => q.source === "outbound").length;
    const latestActivity = dedupedQuotes[0]?.last_activity || null;
    const loadInfo = loadInfoMap.get(loadId) || null;

    allLoadRows.push({
      tenant_id: tenantId,
      load_id: loadId,
      quote_count: dedupedQuotes.length,
      latest_activity: latestActivity,
      best_rate: bestRate,
      outbound_count: outboundCount,
      load_info: loadInfo,
    });

    for (const q of dedupedQuotes) {
      allQuoteRows.push({
        tenant_id: tenantId,
        load_id: loadId,
        source: q.source,
        identifier: q.identifier,
        display_name: q.display_name,
        latest_rate: q.latest_rate,
        ai_rate: q.ai_rate,
        status: q.status,
        round_count: q.round_count,
        is_known: q.is_known,
        carrier_id: q.carrier_id,
        mc_number: q.mc_number,
        last_activity: q.last_activity,
        reference_id: q.reference_id,
      });
    }
  }

  onProgress?.(`Saving ${allLoadRows.length} loads, ${allQuoteRows.length} quotes...`);

  // Batch upsert loads
  let loadsUpserted = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < allLoadRows.length; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
    const batch = allLoadRows.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .upsert(batch, { onConflict: "tenant_id,load_id" });
    if (error) {
      console.error(`[qb-refresh] Load batch upsert error:`, error.message);
    } else {
      loadsUpserted += batch.length;
    }
  }

  // Batch upsert quotes
  let quotesUpserted = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < allQuoteRows.length; i += BATCH_SIZE) {
    const batch = allQuoteRows.slice(i, i + BATCH_SIZE);
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from("quote_board_quotes")
      .upsert(batch, { onConflict: "tenant_id,load_id,identifier" });
    if (error) {
      console.error(`[qb-refresh] Quote batch upsert error:`, error.message);
    } else {
      quotesUpserted += batch.length;
    }
  }

  // --- Clean up stale loads no longer in the aggregation ---
  const activeLoadIds = Array.from(loadMap.keys());
  if (activeLoadIds.length > 0) {
    await supabase
      .from("quote_board_quotes")
      .delete()
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .lt("last_activity", sevenDaysAgo);

    await supabase
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .delete()
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .lt("latest_activity", sevenDaysAgo);
  }

  // --- Clean up non-PENDING loads that were previously materialized ---
  // Collect all non-PENDING order IDs we know about from cache
  const nonPendingIds: string[] = [];
  for (const [orderId, cached] of cachedOrders) {
    const status = cached.loadInfo?.order_status;
    if (status && status.toUpperCase() !== "PENDING") {
      nonPendingIds.push(orderId);
    }
  }
  if (nonPendingIds.length > 0) {
    await supabase
      .from("quote_board_quotes")
      .delete()
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .in("load_id", nonPendingIds);

    await supabase
      .from("quote_board_loads")
      .delete()
      .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
      .in("load_id", nonPendingIds);
  }

  console.log(`[qb-refresh] Done: ${loadsUpserted} loads, ${quotesUpserted} quotes upserted`);

  // --- Pod scoping: tag loads as in/out of user's pod ---
  // OLD CODE (no pod scoping — returned here directly):
  // return { loads_upserted: loadsUpserted, quotes_upserted: quotesUpserted };
  try {
    // OLD: const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(tenantId);
    // OLD: const podLoadIds = await fetchPodLoadIds(ttmsUserId);
    // NEW: use pod_id instead of user_id
    const podInfo = await getTtmsPodInfo(tenantId);
    if (podInfo) {
      const podLoadIds = await fetchPodLoadIds(podInfo.ttmsUserId, podInfo.podId);
      if (podLoadIds) {
        const { data: allLoads } = await supabase
          .from("quote_board_loads")
          .select("load_id")
          .eq("tenant_id", tenantId);

        if (allLoads && allLoads.length > 0) {
          const inPod = allLoads.filter((l) => podLoadIds.has(l.load_id));
          const outPod = allLoads.filter((l) => !podLoadIds.has(l.load_id));

          if (inPod.length > 0) {
            await supabase
              .from("quote_board_loads")
              .update({ in_user_pod: true })
              .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
              .in("load_id", inPod.map((l) => l.load_id));
          }
          if (outPod.length > 0) {
            await supabase
              .from("quote_board_loads")
              .update({ in_user_pod: false })
              .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
              .in("load_id", outPod.map((l) => l.load_id));
          }

          onProgress?.(`Pod scoping: ${inPod.length} in-pod, ${outPod.length} out-of-pod`);
        }
      } else {
        console.warn(`[qb-refresh] Pod fetch failed for tenant ${tenantId}, skipping pod scoping`);
      }
    }
  } catch (podErr) {
    // Non-fatal — pod scoping failure should not break the refresh
    console.error("[qb-refresh] Pod scoping error:", podErr);
  }

  return { loads_upserted: loadsUpserted, quotes_upserted: quotesUpserted };
}

import { createClient } from "@supabase/supabase-js";

/**
 * Raw Supabase admin client — no cookies, no SSR.
 * Uses service role key to bypass RLS.
 * For admin API routes only.
 */
export function createAdminClient() {
  return createClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!
  );
}

FILE: src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts

import { createServerClient } from "@supabase/ssr";
import { NextResponse, type NextRequest } from "next/server";

export async function updateSession(request: NextRequest) {
  let supabaseResponse = NextResponse.next({
    request,
  });

  const supabase = createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        getAll() {
          return request.cookies.getAll();
        },
        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value }) =>
            request.cookies.set(name, value)
          );
          supabaseResponse = NextResponse.next({
            request,
          });
          cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
            supabaseResponse.cookies.set(name, value, options)
          );
        },
      },
    }
  );

  const {
    data: { user },
  } = await supabase.auth.getUser();

  // Protected routes: redirect to login if not authenticated
  const isProtectedRoute =
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/inbox") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/email") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/dashboard") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/loads") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/carriers") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/shippers") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/escalations") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/analytics") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/settings") ||
    request.nextUrl.pathname.startsWith("/onboarding");

  if (!user && isProtectedRoute) {
    const url = request.nextUrl.clone();
    url.pathname = "/";
    return NextResponse.redirect(url);
  }

  // Redirect logged-in users from landing to dashboard
  if (user && request.nextUrl.pathname === "/") {
    const url = request.nextUrl.clone();
    url.pathname = "/dashboard";
    return NextResponse.redirect(url);
  }

  return supabaseResponse;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/supabase/server.ts
================================================
import { createServerClient } from "@supabase/ssr";
import { cookies } from "next/headers";
// Types are handled at query level, not client level
// Use `supabase gen types` to generate proper types after DB setup

export async function createClient() {
  const cookieStore = await cookies();

  return createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        getAll() {
          return cookieStore.getAll();
        },
        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
          try {
            cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
              cookieStore.set(name, value, options)
            );
          } catch {
            // The `setAll` method was called from a Server Component.
            // This can be ignored if you have middleware refreshing sessions.
          }
        },
      },
    }
  );
}

export async function createServiceClient() {
  const cookieStore = await cookies();

  return createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY!,
    {
      cookies: {
        getAll() {
          return cookieStore.getAll();
        },
        setAll(cookiesToSet) {
          try {
            cookiesToSet.forEach(({ name, value, options }) =>
              cookieStore.set(name, value, options)
            );
          } catch {
            // Ignored in Server Components
          }
        },
      },
    }
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/ttms/client-lookup.ts
================================================
/**
 * Find TTMS client IDs by matching a sender's email address or domain.
 * Fetches all clients from TTMS API (919 total, ~10 pages) and caches
 * in module scope for the duration of the serverless invocation.
 */

import { getClients } from "./client";

interface CachedClient {
  id: number;
  name: string;
  email: string; // lowercase
}

let cache: CachedClient[] | null = null;

async function loadClients(): Promise<CachedClient[]> {
  if (cache) return cache;

  const all: CachedClient[] = [];
  let page = 1;
  let lastPage = 1;

  do {
    const result = await getClients({ per_page: 100, page, status: true });
    for (const c of result.data) {
      if (c.email) {
        all.push({ id: c.id, name: c.name, email: c.email.toLowerCase().trim() });
      }
    }
    lastPage = result.meta.last_page;
    page++;
  } while (page <= lastPage);

  cache = all;
  return all;
}

/**
 * Find TTMS client IDs whose email or email domain matches the sender.
 * Returns exact match first, then all domain matches.
 */
export async function findClientIdsByEmail(senderEmail: string): Promise<number[]> {
  const clients = await loadClients();
  const lower = senderEmail.toLowerCase().trim();
  const domain = lower.split("@")[1];
  if (!domain) return [];

  // Exact email match — highest confidence
  const exact = clients.find((c) => c.email === lower);
  if (exact) return [exact.id];

  // Domain match — same company, different contact
  const domainMatches = clients.filter((c) => {
    const clientDomain = c.email.split("@")[1];
    return clientDomain === domain;
  });

  // Deduplicate client IDs (same company can have multiple client records)
  return [...new Set(domainMatches.map((c) => c.id))];
}

FILE: src/lib/ttms/client.ts
================================================
// ============================================================
// TTMS Mailer — RedDog TTMS API Client
// ============================================================

const BASE_URL = process.env.REDDOG_TTMS_BASE_URL || "https://reddog.t-tms.com";
const API_KEY = process.env.REDDOG_TTMS_API_KEY || "";
const VAPI_KEY = process.env.VAPI_API_KEY || API_KEY;

// ---------- Shared fetch helper ----------

const MAX_RETRIES = 3;

async function ttmsFetch<T>(
  path: string,
  options: RequestInit = {}
): Promise<T> {
  const isVapi = path.startsWith("/vapi");
  const url = `${BASE_URL}${path}`;

  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    Accept: "application/json",
    ...(isVapi
      ? { Authorization: `Bearer ${VAPI_KEY}` }
      : { "X-API-KEY": API_KEY }),
    ...(options.headers as Record<string, string>),
  };

  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= MAX_RETRIES; attempt++) {
    const res = await fetch(url, {
      ...options,
      headers,
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(15000),
    });

    // Retry on 429 (rate limit) with exponential backoff
    if (res.status === 429 && attempt < MAX_RETRIES) {
      const retryAfter = res.headers.get("Retry-After");
      const delay = retryAfter
        ? parseInt(retryAfter, 10) * 1000
        : 1000 * Math.pow(2, attempt);
      await new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, delay));
      continue;
    }

    if (!res.ok) {
      const text = await res.text().catch(() => "");
      throw new Error(`TTMS API ${res.status}: ${text || res.statusText}`);
    }

    if (res.status === 204) return {} as T;
    return res.json();
  }

  throw new Error(`TTMS API: rate limited after ${MAX_RETRIES} retries`);
}

export async function getOrders(params?: {
  client_id?: number;
  carrier_id?: number;
  status?: string;
  load_number?: string;
  reference_number?: string;
  per_page?: number;
  page?: number;
  /** @deprecated Use pod_id instead — user_id filter doesn't work reliably */
  user_id?: number;
  /** Pod-centric filter: pass the user's pod.id to get all pod orders */
  pod_id?: number;
}): Promise<PaginatedResponse<TTMSOrder>> {
  const qs = new URLSearchParams();
  if (params?.client_id) qs.set("client_id", String(params.client_id));
  if (params?.carrier_id) qs.set("carrier_id", String(params.carrier_id));
  if (params?.status) qs.set("status", params.status);
  if (params?.load_number) qs.set("load_number", params.load_number);
  if (params?.reference_number) qs.set("reference_number", params.reference_number);
  // OLD: if (params?.user_id) qs.set("user_id", String(params.user_id));
  // user_id filter doesn't work reliably — use pod_id instead
  if (params?.pod_id) qs.set("pod_id", String(params.pod_id));
  qs.set("per_page", String(params?.per_page ?? 25));
  qs.set("page", String(params?.page ?? 1));

  return ttmsFetch<PaginatedResponse<TTMSOrder>>(`/api/orders?${qs.toString()}`);
}

// ============================================================
// DAT Rate API
// ============================================================

export interface DATRateResult {
  /** DAT market price: (miles × fuelSurchargeRate) + estimatedLinehaulTotal */
  marketPrice: number;
  /** Estimated total linehaul for the lane (spot) */
  estimatedTotal: number;
  /** Low end total */
  lowTotal: number;
  /** High end total */
  highTotal: number;
  /** Per-mile rate */
  ratePerMile: number;
  /** Low per-mile */
  lowRatePerMile: number;
  /** High per-mile */
  highRatePerMile: number;
  /** Miles for the lane */
  miles: number;
  /** Confidence level (0-100) */
  confidence: number;
  /** Fuel surcharge per mile */
  fuelSurchargeRate: number;
  /** Number of data contributors */
  contributors: number;
  /** Number of moves in sample */
  moves: number;
}

/**
 * Get the latest DAT spot rate for a lane.
 * Returns null if the API fails (non-fatal — caller can fall back).
 */
export async function getDATRate(params: {
  equipment: string;
  originCity: string;
  originState: string;
  destCity: string;
  destState: string;
}): Promise<DATRateResult | null> {
  try {
    const res = await fetch(`${BASE_URL}/api/dat/rate`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        Accept: "application/json",
        "X-API-KEY": API_KEY,
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        equipment: params.equipment,
        origin_city: params.originCity,
        origin_state: params.originState,
        destination_city: params.destCity,
        destination_state: params.destState,
      }),
      signal: AbortSignal.timeout(10000),
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      console.warn(`[DAT] Rate lookup failed: ${res.status}`);
      return null;
    }

    const json = await res.json();
    const spot = json?.data?.lookupRateResults?.lookupRateSuccessData?.spotRate;
    const miles = parseFloat(json?.data?.lookupRateResults?.lookupRateSuccessData?.miles || "0");

    if (!spot || !spot.estimatedLinehaulTotal) {
      console.warn("[DAT] No spot rate data in response");
      return null;
    }

    const estimatedTotal = parseFloat(spot.estimatedLinehaulTotal);
    const fuelSurchargeRate = parseFloat(spot.averageFuelSurchargeRate || "0");
    // Client formula: Math.round((miles * averageFuelSurchargeRate) + estimatedLinehaulTotal)
    const marketPrice = Math.round((miles * fuelSurchargeRate) + estimatedTotal);

    return {
      marketPrice,
      estimatedTotal,
      lowTotal: parseFloat(spot.lowLinehaulTotal || "0"),
      highTotal: parseFloat(spot.highLinehaulTotal || "0"),
      ratePerMile: parseFloat(spot.estimatedLinehaulRate || "0"),
      lowRatePerMile: parseFloat(spot.lowLinehaulRate || "0"),
      highRatePerMile: parseFloat(spot.highLinehaulRate || "0"),
      miles,
      confidence: parseInt(spot.confidenceLevel || "0", 10),
      fuelSurchargeRate,
      contributors: parseInt(spot.contributors || "0", 10),
      moves: parseInt(spot.moves || "0", 10),
    };
  } catch (err) {
    console.warn("[DAT] Rate lookup error:", err);
    return null;
  }
}

// ============================================================
// Mappers: TTMS → App shapes
// ============================================================

/** Map TTMS Order → our Load shape for the frontend */
export function mapOrderToLoad(order: TTMSOrder) {
  // Map TTMS statuses to our UI statuses
  const statusMap: Record<string, string> = {
    PENDING: "pending",
    CONFIRMED: "booked",
    "IN TRANSIT": "in_transit",
    IN_TRANSIT: "in_transit",
    DISPATCHED: "in_transit",
    AWAITING_PICKUP: "booked",
    BOOKED: "booked",
    DELIVERED: "delivered",
    CANCELLED: "cancelled",
    CANCELED: "cancelled",
  };

  return {
    id: String(order.id),
    load_number: order.load_number || `ORD-${order.id}`,
    status: statusMap[order.status?.toUpperCase()] || "pending",
    origin_city: order.shipfrom_city || null,
    origin_state: order.shipfrom_state || null,
    dest_city: order.shipto_city || null,
    dest_state: order.shipto_state || null,
    equipment_type: order.equipment_type || null,
    weight_lbs: order.total_weight || null,
    commodity: order.order_items?.[0]?.description || null,
    pickup_date: order.requested_pickup_date || null,
    delivery_date: order.requested_delivery_date || null,
    carrier_rate: order.carrier_total_charge || null,
    shipper_rate: order.total_charge || null,
    gross_profit:
      order.total_charge && order.carrier_total_charge
        ? order.total_charge - order.carrier_total_charge
        : null,
    notes: order.notes || null,
    total_miles: order.total_miles || null,
    carrier: order.carrier_name
      ? {
          id: String(order.carrier_id),
          name: order.carrier_name,
          email: order.carrier_email,
        }
      : null,
    shipper: order.client_name
      ? {
          id: String(order.client_id),
          name: order.client_name,
        }
      : null,
    // Keep raw TTMS data for detail views
    _ttms: order,
    created_at: order.created_at,
    updated_at: order.updated_at,
  };
}

/** Map TTMS Carrier → our Carrier shape */
export function mapTTMSCarrier(c: TTMSCarrier) {
  return {
    id: String(c.id),
    name: c.name,
    contact_name: c.contact_name || null,
    email: c.email || null,
    phone: c.telephone || null,
    mc_number: c.mc || null,
    dot_number: c.dot || null,
    equipment_types: c.equipment_type ? [c.equipment_type] : [],
    status: c.status,
    approved: c.approved,
    city: c.city || null,
    state: c.state || null,
    created_at: c.created_at,
    updated_at: c.updated_at,
  };
}

/** Map TTMS Client → our Shipper shape */
export function mapTTMSClient(c: TTMSClient) {
  return {
    id: String(c.id),
    name: c.name,
    billing_email: c.email || null,
    logistics_email: c.email || null,
    city: c.city || null,
    state: c.state || null,
    phone: c.telephone || null,
    status: c.status,
    sla_update_interval_hours: 4,
    created_at: c.created_at,
    updated_at: c.updated_at,
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/ttms/get-ttms-user-id.ts
================================================
/**
 * Fetches the TTMS user info for a given Supabase auth user.
 * Returns the numeric TTMS user ID, and optionally pod info.
 * Caches per invocation to avoid repeated DB hits.
 */

import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getUser as getTtmsUser } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

// --- Pod info type ---
export interface TtmsPodInfo {
  ttmsUserId: number;
  podId: number;
  podTitle: string;
}

// --- Caches ---
const userIdCache = new Map<string, number | undefined>();
const podInfoCache = new Map<string, TtmsPodInfo | undefined>();

// OLD: only returned ttms_user_id from profiles table
// const cache = new Map<string, number | undefined>();
// export async function getTtmsUserId(...) { ... read profiles.ttms_user_id ... }

/** Get just the TTMS user ID (backwards compat — still used for create APIs) */
export async function getTtmsUserId(
  supabaseUserId: string
): Promise<number | undefined> {
  if (userIdCache.has(supabaseUserId)) return userIdCache.get(supabaseUserId);

  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const { data } = await supabase
    .from("profiles")
    .select("ttms_user_id")
    .eq("id", supabaseUserId)
    .single();

  const ttmsId = data?.ttms_user_id ?? undefined;
  userIdCache.set(supabaseUserId, ttmsId);
  return ttmsId;
}

/**
 * Get the user's TTMS pod info (pod ID + pod title).
 *
 * Flow:
 * 1. Read ttms_user_id from profiles table
 * 2. Call TTMS GET /api/users/{id} to get their pod
 * 3. Return { ttmsUserId, podId, podTitle }
 *
 * Returns undefined if user has no TTMS account or no pod.
 */
export async function getTtmsPodInfo(
  supabaseUserId: string
): Promise<TtmsPodInfo | undefined> {
  if (podInfoCache.has(supabaseUserId)) return podInfoCache.get(supabaseUserId);

  const ttmsUserId = await getTtmsUserId(supabaseUserId);
  if (!ttmsUserId) {
    podInfoCache.set(supabaseUserId, undefined);
    return undefined;
  }

  try {
    const { data: ttmsUser } = await getTtmsUser(ttmsUserId);
    if (!ttmsUser?.pod?.id || !ttmsUser?.pod?.title) {
      podInfoCache.set(supabaseUserId, undefined);
      return undefined;
    }

    const info: TtmsPodInfo = {
      ttmsUserId,
      podId: ttmsUser.pod.id,
      podTitle: ttmsUser.pod.title,
    };
    podInfoCache.set(supabaseUserId, info);
    return info;
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[getTtmsPodInfo] Failed to fetch TTMS user:", err);
    podInfoCache.set(supabaseUserId, undefined);
    return undefined;
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/ttms/order-cache.ts
================================================
/**
 * TTMS Order Cache — avoids refetching order details from external API.
 *
 * Checks Supabase cache first (24h TTL). On miss, fetches from TTMS API
 * and upserts to cache. Batch version only fetches cache misses.
 */

import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { getOrder, type TTMSPastCarrier } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

const TTL_MS = 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000; // 24 hours

export interface CachedLoadInfo {
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  miles: number | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
  order_status: string | null;
}

export interface CachedOrder {
  loadInfo: CachedLoadInfo;
  pastCarriers: TTMSPastCarrier[];
}

/**
 * Get a single order from cache or TTMS API.
 */
export async function getOrderCached(
  tenantId: string,
  orderId: string
): Promise<CachedOrder | null> {
  const results = await getOrdersCachedBatch(tenantId, [orderId]);
  return results.get(orderId) || null;
}

/**
 * Batch fetch orders — reads cache first, only fetches API for misses.
 * Returns a Map<orderId, CachedOrder>.
 */
export async function getOrdersCachedBatch(
  tenantId: string,
  orderIds: string[]
): Promise<Map<string, CachedOrder>> {
  if (orderIds.length === 0) return new Map();

  const supabase = await createServiceClient();
  const result = new Map<string, CachedOrder>();

  // 1. Read from cache
  const { data: cached } = await supabase
    .from("ttms_order_cache")
    .select("order_id, load_info, past_carriers, fetched_at")
    .eq("tenant_id", tenantId)
    .in("order_id", orderIds);

  const now = Date.now();
  const missIds: string[] = [];

  for (const row of cached || []) {
    const age = now - new Date(row.fetched_at).getTime();
    if (age < TTL_MS) {
      result.set(row.order_id, {
        loadInfo: row.load_info as CachedLoadInfo,
        pastCarriers: (row.past_carriers || []) as TTMSPastCarrier[],
      });
    } else {
      missIds.push(row.order_id); // stale
    }
  }

  // Find IDs not in cache at all
  for (const id of orderIds) {
    if (!result.has(id) && !missIds.includes(id)) {
      missIds.push(id);
    }
  }

  if (missIds.length === 0) return result;

  // 2. Fetch misses from TTMS API in batches of 10
  const numericMisses = missIds.filter((id) => /^\d+$/.test(id));
  const upsertRows: Record<string, unknown>[] = [];

  for (let i = 0; i < numericMisses.length; i += 10) {
    const batch = numericMisses.slice(i, i + 10);
    const batchResults = await Promise.allSettled(
      batch.map((id) => getOrder(parseInt(id, 10)).catch(() => null))
    );

    for (let j = 0; j < batch.length; j++) {
      const r = batchResults[j];
      if (r.status !== "fulfilled" || !r.value?.data) continue;

      const o = r.value.data;
      const loadInfo: CachedLoadInfo = {
        origin_city: o.shipfrom_city || null,
        origin_state: o.shipfrom_state || null,
        dest_city: o.shipto_city || null,
        dest_state: o.shipto_state || null,
        equipment_type: o.equipment_type || null,
        shipper_rate: o.total_charge || null,
        pickup_date: o.requested_pickup_date || null,
        delivery_date: o.requested_delivery_date || null,
        miles: o.total_miles || null,
        weight_lbs: o.total_weight || null,
        order_status: o.status || null,
      };

      const pastCarriers = (r.value as { past_carriers?: TTMSPastCarrier[] }).past_carriers || [];

      result.set(batch[j], { loadInfo, pastCarriers });
      upsertRows.push({
        tenant_id: tenantId,
        order_id: batch[j],
        load_info: loadInfo,
        past_carriers: pastCarriers,
        fetched_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      });
    }
  }

  // 3. Upsert to cache (non-fatal)
  if (upsertRows.length > 0) {
    await supabase
      .from("ttms_order_cache")
      .upsert(upsertRows, { onConflict: "tenant_id,order_id" })
      .then(({ error }) => {
        if (error) console.error("[order-cache] Upsert error:", error.message);
      });
  }

  return result;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/ttms/pod-load-ids.ts
================================================
/**
 * Fetch all load IDs belonging to a TTMS user's pod.
 *
 * OLD: Paginated through getOrders(user_id=...) — user_id filter
 * doesn't work reliably in TTMS API.
 *
 * NEW: Uses pod_id param directly (TTMS API supports it).
 * Collects every load ID variant (numeric string, ORD-prefixed,
 * load_number) so we can match against quote_board_loads.load_id.
 *
 * Returns null if the fetch fails — callers should skip pod
 * filtering in that case (fail-open, not fail-closed).
 */

import { getOrders } from "@/lib/ttms/client";

// OLD: took ttmsUserId and passed user_id to getOrders
// export async function fetchPodLoadIds(ttmsUserId: number): Promise<Set<string> | null> {
//   ...getOrders({ user_id: ttmsUserId, ... })...
// }

export async function fetchPodLoadIds(
  _ttmsUserId: number,
  podId?: number
): Promise<Set<string> | null> {
  if (!podId) {
    console.warn("[pod-load-ids] No podId provided, cannot filter by pod");
    return null;
  }

  try {
    const ids = new Set<string>();
    let page = 1;
    let lastPage = 1;

    do {
      const res = await getOrders({
        pod_id: podId,
        per_page: 100,
        page,
      });

      for (const order of res.data) {
        // Add all possible formats the quote board might use
        ids.add(String(order.id));                         // "134637"
        ids.add(`ORD-${order.id}`);                        // "ORD-134637"
        if (order.load_number) ids.add(String(order.load_number)); // load_number
      }

      lastPage = res.meta.last_page;
      page++;
    } while (page <= lastPage);

    return ids;
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[pod-load-ids] Failed to fetch pod orders:", err);
    return null; // fail-open: caller should skip filtering
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/vapi/sync-extractions.ts
================================================
// ============================================================
// VAPI Call Extraction Sync
//
// Incrementally processes VAPI call transcripts through Gemini,
// stores results in vapi_call_extractions table.
//
// - First run (empty table): processes last 7 days of calls
// - Subsequent runs: only processes new calls not yet in the table
// ============================================================

import { createServiceClient } from "@/lib/supabase/server";
import { vapiGetAllCalls, type VapiCall } from "@/lib/ttms/client";
import { extractFromVapiCalls } from "@/lib/ai/extract-vapi";

const SEVEN_DAYS_MS = 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;

export interface SyncResult {
  new_extractions: number;
  total_calls_fetched: number;
  calls_processed: number;
  skipped_existing: number;
  affected_order_ids: string[];
  error?: string;
}

export type ProgressCallback = (msg: string) => void;

/**
 * Sync VAPI call extractions for a tenant.
 * Fetches all VAPI calls, checks which are already extracted,
 * runs Gemini on new ones, and upserts results to Supabase.
 */
export async function syncVapiExtractions(tenantId: string, daysCutoff?: number, onProgress?: ProgressCallback): Promise<SyncResult> {
  const supabase = await createServiceClient();

  // 1. Fetch all VAPI calls
  let allCalls: VapiCall[] = [];
  try {
    const result = await vapiGetAllCalls();
    allCalls = result.data || [];
    console.log(`[vapi-sync] Fetched ${allCalls.length} total calls from VAPI API`);
  } catch (err) {
    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "VAPI API fetch failed";
    console.error("[vapi-sync] Failed to fetch VAPI calls:", msg);
    return { new_extractions: 0, total_calls_fetched: 0, calls_processed: 0, skipped_existing: 0, affected_order_ids: [], error: msg };
  }

  if (allCalls.length === 0) {
    console.log("[vapi-sync] No calls returned from VAPI API");
    return { new_extractions: 0, total_calls_fetched: 0, calls_processed: 0, skipped_existing: 0, affected_order_ids: [] };
  }

  // Only consider calls with transcript or summary
  const callsWithContent = allCalls.filter((c) => c.transcript || c.summary);
  console.log(`[vapi-sync] ${callsWithContent.length}/${allCalls.length} calls have transcript/summary`);

  if (callsWithContent.length === 0) {
    return { new_extractions: 0, total_calls_fetched: allCalls.length, calls_processed: 0, skipped_existing: 0, affected_order_ids: [] };
  }

  // 2. Check which call_ids are already in the table
  const { data: existing, error: dbError } = await supabase
    .from("vapi_call_extractions")
    .select("call_id")
    .eq("tenant_id", tenantId);

  if (dbError) {
    console.error("[vapi-sync] DB error fetching existing call_ids:", dbError.message);
  }

  const existingCallIds = new Set((existing || []).map((e) => e.call_id));
  const isFirstRun = existingCallIds.size === 0;
  console.log(`[vapi-sync] ${existingCallIds.size} calls already extracted, isFirstRun=${isFirstRun}`);

  // 3. Filter to new calls only
  let newCalls: VapiCall[];
  if (isFirstRun) {
    // First run: process calls from the cutoff window (default 7 days, 0 = all time)
    const cutoffMs = daysCutoff !== undefined ? daysCutoff * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000 : SEVEN_DAYS_MS;
    if (cutoffMs === 0) {
      // All time — no filtering
      newCalls = callsWithContent;
    } else {
      const cutoff = Date.now() - cutoffMs;
      newCalls = callsWithContent.filter((c) => {
        const callDate = new Date(c.started_at || c.ended_at);
        return !isNaN(callDate.getTime()) && callDate.getTime() > cutoff;
      });
    }
  } else {
    // Subsequent runs: only process calls not yet extracted
    newCalls = callsWithContent.filter((c) => !existingCallIds.has(c.call_id));
  }

  console.log(`[vapi-sync] ${newCalls.length} new calls to process`);
  onProgress?.(`Found ${newCalls.length} new VAPI calls`);

  if (newCalls.length === 0) {
    return {
      new_extractions: 0,
      total_calls_fetched: allCalls.length,
      calls_processed: 0,
      skipped_existing: existingCallIds.size,
      affected_order_ids: [],
    };
  }

  // Cap at 60 calls per invocation to stay within serverless timeout
  const MAX_CALLS_PER_RUN = 60;
  if (newCalls.length > MAX_CALLS_PER_RUN) {
    console.log(`[vapi-sync] Capping at ${MAX_CALLS_PER_RUN} calls (${newCalls.length} available)`);
    newCalls = newCalls.slice(0, MAX_CALLS_PER_RUN);
  }

  // 4. Run Gemini extraction on new calls (batch)
  onProgress?.(`Analysing ${newCalls.length} VAPI calls with AI...`);
  let extractions;
  try {
    extractions = await extractFromVapiCalls(
      newCalls.map((c) => ({
        call_id: c.call_id,
        caller: c.caller || "",
        summary: c.summary || "",
        transcript: c.transcript || "",
      })),
      tenantId
    );
    console.log(`[vapi-sync] Gemini extracted ${extractions.length} results`);
    const withOrder = extractions.filter((e) => e.order_id);
    const withRate = extractions.filter((e) => e.rate != null);
    console.log(`[vapi-sync] ${withOrder.length} with order_id, ${withRate.length} with rate`);
  } catch (err) {
    const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Gemini extraction failed";
    console.error("[vapi-sync] Gemini extraction error:", msg);
    return {
      new_extractions: 0,
      total_calls_fetched: allCalls.length,
      calls_processed: newCalls.length,
      skipped_existing: existingCallIds.size,
      affected_order_ids: [],
      error: msg,
    };
  }

  // 5. Upsert results to Supabase (batched)
  const callMap = new Map(newCalls.map((c) => [c.call_id, c]));
  const now = new Date().toISOString();
  const rows = extractions
    .filter((ext) => callMap.has(ext.call_id))
    .map((ext) => {
      const call = callMap.get(ext.call_id)!;
      return {
        tenant_id: tenantId,
        call_id: ext.call_id,
        phone_number: call.caller || null,
        order_id: ext.order_id || null,
        rate: ext.rate,
        ai_rate: ext.ai_rate,
        intent: ext.intent || "unknown",
        // "accepted" only when MC number is confirmed (email flow) — VAPI booking = verbal agreement, not confirmed
        status: ext.intent === "booking" ? "negotiating" : ext.intent === "transfer" ? "transferred" : "called",
        call_started_at: call.started_at || call.ended_at || null,
        summary: (call.summary || "").slice(0, 500),
        extracted_at: now,
      };
    });

  let insertedCount = 0;
  if (rows.length > 0) {
    const { error } = await supabase
      .from("vapi_call_extractions")
      .upsert(rows, { onConflict: "tenant_id,call_id" });
    if (error) {
      console.error("[vapi-sync] Batch upsert error:", error.message);
    } else {
      insertedCount = rows.length;
    }
  }

  // Collect affected order IDs for incremental materialization
  const affectedOrderIds = [...new Set(rows.map((r) => r.order_id).filter(Boolean) as string[])];

  onProgress?.(`${insertedCount} VAPI calls extracted`);
  console.log(`[vapi-sync] Done: ${insertedCount} new extractions inserted, ${affectedOrderIds.length} orders affected`);

  return {
    new_extractions: insertedCount,
    total_calls_fetched: allCalls.length,
    calls_processed: newCalls.length,
    skipped_existing: existingCallIds.size,
    affected_order_ids: affectedOrderIds,
  };
}

export type EmailCategory = "IMP" | "UNIMP" | "IGNORE" | "UNCLASSIFIED" | "SHIPPER" | "TENDER" | "SHIPPER_STATUS" | "SENT";

import type { EmailCategory } from "./database";

export type ReplyStatus = "ai_replied" | "replied" | null;
export type AwardedStatus = "bidding" | "awarded" | "not_applicable";

export interface EmailListItem {
  id: string;
  subject: string | null;
  from_address: string;
  from_name: string | null;
  received_at: string;
  body_preview: string | null;
  is_read: boolean;
  has_attachments: boolean;
  category: EmailCategory;
  confidence: number | null;
  reply_status?: ReplyStatus;
  awarded_status?: AwardedStatus;
}

export interface EmailDetail extends EmailListItem {
  to_addresses: string[];
  body_html: string | null;
  conversation_id: string | null;
  ai_reasoning: string | null;
  manual_override: boolean;
  awarded_status?: AwardedStatus;
}

export interface ClassificationResult {
  id: string;
  category: "IMP" | "UNIMP" | "IGNORE" | "SHIPPER" | "TENDER" | "SHIPPER_STATUS";
  reasoning: string;
  confidence: number;
}

export interface AnalyticsData {
  totalEmails: number;
  importantCount: number;
  unimportantCount: number;
  ignoreCount: number;
  unclassifiedCount: number;
  emailsPerDay: { date: string; imp: number; unimp: number; ignore: number }[];
  topSenders: { address: string; name: string | null; count: number; topCategory: EmailCategory }[];
  unreadImportant: number;
}

export interface SyncStatus {
  lastSyncAt: string | null;
  syncInProgress: boolean;
}

export interface GraphMessage {
  id: string;
  subject: string | null;
  from: {
    emailAddress: {
      address: string;
      name: string;
    };
  };
  toRecipients: {
    emailAddress: {
      address: string;
      name: string;
    };
  }[];
  receivedDateTime: string;
  bodyPreview: string;
  body: {
    contentType: string;
    content: string;
  };
  isRead: boolean;
  hasAttachments: boolean;
  conversationId: string;
}

// ============================================================
// TTMS Mailer — Shared TypeScript Types
// ============================================================

// --- Enums & Unions ---

export type EmailCategory = "IMP" | "UNIMP" | "IGNORE" | "UNCLASSIFIED" | "SHIPPER" | "TENDER" | "SHIPPER_STATUS" | "SENT";

export type LoadStatus = "pending" | "bidding" | "sourcing" | "booked" | "in_transit" | "delivered" | "cancelled";

export type AwardedStatus = "bidding" | "awarded" | "not_applicable";

export type EmailClassification = "IMP" | "UNIMP" | "IGNORE" | "SHIPPER" | "TENDER" | "SHIPPER_STATUS";

export type DetectedIntent =
  // Carrier-originated (12)
  | "carrier_rate_quote"
  | "carrier_rate_counter"
  | "carrier_booking_confirmation"
  | "carrier_availability_check"
  | "carrier_load_drop"
  | "carrier_detention_request"
  | "carrier_rate_dispute"
  | "carrier_check_in_update"
  | "carrier_pod_submission"
  | "carrier_appointment_request"
  | "carrier_general_inquiry"
  | "carrier_invoice_submission"
  // Shipper-originated (7)
  | "load_tender"
  | "load_tender_cancellation"
  | "shipper_status_request"
  | "shipper_complaint"
  | "shipper_appointment_request"
  | "shipper_invoice_dispute"
  | "shipper_general_inquiry"
  // Consignee-originated (2)
  | "consignee_appointment_request"
  | "consignee_delivery_inquiry"
  // Agent-originated (1)
  | "escalation_decision"
  // Catch-all
  | "unknown";

export type EscalationTrigger =
  | "rate_ceiling_exceeded"
  | "no_carrier_coverage"
  | "late_pickup_risk"
  | "carrier_load_drop"
  | "carrier_detention"
  | "carrier_rate_dispute"
  | "shipper_complaint"
  | "shipper_invoice_dispute"
  | "classifier_low_confidence"
  | "shipper_relationship"
  | "other";

export type EscalationStatus = "open" | "resolved" | "expired";

export type QuoteStatus = "pending" | "negotiating" | "best" | "booked" | "declined" | "out";

export type ActivityActionType =
  | "email_sent"
  | "email_classified"
  | "email_drafted"
  | "load_created"
  | "carrier_sourced"
  | "quote_received"
  | "carrier_booked"
  | "check_call"
  | "appointment_set"
  | "shipper_update"
  | "pod_collected"
  | "invoice_sent"
  | "escalation_created"
  | "escalation_resolved"
  | "load_awarded";

export type HandlerStatus = "pending" | "handled" | "escalated" | "review_queue" | "ignored";

// Always-escalate intents
export const ALWAYS_ESCALATE_INTENTS: DetectedIntent[] = [
  "carrier_load_drop",
  "carrier_detention_request",
  "carrier_rate_dispute",
  "shipper_complaint",
  "shipper_invoice_dispute",
];

// --- Interfaces ---

export interface EscalationOption {
  key: string;
  label: string;
  action_type: string;
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
}

// --- Database Row Types ---

export interface AgentProfile {
  id: string;
  email: string | null;
  name: string | null;
  avatar_url: string | null;
  company_name: string;
  display_name: string | null;
  onboarding_complete: boolean;
  onboarding_step: number;
  supervised_mode: boolean;
  autopilot_active: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export interface EmailConnection {
  id: string;
  tenant_id: string;
  provider: string;
  email_address: string;
  access_token: string;
  refresh_token: string;
  token_expires_at: string;
  graph_subscription_id: string | null;
  graph_subscription_expires_at: string | null;
  delta_link: string | null;
  last_synced_at: string | null;
  is_active: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export interface Load {
  id: string;
  tenant_id?: string;
  load_number: string;
  status: LoadStatus;
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  shipper_id?: string | null;
  carrier_id?: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  weight_lbs: number | null;
  commodity: string | null;
  pickup_date: string | null;
  delivery_date: string | null;
  pickup_appointment?: string | null;
  delivery_appointment?: string | null;
  carrier_rate: number | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  gross_profit: number | null;
  tms_load_id?: string | null;
  tender_email_id?: string | null;
  notes: string | null;
  total_miles?: number | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  // Joined
  carrier?: { id: string; name: string; email?: string | null } | null;
  shipper?: { id: string; name: string } | null;
}

  id: string;
  tenant_id?: string;

  phone: string | null;
  mc_number: string | null;
  dot_number: string | null;
  equipment_types: string[];
  preferred_lanes?: { origin_state: string; dest_state: string }[];
  relationship_notes?: string | null;
  contact_name: string | null;
  status: boolean;
  approved?: boolean;
  city?: string | null;
  state?: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

}

}

export interface InboundEmail {
  id: string;

  confidence: number | null;
  manual_override: boolean;
  detected_intent: DetectedIntent | null;
  confidence_score: number | null;
  classifier_reasoning: string | null;
  extracted_fields: Record<string, unknown> | null;
  agent_corrected_intent: string | null;
  handler_status: HandlerStatus;
  handler_triggered: string | null;
  handler_result: Record<string, unknown> | null;
  load_id: string | null;
  carrier_id: string | null;
  shipper_id: string | null;
  escalation_id: string | null;
  awarded_status: AwardedStatus;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

    dest_city?: string | null;
    dest_state?: string | null;
    equipment_type?: string | null;
    pickup_date?: string | null;
  };
}

// --- Graph Types ---

  subject: string | null;
  from: {
    emailAddress: {
      address: string;
      name: string;
    };
  };
  toRecipients: {
    emailAddress: {
      address: string;
      name: string;
    };
  }[];
  receivedDateTime: string;
  bodyPreview: string;
  body: {
    contentType: string;
    content: string;
  };
  isRead: boolean;
  hasAttachments: boolean;
  conversationId: string;
}

  unreadImportant: number;
  activeLoads: number;
  openEscalations: number;

}

// --- Learning Loop ---

export interface NegotiationEvent {
  id: string;
  tenant_id: string;
  event_type: string;
  carrier_email: string | null;
  carrier_name: string | null;
  carrier_mc: string | null;
  carrier_id: string | null;

  load_number: string | null;
  email_id: string | null;
  negotiation_id: string | null;
  origin_city: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_city: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  shipper_rate: number | null;
  carrier_offer: number | null;
  ai_counter_rate: number | null;
  floor_rate: number | null;
  target_rate: number | null;
  ceiling_rate: number | null;
  round_number: number | null;
  context_snapshot: Record<string, unknown>;
  model_used: string | null;
  system_prompt_hash: string | null;
  action_taken: string | null;
  ai_response_text: string | null;
  outcome: string | null;
  outcome_at: string | null;
  final_rate: number | null;
  margin_realized: number | null;
  margin_pct: number | null;
  vs_target: number | null;
  time_to_close_hours: number | null;
  carrier_accepted_on_round: number | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

export type LearningScope = "carrier" | "lane" | "carrier_lane" | "global" | "equipment" | "time_of_week";
export type LearningCategory = "closing_behavior" | "rate_sensitivity" | "response_pattern" | "lane_preference" | "timing_pattern" | "volume_pattern" | "ghosting_risk";
export type LearningStatus = "active" | "superseded" | "invalidated";

export interface Learning {
  id: string;
  tenant_id: string;
  scope_type: LearningScope;
  carrier_email: string | null;
  carrier_name: string | null;
  carrier_mc: string | null;
  origin_state: string | null;
  dest_state: string | null;
  equipment_type: string | null;
  category: LearningCategory;
  observation: string;
  confidence: number;
  sample_size: number;
  structured_data: Record<string, unknown>;
  status: LearningStatus;
  superseded_by: string | null;
  source_event_ids: string[];
  extracted_at: string;
  expires_at: string | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
}

}

}

  body_html: string | null;
  conversation_id: string | null;
