  manual_override: boolean;
  classifier_reasoning: string | null;
  extracted_fields: Record<string, unknown> | null;
  load_id: string | null;
  carrier_id: string | null;
  escalation_id: string | null;
}



================================================
FILE: supabase/migrations/001_initial_schema.sql
================================================
-- TTMS Mailer Database Schema
-- Run this in Supabase SQL Editor

-- Email category enum
create type email_category as enum ('IMP', 'UNIMP', 'IGNORE', 'UNCLASSIFIED');

-- Profiles table (extends auth.users)
create table profiles (
  id uuid references auth.users on delete cascade primary key,
  email text,
  name text,
  avatar_url text,
  created_at timestamptz default now() not null
);

-- Accounts table (stores OAuth provider tokens)
create table accounts (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  user_id uuid references profiles(id) on delete cascade not null,
  provider text not null default 'azure',
  access_token text,
  refresh_token text,
  expires_at bigint,
  created_at timestamptz default now() not null,
  updated_at timestamptz default now() not null
);

create index idx_accounts_user_id on accounts(user_id);

-- Emails table
create table emails (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  user_id uuid references profiles(id) on delete cascade not null,
  graph_message_id text not null,
  subject text,
  from_address text not null,
  from_name text,
  to_addresses text[] default '{}',
  received_at timestamptz not null,
  body_preview text,
  body_html text,
  is_read boolean default false,
  has_attachments boolean default false,
  conversation_id text,
  category email_category default 'UNCLASSIFIED',
  ai_reasoning text,
  confidence real,
  manual_override boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now() not null,
  updated_at timestamptz default now() not null,

  unique(user_id, graph_message_id)
);

create index idx_emails_user_category on emails(user_id, category);
create index idx_emails_user_received on emails(user_id, received_at desc);
create index idx_emails_user_from on emails(user_id, from_address);

-- Sync state table
create table sync_state (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  user_id uuid references profiles(id) on delete cascade unique not null,
  last_sync_at timestamptz,
  delta_link text,
  sync_in_progress boolean default false,
  created_at timestamptz default now() not null,
  updated_at timestamptz default now() not null
);

-- User preferences table
create table user_preferences (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  user_id uuid references profiles(id) on delete cascade unique not null,
  auto_classify boolean default true,
  important_keywords text[] default '{}',
  ignore_domains text[] default '{}',
  sync_interval_minutes integer default 15,
  created_at timestamptz default now() not null,
  updated_at timestamptz default now() not null
);

-- Row Level Security
alter table profiles enable row level security;
alter table accounts enable row level security;
alter table emails enable row level security;
alter table sync_state enable row level security;
alter table user_preferences enable row level security;

-- Profiles: users can read/update their own profile
create policy "Users can view own profile" on profiles
  for select using (auth.uid() = id);

create policy "Users can update own profile" on profiles
  for update using (auth.uid() = id);

-- Accounts: users can manage their own accounts
create policy "Users can view own accounts" on accounts
  for select using (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can insert own accounts" on accounts
  for insert with check (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can update own accounts" on accounts
  for update using (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Emails: users can only access their own emails
create policy "Users can view own emails" on emails
  for select using (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can insert own emails" on emails
  for insert with check (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can update own emails" on emails
  for update using (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Sync state: users can manage their own sync state
create policy "Users can view own sync state" on sync_state
  for select using (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can insert own sync state" on sync_state
  for insert with check (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can update own sync state" on sync_state
  for update using (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- User preferences: users can manage their own preferences
create policy "Users can view own preferences" on user_preferences
  for select using (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can insert own preferences" on user_preferences
  for insert with check (auth.uid() = user_id);

create policy "Users can update own preferences" on user_preferences
  for update using (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Function to create profile on user signup
create or replace function public.handle_new_user()
returns trigger as $$
begin
  insert into public.profiles (id, email, name, avatar_url)
  values (
    new.id,
    new.email,
    coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name', new.raw_user_meta_data->>'name'),
    new.raw_user_meta_data->>'avatar_url'
  );

  -- Create default preferences
  insert into public.user_preferences (user_id)
  values (new.id);

  -- Create sync state
  insert into public.sync_state (user_id)
  values (new.id);

  return new;
end;
$$ language plpgsql security definer;

-- Trigger to auto-create profile on signup
create or replace trigger on_auth_user_created
  after insert on auth.users
  for each row execute procedure public.handle_new_user();

-- Function to update updated_at timestamp
create or replace function update_updated_at()
returns trigger as $$
begin
  new.updated_at = now();
  return new;
end;
$$ language plpgsql;

-- Apply updated_at triggers
create trigger update_accounts_updated_at before update on accounts
  for each row execute procedure update_updated_at();

create trigger update_emails_updated_at before update on emails
  for each row execute procedure update_updated_at();

create trigger update_sync_state_updated_at before update on sync_state
  for each row execute procedure update_updated_at();

create trigger update_user_preferences_updated_at before update on user_preferences
  for each row execute procedure update_updated_at();



================================================
FILE: supabase/migrations/002_fortress_autopilot.sql
================================================
-- TTMS Mailer — Fortress Autopilot Schema Upgrade
-- Adds: agent_profiles, email_connections, loads, carriers, shippers,
--        carrier_quotes, inbound_emails, ai_activity_log, escalations, rate_parameters

-- ============================================================
-- 1. Extend profiles → agent_profiles columns
-- ============================================================
ALTER TABLE profiles
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS company_name TEXT DEFAULT 'Red Dog Logistics',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS display_name TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_complete BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS onboarding_step INT DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS supervised_mode BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS autopilot_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW();

-- ============================================================
-- 2. Email connections (replaces simple accounts for Graph tokens)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_connections (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  provider TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'microsoft',
  email_address TEXT NOT NULL,
  access_token TEXT NOT NULL,
  refresh_token TEXT NOT NULL,
  token_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  graph_subscription_id TEXT,
  graph_subscription_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  delta_link TEXT,
  last_synced_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_connections_tenant ON email_connections(tenant_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 3. Shippers (must exist before loads FK)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS shippers (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  billing_email TEXT,
  logistics_email TEXT,
  sla_update_interval_hours INT DEFAULT 4,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_shippers_tenant ON shippers(tenant_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 4. Carriers
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS carriers (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  email TEXT,
  phone TEXT,
  mc_number TEXT,
  dot_number TEXT,
  equipment_types TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
  preferred_lanes JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  relationship_notes TEXT,
  contact_name TEXT,
  status BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  approved BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_carriers_tenant ON carriers(tenant_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 5. Inbound emails (enhanced version of existing emails table)
-- ============================================================
-- Add new columns to existing emails table for intent detection
ALTER TABLE emails
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS detected_intent TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS confidence_score NUMERIC(4,3),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS classifier_reasoning TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extracted_fields JSONB,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS agent_corrected_intent TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS handler_status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS handler_triggered TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS handler_result JSONB,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS load_id UUID,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS carrier_id UUID,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS shipper_id UUID,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS escalation_id UUID;

-- ============================================================
-- 6. Loads (freight shipments)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS loads (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  load_number TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  origin_city TEXT,
  origin_state TEXT,
  dest_city TEXT,
  dest_state TEXT,
  shipper_id UUID REFERENCES shippers(id),
  carrier_id UUID REFERENCES carriers(id),
  equipment_type TEXT,
  weight_lbs INT,
  commodity TEXT,
  pickup_date DATE,
  delivery_date DATE,
  pickup_appointment TIMESTAMPTZ,
  delivery_appointment TIMESTAMPTZ,
  carrier_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  shipper_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  gross_profit NUMERIC(10,2) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (shipper_rate - carrier_rate) STORED,
  tms_load_id TEXT,
  tender_email_id UUID,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(tenant_id, load_number)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_loads_tenant ON loads(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_loads_status ON loads(tenant_id, status);

-- ============================================================
-- 7. Carrier quotes per load
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS carrier_quotes (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  load_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES loads(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  carrier_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES carriers(id),
  quoted_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  rate_per_mile NUMERIC(6,2),
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'pending',
  ai_counter_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  email_thread_id TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_carrier_quotes_load ON carrier_quotes(load_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_carrier_quotes_tenant ON carrier_quotes(tenant_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 8. AI activity log
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ai_activity_log (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  action_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  action_description TEXT NOT NULL,
  load_id UUID REFERENCES loads(id),
  carrier_id UUID REFERENCES carriers(id),
  shipper_id UUID REFERENCES shippers(id),
  email_id UUID,
  external_id TEXT,
  outcome TEXT,
  metadata JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activity_log_tenant ON ai_activity_log(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activity_log_created ON ai_activity_log(tenant_id, created_at DESC);

-- ============================================================
-- 9. Escalations
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS escalations (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  load_id UUID REFERENCES loads(id),
  trigger_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'open',
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  options JSONB NOT NULL,
  ai_recommendation TEXT,
  resolved_option TEXT,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  resolution_source TEXT,
  notification_email_sent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_escalations_tenant ON escalations(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_escalations_status ON escalations(tenant_id, status);

-- ============================================================
-- 10. Rate parameters
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rate_parameters (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id),
  lane_description TEXT,
  origin_state TEXT,
  dest_state TEXT,
  equipment_type TEXT,
  floor_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  target_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  ceiling_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  is_default BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_rate_params_tenant ON rate_parameters(tenant_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 11. Add FK constraints to emails for new tables
-- ============================================================
-- (Using DO block to skip if constraint already exists)
DO $$ BEGIN
  ALTER TABLE emails ADD CONSTRAINT fk_emails_load FOREIGN KEY (load_id) REFERENCES loads(id);
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL;
END $$;

DO $$ BEGIN
  ALTER TABLE emails ADD CONSTRAINT fk_emails_carrier FOREIGN KEY (carrier_id) REFERENCES carriers(id);
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL;
END $$;

DO $$ BEGIN
  ALTER TABLE emails ADD CONSTRAINT fk_emails_shipper FOREIGN KEY (shipper_id) REFERENCES shippers(id);
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL;
END $$;

DO $$ BEGIN
  ALTER TABLE emails ADD CONSTRAINT fk_emails_escalation FOREIGN KEY (escalation_id) REFERENCES escalations(id);
EXCEPTION WHEN duplicate_object THEN NULL;
END $$;

-- ============================================================
-- 12. RLS for all new tables
-- ============================================================
ALTER TABLE email_connections ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE shippers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE carriers ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE loads ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE carrier_quotes ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE ai_activity_log ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE escalations ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE rate_parameters ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- Tenant isolation policies
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON email_connections FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON shippers FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON carriers FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON loads FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON carrier_quotes FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON ai_activity_log FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON escalations FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation" ON rate_parameters FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

-- ============================================================
-- 13. Enable Supabase Realtime on key tables
-- ============================================================
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE ai_activity_log;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE escalations;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE loads;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE carrier_quotes;

-- ============================================================
-- 14. Update triggers for updated_at
-- ============================================================
CREATE TRIGGER update_email_connections_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON email_connections
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_shippers_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON shippers
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_carriers_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON carriers
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_loads_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON loads
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_carrier_quotes_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON carrier_quotes
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_escalations_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON escalations
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_rate_parameters_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON rate_parameters
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

-- ============================================================
-- 15. Update handle_new_user to set up agent profile fields
-- ============================================================
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.handle_new_user()
RETURNS trigger AS $$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO public.profiles (id, email, name, avatar_url, onboarding_complete, onboarding_step)
  VALUES (
    new.id,
    new.email,
    coalesce(new.raw_user_meta_data->>'full_name', new.raw_user_meta_data->>'name'),
    new.raw_user_meta_data->>'avatar_url',
    FALSE,
    1
  );

  -- Create default preferences
  INSERT INTO public.user_preferences (user_id)
  VALUES (new.id);

  -- Create sync state
  INSERT INTO public.sync_state (user_id)
  VALUES (new.id);

  RETURN new;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER;

FILE: supabase/migrations/003_escalation_ttms.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 003: Adapt escalations for TTMS integration
-- ============================================================

-- Add TTMS order ID column (integer, nullable)
ALTER TABLE escalations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ttms_order_id INT;

-- Add load context as JSONB (origin, dest, carrier, shipper info from TTMS)
ALTER TABLE escalations ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS load_context JSONB;

-- Index for looking up escalations by TTMS order
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_escalations_ttms_order ON escalations(ttms_order_id) WHERE ttms_order_id IS NOT NULL;

-- Prevent duplicate open escalations for the same order + trigger
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_escalations_unique_open
  ON escalations(tenant_id, ttms_order_id, trigger_type)
  WHERE status = 'open' AND ttms_order_id IS NOT NULL;

FILE: supabase/migrations/004_email_replies.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 004: Email replies tracking
-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_replies (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  email_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES emails(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  conversation_id TEXT,
  reply_body TEXT NOT NULL,
  reply_html TEXT,
  reply_to_address TEXT NOT NULL,
  source TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual', -- 'manual', 'ai_draft', 'ai_auto'
  graph_message_id TEXT, -- MS Graph message ID of the sent reply
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_replies_email ON email_replies(email_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_replies_conversation ON email_replies(conversation_id) WHERE conversation_id IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_replies_user ON email_replies(user_id);

-- RLS
ALTER TABLE email_replies ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can manage their own replies"
  ON email_replies FOR ALL
  USING (auth.uid() = user_id)
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

FILE: supabase/migrations/005_realtime_emails.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 005: Enable Supabase Realtime on emails + email_replies
-- ============================================================

-- Add emails table to realtime publication so INSERT/UPDATE events
-- are broadcast to subscribed clients (inbox list, thread view)
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE emails;

-- Add email_replies table to realtime publication so new replies
-- appear instantly in conversation thread views
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE email_replies;

FILE: supabase/migrations/006_email_negotiations.sql
================================================
-- Track all email-based negotiations (carrier or not)
-- Stores context so AI can maintain continuity across email exchanges

create table if not exists email_negotiations (
  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id uuid not null references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
  sender_email text not null,
  sender_name text,
  mc_number text default 'NA',
  interested_order text not null,
  last_negotiated_rate numeric,
  intent text,
  conversation_id text,
  status text not null default 'open' check (status in ('open', 'negotiating', 'accepted', 'rejected', 'closed')),
  round_count int not null default 0,
  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
);

-- Index for fast lookup by sender email + order
create index if not exists idx_email_negotiations_sender
  on email_negotiations (tenant_id, sender_email, interested_order);

-- RLS
alter table email_negotiations enable row level security;

create policy "Users can manage their own negotiations"
  on email_negotiations for all
  using (tenant_id = auth.uid())
  with check (tenant_id = auth.uid());

-- Add to realtime publication
alter publication supabase_realtime add table email_negotiations;

-- Add unique constraints needed for TTMS sync upserts

-- Shippers: unique on (tenant_id, name) for upsert

  ON shippers (tenant_id, name);

-- Note: loads already has UNIQUE(tenant_id, load_number) from 002
-- Carriers don't have a natural unique key besides UUID, so we skip upsert
-- and use insert-on-conflict-skip pattern in the sync job

FILE: supabase/migrations/008_learning_loop.sql
================================================
-- TTMS Mailer — Learning Loop Schema
-- Adds: negotiation_events, learnings tables
-- Extends: carrier_quotes, email_negotiations with outcome tracking

-- ============================================================
-- 1. Negotiation Events (Stage 1 + 2: Action Capture + Outcome)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS negotiation_events (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

  -- WHAT happened
  event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    -- 'negotiation_quote', 'negotiation_counter', 'negotiation_accept',
    -- 'negotiation_reject', 'negotiation_ask_mc', 'negotiation_generic',
    -- 'vapi_call_completed', 'email_classified'

  -- WHO was involved
  carrier_email TEXT,
  carrier_name TEXT,
  carrier_mc TEXT,
  carrier_id UUID REFERENCES carriers(id),
  load_id UUID REFERENCES loads(id),
  load_number TEXT,
  email_id UUID,
  negotiation_id UUID,

  -- LANE (denormalized for fast pattern queries)
  origin_city TEXT,
  origin_state TEXT,
  dest_city TEXT,
  dest_state TEXT,
  equipment_type TEXT,

  -- RATE STATE at decision time
  shipper_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  carrier_offer NUMERIC(10,2),
  ai_counter_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  floor_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  target_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  ceiling_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  round_number INT,

  -- FULL CONTEXT SNAPSHOT (exactly what the AI saw)
  context_snapshot JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',

  -- AI DECISION AUDIT
  model_used TEXT,
  system_prompt_hash TEXT,
  action_taken TEXT,
  ai_response_text TEXT,

  -- OUTCOME (backfilled by Stage 2)
  outcome TEXT,
  outcome_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  final_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  margin_realized NUMERIC(10,2),
  margin_pct NUMERIC(5,4),
  vs_target NUMERIC(10,2),
  time_to_close_hours NUMERIC(10,2),
  carrier_accepted_on_round INT,

  -- META
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_tenant ON negotiation_events(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_tenant_created ON negotiation_events(tenant_id, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_carrier ON negotiation_events(carrier_email);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_lane ON negotiation_events(origin_state, dest_state);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_outcome ON negotiation_events(outcome) WHERE outcome IS NOT NULL;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_load ON negotiation_events(load_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_neg_events_negotiation ON negotiation_events(negotiation_id);

ALTER TABLE negotiation_events ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation_neg_events" ON negotiation_events
  FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE TRIGGER update_negotiation_events_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON negotiation_events
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

-- ============================================================
-- 2. Learnings (Stage 3 output: distilled patterns)
-- ============================================================
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learnings (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,

  -- SCOPE: what this learning applies to
  scope_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    -- 'carrier', 'lane', 'carrier_lane', 'global', 'equipment', 'time_of_week'
  carrier_email TEXT,
  carrier_name TEXT,
  carrier_mc TEXT,
  origin_state TEXT,
  dest_state TEXT,
  equipment_type TEXT,

  -- THE LEARNING
  category TEXT NOT NULL,
    -- 'closing_behavior', 'rate_sensitivity', 'response_pattern',
    -- 'lane_preference', 'timing_pattern', 'volume_pattern', 'ghosting_risk'
  observation TEXT NOT NULL,
  confidence NUMERIC(3,2) NOT NULL,
  sample_size INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,

  -- STRUCTURED DATA for programmatic use
  structured_data JSONB DEFAULT '{}',

  -- LIFECYCLE
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'active' CHECK (status IN ('active', 'superseded', 'invalidated')),
  superseded_by UUID REFERENCES learnings(id),
  source_event_ids UUID[] DEFAULT '{}',
  extracted_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,

  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_tenant ON learnings(tenant_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_carrier ON learnings(tenant_id, carrier_email) WHERE status = 'active';
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_lane ON learnings(tenant_id, origin_state, dest_state) WHERE status = 'active';
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_scope ON learnings(tenant_id, scope_type) WHERE status = 'active';
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_active ON learnings(tenant_id, status, extracted_at DESC);

ALTER TABLE learnings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "tenant_isolation_learnings" ON learnings
  FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE TRIGGER update_learnings_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON learnings
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

-- ============================================================
-- 3. Extend carrier_quotes for outcome tracking
-- ============================================================
ALTER TABLE carrier_quotes
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS outcome TEXT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS outcome_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS booked_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS rounds_to_close INT;

-- ============================================================
-- 4. Extend email_negotiations for timing + outcome
-- ============================================================
ALTER TABLE email_negotiations
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS first_contact_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS closed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS final_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS outcome TEXT;

ALTER TABLE loads ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS miles NUMERIC(10,2);

FILE: supabase/migrations/010_vapi_call_extractions.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 010: VAPI call extractions table
-- Persists AI-extracted data from VAPI call transcripts
-- so the Quote Board doesn't re-run Gemini on every load
-- ============================================================

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vapi_call_extractions (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  call_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  phone_number TEXT,
  order_id TEXT,
  rate NUMERIC(12,2),
  intent TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown',
  status TEXT DEFAULT 'extracted',
  call_started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  summary TEXT,
  extracted_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(tenant_id, call_id)
);

-- Index for fast lookups by tenant + order
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_vapi_extractions_tenant_order
  ON vapi_call_extractions(tenant_id, order_id);

-- Index for fast lookups by tenant + recency
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_vapi_extractions_tenant_time
  ON vapi_call_extractions(tenant_id, call_started_at DESC);

-- RLS
ALTER TABLE vapi_call_extractions ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can read own extractions"
  ON vapi_call_extractions FOR SELECT
  USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "Users can insert own extractions"
  ON vapi_call_extractions FOR INSERT
  WITH CHECK (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "Users can update own extractions"
  ON vapi_call_extractions FOR UPDATE
  USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

FILE: supabase/migrations/011_lane_boundaries.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Lane Boundaries — per-tenant lane rate boundaries
-- ============================================================

create table if not exists public.lane_boundaries (
  id            uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
  tenant_id     uuid not null references auth.users(id) on delete cascade,
  lane_description text not null,
  origin_state  text not null,
  dest_state    text not null,
  equipment_type text not null default 'Dry Van',
  floor_rate    numeric(10,2) not null,
  target_rate   numeric(10,2) not null,
  ceiling_rate  numeric(10,2) not null,
  set_by        text not null default 'agent',  -- 'ai' or 'agent'
  created_at    timestamptz not null default now(),
  updated_at    timestamptz not null default now()
);

-- Index for tenant lookups
create index if not exists idx_lane_boundaries_tenant
  on public.lane_boundaries(tenant_id);

-- RLS
alter table public.lane_boundaries enable row level security;

create policy "Users can view own lane boundaries"
  on public.lane_boundaries for select
  using (auth.uid() = tenant_id);

create policy "Users can insert own lane boundaries"
  on public.lane_boundaries for insert
  with check (auth.uid() = tenant_id);

create policy "Users can update own lane boundaries"
  on public.lane_boundaries for update
  using (auth.uid() = tenant_id);

create policy "Users can delete own lane boundaries"
  on public.lane_boundaries for delete
  using (auth.uid() = tenant_id);

FILE: supabase/migrations/012_quote_board_cache.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 012: Materialized quote board tables
--
-- Caches the aggregated quote board data for fast reads and
-- Supabase Realtime subscriptions. Refreshed by the sync
-- endpoint after VAPI extraction + source aggregation.
-- ============================================================

-- One row per load on the board
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quote_board_loads (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  load_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  quote_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  latest_activity TIMESTAMPTZ,
  best_rate NUMERIC(12,2),
  outbound_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  load_info JSONB,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(tenant_id, load_id)
);

-- One row per carrier quote per load
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quote_board_quotes (
  id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid() PRIMARY KEY,
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  load_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  source TEXT NOT NULL,
  identifier TEXT NOT NULL,
  display_name TEXT,
  latest_rate NUMERIC(12,2),
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open',
  round_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  is_known BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  carrier_id TEXT,
  mc_number TEXT,
  last_activity TIMESTAMPTZ,
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  UNIQUE(tenant_id, load_id, identifier)
);

-- Indexes for fast reads
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_qb_loads_tenant_activity
  ON quote_board_loads(tenant_id, latest_activity DESC);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_qb_quotes_tenant_load
  ON quote_board_quotes(tenant_id, load_id);

-- RLS
ALTER TABLE quote_board_loads ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
ALTER TABLE quote_board_quotes ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can read own quote board loads"
  ON quote_board_loads FOR SELECT
  USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "Service can manage quote board loads"
  ON quote_board_loads FOR ALL
  USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE POLICY "Users can read own quote board quotes"
  ON quote_board_quotes FOR SELECT
  USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "Service can manage quote board quotes"
  ON quote_board_quotes FOR ALL
  USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

-- Realtime
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE quote_board_loads;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE quote_board_quotes;

-- Auto-update updated_at
CREATE TRIGGER update_qb_loads_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON quote_board_loads
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

CREATE TRIGGER update_qb_quotes_updated_at BEFORE UPDATE ON quote_board_quotes
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at();

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS reference_id TEXT;

FILE: supabase/migrations/016_quoted_loads.sql
================================================
-- 016_quoted_loads.sql
-- Bidding → Awarded return loop: track quoted loads and award status on emails

-- Add awarded_status column to emails table
ALTER TABLE emails ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS awarded_status TEXT DEFAULT 'not_applicable'
  CHECK (awarded_status IN ('bidding', 'awarded', 'not_applicable'));

-- Index for fast lookups on bidding emails
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_emails_awarded_status ON emails(awarded_status) WHERE awarded_status != 'not_applicable';
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_emails_conversation_awarded ON emails(conversation_id, awarded_status) WHERE conversation_id IS NOT NULL AND awarded_status = 'bidding';

-- Create quoted_loads table for tracking loads we've quoted on
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quoted_loads (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  email_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES emails(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  reply_id UUID REFERENCES email_replies(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  conversation_id TEXT,
  shipper_address TEXT,
  shipper_name TEXT,
  email_subject TEXT,
  lanes JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
  awarded_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bidding'
    CHECK (awarded_status IN ('bidding', 'awarded', 'expired')),
  awarded_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  awarded_email_id UUID REFERENCES emails(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  award_confidence NUMERIC,
  award_reasoning TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- RLS
ALTER TABLE quoted_loads ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
CREATE POLICY "Users can manage their own quoted loads"
  ON quoted_loads FOR ALL USING (user_id = auth.uid());

-- Indexes
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quoted_loads_conversation ON quoted_loads(conversation_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quoted_loads_status ON quoted_loads(awarded_status);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quoted_loads_user ON quoted_loads(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quoted_loads_bidding ON quoted_loads(conversation_id, awarded_status)
  WHERE awarded_status = 'bidding';

-- Updated_at trigger
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_quoted_loads_updated_at()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
  NEW.updated_at = NOW();
  RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER quoted_loads_updated_at
  BEFORE UPDATE ON quoted_loads
  FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_quoted_loads_updated_at();

-- Enable Realtime on quoted_loads for live UI updates
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE quoted_loads;

FILE: supabase/migrations/017_agent_mode.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Agent Mode Tables
-- ============================================================

-- 1. Agent settings per user (default: disabled, draft_mode on)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_settings (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  draft_mode BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  max_carrier_blast INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  max_negotiation_rounds INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3,
  rate_ceiling_pct NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 15.00,
  auto_book_enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE(user_id)
);

-- 2. Agent activity log
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_activity (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  action TEXT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL,
  email_id UUID REFERENCES emails(id),
  load_id TEXT,
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX idx_agent_activity_user_created ON agent_activity(user_id, created_at DESC);

-- 3. Agent drafts (outbound emails pending human approval)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_drafts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  draft_type TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  to_address TEXT NOT NULL,
  to_name TEXT,
  subject TEXT NOT NULL,
  body_html TEXT NOT NULL,
  body_text TEXT NOT NULL,
  reply_to_message_id TEXT,
  email_id UUID REFERENCES emails(id),
  load_id TEXT,
  negotiation_id UUID REFERENCES email_negotiations(id),
  metadata JSONB DEFAULT '{}',
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  discarded_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);
CREATE INDEX idx_agent_drafts_user_status ON agent_drafts(user_id, status);

-- 4. Carrier blast tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS carrier_blasts (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  load_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  carrier_id INTEGER,
  carrier_email TEXT NOT NULL,
  carrier_name TEXT,
  carrier_mc TEXT,
  carrier_score INTEGER,
  offer_rate NUMERIC(10,2),
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'sent',
  draft_id UUID REFERENCES agent_drafts(id),
  accepted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
);
CREATE INDEX idx_carrier_blasts_load ON carrier_blasts(load_id, status);
CREATE INDEX idx_carrier_blasts_email ON carrier_blasts(carrier_email, load_id);

-- 5. Enable realtime on agent tables
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE agent_activity;
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE agent_drafts;

-- 6. Add agent_processed flag to emails table
ALTER TABLE emails ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS agent_processed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false;
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_emails_agent_processed ON emails(agent_processed) WHERE agent_processed = false;

FILE: supabase/migrations/018_performance_indexes.sql

-- ============================================================
-- Performance Indexes & RPC Functions
-- ============================================================

-- 1. email_connections: delta-sync + token-refresh cron filter
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_connections_active_tenant
  ON email_connections(tenant_id) WHERE is_active = true;

-- 2. email_negotiations: status filtering in detect-ghosts, analytics, draft-reply
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_negotiations_tenant_status
  ON email_negotiations(tenant_id, status);

-- 3. email_negotiations: ghost detection cutoff query
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_email_negotiations_stale
  ON email_negotiations(updated_at DESC) WHERE status IN ('offered', 'negotiating');

-- 4. carrier_blasts: race-manager acceptance check (user+load+status)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_carrier_blasts_user_load_status
  ON carrier_blasts(user_id, load_id, status);

-- 5. carriers: check-escalations N+1 fix (tenant+email lookup)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_carriers_tenant_email
  ON carriers(tenant_id, email);


-- ============================================================
-- RPC: get_email_counts
-- Returns per-category counts + bidding count in one query.
-- Replaces O(N) client-side counting that fetches all email rows.
-- ============================================================
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_email_counts(p_user_id UUID)
RETURNS TABLE(category TEXT, cnt BIGINT, bidding_count BIGINT)
LANGUAGE plpgsql STABLE SECURITY DEFINER AS $$
BEGIN
  RETURN QUERY
  SELECT
    e.category::TEXT AS category,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e.awarded_status = 'bidding') AS bidding_count
  FROM emails e
  WHERE e.user_id = p_user_id
  GROUP BY e.category

  UNION ALL

  -- Grand total row (category = 'ALL')
  SELECT
    'ALL'::TEXT AS category,
    COUNT(*) AS cnt,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE e2.awarded_status = 'bidding') AS bidding_count
  FROM emails e2
  WHERE e2.user_id = p_user_id;
END;
$$;


-- ============================================================
-- RPC: get_email_analytics
-- Returns email stats, daily breakdown, and top senders via SQL.
-- Replaces JS-side triple-iteration over all emails.
-- ============================================================
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION get_email_analytics(p_user_id UUID, p_since TIMESTAMPTZ)
RETURNS JSON
LANGUAGE plpgsql STABLE SECURITY DEFINER AS $$
DECLARE
  result JSON;
BEGIN
  SELECT json_build_object(
    'total', COUNT(*),
    'imp', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'IMP'),
    'unimp', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'UNIMP'),
    'ignore', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'IGNORE'),
    'shipper', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'SHIPPER'),
    'unclassified', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'UNCLASSIFIED'),
    'unread_imp', COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'IMP' AND NOT is_read),
    'daily', (
      SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(d) ORDER BY d.date), '[]'::JSON)
      FROM (
        SELECT
          (received_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date AS date,
          COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'IMP') AS imp,
          COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'UNIMP') AS unimp,
          COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'IGNORE') AS ignore,
          COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE category = 'SHIPPER') AS shipper
        FROM emails
        WHERE user_id = p_user_id AND received_at >= p_since
        GROUP BY (received_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::date
      ) d
    ),
    'top_senders', (
      SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json(s)), '[]'::JSON)
      FROM (
        SELECT
          from_address AS address,
          MAX(from_name) AS name,
          COUNT(*) AS count,
          MODE() WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY category) AS top_category
        FROM emails
        WHERE user_id = p_user_id AND received_at >= p_since
        GROUP BY from_address
        ORDER BY count DESC
        LIMIT 10
      ) s
    )
  ) INTO result
  FROM emails
  WHERE user_id = p_user_id AND received_at >= p_since;

  RETURN result;
END;
$$;

-- ============================================================
-- 020: Smart Logging — Cycle Tracing + LLM Usage Tracking
-- ============================================================

-- Cycle tracing on agent_activity
ALTER TABLE agent_activity ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS cycle_id UUID;
ALTER TABLE agent_activity ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS phase TEXT;
ALTER TABLE agent_activity ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS duration_ms INTEGER;
ALTER TABLE agent_activity ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS log_level TEXT DEFAULT 'info';

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_agent_activity_cycle
  ON agent_activity(cycle_id)
  WHERE cycle_id IS NOT NULL;

-- LLM cost tracking
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS llm_usage (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  cycle_id UUID,
  model TEXT NOT NULL,
  purpose TEXT NOT NULL,
  prompt_tokens INTEGER,
  completion_tokens INTEGER,
  total_cost NUMERIC(10,6),
  latency_ms INTEGER,
  retries INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

-- RLS
ALTER TABLE llm_usage ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users see own llm_usage"
  ON llm_usage FOR SELECT
  USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

CREATE POLICY "Service can insert llm_usage"
  ON llm_usage FOR INSERT
  WITH CHECK (true);

CREATE INDEX idx_llm_usage_user_created
  ON llm_usage(user_id, created_at DESC);

CREATE INDEX idx_llm_usage_cycle
  ON llm_usage(cycle_id)
  WHERE cycle_id IS NOT NULL;

-- 021_security_hardening.sql
-- Fix all Supabase linter errors and warnings:
--   1. Enable RLS on 4 unprotected tables
--   2. Fix auth_rls_initplan: wrap auth.uid() in (select ...) for all policies
--   3. Set search_path on 5 functions
--   4. Tighten overly permissive RLS policies

BEGIN;

-- ============================================================
-- 1. ENABLE RLS + ADD POLICIES FOR UNPROTECTED TABLES
-- ============================================================

-- carrier_blasts
ALTER TABLE carrier_blasts ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can manage own carrier_blasts"
  ON carrier_blasts FOR ALL
  USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- agent_drafts
ALTER TABLE agent_drafts ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can manage own agent_drafts"
  ON agent_drafts FOR ALL
  USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- agent_settings
ALTER TABLE agent_settings ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can manage own agent_settings"
  ON agent_settings FOR ALL
  USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- agent_activity
ALTER TABLE agent_activity ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can manage own agent_activity"
  ON agent_activity FOR ALL
  USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 2. FIX auth_rls_initplan — DROP + RECREATE WITH (select auth.uid())
-- ============================================================

-- profiles
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view own profile" ON profiles;
CREATE POLICY "Users can view own profile" ON profiles
  FOR SELECT USING ((select auth.uid()) = id);

DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can update own profile" ON profiles;
CREATE POLICY "Users can update own profile" ON profiles
  FOR UPDATE USING ((select auth.uid()) = id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = id);

-- accounts
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view own accounts" ON accounts;
CREATE POLICY "Users can view own accounts" ON accounts
  FOR SELECT USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can insert own accounts" ON accounts;
CREATE POLICY "Users can insert own accounts" ON accounts
  FOR INSERT WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can update own accounts" ON accounts;
CREATE POLICY "Users can update own accounts" ON accounts
  FOR UPDATE USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- emails
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view own emails" ON emails;
CREATE POLICY "Users can view own emails" ON emails
  FOR SELECT USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can insert own emails" ON emails;
CREATE POLICY "Users can insert own emails" ON emails
  FOR INSERT WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can update own emails" ON emails;
CREATE POLICY "Users can update own emails" ON emails
  FOR UPDATE USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- sync_state
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can view own sync state" ON sync_state;
CREATE POLICY "Users can view own sync state" ON sync_state
  FOR SELECT USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Users can insert own sync state" ON sync_state;
CREATE POLICY "Users can insert own sync state" ON sync_state
  FOR INSERT WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

  FOR UPDATE USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

  FOR SELECT USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

  FOR INSERT WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

  FOR UPDATE USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id)
  WITH CHECK ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- email_connections (column is tenant_id)

  FOR ALL USING (tenant_id = (select auth.uid()))
  WITH CHECK (tenant_id = (select auth.uid()));

  WITH CHECK (tenant_id = (select auth.uid()));

  FOR DELETE USING (tenant_id = (select auth.uid()));

  FOR SELECT USING ((select auth.uid()) = user_id);

-- ============================================================
-- 3. TIGHTEN ALWAYS-TRUE RLS POLICIES
--    Replace WITH CHECK (true) with service_role-only access
-- ============================================================

-- llm_usage: service insert should be restricted to service_role
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Service can insert llm_usage" ON llm_usage;
CREATE POLICY "Service can insert llm_usage" ON llm_usage
  FOR INSERT TO service_role
  WITH CHECK (true);

-- quote_board_loads: service manage should be restricted to service_role
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Service can manage quote board loads" ON quote_board_loads;
CREATE POLICY "Service can manage quote board loads" ON quote_board_loads
  FOR ALL TO service_role
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

-- quote_board_quotes: service manage should be restricted to service_role
DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "Service can manage quote board quotes" ON quote_board_quotes;
CREATE POLICY "Service can manage quote board quotes" ON quote_board_quotes
  FOR ALL TO service_role
  USING (true)
  WITH CHECK (true);

-- ============================================================
-- 4. FIX MUTABLE SEARCH_PATH ON FUNCTIONS
-- ============================================================

ALTER FUNCTION get_email_counts(UUID) SET search_path = public;
ALTER FUNCTION get_email_analytics(UUID, TIMESTAMPTZ) SET search_path = public;
ALTER FUNCTION update_updated_at() SET search_path = public;
ALTER FUNCTION update_quoted_loads_updated_at() SET search_path = public;
ALTER FUNCTION handle_new_user() SET search_path = public;

COMMIT;

-- ============================================================

-- This lets us track AI spend directly in the activity table
-- instead of relying on a separate llm_usage table + buffer.
-- ============================================================

ALTER TABLE ai_activity_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS model TEXT;
ALTER TABLE ai_activity_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS prompt_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE ai_activity_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completion_tokens INTEGER DEFAULT 0;
ALTER TABLE ai_activity_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS latency_ms INTEGER;
ALTER TABLE ai_activity_log ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS purpose TEXT;

-- Index for cost analytics queries
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_activity_log_cost
  ON ai_activity_log(tenant_id, created_at DESC)
  WHERE cost > 0;

-- Allow service_role to insert (agent + trackLlmCall use service client)

  FOR INSERT TO service_role
  WITH CHECK (true);

FILE: supabase/migrations/023_quote_board_v2.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 023: Quote Board v2 — TTMS order cache + vapi realtime
--
-- Caches TTMS order details locally (24h TTL) to eliminate
-- repeated external API calls during quote board refresh.
-- Also enables Realtime on vapi_call_extractions.
-- ============================================================

-- Cache TTMS order details (routes, equipment, rates, past carriers)
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ttms_order_cache (
  tenant_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES profiles(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  order_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  load_info JSONB NOT NULL,
  past_carriers JSONB DEFAULT '[]',
  fetched_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
  PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, order_id)
);

-- RLS
ALTER TABLE ttms_order_cache ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users can read own order cache"
  ON ttms_order_cache FOR SELECT
  USING (tenant_id = auth.uid());

CREATE POLICY "Service can manage order cache"
  ON ttms_order_cache FOR ALL
  USING (true) WITH CHECK (true);

-- Enable Realtime on vapi_call_extractions (was missing)
ALTER PUBLICATION supabase_realtime ADD TABLE vapi_call_extractions;



================================================
FILE: supabase/migrations/024_custom_tags.sql
================================================
-- Add SHIPPER_STATUS to email_category enum
ALTER TYPE email_category ADD VALUE IF NOT EXISTS 'SHIPPER_STATUS';

-- Custom tags: user-defined email tags with AI-powered auto-reply

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS custom_tags (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  UNIQUE(user_id, name)
);

ALTER TABLE custom_tags ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

CREATE POLICY "Users manage own custom tags"
  ON custom_tags FOR ALL
  USING (user_id = auth.uid());

-- Add custom_tag column to emails (nullable — only set when user applies a custom tag)
ALTER TABLE emails ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS custom_tag TEXT DEFAULT NULL;

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_emails_custom_tag ON emails(user_id, custom_tag) WHERE custom_tag IS NOT NULL;



================================================
FILE: supabase/migrations/025_quote_board_pod_scope.sql
================================================
-- ============================================================
-- Migration 025: Quote Board Pod Scoping
--
-- Adds in_user_pod column to quote_board_loads so pod users
-- only see loads belonging to their pod on the quote board.
-- NULL = no pod (user sees everything), true = in pod, false = not in pod.
-- ============================================================

ALTER TABLE quote_board_loads
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS in_user_pod BOOLEAN DEFAULT NULL;

-- Index for fast filtered reads
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_qb_loads_pod_scope
  ON quote_board_loads(tenant_id, in_user_pod)
  WHERE in_user_pod IS NOT NULL;



================================================
FILE: supabase/migrations/026_vapi_ai_rate.sql
================================================
-- Add ai_rate column to vapi_call_extractions
-- Stores the rate our AI offered to the carrier (separate from carrier's counter in `rate`)
ALTER TABLE vapi_call_extractions ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_rate NUMERIC(12,2);
